title_en: 3 CHOUME NO TAMA - TAMA AND FRIENDS - 3 CHOUME OBAKE PANIC!!
no_intro_name: 3 Choume no Tama - Tama and Friends - 3 Choume Obake Panic!! (Japan)
overview_en: 3 Choume no Tama: Tama and Friends - 3 Choume Obake Panic!! is a Japanese exclusive Game Boy game based on the Tama and Friends anime series. The game puts you in control of the series protagonist, the energetic cat Tama, as you walk around town dodging cars and entering houses and other locations, which usually lead to various minigames.
overview_zh: 《3丁目のタマ：Tama and Friends - 3丁目妖怪 Panic!!》是僅在日本發行的 Game Boy 遊戲，改編自動畫《3丁目のタマ》系列。玩家操作主角——活力滿點的小貓 Tama——在街上行走，閃避車輛並進入民宅與其他地點，這些場所通常會引發各式各樣的小遊戲。

overview_en: 4-in-1 Fun Pak combines four board games to play against the CPU or a fellow gamer. The include titles are Chess, Checkers, Reversi and Backgammon. Each game features a number of different difficulty settings (1 being the easiest, 6 being the hardest), with simple black and white visuals and a challenging CPU opponent to take on. Multiplayer is available, either using the same Nintendo Game Boy between two players or using the system link option to play with two Nintendo Game Boys.
overview_zh: 《4-in-1 Fun Pak》將四款棋盤遊戲合而為一，可與電腦或另一名玩家對戰。收錄項目為西洋棋、跳棋、黑白棋與西洋雙陸棋。每款遊戲提供多種難度設定（1 為最簡單，6 為最難），畫面是簡潔的黑白風格，並具備頗具挑戰性的電腦對手。多人遊戲可在同一台 Game Boy 上對戰，亦可使用通信線連接兩台 Game Boy 進行對戰。

overview_en: 4-in-1 Funpak: Volume II gives you, like its predecessor, four family-friendly games in one cart.  The games are Solitaire, Dominoes, Cribbage and Yacht (using Yahtzee's rules). You can play against the CPU or a second player, using the same Game Boy or, if you have the game link cable, two Nintendo Game Boys. Unlike the previous cart, there is no skill selection.
overview_zh: 《4-in-1 Funpak: Volume II》與前作相同，將四款適合全家同樂的遊戲收錄於同一卡帶中。遊戲內容包括接龍、骨牌、Cribbage 與 Yacht（採用 Yahtzee 規則）。可與電腦或第二位玩家對戰，可使用同一台 Game Boy，或是透過通信線連接兩台 Game Boy。與前一卡帶不同的是，本作沒有難度選擇。

overview_en: Aa Harimanada (ああ播磨灘) is a 1993 sumo wrestling sports game, developed by Atelier Double and published by ASK, which was released in Japan in 1993.
overview_zh: 《ああ播磨灘》是 1993 年的相撲運動遊戲，由 Atelier Double 開發、ASK 發行，於 1993 年在日本推出。

title_en: ADDAMS FAMILY, THE - PUGSLEY'S SCAVENGER HUNT
no_intro_name: Addams Family, The - Pugsley's Scavenger Hunt (USA, Europe)

overview_en:
Adventure Island is a 1991 Game Boy video game developed by Now Production and released by Hudson Soft USA in the USA on December 27, 1991.

In the South Pacific, Master Higgins lives peacefully wearing only a grass skirt and a cap. That is until the Evil Witch Doctor decides to capture the Princess Leilani and hold her as his own. It's up to Master Higgins to gather throwing axes, fireballs and skateboards in order to aid his noble quest.

Master Higgins moves across the screen from left to right and finds his power-ups in giant eggs. This includes a skateboard which results in a great speed enhancement - until Master Higgins gets hit and loses his power. If he is not on a skateboard a hit means instant death. Another game mechanic is starvation which gets indicated through a meter which steadily decreases. If it hits zero the hero dies and the only way to fill it up is by collecting food on the way. Bosses await him at the end of levels, all the way to the Evil Witch Doctor himself.
overview_zh:
《Adventure Island》是 1991 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Now Production 開發，Hudson Soft USA 於 1991 年 12 月 27 日在美國發行。

在南太平洋，希金斯先生只穿著草裙與帽子過著平靜的生活。直到邪惡巫醫決定擄走萊拉妮公主並佔為己有為止。希金斯先生必須收集投擲斧、火球與滑板，踏上拯救公主的高貴旅程。

希金斯先生會由畫面左方往右方移動，並在巨蛋中找到強化道具。其中包含可大幅提升速度的滑板——但希金斯先生只要被擊中就會失去能力。若沒有滑板，被擊中即立即死亡。另一項機制是飢餓度，畫面上會顯示一道穩定下降的計量條。歸零時主角便會死亡，唯一補充的方式是沿途收集食物。各關尾端皆有頭目等候，最後將迎戰邪惡巫醫本人。

title_en: ADVENTURE ISLAND II - ALIENS IN PARADISE
no_intro_name: Adventure Island II - Aliens in Paradise (USA, Europe)
overview_en:
Adventure Island II: Aliens in Paradise is a 1993 Game Boy video game developed by Now Production and released by Hudson Soft USA in the USA on February 1, 1993.

A mysterious flying saucer just made off with Master Higgins' girlfriend and it's up to him to save her! But first he must defeat scores of mutated monsters across eight uncharted islands! Battle your way across all new dangers and challenges on the biggest Adventure Island yet! Find secret treasure chambers, surf through killer waves and grab all the bonus items you can handle as you master each realm! Action, adventure and more await you in this thrilling addition to the Adventure Island saga!
overview_zh:
《Adventure Island II: Aliens in Paradise》是 1993 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Now Production 開發，Hudson Soft USA 於 1993 年 2 月 1 日在美國發行。

一艘神秘的飛碟剛擄走了希金斯先生的女友，而拯救她的責任就落在他肩上！但他得先擊敗八座未知島嶼上眾多的變種怪物！在《Adventure Island》系列史上規模最大的一作中，迎擊全新危機與挑戰！找出秘寶藏室、衝過致命浪濤，並沿途盡情收集獎勵道具，征服每一個領域！動作、冒險與更多刺激體驗，都在這部令人熱血沸騰的續作中等候。

overview_en: Prince Lolo of Gentryland visited Eden, a country of love and peace, and enjoyed many pleasant days with Princess Lala of Eden. But one day, Egger, the King of Darkness, who had an evil plot to conquer Eden, spirited the Princess away before Lolo's eyes. After a long and difficult journey, Lolo has come to the evil Castle of the Labyrinth. The castle is guarded by an army of evil monsters led by Egger, the King of Darkness. Can Lolo solve the seemingly endless series of mazes and save Lala? Lolo is not gifted with strength or agility, but has great courage and patience. Now the battle of wits begins. Good luck, Lolo!
overview_zh: Gentryland 的 Lolo 王子造訪了愛與和平之國 Eden，並與 Eden 的 Lala 公主度過了許多愉快的日子。然而某天，懷有征服 Eden 邪惡企圖的暗黑王 Egger，竟在 Lolo 眼前擄走了公主。歷經漫長艱辛的旅途後，Lolo 終於來到邪惡的迷宮城堡。城堡由暗黑王 Egger 率領的怪物大軍把守。Lolo 能否破解這彷彿無止盡的迷宮、救出 Lala？Lolo 沒有過人的力量或敏捷，但有十足的勇氣與耐心。鬥智之戰，現在開始。Lolo，祝你好運！

title_en: ADVENTURES OF ROCKY AND BULLWINKLE AND FRIENDS, THE
no_intro_name: Adventures of Rocky and Bullwinkle and Friends, The (USA)
Adventures of Star Saver, The (USA, Europe)
publisher:
King Records JP
Taito Corporation NA/EU

overview_en: After the end of the Sixth World War, the Earth has been rendered inhospitable and uninhabitable by humanity. The Intergalactic Council ruled that Earth could once again be used by humans and sent people there to restore civilization there. Meanwhile, mutants have prospered in the long-lost wastelands of Earth and were unwilling to allow the humans to have it again. The Intergalactic Council has sent in a lone fighter called Aerostar to defend the Earth from a second act of total destruction.
overview_zh: 第六次世界大戰結束後，地球已被人類折騰得無法居住。星際議會裁定地球可重新供人類使用，並派遣人員前往復興文明。同時，變種生物在荒廢已久的地球大地上繁衍興盛，不願讓人類再次擁有地球。星際議會於是派出一名孤身戰士「Aerostar」，捍衛地球免於再度遭受全面毀滅。

overview_en:
Action game with dinosaurs, originally released in Australia.

It is essentially the same game as Baby T-Rex, We're Back: A Dinosaur's Story and Bamse.
overview_zh:
以恐龍為題材的動作遊戲，原作於澳洲推出。

本作實際上與《Baby T-Rex》、《We're Back: A Dinosaur's Story》以及《Bamse》是同一款遊戲。

title_en: AKUMAJOU DRACULA - SHIKKOKU TARU ZENSOUKYOKU - DARK NIGHT PRELUDE
no_intro_name: Akumajou Dracula - Shikkoku Taru Zensoukyoku - Dark Night Prelude (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en:
The player takes the role of a chicken named Alfred who must find his way through bizarre levels full of balloons, telephones, cheese and other strange elements. While he is on the ground, Alfred can walk, jump, and peck balloons and ground switches. While he is in the air he can dive bomb enemies or springs. Dive bombing enemies will destroy them. Dive bombing springs will bounce Alfred much higher so he can reach platforms well above his normal jumping ability. If he does not hit an enemy or a spring, Alfred will get stuck in the ground for a short time.

To complete a level, Alfred must find and peck all the balloons. The last balloon will take him to a boss fight. If Alfred dies, he starts as an egg located at the last balloon pecked.

Alfred can receive a few powerups during the game. For one power up, he must answer a telephone in secret areas to make Mr Pekles (a giant flower) give him a pot of jam. The jam gives Alfred the ability to shoot a bomb (about the size of Alfred himself) which bounces around the screen collecting things and hurting enemies. Another power up is a worm that spins around Alfred destroying enemies that it touches. You must find a can of worms to get this power up.
overview_zh:
玩家操作一隻名為 Alfred 的小雞，必須穿越充滿氣球、電話、起司等怪異元素的奇特關卡。Alfred 在地面上可以行走、跳躍，並啄擊氣球與地面開關。在空中時則可以俯衝攻擊敵人或彈簧。俯衝撞上敵人會將其消滅；俯衝撞上彈簧則會把 Alfred 彈得更高，使他能抵達正常跳躍無法企及的平台。若沒撞到敵人或彈簧，Alfred 會短暫卡在地面。

要通關，Alfred 必須找出並啄破所有氣球。最後一個氣球會把他帶往頭目戰。如果 Alfred 死亡，他會在最後啄破的氣球處重生為蛋。

Alfred 在遊戲中可獲得幾種強化道具。其中之一是必須在隱藏區域中接聽電話，讓 Mr Pekles（一朵巨大的花）給予一罐果醬。果醬讓 Alfred 能發射一顆與自身差不多大的炸彈，在畫面中彈跳並收集物品、傷害敵人。另一項強化道具是會繞著 Alfred 旋轉、消滅碰觸到的敵人的蠕蟲。要取得此道具，必須找到一罐蠕蟲。

overview_en:
The Game Boy version of Alien³ differs significantly from the console games based on the third Alien film. Unlike the more shooter-oriented action on the consoles, this title is played from a top-down perspective, with a greater emphasis on exploration, acquiring items to beat limited puzzles, and survival.

As Ripley, you must navigate the corridors of the Fury 161 prison, searching for items to aid your escape. Unlike the film it is based on, multiple Aliens are running loose and attacking the prisoners, plus an Alien Queen nesting in the furnace. The player must map out the labyrinthine halls and ventilation systems to easily move around the complex. They must also find weapons to defend Ripley from the Aliens, along with a flamethrower and fuel to torch their eggs. Only after destroying the Queen and her eggs, may Ripley activate the crashed escape pod and leave the planet.
overview_zh:
Game Boy 版的《Alien³》與其他以第三部《異形》電影為基礎的家用主機版本有顯著差異。不同於主機版偏射擊的玩法，本作採俯瞰視角，更著重探索、取得道具以解開有限的謎題以及生存要素。

玩家扮演 Ripley，必須穿梭於 Fury 161 監獄走廊間，尋找助於逃脫的物品。與電影不同的是，本作有多隻異形四處逃竄並攻擊囚犯，加上一隻在熔爐中築巢的異形女王。玩家須探明錯綜複雜的走廊與通風管道，方便在設施中移動，並必須找到武器以保護 Ripley，包括火焰噴射器與燃料以焚燒異形蛋。唯有在擊敗女王並摧毀其卵後，Ripley 才能啟動墜毀的逃生艙離開該行星。

title_en: ALIEN VS PREDATOR - THE LAST OF HIS CLAN
no_intro_name: Alien vs Predator - The Last of His Clan (USA)
overview_en:
In the year 2593, on the planet Alpha Centauri 3, Predators looking for a hunting ground plant Alien eggs. The Aliens soon hatch and wipe out the human population. However, when the Predators move in for the hunt, they find they are vastly outnumbered and suffer the same fate. Only one of them survives. He theorizes that among the hatched Aliens there was a queen that laid additional eggs, which would explain the huge number of Aliens. The last survivor sets out to destroy the queen and regain the honor of his clan.

The Predator must traverse several side-scrolling levels on his way to the queen, while destroying Aliens in all their forms - facehuggers hatched from eggs, chestburster aliens and fully grown warriors. Various weapons are available: the standard weapon are the wrist blades. Ammunition for the shoulder cannon, the cutting disks and bombs must be picked up. The bombs not only work as weapons but can also be used to destroy barriers. To avoid a fight altogether, the Predator can also use his invisibility system, which runs down the energy supply. To recharge it, energy powerups must be collected. Also hidden in the levels are keys that open up doors blocking the way into the next area. A small radar map helps in navigating the maze-like corridors and also displays approaching enemies.
overview_zh:
西元 2593 年，鐵血戰士為尋找狩獵場，在半人馬座 α 第三行星上播下異形蛋。異形隨後孵化，將人類消滅殆盡。然而當鐵血戰士進場狩獵時，卻發現自己人數遠遠不及，最終也遭到同樣下場。僅有一名戰士倖存。他推測孵化的異形中有一隻女王在持續產卵，這才能解釋異形數量為何如此龐大。最後的倖存者於是踏上消滅女王、為族人挽回榮耀的旅程。

鐵血戰士必須穿越多個橫向卷軸關卡前往女王所在處，沿途消滅各種型態的異形——從蛋中孵化的抱臉體、破胸體幼異形，以及成年戰士。可使用多種武器：標準武器為腕刃；肩砲、切割飛盤與炸彈的彈藥則需拾取。炸彈不僅可作為武器，亦能用來破壞障礙物。鐵血戰士也可啟動隱形系統來避戰，但會消耗能量；若要回復，需收集能量道具。關卡中亦藏有開啟通往下個區域的門所需的鑰匙。一張小型雷達地圖有助於在迷宮般的走廊中導航，並會顯示靠近的敵人。

overview_en:
All-Star Baseball 99 is the first handheld entry in the All-Star Baseball series and differs from its N64 counterpart.

The game features six different modes: exhibition games, a full season (either all 162 games of the 1998 season or various shortened runs), the '97 playoffs, the '97 All-Star game as well as the Home Run Derby, and a batting practice mode. In season and playoff mode, progress is saved via passwords.

On the field, players will control pitching, fielding and batting (bunts and swings are possible). The game also allows players to set team lineups and positions.

The game includes all 30 MLB teams of the 1998 season, including the '98 expansion teams Arizona and Tampa Bay.
overview_zh:
《All-Star Baseball 99》是該系列首款掌機作品，與 N64 版有所不同。

本作收錄六種模式：表演賽、完整賽季（1998 年完整 162 場或多種縮減賽程）、'97 季後賽、'97 全明星賽以及全壘打大賽，還有打擊練習模式。賽季與季後賽模式以密碼方式儲存進度。

場上玩家可控制投球、守備與打擊（可短打與揮擊），亦可調整球隊先發名單與守備位置。

遊戲收錄 1998 年球季全 30 支 MLB 球隊，包含當年新增的擴張球隊亞利桑那與坦帕灣。

overview_en:
Alleyway is a 1989 Game Boy video game developed by Nintendo R&D1 and Intelligent Systems and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on July 31, 1989.

Interstellar ping-pong with a deadly energy ball! Your spaceship is at the gate of the Alleyway. Use your vessel to repel the energy ball. Atomize space grids with your return shots. Destroy the entire field and move on to even more challenging targets. You're in command in the Alleyway!
overview_zh:
《Alleyway》是 1989 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由任天堂 R&D1 與 Intelligent Systems 開發，Nintendo of America 於 1989 年 7 月 31 日在美國發行。

以致命能量球進行的星際乒乓！你的太空船停在 Alleyway 入口處。用船身將能量球反彈出去，以擊回的球粉碎太空格網。摧毀整個場地，挑戰更具挑戰的目標。在 Alleyway，主導權就在你手上！

overview_en: The player is an astronaut trapped on an alien spaceship who has to try to find his way out while avoiding aliens and continually replenishing his oxygen supply. This was the first isometric view game on the Game Boy
overview_zh: 玩家扮演被困在外星太空船上的太空人，必須一邊閃避外星人、一邊持續補充氧氣，設法找到逃出之路。本作為 Game Boy 上首款採用等角視角的遊戲。
publisher:
Sony Imagesoft NA
Epic/Sony Records JP
Hi Tech Expressions EU

overview_en:
The character controls a penguin who must clear 40 levels worth of action. There are a certain amount of lines with switches and dots that need activating.[3] Once all the lines are cleared, so are any enemies that are remaining in that level. A strict time limit make players lose their lives in addition to bumping into an enemy.

There is no regularity to the movement of the character, giving an element of luck to the game. Some aspects of background graphics appear in certain levels (especially on levels 12, 20, 28, and 36).  Level 40 is essentially a giant maze which leads up to a castle that ends the game.
overview_zh:
玩家操作一隻企鵝，必須通過 40 關的動作關卡。場上有一定數量的線段、開關與點需要啟動。一旦所有線段被清除，該關卡剩下的敵人也會一併被消滅。嚴格的時間限制與碰撞敵人都會使玩家失去生命。

角色的移動沒有規律性，為遊戲增添了一些運氣成分。某些關卡會出現背景圖案（特別是第 12、20、28、36 關）。第 40 關本質上是一座巨大迷宮，最終會通往結束遊戲的城堡。

title_en: AMERICA OUDAN ULTRA QUIZ PART 3 - CHAMPION TAIKAI
no_intro_name: America Oudan Ultra Quiz Part 3 - Champion Taikai (Japan)

overview_en: Animal Breeder is the first entry in the Japanese Animal Breeder series.
overview_zh: 《Animal Breeder》是日本《Animal Breeder》系列的首作。

overview_en: Animal Breeder 2 is the second entry in the Japanese Animal Breeder franchise.
overview_zh: 《Animal Breeder 2》是日本《Animal Breeder》系列的第二作。

overview_en:
A lot of trouble is popping up at Warner Bros. Studio!

Yakko, Wakko and Dot are out of the water tower and running wild across the movie sets of "Bungle in the Jungle", "Remember the A La Mode" and "To Scream or Not to Scream". Guide their hilarious hijinks to find power-ups and avoid crazy traps like catapults, runaway trains, and giant boulders. Use each character's special abilities and unique talents on your quest to collect the key movie props on each set!
overview_zh:
華納兄弟片廠麻煩接二連三！

Yakko、Wakko 與 Dot 衝出水塔，在《Bungle in the Jungle》、《Remember the A La Mode》與《To Scream or Not to Scream》等片場上四處撒野。引導他們在搞笑胡鬧中尋找強化道具，並閃避投石機、失控火車與巨石等瘋狂陷阱。在收集每個片場關鍵電影道具的旅程中，善用每個角色的特殊能力與獨特天賦！

overview_en: Taking place in the world of Granas, there was once a great war between humans and demons. After a long conflict peace was restored between humans and demons. Eventually a demon cult appears and call out to the demons to free themselves of the humans, and so the demons began to oppose the humans. The protagonist, Cassiel, lost his parents and decides to abandon his hometown to travel. After rescuing the heroine, Pyutia, their journey becomes one geared towards saving the world.
overview_zh: 故事舞台位於 Granas 世界，過去人類與惡魔之間曾爆發過一場大戰。在漫長的衝突後，雙方終於恢復和平。然而後來出現了一個惡魔教派，呼籲惡魔擺脫人類束縛，於是惡魔再度起而對抗人類。主角 Cassiel 失去了雙親，決定離開故鄉踏上旅途。在拯救女主角 Pyutia 之後，他們的旅程也轉變為拯救世界的使命。

overview_en: Aoki Densetsu Shoot! is a soccer management and simulation game released on both the Super Nintendo and the Game Boy. Aoki Densetsu Shoot! was developed by Affect and published by Banpresto (Game Boy version) and KSS (Super Nintendo version). Aoki Densetsu Shoot! is based on an anime of the same name.
overview_zh: 《蒼き伝説シュート!》是一款於 Super Nintendo 與 Game Boy 上推出的足球經營與模擬遊戲。本作由 Affect 開發，Banpresto 發行 Game Boy 版、KSS 發行 Super Nintendo 版，改編自同名動畫。

title_en: ARCADE CLASSIC NO. 1 - ASTEROIDS _ MISSILE COMMAND
no_intro_name: Arcade Classic No. 1 - Asteroids _ Missile Command (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en:
This is a compilation of two classic arcade games on one pack:
•Asteroids
•Missile Command
overview_zh:
本作是兩款經典街機遊戲合輯：
• Asteroids（小行星）
• Missile Command（飛彈指揮官）

no_intro_name: Arcade Classic No. 2 - Centipede _ Millipede (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en: Centipede The Forest is Crawling with Critter Chaos! The forest is swarming with tormenting fleas, lethal scorpions and the dreaded Centipedes. Exterminate this insect battalion or they'll eat you for lunch! Millipede The Garden is Infested with Insect Insanity! A poisonous mushroom garden has been invaded by an army of creepy crawlers! Zap menacing Millipedes, jumping spiders, and nasty earwigs before they multiply into an insect epidemic! - Two classic insect-zapping games on one Game Boy cartridge! - The farther these bug-infested games advance, the faster the mania becomes! - Select a starting score and earn bonus lives in ten levels of challenge! - Programmed to take full advantage of Super Game Boy features!
overview_zh: Centipede 森林裡蟲蟲大亂鬥！森林中蟄伏著討厭的跳蚤、致命的蠍子，以及令人聞風喪膽的蜈蚣。把這群昆蟲大軍消滅殆盡，否則就要被牠們吞噬！Millipede 花園遭蟲群入侵！毒蘑菇花園被一群令人毛骨悚然的爬蟲入侵！趕在牠們繁殖成蟲災前，擊倒兇猛的千足蟲、跳蛛與惡毒的蠼螋！— 兩款經典消蟲遊戲集結於同一張 Game Boy 卡帶！— 越深入這些蟲滿為患的關卡，瘋狂程度也越高！— 可選擇起始分數，並在十關挑戰中累積額外生命！— 充分支援 Super Game Boy 機能！

no_intro_name: Arcade Classic No. 3 - Galaga _ Galaxian (USA) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en:
This is a compilation of two classic arcade games on one pack:
•Galaga
•Galaxian
overview_zh:
本作是兩款經典街機遊戲合輯：
• Galaga
• Galaxian

no_intro_name: Arcade Classic No. 4 - Defender _ Joust (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en:
This is a compilation of two classic arcade games on one pack:
•Defender
•Joust
overview_zh:
本作是兩款經典街機遊戲合輯：
• Defender
• Joust

no_intro_name: Arcade Classics - Super Breakout _ Battlezone (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en:
Battlezone:
 A standard enemy tank in the player's sights in the military training version The Bradley Trainer.
Gameplay is on a plain with a mountainous horizon featuring a memorable erupting volcano, distant crescent moon, and various geometric solids (in vector outline) like pyramids and blocks. The player views the screen, which includes an overhead radar view to find and destroy the rather slow tanks, or the faster moving supertanks. Saucer-shaped UFOs and guided missiles occasionally appear for a bonus opportunity. The saucers differ from the tanks in that they do not fire upon the player, and do not appear on radar. The player can hide behind the solids or maneuver in rapid turns once fired on to buy time with which to fire himself. Common play in the US could run from 25 cents to a dollar per game, depending on machine setting. The typical setting is for 25 cent play, with three tanks.

A standard enemy tank is worth 1,000 points, a supertank 3,000 points, and the flying saucer 5,000 points. The guided missile is worth 2,000 points when destroyed. Each of these targets can be destroyed with a single shot from the player's tank. An extra life is awarded when the player's score reaches 15,000 points, and a further tank is then awarded at 100,000 points. No additional tanks are awarded until the score counter rolls over at ten million, and additional bonus tanks are again awarded at indicated scores of 15,000 and 100,000. The game only includes one hostile enemy on the game board at all times; the player never has to battle two enemy tanks at once, or a tank and guided missile. The UFO can appear on the screen at the same time as an enemy tank, and it can occasionally be destroyed by enemy fire.

The geometric solid obstacles are indestructible, and can block the movement of a player's tank. However, they are also useful as shields as they also block enemy fire as well.

There was a bug in some machines which caused very high phony scores into the seven digits to be posted (after a player would enter his initials). Good players could actually reach this level after an hour or two of play.


SUPER BREAKOUT:
In Super Breakout, there are three different and more advanced game types from which the player can choose:
Double gives the player control of two bats at the same time—one placed above the other—and two balls. Losing a life occurs only when both balls go out of play, and points are doubled while the player is able to juggle both balls without losing either.
Cavity retains the single bat and ball of Breakout, but two other balls are enclosed on the other side of the wall, which the player must free before they, too, can be used to destroy additional bricks. Points are increased for this, but triple points are available if the player can keep all three balls in play.
Progressive also has the single bat and ball, but as the ball hits the paddle, the entire wall gradually advances downwards step by step, gaining in speed the longer the ball lasts in play.
overview_zh:
Battlezone：
軍方訓練版本「The Bradley Trainer」中，玩家正瞄準一輛標準敵方戰車。
遊戲場景為一片平原，地平線上有山脈，以及讓人印象深刻的噴發火山、遠方的弦月，與多種幾何立體圖形（以線框繪製），如金字塔與方塊等。畫面包含俯瞰雷達視窗，可用以尋找並摧毀行動較慢的戰車或速度較快的超級戰車。飛碟形 UFO 與導向飛彈會偶爾出現提供加分機會。飛碟與戰車不同的是不會射擊玩家，也不會出現在雷達上。玩家可躲在立體障礙物後方，或在被攻擊時急轉以爭取反擊時間。在美國的常見投幣設定為 25 美分至 1 美元一局，標準設定為 25 美分、三輛戰車。

標準敵方戰車值 1,000 分，超級戰車 3,000 分，飛碟 5,000 分。導向飛彈被擊毀可得 2,000 分。所有目標皆能被玩家戰車一發擊毀。玩家分數達 15,000 分時可獲得一輛額外戰車，達 100,000 分時再獲一輛。在計分跳到一千萬重置之前不會再追加，重置後再次以 15,000 與 100,000 分為門檻發放。場上同時最多只會出現一個敵人，玩家不必同時對付兩輛戰車或戰車加飛彈。UFO 可與敵方戰車同時出現於畫面上，偶爾還會被敵方火力擊落。

幾何立體障礙物無法被摧毀，會擋住玩家戰車的移動，但同樣可作為掩體擋住敵方火力。

部分機台存在 Bug，可能在玩家輸入縮寫後出現高達七位數的虛假分數。技術好的玩家其實可以靠一兩小時的遊玩達到這個分數。

SUPER BREAKOUT：
《Super Breakout》提供三種比原版更進階的玩法供玩家選擇：
Double：玩家同時控制兩支球拍（上下排列）與兩顆球。只有兩顆球都掉出畫面才會失去一條命，且在能同時操作兩顆球的期間，得分加倍。
Cavity：保留原版《Breakout》的單拍單球，但牆的另一側封閉著另兩顆球，玩家須先把它們解放出來才能用以擊破更多磚塊。此模式得分加倍，若能同時讓三顆球留在場上則可獲三倍分數。
Progressive：同樣是單拍單球，但每當球擊中球拍，整面牆便會逐步往下推進，球停留時間越長速度越快。
publisher:
Black Pearl Software NA
Atari EU

overview_en: Twin princesses were born in the Kingdom of Aretha, which benefits from the gods. The princesses were named Materia and Emilita, respectively, and were blessed by the people. However, at that time, a gold dragon suddenly appears and kidnaps Emilita. In turn, the Demon King Howard's army attacked the Kingdom of Aretha, killing King Riperton and leaving another princess missing. Time goes by, and Floyd, who picked up and raised the baby Materia, informed him of his upbringing and set out on a journey to defeat the Demon King Howard.
overview_zh: 在受神祇庇佑的 Aretha 王國誕生了一對雙胞胎公主，分別被命名為 Materia 與 Emilita，並受到人民祝福。然而就在此時，一頭金龍突然現身擄走了 Emilita。緊接著，魔王 Howard 的軍隊攻擊 Aretha 王國，殺害 Riperton 國王，另一位公主也下落不明。時光流逝，撿到 Materia 並將其撫養長大的 Floyd 告知她身世，於是她踏上擊敗魔王 Howard 的旅程。

overview_en:
A Japan-exclusive turn-based RPG game for the Super Famicom and Game Boy.

Aretha II: Ariel no Fushigi na Tabi ("Aretha II: Ariel's Mysterious Journey") is a role-playing game developed by Japan Art Media and published by Yanoman Corporation for the Super Famicom platform. It is the sequel to the first Super Famicom Aretha. Ariel is once again called into action to save her friends Kyle and Doll (Dole) from peril.

The game has a novel equipment creation system that uses the colored souls of enemies to craft new gear depending on the configuration of colors the player uses. The player's party is dictated by the player's place in the story with characters joining and leaving at various points, similar to Final Fantasy IV. The eponymous heroine is the only constant.

The game should not be confused with Aretha II for the Game Boy. The original three Game Boy Aretha games were released several years earlier and have a separate arching storyline, following the adventures of the eponymous princess Aretha.
overview_zh:
Super Famicom 與 Game Boy 上日本獨佔的回合制 RPG。

《Aretha II: アリエルの不思議な旅》是由 Japan Art Media 開發、Yanoman 發行的 Super Famicom RPG，為首作 Super Famicom 版《Aretha》的續作。Ariel 再次被召喚，要從危難中拯救夥伴 Kyle 與 Doll（Dole）。

本作擁有別出心裁的裝備製作系統，可使用敵人的彩色靈魂，依玩家組合的顏色配置打造新裝備。隊伍成員會隨故事推進而加入或離隊，類似《最終幻想 IV》。同名女主角是唯一固定的成員。

請注意本作不要與 Game Boy 版《Aretha II》混淆。原 Game Boy 三部《Aretha》早數年推出，故事獨立成另一條主軸，描寫同名公主 Aretha 的冒險。

overview_en: The third game in the Aretha roleplaying series.
overview_zh: 《Aretha》系列 RPG 的第三作。

overview_en:
Asmik-kun World 2 (アスミッくん ワールド 2 Asumikkun Wārudo 2) is a Game Boy video game by Asmik, copyrighted in 1991.Unlike its predecessor, Boomer's Adventure in ASMIK World (Teke! Teke! Asmik-kun World), this game was never released outside Japan. Like its predecessor, the game is an excellent example of the trap-em-up genre, which also includes games like Heiankyo Alien and Space Panic.

In the game, Asmik-kun has to build a "road" from the entrance to the exit in each level. An enemy has come to kidnap the children on a certain world and the "roads" are intended for the children to be rescued and escorted safely back home.[3]
overview_zh:
《アスミッくん ワールド 2》是 Asmik 於 1991 年取得版權的 Game Boy 遊戲。與前作《Boomer's Adventure in ASMIK World》（てけ！てけ！アスミっくんワールド）不同，本作未在日本以外推出。與前作相同，本作是「設陷阱」類型遊戲的優秀範例，同類作品還包括《平安京エイリアン》與《Space Panic》。

遊戲中，アスミッくん 必須在每關內，從入口到出口建造一條「道路」。某個世界出現了綁架孩童的敵人，這些「道路」就是用來救出孩子並將他們安全送回家。

overview_en:
OBELIX has disappeared !...
To ﬁnd Obelix travel throughout Gaul, across the Roman Empire, taking your search as far afield as the Egyptian Pyramids while battling with the Roman armies and avoiding Caesar’s spies. Magic potion, Romans, fights, punches, catapults, wild boars, not forgetting the ﬁsh that is not quite “fresh”... RELIVE THE ADVENTURES OF ASTERIX THE GAUL !
overview_zh:
OBELIX 失蹤了！……
為了找回 Obelix，請走遍高盧全境，橫越羅馬帝國，甚至遠至埃及金字塔，途中要與羅馬軍團作戰並躲開凱撒的探子。魔法藥水、羅馬人、戰鬥、揮拳、投石機、野豬，還有那條不太「新鮮」的魚……重溫高盧人 ASTERIX 的冒險吧！

overview_en: Caesar has erected a new barricade around the village of the indomitable gauls, to keep them trapped inside. Join Asterix and Obelix and travel across the Roman Empire. Here you will enter a bullfight, participate in a rugby match, and even take part in the Olympic Games. Bring a souvenir from each country you visit, in order to prove to Caesar that the Gauls are the strongest heroes.
overview_zh: 凱撒在無敵高盧村四周築起新的封鎖線，企圖將他們困在裡頭。與 Asterix 和 Obelix 一同踏遍羅馬帝國。在這趟旅程中，你會參加鬥牛、橄欖球比賽，甚至參加奧運。從每個造訪的國家帶回紀念品，向凱撒證明高盧人才是最強的英雄。

overview_en:
Asteroids is a conversion of the arcade game of the same name.

Play the role of a spaceship pilot trapped in a gigantic asteroid cloud and pulverize incoming asteroids with the ship's photon cannon. When all asteroids are destroyed, the player can then move on to the next round. In addition to the asteroids, the player will also face an Alien Robot Saucer which shoots randomly across the screen.

The player using the controller may rotate the ship (left or right) to any direction or move the ship forward. Shots will be fired according to the ship direction. The player has three reserved ships available to replace a destroyed spaceship. The spaceship is destroyed if an asteroid collides with the spaceship or is shot by an Alien Robot Saucer. Additionally, the player may opt to use the hyperspace warp to avoid collision. The warp however, may also destroy the spaceship in the process.

Asteroids when shot will break-up into smaller pieces or be destroyed. There are three types of asteroids: large asteroids, medium asteroids, and small asteroids. Large asteroids and medium asteroids when shot, will break-up into two smaller sized asteroids. Small asteroids when shot will be destroyed. 

Alien Robot Saucers come in two sizes: small and large. Both use photon lasers to shoot and will explode when destroyed. Alien Robot Saucers will not appear at the Novice Level.
overview_zh:
《Asteroids》是同名街機遊戲的移植版。

玩家扮演被困在巨大小行星雲中的太空船駕駛員，使用船上的光子炮粉碎來襲的小行星。所有小行星被消滅後，玩家便可進入下一回合。除了小行星，玩家還會遭遇會在畫面上隨機射擊的外星機器人飛碟。

玩家可以使用控制器旋轉太空船（向左或向右）至任意方向，或讓船向前推進。射擊方向會依船的朝向而定。玩家擁有三艘預備船以替補被擊毀的太空船。若太空船與小行星相撞、或被外星飛碟擊中，便會損毀。此外，玩家亦可選擇使用超空間躍遷以避開碰撞。然而躍遷本身也可能導致太空船毀損。

小行星被擊中後會碎裂成更小塊或徹底消失。共有三種尺寸：大、中、小。大型與中型在被擊中時會分裂成兩顆較小的小行星；小型小行星則會直接被消滅。

外星機器人飛碟有大、小兩種尺寸。兩者皆使用光子雷射射擊，被擊毀時會爆炸。新手難度下不會出現外星機器人飛碟。

overview_en: The game puts you in control of Rabby, a robotic bunny, whose goal is to recover stolen parts for his creator, Doc, that were taken by the Dortoise Troops. Doc's dream is to utilize the parts to allow Rabby to fly freely. The game is a top-down, vertically scrolling action game that can be considered a precursor to the Jumping Flash series. The player must jump along with platforms in search of a heart, which will allow the player to upgrade Rabby and proceed on to the next level. A level will loop indefinitely until the heart is found.
overview_zh: 玩家扮演機械兔 Rabby，目標是奪回被烏龜大軍偷走、屬於其發明者 Doc 的零件。Doc 的夢想是利用這些零件讓 Rabby 能自由飛翔。本作為俯瞰、垂直卷軸的動作遊戲，可視為《Jumping Flash》系列的先驅。玩家必須跟著平台跳躍尋找愛心，找到後即可強化 Rabby 並進入下一關。在找到愛心前，關卡會無限循環。

overview_en:
There are four modes of gameplay in Atomic Punk, including two single player modes and two multiplayer game modes.

Solo:

"Game A" (known as "Bomber Boy" in the Japanese version) is similar to other games in the series, with a few differences. Power-ups, known as panels, which are usually gained in each level and carried over from one to the next, can also be bought from a store by using GP, which is collected depending on how much time it takes to complete a level and how many blocks are destroyed. At the beginning of each round, the player decides which panels to use to complete the round. Another difference is that the linear gameplay of the original, with the player advancing levels after completing each one, was changed to implement a world map with nine locations.

The second game mode, "Game B" (known as "Bomber Man" in the Japanese version) is the same as that in the original Bomberman game, but the stage area is squared rather than rectangular and the screen is always centered on Bomberman rather than scrolling when he touches the border.

Vs.:

Panel Mode, in which players begin with only one bomb to place at a time and a bomb blast length of one unit, and Bomb Up and Fire Up panels appear.

Powerful Mode, in which players have four bombs to place at a time and a bomb blast length of four units, and no panels appear.
overview_zh:
《Atomic Punk》共有四種玩法，包括兩種單人模式與兩種多人對戰模式。

單人：

「Game A」（日版稱作「ボンバーボーイ」）大致與系列其他作品相似，但有幾項差異。強化道具（稱作 panel）通常於每關取得並可帶到下一關，本作中亦可在商店以 GP 購買，GP 依完成關卡所花時間與摧毀方塊數量發放。每回合開始前，玩家可決定要使用哪些 panel。另一項差異是，原作的線性關卡推進改為包含九個地點的世界地圖。

第二種模式「Game B」（日版稱作「ボンバーマン」）與原版《Bomberman》相同，但場地由長方形改為正方形，畫面始終以炸彈超人為中心而非碰到邊緣才捲動。

對戰：

Panel Mode：玩家初始僅能放置一顆炸彈、爆炸範圍為一格，場上會出現 Bomb Up 與 Fire Up 道具。

Powerful Mode：玩家可同時放置四顆炸彈、爆炸範圍四格，場上不會出現道具。

overview_en:
The game's protagonist is Chad Finletter, a young boy is on a quest to stop the evil scientist Dr. Putrid T. Gangreen from unleashing his Doomsday Tomato. During his journey he must fight through legions of mutant tomatoes, although this is a feat he will take on alone as the citizens of San Zucchini are too afraid of the mutant tomatoes to aid him.
 Much like other platform games of its time, the main method of killing the enemies is to jump on them, in this case squashing them, or breaking them into smaller tomato enemies. There are several bosses to take on including Zoltan, Beefstake, Mummato, Fang, Ketchuck and Tomacho.
overview_zh:
本作主角是少年 Chad Finletter，他必須阻止邪惡科學家 Dr. Putrid T. Gangreen 釋出他的「末日番茄」。旅途中他得對抗成群的變種番茄；由於 San Zucchini 的居民全都因懼怕變種番茄而不敢相助，這場戰鬥只能孤軍奮戰。
如同當時其他平台遊戲，主要消滅敵人的方式是踩踏，將其壓扁，或讓它們分裂成更小的番茄敵人。共有多名頭目登場，包括 Zoltan、Beefstake、Mummato、Fang、Ketchuck 與 Tomacho。
publisher:
THQ NA
Nintendo EU
Altron JP

overview_en:
There is no rest, even in the afterlife.

A classic action game that introduced a unique system for possessing and controlling other characters is now available on the Nintendo eShop.

While out on a walk with his girlfriend, our hero is gunned down by an evil syndicate that wants to harness ghost energy. This syndicate plans to ransom the poor girl, who is the daughter of a prestigious scientist, to force her father to cooperate. But our hero's adventure isn't over. In fact, it's just beginning. He's come back as a ghost so that he can rescue his girlfriend from her kidnappers and finally rest in peace.
overview_zh:
即便是死後世界，也無法安息。

以獨特的附身與操控他人系統打響名號的經典動作遊戲，現已登上 Nintendo eShop。

與女友外出散步時，主角被想要利用幽靈能量的邪惡組織槍殺。該組織計畫挾持這位知名科學家的女兒，逼迫其父親就範。然而主角的故事並未就此結束，反而才剛開始。他化為幽靈歸來，誓要從綁匪手中救回女友，最終才能安息。

overview_en: Explore the Castle of Ayakashi as a ninja named Hayabusa in order to defeat the resurrected Doman, who controls the Demonouden. This Castle of Ayakashi has five dungeons, Suzakuden, Genbuden, Hakutoraden, Seiryuden, and Demonouden
overview_zh: 操作忍者 Hayabusa 探索 Ayakashi 之城，擊敗復活的 Doman——大魔王殿之主。Ayakashi 之城共有五座迷宮：朱雀殿、玄武殿、白虎殿、青龍殿與大魔王殿。

overview_en:
It's REX To The Rescue!
You were once just a typical Tyrannosaurus-10 tons of terror with lots of teeth and really bad breath. Now, thanks to Captain NewEye' Brain Grain formula, you're the intelligent giant reptile called Rex - and you're hopping mad! Evil Professor ScrewEyes has "dino-napped" your prehistoric pals, Woog, Dweeb and Elsa, and is holding them prisoner in his castle. Only you have the brains and brawn to set them free!

Follow a mystical map that will take you from the outskirts of the Jurassic Jungle through the Cretaceous Caves to well within the castle walls. Then it's on to the Dungeon and, if you avoid extinction, up into the Tower. 16 levels of "brain-draining" obstacles, traps and other dangers await you-not to mention power-boosting inventions, carefully hidden bonuses and secret worlds of adventure.

So step on it big guy-or your friends could end up as colossal fossils!
overview_zh:
出動吧 REX！
你曾經只是隻典型的暴龍——10 噸重的恐怖巨獸，滿口尖牙、口氣超臭。如今多虧 NewEye 船長的「腦力激增」配方，你成了名為 Rex 的高智商巨型爬蟲——而且暴跳如雷！邪惡的 ScrewEyes 教授「龍口奪寶」，把你的史前夥伴 Woog、Dweeb 與 Elsa 擄到他的城堡關了起來。只有你才有膽識與蠻力解救他們！

跟著一張神秘地圖，從侏儸紀叢林邊緣穿越白堊紀洞窟，深入城堡。接著進入地牢，若能逃過絕種，便登上塔頂。16 關「燒腦」的障礙、陷阱與其他危機正等著你——更別提一路上還有提升能力的發明、藏匿的獎勵物品以及秘密冒險世界。

大個兒，動作快點——否則你的朋友可能就要變成大化石了！

overview_en: Bakenou TV '94 is a Sports game, developed by Graphic Research and published by Asmik Ace Entertainment, Inc, which was released in Japan in 1994.
overview_zh: 《Bakenou TV '94》是 Graphic Research 開發、Asmik Ace Entertainment 發行的運動類遊戲，於 1994 年在日本推出。

overview_en: Bakenou V3 is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Graphic Research and published by Asmik Ace Entertainment, Inc, which was released in Japan in 1993.
overview_zh: 《Bakenou V3》是 Graphic Research 開發、Asmik Ace Entertainment 發行的雜項類遊戲，於 1993 年在日本推出。

overview_en: Bakuchou Retrieve Master is a Role-Playing game, developed by TOSE and published by Konami, which was released in Japan in 1998.
overview_zh: 《爆釣リトリーブマスター》是 TOSE 開發、Konami 發行的角色扮演遊戲，於 1998 年在日本推出。

no_intro_name: Bakuchou Retsuden Shou - Hyper Fishing (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en: Bakuchou Retsuden Shou: Hyper Fishing is a Sports game, published by Starfish, which was released in Japan in 1998.
overview_zh: 《爆釣列伝・翔 Hyper Fishing》是由 Starfish 發行的運動類遊戲，於 1998 年在日本推出。

overview_en:
Balloon Kid is a 1990 Game Boy video game developed by Nintendo R&D1 and Pax Softnica and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on October 5, 1990.

Take to the skies in a balloon to save your younger brother. In the little town of Pencilvania, there lived a brother and sister who loved to play with balloons. Alice and her younger brother Jim would spend countless days filling the skies with their balloons. One day, Jim filled all of his balloons and tied them together to make a beautiful balloon rainbow across the sky. But suddenly, a strong wind came and carried Jim away. As Alice, you must save your brother from peril. Float through eight different stages as you follow Jim's trail of balloons. Collect as many balloons as possible to earn bonuses. Test your piloting skills to avoid enemies, or let go of your balloons to face enemies on the ground. In "Balloon Trip" mode, compete for the highest score and move up the ranks. Take a big gulp of courage and give Alice a hand as she searches for her missing brother.
overview_zh:
《Balloon Kid》是 1990 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由任天堂 R&D1 與 Pax Softnica 開發，Nintendo of America 於 1990 年 10 月 5 日在美國發行。

搭著氣球翱翔天際，去拯救你的弟弟。在小鎮 Pencilvania，住著一對熱愛玩氣球的姐弟。Alice 與她的弟弟 Jim 整天讓氣球佈滿天空。某天，Jim 把所有氣球綁在一起，做出一道橫跨天空的美麗氣球彩虹。然而一陣強風突然將 Jim 吹走。身為 Alice，你必須拯救陷入危險的弟弟。沿著 Jim 留下的氣球軌跡飛越八個關卡，盡可能多收集氣球以獲得獎勵。考驗你的飛行技巧閃避敵人，或鬆開氣球到地面與敵人正面交鋒。在「Balloon Trip」模式中，挑戰最高分並向上晉級。鼓起勇氣，助 Alice 一臂之力找回失蹤的弟弟。

overview_en:
Skalman has invented a timemachine and together with bamse and Lille Skutt he's traveled an incredible 75 million years into the past. But there was a stowaway onboard, Vargen! He's kidnappped Skalman, and without him there is now way for Bamse and Lille Skutt to get back to their own time.

Can you help Bamse find Skalman and clear all the dangers on the way? It won't be easy and Bamse is gonna need all the help he can get.
overview_zh:
Skalman 發明了一台時光機，與 Bamse、小兔子 Lille Skutt 一起回到 7500 萬年前的遠古。然而船上多了一個偷渡客——大野狼 Vargen！他綁架了 Skalman，沒有他，Bamse 與 Lille Skutt 就無法回到原本的時代。

你能幫 Bamse 找到 Skalman、化解沿途所有危險嗎？這並不容易，Bamse 需要你所能提供的一切協助。

overview_en: Banishing Racer (バニシングレーサー) is a Japanese platforming video game developed and published by Jaleco Entertainment for the Game Boy exclusively in Japan. It was released in Japan on July 26, 1991. Banishing Racer was also sold around Hong Kong. The game allows the player to take control of an animated car against numerous enemies that must be jumped on to defeat, in a fashion similar to Super Mario Land. The player has three lives before being allowed to continue or start over. One hit kills the player and forces a restart from the beginning of the level. The car model used within the game looks very similar to a Subaru 360.
overview_zh: 《Banishing Racer》（バニシングレーサー）是 Jaleco Entertainment 開發、發行的日本平台遊戲，僅在日本 Game Boy 平台推出，於 1991 年 7 月 26 日發售。本作也曾在香港地區販售。玩家操控一輛擬人化的汽車，必須以類似《超級瑪利歐 Land》的方式跳躍踩擊眾多敵人。玩家有三條命，用完後可選擇繼續或重新開始。被擊中一次即死亡並從關卡開頭重來。遊戲中的車型外觀近似 Subaru 360。

overview_en:
Unlike most Barbie games, this game is a standard platform game rather than a simulation of the life of a female fashion model. Barbie must find an outfit for her date with Ken. The environment features a shopping mall level, an underwater level, and other worlds to explore. The game is also centered around collecting gems and pearls to fend off opponents.

Enemies in the game include the usual sharks found in underwater levels in addition to jellyfish. Moving cubes of sugar must also be defeated in the game. The bonus rounds of the game are essentially a Concentration-type game where matching identical cards lead to extra points for the player.
overview_zh:
與多數 Barbie 遊戲不同，本作是標準的平台動作遊戲，而不是模擬時尚名模生活。Barbie 必須為與 Ken 的約會找到合適的服裝。場景包含購物中心關卡、海底關卡，以及其他可探索的世界。遊戲也圍繞著收集寶石與珍珠以擊退對手。

敵人除了海底關常見的鯊魚外，還有水母。場上還有會移動的方糖需要打倒。獎勵回合本質上是一種「翻牌配對」遊戲，配對成功的卡片會替玩家帶來額外分數。

title_en: BART SIMPSON'S ESCAPE FROM CAMP DEADLY
no_intro_name: Bart Simpson's Escape from Camp Deadly (USA, Europe)
overview_en: School's out and Bart's ready for some summer fun in the sun! Until he got the news - Homer and Marge were sending him and Lisa off to summer camp. Not just any camp, but the infamous Camp Deadly! How bad could it be? Well, with Ironfist Burns as head counselor and Nelson and his band of bullies as bunkmates, it's not exactly paradise. Bart and Lisa are determined to get out - but first they've got to survive outrageous food fights, killer bees and a life-threatening game of capture the flag. Help Bart and Lisa escape, at least in time for school!
overview_zh: 學期結束，Bart 準備好享受陽光下的暑期樂趣！直到他得知 Homer 與 Marge 要送他和 Lisa 去夏令營——而且還不是普通的夏令營，是惡名昭彰的 Camp Deadly！能糟到哪去？嗯，當總教官的是「鐵拳」Burns，Nelson 與他的惡霸幫又是同寢室，這實在說不上是天堂。Bart 與 Lisa 決心逃出去，但首先他們得撐過誇張的食物大戰、殺人蜂，以及一場攸關性命的奪旗遊戲。幫助 Bart 與 Lisa 逃離夏令營，至少趕得上開學！

overview_en:
Baseball was one of the first games to launch with the Game Boy.

Although there is no difference between them other than uniform color, they are meant to represent the six members of the Japanese Central League. For the American version, the letters of the teams were renamed to more closely resemble several of the Major League Baseball teams:
overview_zh:
《Baseball》是 Game Boy 首發陣容中的其中一款。

各隊伍除了制服顏色外並無實質差異，但分別代表日本中央聯盟的六支球隊。美版則將球隊代號改為更近似美國職棒大聯盟的隊伍。

overview_en:
This game is the first installment of the Bases Loaded series, followed by seven sequels across three generations of consoles.


Bases Loaded features baseball action with two game modes, USA mode or Japan mode. The difference between the two modes is that the Japan mode contains faster pitches. After selecting your mode of play you are given a choice of two teams: East and West. You can perform all of the basics of major league baseball: pitch, hit, field, pickoffs, pinch hit, and bring in a relief pitcher. Gameplay is viewed from a different perspective when hitting and when pitching. Link with a friend's Game Boy to go head-to-head.
overview_zh:
本作為《Bases Loaded》系列首作，後續橫跨三世代主機共推出七部續作。

《Bases Loaded》提供兩種棒球玩法：USA 模式與 Japan 模式。兩者主要差異在 Japan 模式投球速度較快。選好模式後，玩家可從東軍或西軍中擇一。可進行大聯盟基本動作：投球、打擊、守備、牽制、代打、換上後援投手等。打擊與投球時的視角不同。可透過通信線連接朋友的 Game Boy 進行對戰。

overview_en: Bass Fishing Tatsujin Techou is a Sports game, published by Starfish, which was released in Japan in 1996.
overview_zh: 《バスフィッシング達人手帳》是由 Starfish 發行的運動類遊戲，於 1996 年在日本推出。

overview_en:
The Real Game Begins

Batman and Robin blast into Gotham City! Armed with incredible attacks, fierce combat moves, and an arsenal of gadgets, the Dynamic Duo are ready to battle the diabolical minds of Two-Face and The Riddler!

Without question... it's Batman Forever!
overview_zh:
真正的好戲開場了。

蝙蝠俠與羅賓殺進高譚市！配備驚人的攻擊技、凌厲的格鬥動作與一整套裝備，動感雙俠隨時準備迎戰雙面人與謎天大聖的邪惡計謀！

毫無疑問——是《Batman Forever》！

overview_en: The seedy underworld is crawling with criminals. Even worse - the JOKER is back on top of 'em all! Law and order means nothing... until now! Because BATMAN is here - and the action is hotter than ever! Ear-crunching sound effects. Pulse-quickening music. Graphics that are as hot as 16-bit. And this time, BATMAN hits fast and hard. Flying, leaping, and sliding to attack! And striking at the heart of the JOKER. The CAPED CRUSADER has a totally new arsenal at his command: Batarang, Crossbow, Sonic Neutralizer. He's even got a superfueled jetpack. And even more powerful weapons at the touch of a button. BATMAN has got to use all of his power. Because this world is a very dark place, and you never know where the JOKER is hiding!
overview_zh: 罪惡叢生的黑社會充滿犯罪份子。更糟的是——JOKER 又坐回頂端！法律與秩序蕩然無存……直到現在！因為 BATMAN 來了——而且火力前所未有。震撼耳膜的音效。令人心跳加速的配樂。媲美 16 位元的畫面。這次 BATMAN 出手既快又狠，飛越、跳躍、滑行展開攻擊，直擊 JOKER 心臟！斗篷十字軍此次配備全新武器：蝙蝠鏢、十字弓、聲波中和器，甚至還有超級噴射背包。一鍵之差還能祭出更具威力的武器。BATMAN 必須火力全開，因為這是個極為陰暗的世界，誰也不知道 JOKER 究竟藏在哪裡！

overview_en:
FROM TV SCREEN TO GAME BOY SCREEN COMES HEROIC CRIME FIGHTING ADVENTURE.

Everyone's tuning in to Batman - The Animated Series. Now, for the first time, this hit TV series becomes an intense video game adventure. The Dark Knight and his partner Robin fight Gotham City's most infamous fiends in five original episodes of sizzling crime fighting action. Batman's strategic use of the grappling hook is crucial for surviving the onslaught of evil enemies. And Robin relies on his hang-from-the-ceiling skills to escape certain doom. Both of our heroes possess fists of amazing strength and must try to find weapon power-ups scattered throughout the mayhem.
overview_zh:
電視螢幕上的英勇打擊罪犯冒險，登上 Game Boy。

大家都在收看《Batman: The Animated Series》。如今這部熱門影集首度化為扣人心弦的電玩冒險。黑暗騎士與搭檔羅賓在五段全新原創章節中，迎戰高譚市最惡名昭彰的反派。蝙蝠俠的鉤爪在面對洶湧而至的敵人時是生存關鍵。羅賓則靠他從天花板倒掛的本領脫離絕境。兩位英雄都擁有驚人的拳頭，並必須尋找散布於混亂之中的武器強化道具。

overview_en: He's totally new. Totally tough. And he'll stop at nothing to make sure justice prevails! From the dark streets of Gotham City to the deepest corners of the criminal underworld comes the Caped Crusader as you've never seen him before. Incredibly strong. Armed to the teeth. And ready to put his life on the line for the sake of all, on a search-and-destroy mission to end the Joker's reign of terror. He leaps, he flies, he dodges enemy fire and delivers it right back... with a vengeance. This is no kid stuff. This is as real as video gaming gets. If you liked what you saw in the movie, you're gonna love what you see here. Because this time around, Batman is all business, and he won't let anything stand in his way!
overview_zh: 全新登場，硬派十足，為了正義不擇手段！從高譚市的黑暗街頭到犯罪世界的最深處，斗篷十字軍以前所未見的姿態現身。力量驚人，全副武裝，為了眾人不惜捨命；任務只有一個——追擊毀滅 Joker 的恐怖統治。他跳躍、飛行、閃避敵火、再以同樣方式報以重擊。這可不是孩子的玩意，這是電玩史上最寫實的格鬥體驗。如果你喜歡電影裡的他，那你絕對會愛上這款遊戲。因為這次 BATMAN 認真了，沒有任何事物擋得住他！

overview_en:
Get Ready To Rumble!

The Toshin Daibukai tournament has arrived. Ten of the toughest fighters in the world are taking part in the most grueling slugfest known to man. To win, each combatant must be completely focused. One slip and their fate is sealed. Who will be crowned the champion? That is up to you. So get off your duff and get ready for the fight of your life with Battle Arena Toshinden!
overview_zh:
戰況一觸即發！

鬥神大武會來到了。世界十大頂尖鬥士齊聚，展開人類史上最艱辛的較量。要勝出，每位戰士都必須全神貫注，一個閃失就此命運難逃。誰能登上冠軍寶座？答案取決於你。立刻起身，準備迎接人生最激烈的戰鬥——《Battle Arena Toshinden》！
publisher:
Takara JP
Nintendo NA
Laguna EU

overview_en:
The player controls a driver of an excavation vehicle as he competes in a 48-level tournament of drilling things.

Players have to kill rival drivers only by pushing huge stones at them. Most of the other stones are a permanent part of the underground cavern; while others can be used to eliminate the opponents. Money is earned after each level for the purpose of upgrading the player's vehicle. Players can improve their engines, purchase extra lives, shovels that can dig better, and weapons to improve the odds on the playing field. A kill ratio is required to be met in order to reach the next stage. Otherwise, the player remains in the current level.

After finishing all 48 levels, the game proclaims that the "battle is over" and that the player becomes "the new champion." The final scene in the game is where the player looks over the sunset with his girlfriend along with the closing credits.
overview_zh:
玩家操作一輛挖掘車駕駛員，挑戰共 48 關的鑽掘大賽。

玩家只能透過將大石塊推向對手來擊倒其他駕駛。多數其他石塊是地下洞穴的固定地形，但有些可用來消滅對手。每關結束會獲得金錢以升級車輛。可改良引擎、購買額外生命、性能更好的鏟子，以及武器以增加勝算。每關需達成擊殺比例才能進入下一階段，否則只能停留在當前關卡。

通過全 48 關後，遊戲會宣告「戰鬥結束」，玩家成為「新冠軍」。最終畫面是主角與女友一同望著夕陽，並播放結尾名單。

overview_en: Battle Crusher is a fighting game published by Banpresto and released only in Japan in 1995. Battle Crusher features a single player progression mode and a two player versus mode. Battle Crusher features twelve different playable characters, including some characters from the Gundam and Ultraman franchises.
overview_zh: 《Battle Crusher》是 Banpresto 發行的格鬥遊戲，於 1995 年僅在日本推出。本作收錄單人闖關模式與雙人對戰模式，共有十二名可操作角色，包括《鋼彈》與《超人力霸王》系列的角色。

overview_en:
Battle Dodge Ball is a part of the Japanese exclusive Compati Hero Series. Gundam, Kamen Rider V3, and Ultraman Taro are the main representatives of the 'heroes' side of the six teams in Battle Dodge Ball, with Zeong, Ika Devil, and Zetton rounding out as the villains.

The general gist of the game is that you can choose one of the six teams. You then fight each of the other five teams once per round in a short dodgeball game, two-on-two. Unlike normal dodgeball, you are not knocked out with a single hit. Rather, in Battle Dodge Ball, each character has a specific amount of HP. Once he takes enough hits to lose all his HP, he is out of the match.

The game also adds an RPG element in the ability to gain experience at the end of a match, win or lose, which can then be used to power up stats of your team's players.
overview_zh:
《Battle Dodge Ball》是日本獨佔的「Compati Hero 系列」之一。鋼彈、假面騎士 V3 與超人力霸王太郎是六支隊伍中「英雄」方的代表，「反派」方則由 Zeong、Ika Devil 與 Zetton 構成。

遊戲大致玩法是玩家從六支隊伍中擇一，每回合與其餘五隊各打一場簡短的躲避球賽，二對二進行。與一般躲避球不同，被打中一次不會出局，每名角色擁有特定的 HP，HP 歸零才會退場。

本作還加入了 RPG 元素：賽後不論勝負皆可獲得經驗值，可用來強化隊員能力。

overview_en:
Battle of Kingdom is a 1991 Game Boy video game that was jointly created by the Meldac, Live Planning, and the Lenar companies. It was only released for a Japanese market.

The object is to lead a kingdom through various battles using the format of a traditional board game. In order to advance to the next battle, players must destroy at least 92% of the monsters on the battlefield. Each stage represents a battle in a high fantasy campaign to save the world from an unknown evil force (that resides in a skull castle).
overview_zh:
《Battle of Kingdom》是 1991 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Meldac、Live Planning 與 Lenar 三家公司共同開發，僅在日本推出。

玩家以類似傳統棋盤遊戲的形式帶領王國經歷各種戰役。要進入下一場戰鬥，必須消滅戰場上至少 92% 的怪物。每一關代表一場高度奇幻設定的戰役，目標是將世界從一股藏身於骷髏城的不明邪惡勢力中拯救出來。

overview_en:
A pack-in game that came with the Barcode Boy in Japan.

Battle Space is a strategy game developed by Sofel and published by Namco for the Game Boy platform.
overview_zh:
本作是日本 Barcode Boy 的隨附遊戲。

《Battle Space》是 Sofel 開發、Namco 發行的 Game Boy 平台策略遊戲。

overview_en:
Battle Unit Zeoth takes place in the future where mankind is invaded by a race of alien robots known as the Grein. The Earth’s forces were triumphant in battle and the Grein forces fled the Solar System. However, as they retreated, the Grein left behind a secret underground base filled with self-replicating Grein machines.

Forty-two years after the Earth’s victory, the Grein base opened and a new attack force decimated the city of New Age. To retaliate, Earth’s military has stored a mecha that specializes in alien combat known as the Zeoth. It is the Zeoth’s assignment to stop the attack force, go into the Grein secret base and destroy the mechanical occupants before a new invasion force arrives.
overview_zh:
《Battle Unit Zeoth》故事設定於未來，人類遭一支名為 Grein 的外星機器人種族入侵。地球軍在戰役中獲勝，Grein 部隊撤離太陽系。然而在撤退途中，Grein 在地球留下了一座充滿自我複製機器的秘密地下基地。

地球勝利的 42 年後，Grein 基地啟動，新的攻擊部隊重創了 New Age 城。為反擊，地球軍隊出動專門對付外星敵人的機甲——Zeoth。Zeoth 的任務是阻止來犯部隊，潛入 Grein 秘密基地，並在新一波侵略部隊抵達前消滅內部的機械守軍。

overview_en:
based on the board game of the same name.
The object is to sink the opponent's entire fleet without him sinking the player's fleet first. In this updated version, both the player and the computer get extra firepower from military aircraft and support weapons. There are even scenarios that start a player off in a pre-played game that he must resume (and overcome a bleak scenario).
overview_zh:
改編自同名桌遊。
目標是搶在對方擊沉自己整支艦隊之前，先擊沉對方所有船艦。在這個更新版本中，玩家與電腦都可獲得來自軍機與支援武器的額外火力。本作甚至包含特殊情境，會讓玩家從一個已開打的劣勢局面接手繼續對戰。

overview_en:
’TOAD-NAPPED!

While partying on Lost Vega, a deep-space leisure station, the three Battletoads—Zitz, Rash and Pimple—get pleasantly side-tracked by a Thallian Thorax Dancer. Unfortunately, the dancer soon reveals herself as the evil Dark Queen! The ‘toads fight valiantly against overwhelming odds, but are eventually overpowered. Rash and Pimple are taken prisoner, but luckily, Zitz makes it to the Toadster and burns space back to the Vulture and the Battletoads’ mentor, Professor T. Bird. So, Zitz, the Dark Queen’s ‘toadnapped your best buddies—what’re you gonna do about it? You’re gonna get real MAD, that’s what—then you’re gonna get EVEN! Once you get to Armagedda, the Dark Queen’s planet, you’ve got a long way to go—into caverns, across swamps and even through the belly of the dreaded Wurm. And ultimately, you’re gonna have to defeat the terrible, the towering, the truly ’toadsplatting Robo-Manus mutant! Have you got what it takes to be a bonafide Battletoad? We’ll soon see, one way or another…
overview_zh:
蛤蟆綁架案！

三隻 Battletoads——Zitz、Rash 與 Pimple——在深空休閒站 Lost Vega 開派對時，被一名 Thallian 胸甲舞者迷得不亦樂乎。豈料舞者真實身份竟是邪惡的暗黑女王！蛤蟆們奮力反抗壓倒性勢力，最終仍敗下陣來。Rash 與 Pimple 被俘，所幸 Zitz 趕回 Toadster，飛回母艦 Vulture 與導師 T. Bird 教授會合。Zitz，暗黑女王綁了你的好兄弟——你打算怎麼辦？當然是火大爆發，然後給她好看！抵達暗黑女王的星球 Armagedda 後，等著你的是一條漫漫長路——穿越洞窟、跨過沼澤，甚至深入恐怖的 Wurm 體內。最後你還必須擊敗那可怕、聳立、令人聞之色變的變異 Robo-Manus！你有沒有真本事成為一名真正的 Battletoad？很快就會見分曉……

overview_en:
The Ultimate Team!

When a battle cruiser the size of a city and called the Colossus smashes out of the moon, its laser cannon glowing menacingly, you can bet it ain’t gonna be makin’ no social calls…

You can bet it’s gonna be creating some bad n’ crazy mayhem on good ol’ planet Earth- ‘specially when you know that the dreaded Dark Queen and the shady Shadow Boss are on board just rarin’ to rock n’ roll…

The dastardly duo are about to unleash their most monstrous plan yet- from their secret lunar base they intend to launch an invasion that’ll make them master of the world…

Neutralized by deadly glooming rays, Earth’s forces are powerless… that is until the Dragons join the ‘Toads!

Take a toadacious trip with the dream ticket as those terrific twins Billy and Jimmy Lee team up with Zitz, Rash and Pimple against the combined might of the gruesome twosome and their mindless minions, Big Blag, Abobo, Robo-Manus and Roper, in a toadally terminal new adventure!

So let’s get mad, bad n’ crazy once again as the BATTLETOADS join DOUBLE DRAGON in THE ULTIMATE TEAM!
overview_zh:
終極夢幻戰隊！

當一艘巨如城市的戰艦「Colossus」從月球破殼而出，雷射砲威脅地閃著光，這肯定不是來打招呼的……

它必然會在地球上掀起腥風血雨——尤其當你知道艦上是惡名昭彰的暗黑女王與陰險的影子老大正準備鬧個天翻地覆時……

這對惡黨即將展開他們最瘋狂的計畫——從月球秘密基地發動入侵，奪取整個世界的霸權……

受到致命光線壓制，地球軍隊形同癱瘓……除非雙截龍與蛤蟆們聯手出擊！

搭上夢幻組合的瘋狂列車，看雙胞胎兄弟 Billy 與 Jimmy Lee 與 Zitz、Rash、Pimple 攜手對抗那可怕雙人組與其無腦爪牙 Big Blag、Abobo、Robo-Manus 與 Roper，展開又一場驚天動地的全新冒險！

再來一次火爆瘋狂吧——BATTLETOADS 與 DOUBLE DRAGON 強強聯手組成「終極戰隊」！

overview_en:
Okay 'toads! Let's get EVEN! When the evil Dark Queen kidnaps both your best buddy and the best looking girl this side of the Mazallion Star Cluster -what are you gonna do about it? Are you gonna cry? Hide? Call the Starcops? No way! Because you're a BATTLETOAD and BATTLETOADS don't cry, hide, or call for help. BATTLETOADS get real MAD-and then they get EVEN!

So, strap on your Blaster, power-up the Toadster and get on downt o the Dark Queen's planet - but, watch out 'toad - this lady's bad, and she's got a whole mess of really nasty surprises lined up for you - like the Psyko Pigs, the Mutant Ratpack, Robo-Manus and the Saturn Toadtrap, to name but a few. You're gonna need all your fighting skills to defeat her - the Battletoad Butt, the Big Bad Boot and the Nuclear Knuckles. Hey, and don't forget to take along the Jet Turbo, the Space Board and the Speed Bike. Because you're gonna need 'em all, 'toad, if you're gonna rescue your friends and get the frog outta there with your green skin intact!
overview_zh:
好啦，蛤蟆們！讓我們以牙還牙！當邪惡的暗黑女王同時擄走你的好兄弟和 Mazallion 星團這一帶最美的女孩——你打算怎麼辦？哭嗎？躲嗎？打給星際警察嗎？想都別想！因為你是 BATTLETOAD，BATTLETOAD 不會哭、不會躲、也不會求救。BATTLETOAD 會發狠——然後反擊到底！

所以，繫好你的 Blaster、發動 Toadster，殺向暗黑女王的星球——但小心點蛤蟆，這位女士可不簡單，她準備了一堆陰險手段等著你——像是 Psyko Pigs、變種鼠群、Robo-Manus，還有 Saturn Toadtrap，這只是其中幾項。你得用上所有戰鬥技巧才能擊敗她——蛤蟆翹臀、大笨腳與核子拳。喔，別忘了帶上 Jet Turbo、Space Board 與 Speed Bike，蛤蟆，這些通通要用得上，才能救出朋友、帶著綠皮全身而退！

overview_en: The plot involves the pair doing dangerous activities in attempt to gain free access to a concert.
overview_zh: 劇情圍繞兩人為了免費混進演唱會而做出各種危險行徑。

overview_en:
based on the animated television series.
The game begins with the player taking control of Beetlejuice as he attempts to get rid of all the ghosts that he invited into Lydia Deetz's house (where she lives with her mother and father) He must then rescue Lydia from the evil Astoroth. Using bio-exorcist magic, players must defeat undead creatures through the cemetery and even inside the Neitherworld. Players can also ride on a mine cart and a Pogosnake (that operates in a similar fashion to Super Mario World's Yoshi). There are some elements of animated violence along with a dark Gothic theme (that explores into the realms of hauntings) in this video game.
overview_zh:
改編自同名動畫影集。
遊戲開始，玩家操控陰間大法師 Beetlejuice，他試圖把先前自己邀請進 Lydia Deetz 家（她與父母同住）裡的所有鬼魂趕出去。接著他必須從邪惡的 Astoroth 手中救出 Lydia。玩家以「生靈驅魔」魔法在墓園、甚至冥界深處擊敗不死生物。途中還可駕駛礦車與 Pogosnake（操作方式類似《超級瑪利歐世界》中的耀西）。本作包含一些動畫式暴力情節，並帶有探索鬧鬼領域的黑暗哥德氛圍。

title_en: BEST OF THE BEST - CHAMPIONSHIP KARATE
no_intro_name: Best of the Best - Championship Karate (USA)
overview_en: The object is to win the kick boxing championship by defeating an array of kick boxing masters in a series of fighting matches.
overview_zh: 目標是在一系列拳擊賽中擊敗多位踢拳大師，奪下踢拳冠軍。
publisher:
Electro Brain NA
Loriciels EU
Micro World JP

title_en: BIKKURI NEKKETSU SHIN KIROKU! - DOKODEMO KIN MEDAL
no_intro_name: Bikkuri Nekketsu Shin Kiroku! - Dokodemo Kin Medal (Japan)
overview_en:
Toudou Mamoru's plan that tried to crush the other schools in the athletic meet, ended in failure. While his team played decent, he underestimated the strength of Nekketsu High. Toudou doesn't take the loss lightly, and goes back to the drawing board in his quest for complete domination.

With his wealth and influence, Kounosuke Todou is set on making things right and announces another event! Fight back, Kunio-Kun!
overview_zh:
藤堂衛意圖在運動會中擊垮其他學校的計畫以失敗收場。雖然他的隊伍表現不差，但他低估了熱血高校的實力。藤堂無法接受這個敗果，回到原點重新策畫稱霸大計。

憑藉自身財力與影響力，藤堂幸之介決定一雪前恥，再度宣布舉辦新的賽事！反擊吧，國夫君！

title_en: BILL _ TED'S EXCELLENT GAME BOY ADVENTURE - A BOGUS JOURNEY!
no_intro_name: Bill _ Ted's Excellent Game Boy Adventure - A Bogus Journey! (USA, Europe)

overview_en: Doom style, first-person action game
overview_zh: Doom 風格的第一人稱動作遊戲。
publisher:
Use Corporation JP
Electro Brain NA

overview_en:
Bionic Commando is a 1992 Game Boy video game developed by Minakuchi Engineering and released by Capcom USA in the USA on September 19, 1992.

SWING INTO ACTION AGAINST THE FORCES OF EVIL!

A ruthless army stands ready for war and the one man who can stop it has disappeared. Now, in a desperate fight for survival, the world turns to an elite group of men and women to put an end to the threat. More than simple soldiers, they are the Bionic Commandoes.

Drop behind the lines with Rad Spencer as he infiltrates the Doraize military stronghold. Blast your way through enemy lines with your assault rifle and gather the information needed to rescue Super Joe. Tap enemy communications to learn the dark secrets of director Wiseman and then come face to face with the awesome might of his mysterious Albatross Project!
overview_zh:
《Bionic Commando》是 1992 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Minakuchi Engineering 開發，Capcom USA 於 1992 年 9 月 19 日在美國發行。

甩繩前進，迎戰邪惡勢力！

一支冷酷無情的軍隊已備戰待發，唯一能阻止他們的人卻失蹤了。在這場攸關存亡的戰鬥中，世界把希望寄託在一支精銳男女部隊上。他們不只是普通士兵，而是 Bionic Commandoes。

與 Rad Spencer 一同潛入敵後，深入 Doraize 軍事要塞。用突擊步槍殺出敵陣，蒐集救出 Super Joe 所需的情報。竊聽敵方通訊，揭開 Wiseman 司令的黑暗秘密，並親自面對其神秘 Albatross 計畫的駭人威能！

overview_en:
Bishoujo Senshi Sailor Moon was a video game developed by Arc System Works and published for the Nintendo Game Boy by Angel (Bandai) in 1992. It was one of the first Sailor Moon-related video games to be released.

In this game, the player controlled Usagi Tsukino/Sailor Moon. The storyline was based on the first, third, and fourth episodes of the first season of the anime. Although they originally had not yet appeared in those episodes, in the game Usagi could meet and talk to Ami and Rei, who were NPCs (non-player characters).

The three levels were divided into two parts. First, Usagi could walk through the city, school or a health spa, occassionally talking to people. After talking to the right people, Usagi turned into Sailor Moon and entered another kind of level in which she fought numerous enemies.

By default, Sailor Moon could only use kicking attacks. Pressing the "down" button would make Sailor Moon sit down and cry, and if there were rocks on the wall nearby, her high-pitched crying would make the rocks explode and drop special items. These items gave different powers: one enabled her to use Moon Tiara Action for a limited number of times, one made her invincible for a short amount of time, etc.

The bosses were Morga, Kyurene, Jadeite, and Queen Beryl. Sailor Moon actually had to fight Jadeite each time after defeating the two Youma, and at the end of the last level, had to fight him again before facing Queen Beryl.
overview_zh:
《美少女戦士セーラームーン》是 Arc System Works 開發、Angel（Bandai）於 1992 年在 Nintendo Game Boy 上發行的電玩，是首批《美少女戰士》相關電玩之一。

本作中玩家操控月野兔／水手月亮。劇情改編自動畫第一季第一、三、四集。雖然在原集數中尚未登場，遊戲中的兔子可與身為 NPC 的小愛與火野麗對話。

三個關卡分為兩部分。前半段，兔子可在城市、學校或健身房中四處走動，偶爾與人交談。和對的人對話後，兔子會變身為水手月亮，進入另一種關卡與多名敵人作戰。

預設情況下，水手月亮只能使用踢擊。按下方向鍵下，她會坐下哭泣；若附近牆壁上有石塊，她的高音哭聲會將石塊炸開並掉出特殊道具。這些道具帶來不同效果：有的能讓她使用數次月光迴力鏢、有的能讓她短時間無敵等。

頭目依序為 Morga、Kyurene、Jadeite 與 Beryl 女王。每次擊敗兩名 Youma 後，水手月亮都得對戰 Jadeite，最後一關末段也要先再戰 Jadeite，才能對上 Beryl 女王。

overview_en:
Bishoujo Senshi Sailor Moon R was a video game released for the Nintendo Game Boy by Angel Studios in 1994.

In this game, the player could play using "story mode" or "arcade mode." In story mode, the player began play with Usagi Tsukino/Sailor Moon, then Chibiusa, then the Inner Senshi. Gameplay alternated between a story chapter where the player walked around the map and talked to other characters, followed by a platform level, and a boss room. In arcade mode, the player chose a character, and the non-combat parts of the game are skipped.

In both modes, the game was complete after five stages, most of which were rather short. The boss rooms sometimes started with a scene with Tuxedo Mask where the player would receive an extra life for picking up the rose item. Other items the player could pick up included hearts, which refilled some health, cake slices, which refilled more health, and a tiara, which offered a power-up to the character's attacks.
overview_zh:
《美少女戦士セーラームーン R》是 Angel Studios 於 1994 年在 Nintendo Game Boy 上發行的電玩。

本作可選擇「劇情模式」或「街機模式」。劇情模式中，玩家依序使用月野兔／水手月亮、小小兔，再來是內部戰士群進行遊戲。玩法在劇情章節（玩家在地圖上行走並與其他角色對話）、平台關卡與頭目房之間交替。街機模式下玩家自選角色，跳過非戰鬥部分。

兩種模式皆於五個關卡後通關，多數關卡相當短。頭目房有時會以禮服蒙面俠的場景開場，玩家撿起玫瑰道具可獲得額外生命。其他可拾取的道具包括補少量血量的愛心、補較多血量的蛋糕，以及強化角色攻擊的頭飾。

overview_en:
There are only two lakes to fish at and a limited set of lures; unlike the Super NES video game Super Black Bass. Casting is done on an overhead view with a meter for the direction and another meter for the shadow of the fish. Trout, pike, catfish, and the infamous black bass can all be caught in this game.

The Game Boy Color version allows players to play against 99 AI-controlled fishermen. Tournament hours are twelve non-real time hours long and all locations are fictional. Each game originally came with a 40-page instruction manual and a precautions booklet. Both versions of the game notify players when they have lost their lure and/or their fish through a text-based message. Once a player runs out of a certain kind of fishing lure, it cannot be recovered until the next gameplay.
overview_zh:
與 Super NES 上的《Super Black Bass》不同，本作只有兩個湖泊可釣，魚餌種類也有限。投竿採俯瞰視角，並有一條方向計量條與一條顯示魚影位置的計量條。可釣到鱒魚、梭子魚、鯰魚以及著名的黑鱸。

Game Boy Color 版讓玩家可與 99 名 AI 釣手對戰。比賽時間為十二小時（非實時），所有地點皆為虛構。原裝實體版隨附 40 頁說明書與一本注意事項小冊。兩個版本在玩家失去魚餌或讓魚跑掉時都會以文字訊息通知。某種釣餌用完後，要等到下次遊玩才會回復。

overview_en: Blades of Steel differs from the professional game in the NHL in the late 1980s in that it has no offside rule, and its interpretation of penalties is somewhat unique. The game's officials only call two penalties. Players who lose a fistfight are penalized for two minutes, an abstract reworking of the five-minute offsetting majors normally assigned in the event of a fight. Should a fight break out in front of one team's net, then the player on offense gets a penalty shot. The penalty shot is administered in the style of a soccer penalty shot, in that the shooting player must stand on the blue line, instead of moving towards the goaltender. The game also recognizes icing infractions, with an appropriate game reset and faceoff in the liable team's zone.
overview_zh: 《Blades of Steel》與 1980 年代後期 NHL 職業冰球的規則不同，沒有越位規則，對犯規的判定也相當特別。場上裁判只判兩種犯規：在拳賽中落敗的球員會被罰出場兩分鐘——這是對打架時通常開出之五分鐘對等大罰的簡化處理。若打架發生在某隊球門前，則進攻方的球員可獲得罰球。罰球以類似足球罰球的方式進行：射手必須站在藍線上，而不是朝守門員推進。本作也判定 icing 違例，並在違規隊的區域進行重置與爭球。
publisher:
Ultra Games NA
Palcom Software EU
Konami JP

overview_en:
You thought the world would be free of radioactive threats from the underground world after the events of the original Blaster Master yet for reasons unknown several radioactive hotspots sprout from the ground all over the world. Once again you must get into your armour and journey to the underground caves in order to discover the truth behind the new menace.

Blaster Master Boy is a "somewhat" direct sequel of Blaster Master, your mission is to control your character through a series of underground dungeons from a top-down perspective and defeat the enemies you encounter there. You no longer have your trusty tank to take with you in side scrolling areas, nor your grenades, but to aid you in the dungeons you now have the ability to carry special bombs which can be used to kill enemies as well as clear paths through the dungeons à la Bomber King.
overview_zh:
原以為在《Blaster Master》事件後，世界從此擺脫地下世界的輻射威脅，未料數個輻射熱點不知何故再度從地表湧現。你必須再次穿上戰甲，深入地下洞穴，揭開新威脅背後的真相。

《Blaster Master Boy》是某種程度上的《Blaster Master》直接續作。任務是以俯瞰視角操作角色穿過一連串地下迷宮，擊敗沿途遭遇的敵人。這次你不再有那輛可靠的戰車陪你橫向卷軸前行，也沒有手榴彈，但你能攜帶可消滅敵人並像《Bomber King》那樣炸開通路的特殊炸彈來協助闖關。

overview_en:
Blaster Master Jr., known as Blaster Master Boy in North America and Bomber King: Scenario 2 (ボンバーキング　シナリオ2) in Japan, is an action video game developed by Aicom and published by Sunsoft. The game was released in 1991 for Game Boy.

Gameplay and premise:
Players control Jason, the protagonist of Blaster Master, with his car Sophia not present. Players have various abilities, including making Jason fire a gun and plant bombs that can be used to damage enemies and environment. Players will encounter power-ups that will allow Jason to clear obstacles. Players can also upgrade their weapons with other power-ups. Each stage features an exit that requires a key and a boss behind that exit.

Development:
It is a sequel to Robowarrior, a spin-off title in the Bomberman series by Hudson Soft. However, the game was marketed in western territories as a game in the Blaster Master series by Sunsoft. Aside from the title change, the game is the same in all regions.

Reception:
Hardcore Gaming 101 felt that the game was decent for a Game Boy title, but that they would not replay it due to being unremarkable. They speculated that the name change was due to a similarity between Blaster Master's overhead stages and these.
overview_zh:
《Blaster Master Jr.》在北美稱作《Blaster Master Boy》，在日本則名為《ボンバーキング シナリオ2》，是 Aicom 開發、Sunsoft 發行的動作遊戲，於 1991 年在 Game Boy 上推出。

玩法與設定：
玩家操作《Blaster Master》主角 Jason，但少了愛車 Sophia。Jason 可使用槍枝射擊與佈設炸彈，用來傷害敵人或破壞地形。途中會遭遇能讓 Jason 跨越障礙的強化道具，亦可透過其他道具升級武器。每個關卡都有需要鑰匙才能打開的出口，出口後方則有頭目。

開發背景：
本作是 Hudson Soft《Bomberman》系列衍生作《Robowarrior》的續作，但在西方則被定位為 Sunsoft 旗下《Blaster Master》系列的作品。除標題不同外，各地區內容相同。

評價：
Hardcore Gaming 101 認為本作以 Game Boy 標準算可圈可點，但因平庸而無重玩動機。他們推測之所以更名，可能是因為《Blaster Master》的俯瞰關卡與本作風格相近所致。

overview_en: Block Kuzushi GB is an Action game, developed by OeRSTED and published by Pow, which was released in Japan in 1995.
overview_zh: 《ブロックくずし GB》是 OeRSTED 開發、Pow 發行的動作遊戲，於 1995 年在日本推出。

overview_en: Blodia is a Puzzle game, published by Tonkin House, which was released in Japan in 1990.
overview_zh: 《Blodia》是 Tonkin House 發行的益智遊戲，於 1990 年在日本推出。

title_en: BO JACKSON - TWO GAMES IN ONE
no_intro_name: Bo Jackson - Two Games in One (USA)
overview_en: It's two games in one -- play either baseball or football in this game headlined by Bo Jackson. In baseball, you can participate in all the major parts of the ballgame, such as pitching, hitting, and fielding. The field is displayed in 3D using an engine called "3-D Sensation." In football, the field is displayed as an overhead view in 2D with tiny players running around -- a sharp contrast to the graphic style of the baseball portion of the game. The football game allows you to design your own plays and watch them with instant replay.
overview_zh: 二合一遊戲——可選擇棒球或美式足球，由 Bo Jackson 領銜。棒球部分可體驗投球、打擊與守備等比賽主要環節，球場以名為「3-D Sensation」的引擎呈現 3D 畫面。美式足球部分則以 2D 俯瞰視角呈現，球員以小型角色奔跑，視覺風格與棒球部分形成鮮明對比。美式足球模式中玩家可自行設計戰術，並透過即時重播觀看。

overview_en: Create words at home or on the road with Boggle Plus for Game Boy. Based on Parker Brothers' classic board game, which challenges you to create words from randomly generated letter cubes, Boggle Plus also includes additional play variants. "Big Boggle" offers additional letters, while "Anagrams" involves unscrambling jumbled words. "Categories" has you searching for words based on a specific theme, and "Use All" involves forming words with every letter displayed on the screen. Boggle Plus includes a built-in dictionary with 35,000 words and supports head-to-head play via Game Link Cable.
overview_zh: 在家或路上都能輕鬆組字——Game Boy 版《Boggle Plus》。改編自 Parker Brothers 的經典桌遊：玩家需從隨機產生的字母方塊中組成單字。本作另收錄多種變體玩法。「Big Boggle」提供更多字母；「Anagrams」要求重組打亂的單字；「Categories」則需依特定主題尋找單字；「Use All」要求使用畫面上所有字母組成單字。內建 35,000 字辭典，並支援使用通信線進行對戰。

overview_en: Bomb Jack is an Action game, developed by Bit Managers and published by Infogrames, which was released in Europe in 1992.
overview_zh: 《Bomb Jack》是 Bit Managers 開發、Infogrames 發行的動作遊戲，於 1992 年在歐洲推出。

overview_en: Compilation of three GameBoy games in the Bomberman series.
overview_zh: 收錄 Game Boy 上《Bomberman》系列三款作品的合輯。

overview_en:
Bomberman is searching the depths of the earth in hopes of finding the Legendary Treasure.  In the Story Mode, guide him through 48 levels of puzzle-solving action, collecting power-up items and defeating monsters along the way.  The Battle Mode is the old favorite, where one to four players battle it out on six different maps.

* There are 48 challenging levels in Story Mode!
* Classic Battle Mode on the Super Game Boy accessory!
* The SNES Multi-Player Adapter provides four player action with your Super Game Boy.
* Password save feature!
overview_zh:
炸彈超人深入地底，希望能找到傳說中的寶藏。在故事模式中，引導他穿越 48 關充滿解謎與動作的關卡，沿途收集強化道具並擊敗怪物。對戰模式則保留經典玩法，可由一至四名玩家在六種地圖中對戰。

* 故事模式 48 個挑戰關卡！
* 在 Super Game Boy 上享受經典對戰模式！
* 透過 SNES 多人連接器與 Super Game Boy 進行四人對戰。
* 支援密碼存檔功能！

overview_en: Bomberman GB 2 (known simply as Bomberman GB outside Japan) is a game for the original Game Boy and was released in North America in April of 1998. It is the first portable game in the Bomberman series to feature a motif, with an adventurer/treasure hunter theme.
overview_zh: 《Bomberman GB 2》（在日本以外簡稱《Bomberman GB》）是原版 Game Boy 的遊戲，1998 年 4 月在北美推出。本作是《Bomberman》系列首款掌機作品中具備明確主題者，採用冒險家／尋寶者的設定。

overview_en:
The 11th planet of Bomber Nebula, named Owen, faces a sudden earthquake. Deep within its underground, the terrible Evil Bomber had been trapped for ages. He finally rises to power and steals the Bomber Capsules from Bomberman. Bomberman and his friends then vow to take back the Capsules and defeat Evil Bomber...

This game was only released in Japan. It is the last game in the Bomberman GB trilogy and features the appearance of a few new characters like Cutie Bomber.
overview_zh:
炸彈星雲第 11 行星 Owen 突然發生地震。深埋地底多年的可怕 Evil Bomber 終於崛起，奪走了炸彈超人的炸彈太空艙。炸彈超人與夥伴們誓言奪回太空艙、擊敗 Evil Bomber……

本作僅在日本推出，是《Bomberman GB》三部曲的最終作，登場了 Cutie Bomber 等少數新角色。

overview_en: The game's protagonist is Bonk, a strong caveboy who battles anthropomorphic dinosaurs and other prehistoric themed enemies. Bonk's mission is to rescue Princess Za (a small pink Pleisiosaur-type reptile) who has been kidnapped by the evil King Drool (a large, green, Tyrannosaurus-type dinosaur). In the Arcade version, Bonk is also assisted by a female version of himself.
overview_zh: 本作主角是力大無窮的穴居小子 Bonk，他要對抗擬人化恐龍與其他史前主題的敵人。Bonk 的任務是救出被邪惡的 Drool 國王（一頭巨大綠色暴龍型恐龍）擄走的 Za 公主（一隻小小的粉紅蛇頸龍型爬蟲）。在街機版中，Bonk 還有一位女版自己助陣。

overview_en:
In the Game Boy version of this title, Bonk can turn into one of three unique heroes: Master Bonk, Hungry Bonk, or Stealth Bonk. Becoming Master Bonk dresses Bonk in a cape and provides him with Vulcan-esque ears, and gives him the ability to move faster and jump higher. Becoming Hungry Bonk gives Bonk an animalistic appearance with evil eyes and a mouth full of razor-sharp teeth, and gives bonk the ability to chew enemies to death, as well as providing him with a much stronger head-butt that can kill nearby foes. Becoming Stealth Bonk dresses Bonk in a striped jail outfit, and gives him the ability to enter special locked doors that lead to areas such as the bank, where Bonk can collect Smileys, the butcher's, where Bonk can eat more slabs of meat in hope for a different power-up, and jail, where Bonk loses a portion of his Smileys.

Grabbing one of many tulips scattered throughout the game carries Bonk to a special bonus stage where he can face off against Mechabonk -- a RoboCop-esque version of Bonk—in a best-of-three battle to "bonk" one another off the edge of a small stage. Winning two rounds provides Bonk with an extra life, while a loss transforms Bonk into Wounded Bonk, where Bonk resembles a mummy and takes twice as much damage as usual.

The game overall is very similar to games in the Mario series, providing linear, side-scrolling action, multiple power-ups, and several small boss confrontations leading up to a final boss. Its treatment of power-ups is similar as well: taking a hit while powered-up causes Bonk to take no damage but instead lose his power. For those who struggle with the game, the game offers passwords after game-overs so the player does not need to start over from the beginning.
overview_zh:
在 Game Boy 版本中，Bonk 可變身為三種獨特英雄之一：Master Bonk、Hungry Bonk 或 Stealth Bonk。變成 Master Bonk 時，Bonk 會披上斗篷、長出 Vulcan 風格的耳朵，並能更快移動、跳得更高。變成 Hungry Bonk 時，Bonk 會呈現獸性外觀，雙眼陰惡、滿口剃刀般尖牙，並能咬死敵人，同時擁有威力大增、可秒殺鄰近敵人的頭錘。變成 Stealth Bonk 時，Bonk 會穿上條紋囚衣，能夠進入特殊鎖門，前往諸如可收集笑臉的銀行、可吃下更多肉塊以期取得不同強化道具的肉舖，以及讓 Bonk 損失部分笑臉的監獄。

抓取遍佈遊戲中的鬱金香之一，會把 Bonk 帶往特殊獎勵關卡，與 Mechabonk（RoboCop 風格的機械版 Bonk）進行三戰兩勝的對戰，看誰能把對手撞下小場地邊緣。贏下兩局可獲一條額外生命；若敗北，Bonk 會變成 Wounded Bonk，外觀如木乃伊，受到的傷害會加倍。

整體而言本作與《瑪利歐》系列極為相似，採線性橫向卷軸、多種強化道具，以及多個小型頭目戰，最終迎戰大魔王。對強化道具的處理方式也類似：強化狀態下被擊中不會受傷，而是失去能力。對苦戰玩家而言，遊戲在 Game Over 後提供密碼，使玩家不必從頭開始。

overview_en: Kid and Mac, who have traveled back in time from the 23rd century, have to defeat Demon Lord Dante and return to their original era.
overview_zh: 從 23 世紀穿越時空而來的 Kid 與 Mac，必須擊敗魔王 Dante 才能回到自己的時代。

overview_en: This video game stars Boomer (Asmik-kun in the Japanese version), a pink dinosaur, coursing through maze-like levels. Boomer traps enemies by digging holes and letting the enemy fall in them. Boomer can also dig out items and keys needed to complete the levels. Passwords are revealed before and after every boss level. On the top floor is the ultimate boss. Defeat him in order to beat the game.
overview_zh: 本作主角是 Boomer（日版稱作アスミッくん），一隻粉紅色恐龍，要在迷宮般的關卡中前進。Boomer 透過挖洞讓敵人掉入來捕捉敵人，也能挖出物品與通關所需的鑰匙。每個頭目關前後都會出現密碼。最頂層住著最終頭目，擊敗他即可破關。
publisher:
Asmik Ace Entertainment JP
Asmik Corporation of America NA

overview_en:
The game is essentially a series of 36 jigsaw puzzles with Tetris-like pieces known as pentominos that must be assembled into a specific shape. The puzzles start off with rectangular shapes and simple solutions, but the puzzles quickly grow more complex, with odder shapes like a rocket ship, a gun, and even enlarged versions of some of the pentominoes themselves. Each level is timed, and once the timer is started it cannot be stopped until the level is finished. One starts off the game with only three pentomino pieces, and at the completion of each early level, a new piece is awarded to the player. At the final level, the player is given the 2x2 square O tetromino and must complete an 8x8 square puzzle.

After completing each level, the player was given a password to access that level at a later time. Interestingly, each password was a common English four-letter word, so that by guessing common four-letter words, players could potentially access levels they had not actually reached by playing the game.
overview_zh:
本作本質上是 36 道使用 Tetris 風格的「五格骨牌（pentomino）」拼圖，玩家需將之組合成特定形狀。早期關卡為長方形且解法簡單，但難度迅速增加，會出現火箭、槍枝，甚至放大版五格骨牌等更奇特的形狀。每關都有時限，計時開始後便無法暫停，直到關卡完成。遊戲開始時僅有三塊五格骨牌，每完成一關便會獲得一塊新方塊。最終關玩家會拿到 2x2 方形的 O 型四格骨牌，必須完成 8x8 的方形拼圖。

每關完成後皆會給予密碼以便日後直接挑戰該關。有趣的是，每組密碼都是常見的英文四字母單字，因此玩家可藉由猜測常見單字進入未實際打到的關卡。

overview_en: The ultimate underground journey, but be forewarned - nothing less than perfection is required! Boulder Dash will challenge your mind and reflexes like no other game. The objective is to search throughout each cave and collect as many jewels in as short a time as possible. Once the indicated amount has been collected, the door to the mysterious escape tunnel is revealed and you go to the next level. Boulders drop predictably enough, but you and Rockford also have to block growing amoebas, transform butterflies, outmaneuver fireflies, and overcome other numerous obstacles.
overview_zh: 終極地底之旅，但請當心——非完美無瑕不可！《Boulder Dash》將以前所未見的方式挑戰你的腦力與反射神經。目標是在每個洞窟中盡可能於短時間內收集大量寶石。一旦達到指定數量，神秘逃脫通道之門便會出現，玩家便可前往下一關。落石會以可預測的方式落下，但你和 Rockford 仍須阻擋擴張中的變形蟲、轉化蝴蝶、智取螢火蟲，並克服其他眾多障礙。
publisher:
Victor Interactive Software JP
Nintendo EU

overview_en: The player must maneuver boxes in a warehouse in order to make enough money to woo his desired girlfriend.
overview_zh: 玩家必須在倉庫中搬運箱子，賺取足夠的錢追求心儀的女孩。

overview_en: The player must maneuver boxes in a warehouse in order to make enough money to woo his desired girlfriend.
overview_zh: 玩家必須在倉庫中搬運箱子，賺取足夠的錢追求心儀的女孩。

overview_en: An unusual puzzle game that involves manipulating mirrors in order to complete objectives. You'll advance across 120 levels while trying to eliminate specific obstacles, such as gas spheres, satellites, and computer-controlled "electrobrains," by aiming the mirrors to reflect laser beams. A password system is used to resume progress.
overview_zh: 別具一格的解謎遊戲，玩法是操作鏡子來達成關卡目標。你將通過 120 個關卡，藉由瞄準鏡子反射雷射光，消除諸如氣體球、衛星與電腦控制的「電子腦」等指定障礙物。遊戲使用密碼系統續玩。

overview_en:
Brain Drain is a puzzle game in which the player has to recreate a pattern, consisting of different symbols like apples or hearts, which is shown in the corner of the screen. The main playing field consists of said symbols, but randomly switched around. The player controls a frame which encloses four of the symbols. When pressing a button, the symbols are rotated clockwise around the frame. Of course the levels have to be solved within a time limit.

In the higher difficulty levels, the player also has to deal with so-called special effects which occasionally kick in during play, e.g. some symbols get hidden by "?" blocks, symbols rotate on their own or the controls are reversed. Three power-ups can be earned by completing bonus levels or finishing a level really fast: clock (stops time for 20 seconds), flash (skips the current level) and credit (gives a second try after time has run out). Clock and flash have to be activated manually; credits is applied automatically. Besides the regular playing mode, there is also the "Brain Race" available which involves solving a certain number of levels (depending on the difficulty) as fast as possible.
overview_zh:
《Brain Drain》是一款解謎遊戲，玩家必須重現畫面角落顯示、由蘋果或愛心等不同符號組成的圖樣。主場地由這些符號組成，但已隨機打亂。玩家操作一個方框框住四個符號，按下按鈕會讓方框內的符號順時針旋轉。當然，每關都有時限。

在較高難度中，玩家還必須應付不時觸發的特殊效果，例如部分符號被「?」方塊遮蓋、符號自行旋轉，或操作方向反轉。完成獎勵關卡或極快通關，可獲得三種強化道具：時鐘（停時 20 秒）、閃電（跳過當前關卡）、Credit（時間用盡時可再試一次）。時鐘與閃電需手動啟動，Credit 則自動套用。除一般模式外，本作另有「Brain Race」模式，需依難度設定盡快完成一定數量的關卡。
publisher:
Acclaim NA
Acclaim Japan JP
Bandai EU

overview_en:
While based on the 1992 film of the same name, the game had very little to do with the actual movie. Several weapons can be used; ranging from the basic knife to the advanced shotgun weapon.

The 16-bit renditions of the game were straightforward hack and slash games where players had to slash generic enemies in order to get to Dracula. There is a time limit that forces players to move quickly around the levels. Each chapter of the game starts off with a cover from a book. Checkpoints are used to maintain progress in a level after losing a life. Each level has a daytime and night time equivalent.
