A boss appears at the end of each night time level in order to test the playing skills and to reinforce the concepts that were taught in the daytime version of the level.

The player controls a young lawyer named Jonathan Harker. Harker must free himself from Dracula's capture, follow him to London, and end his reign of terror.
overview_zh:
雖以 1992 年同名電影為基礎，但與電影內容關聯極少。可使用多種武器，從基本的小刀到進階的散彈槍應有盡有。

16 位元版本是直觀的砍殺遊戲，玩家必須砍翻一般敵人前進至 Dracula。關卡有時間限制，迫使玩家加速行動。每章開頭以一本書的封面起始。關卡內以檢查點維持失去生命後的進度。每關都有白天版與夜晚版兩種；夜晚版終局會出現頭目戰，用以驗收白天版所教的概念。

玩家操作年輕律師 Jonathan Harker，必須先脫離 Dracula 的囚禁、追隨他至倫敦，最終終結他的恐怖統治。

overview_en:
In the game, the player must move the cursor amongst a grid of different colored squares. All squares must be "removed", and squares can only be removed if they are directly touching two or more squares of the same color. Once squares are removed, blocks then shift downward and either to the left or right, to fill in the blanks. The game ends when either all blocks are removed, or time has run out.

If the player comes to a point in which none of the remaining square match, a few options remain. A few "special items" help clear out blocks that don't necessarily match, such as an airplane block that eliminates a full line of square in the direction it is pointed in, or a block of dynamite that blows up every square touching it. Additionally, the player can also chose to drop new, randomly generated squares into the equation.
overview_zh:
玩家須在不同顏色的方塊網格中移動游標。所有方塊都必須「移除」，且只有當該方塊直接接觸到兩個或更多同色方塊時才能消除。方塊移除後，其餘方塊會向下並向左或右滑動填補空缺。當所有方塊被消除或時間耗盡時遊戲結束。

當剩下的方塊全無法配對時，仍有幾項補救方案。一些「特殊道具」可清除不必同色的方塊：例如可消除指定方向整列的飛機方塊，或炸毀所有相鄰方塊的炸藥方塊。此外，玩家亦可選擇隨機投放新方塊以打破僵局。

overview_en:
Bubble Bobble is the story of two humans, Bub and Bob who wander into the mysterious cave of monsters and magically turn into dinosaurs. The only way to transform back is to reach the end of the cave...

Bubble Bobble is a platform game, with each level being a single screen. The enemies must be cleared from a level to go to the next one. With one player controlling Bub and the other controlling Bob, the player can jump and collect items for points (such as fruit). The real power Bub and Bob have however is the ability to blow bubbles. These bubbles can be as platforms to leap on, or to trap enemies. Enemies trapped in a bubble must be popped by jumping into them, wherein they'll turn to fruit. Additionally, power-ups sometimes float by in bubbles. They include lightning, which flies out horizontally at enemies, and water, which drags the player and enemies straight down flowing over platforms. Taking too long to complete any level will summon Baron Von Blubba, who will float around the screen trying to destroy the player.
overview_zh:
《Bubble Bobble》講述兩個人類 Bub 與 Bob 誤入神秘怪物洞窟，被魔法變成恐龍。要變回人形，唯一的辦法就是抵達洞窟盡頭……

本作是平台遊戲，每關為單一畫面，必須清除敵人才能進入下一關。一名玩家操作 Bub，另一名操作 Bob，可跳躍並收集水果等物品得分。但 Bub 與 Bob 真正的能力是吐泡泡——這些泡泡可作為跳躍平台，也能困住敵人。被泡泡困住的敵人需被跳擊戳破，便會變成水果。此外，泡泡偶爾會帶著強化道具飄過，例如水平射出的閃電、能將玩家與敵人垂直拉下並越過平台的水柱。任何一關拖太久都會召出 Baron Von Blubba，他會在畫面中漂浮並攻擊玩家。

overview_en:
The objective is to guide a bubble throughout a number of halls in a haunted house. If the bubble hits any walls or obstacles, then it will pop and the player loses a life. Obstacles include lit candles, electricity and fans. These can be all controlled by the ghost, who can wander around the level freely and blow at things - such as the bubble to add speed, the candle to put out the flame, or switches to turn them on or off.

It was the first French game adapted for the Game Boy.
overview_zh:
目標是引導泡泡穿越鬧鬼宅邸的一連串走廊。泡泡若撞上牆壁或障礙物便會破掉、扣去一條命。障礙物包括燃燒的蠟燭、電力與電風扇。這些都可由能在關卡內自由移動、並可吹氣的鬼魂控制——例如吹泡泡加速、吹熄蠟燭，或撥動開關以開關設備。

本作是首款移植到 Game Boy 的法國遊戲。

overview_en:
Defeat droves of dive bombing penguins! Squash squadrons of flying pigs! Trash tons of turbo-powered sheep!
It's all waiting for you in this wacky, whirlwind adventure through the Amazatorium.

Three wild worlds, two mind-boggling mini-games, and one totally cool bobcat named Bubsy!

- Nine fabulous, fur-flyin' levels
- About a bazillion barnyard bad guys including Oinker P. Hamm
- Mega-cool mini-games such as Frogapult (the ultimate in amphibian fun) and Liquid Lunacy (super duper deep sea silliness)
- Great graphics and awesome animations
overview_zh:
擊潰俯衝企鵝大軍！痛扁飛天豬部隊！碾爛渦輪羊群！
它們全都在這場 Amazatorium 中的瘋狂冒險裡等著你。

三個狂野世界、兩個讓人頭暈目眩的小遊戲，外加一隻超酷的山貓 Bubsy！

- 九個狂飆毛皮飛舞的精彩關卡
- 上百萬隻農場壞蛋，包括 Oinker P. Hamm
- 兩款超讚小遊戲，例如 Frogapult（究極兩棲樂趣）與 Liquid Lunacy（深海超級胡鬧）
- 出色畫面與精彩動畫

overview_en: An Asian only  release containing "Bugs Bunny" and "Crazy Castle II".
overview_zh: 亞洲限定發售，內含《Bugs Bunny》與《Crazy Castle II》。

no_intro_name: Bugs Bunny Crazy Castle, The (USA, Europe)

overview_en:
The player starts out with a relatively weak cannon but can upgrade to ring, laser, and missile weapons, which are much more powerful. The player can also choose from three difficulty settings: Eagle, Albatross, and Ace; but the fourth difficulty setting, Ultimate, must be unlocked. One proceeds by controlling the character in 8 directions and can shoot in a different direction from the direction he is looking.

Burai Fighter is a single player two dimensional automatic sidescroller. It has three difficulty levels to choose from. At the start, the screen moves from left to right, but it can move in all four directions and even change directions in the same level. The player is expected to keep up, because getting stuck on the edge means you die. You start out with a basic gun that you can fire in all eight directions. You can hold the fire button to lock your firing position. You float through space blowing up robots that sort of look like animals most of the time. At the end of a level you must defeat a boss to continue to the next level. At times, you may find a gap at the side of the screen. If you time it right and push in that direction, the orientation of the screen will change and take you into a secret room with some power ups. However, the higher difficulty levels have fewer secret rooms and your timing also needs to be perfect. This means you can quite simply walk into a death trap. The game is fairly linear otherwise, but there are a few forks in the road where you can either travel on the left side or the right side of the screen for a little while. If you pick the wrong side, you need to be an exceptionally skilled player to make it out of there.
overview_zh:
玩家初始僅有相對較弱的火砲，但可升級為環、雷射與飛彈等威力更強的武器。可從三種難度中選擇：Eagle、Albatross 與 Ace；第四種難度 Ultimate 須解鎖。角色可朝八方移動，且射擊方向可與面向不同。

《Burai Fighter》是單人 2D 自動橫向卷軸遊戲，提供三種難度。畫面起初由左向右移動，但可在同一關卡內朝任意方向移動，甚至改變方向。玩家必須跟上節奏，被卡在邊緣即代表死亡。一開始的基本槍枝可朝八方射擊，按住射擊鍵可固定射擊方向。你會在太空中漂浮，擊毀那些大多看來像是動物造型的機器人。每關末須擊敗頭目才能前進。有時你會在畫面側邊發現缺口，若時機抓得準並朝該方向推進，畫面方向會改變，把你帶入藏有強化道具的密室。然而高難度下密室更少、時機要求也更嚴苛，這意味著你也可能就此踏入死亡陷阱。本作整體相當線性，但偶有分歧路口可選擇沿畫面左側或右側前進一段距離。若選錯邊，需具備相當高超的技巧才能脫困。

overview_en:
Based on BurgerTime, the Arcade classic from 1982, BurgerTime Deluxe once again puts you in the role of chef Peter Pepper, a guy who can really build a burger. You maneuver the cook up and down ladders and left and right across floors in order to walk across various parts of giant hamburgers, such as large lettuce, big buns and massive meat patties. After you cross any section of any hamburger, it will drop one level and push any other burger part within that stack down a floor as well. The object of the game is to build all the hamburgers in each stage by dropping all the makings of each burger into completed stacks at the bottom of the screen.

As you go about your burger building business, Food Foes Mr. Pickle, Mr. Egg and Mr. Hot dog (also known as Frank N. Furter) will chase after you. You can destroy these culinary cutups by trapping them in falling burger parts or by tricking them into walking on a burger part you are in the process of dropping. To freeze the Food Foes, you can sprinkle a dash of pepper on them. You begin the game with a small pepper supply and can pick up additional pepper shakers that appear throughout the levels. You can also pick up bonus points (in the guise of cups and saucers) and extra lives.

Unlike the original BurgerTime, which had less than 10 different non-scrolling screens, BurgerTime Deluxe has seven levels with four stages in each level for a grand total of 28 screens, most of which scroll to some degree. A password feature enables you to return to the beginning of last level you played. Also, this version of the game features a two-player competitive mode (as long as you have two copies of the game, an extra Game Boy, and a link cable).
overview_zh:
改編自 1982 年的街機經典《BurgerTime》，《BurgerTime Deluxe》再度讓你扮演廚師 Peter Pepper——一個真正的築堡高手。操作他在梯子間上下移動、在樓層左右奔跑，跨越巨大漢堡的各部分，例如大片生菜、巨型麵包與厚實肉排。當你跨越任何一層任意漢堡部位後，該部位會掉落一層，並把同一疊上的其他部分往下擠一層。目標是把每關所有漢堡的食材組合堆疊到畫面底部，築出完整漢堡。

築堡途中，食物大敵 Pickle 先生、Egg 先生與 Hot dog 先生（亦稱 Frank N. Furter）會追著你跑。你可以把它們困在掉落的漢堡部分中、或誘騙它們踩上你正準備落下的部位來消滅它們。撒一把胡椒可使食物大敵暫時定格。遊戲開始你只有少量胡椒，可在關卡中拾取額外的胡椒罐。也能撿到獎勵分數（以杯盤呈現）與額外生命。

與原版《BurgerTime》僅有不到 10 個非卷軸畫面不同，《BurgerTime Deluxe》共有 7 大關，每關 4 小關，總計 28 個畫面，多數會卷動。密碼功能可讓你回到上次遊玩的關卡開頭。本版本還支援雙人對戰（需準備兩份遊戲、一台額外的 Game Boy 與通信線）。

overview_en: Burning Paper is a Puzzle game, developed by Pixel and published by LOZC G. Amusements, which was released in Japan in 1993.
overview_zh: 《Burning Paper》是 Pixel 開發、LOZC G. Amusements 發行的益智遊戲，於 1993 年在日本推出。

overview_en: Bust-A-Move 2 is a puzzle game that involves clearing or "popping" groups of bubbles by creating matches of three or more. A pointing device at the bottom of the screen is used to aim and launch a randomly generated bubble toward others of the same shade or pattern. Since launched bubbles can ricochet off walls, the challenge comes from estimating the angle you'll need to create potential matches. Clear each stage before the ceiling reaches the screen's bottom and you'll safely advance. The Game Boy version offers three play modes and a password save feature. You can challenge a series of 13 computer opponents, complete 100 puzzle levels, and race to clear 50 screens with the time attack option.
overview_zh: 《Bust-A-Move 2》是一款解謎遊戲，玩法是製造三顆以上同色泡泡的連線以「爆破」泡泡群。畫面下方有指針用以瞄準並射出隨機產生的泡泡至同色或同圖案的泡泡上。射出的泡泡會在牆壁間反彈，挑戰之處在於估算所需角度造成連線。在天花板降至畫面底部前清空關卡即可順利過關。Game Boy 版提供三種模式並有密碼存檔。可挑戰 13 名電腦對手、完成 100 道謎題關卡，或在計時模式中盡快清掉 50 個畫面。

overview_en:
Bust-A-Move 3 DX is the same game as Bust-A-Move '99. Besides the obvious differences because of technical limitations of the platform, e.g. the bubbles have to differentiated from of their shades instead of colour, it also has less playing modes. Only the arcade mode (a port of the original arcade version with the main singleplayer campaign or the possibility to challenge an AI opponent) and the challenge mode (beating a series of 25 levels as fast as possible) are available. 

Regarding gameplay, this is a tile matching game. There are bubbles of varying shades at the top of the screen and the player controls a stationary cannon at the bottom of the screen. The cannon is loaded with one bubble at the time and the direction of the shot can be varied left and right. The goal is to clear the screen by matching bubbles of the same colour.
overview_zh:
《Bust-A-Move 3 DX》與《Bust-A-Move '99》本質上是同一款遊戲。除了平台技術限制造成的差異（例如泡泡需以濃淡而非顏色區分）外，模式也較少。僅提供街機模式（即原街機版的單人主戰役，亦可挑戰 AI 對手）與挑戰模式（盡快通過 25 關）。

玩法上是配對消除遊戲：畫面上方有不同濃淡的泡泡，玩家操作底部固定的發射器。發射器一次裝填一顆泡泡，可向左右調整射擊方向，目標是配對同色泡泡並清除整個畫面。

overview_en: Eliminate bouncing balls in destinations around the world in Buster Bros. for Game Boy. Based on the 1989 arcade game, Buster Bros. has you guiding a pith helmet clad sibling in 50 levels across 17 cities. Aim a harpoon, grappling hook, or gun at each ball. A successful hit results in the sphere splitting into two or more targets, and play continues until all balls are removed from the screen. Avoid contact with the spheres by moving left and right, and collect assorted power-ups to help complete each stage. Two Game Boy owners can engage in cooperative play via Game Link Cable
overview_zh: 於世界各地的場景中消除彈跳的球——Game Boy 版《Buster Bros.》。改編自 1989 年的街機作品，本作中你將引導一對戴著頭盔的兄弟，跨越 17 座城市的 50 個關卡。用魚叉、鉤爪或槍瞄準每顆球，命中後球會分裂成兩顆或更多目標，遊戲持續直到所有球被消除。透過左右移動避開球體，並收集各種強化道具助你過關。兩位 Game Boy 玩家可透過通信線進行合作模式。

publisher:
Arcadia Systems NA
Ocean EU
Coconuts Japan JP

overview_en: Capcom Quiz: Hatena? no Daibouken is a trivia game published by Capcom for the Game Boy platform. The game was only released in Japan.
overview_zh: 《Capcom Quiz：はてな?の大冒険》是 Capcom 在 Game Boy 平台發行的問答遊戲，僅在日本推出。

overview_en: The Red Skull is using a mind-control device to unite the world's most dreaded super-villains under his command. The call goes out to the world's mightiest team of superheroes: AVENGERS ASSEMBLE! As Captain America, Iron Man, Hawkeye or Vision, it's up to you and a friend to foil the Red Skull's fiendish plan for world domination. Battle enemies like Whirlwind, Living Laser, Klaw, Grim Reaper and more! Live the Marvel legend in this picture-perfect translation of the blockbuster arcade smash!
overview_zh: 紅骷髏正以心智控制裝置統合世界上最可怕的超級反派。號召響起：復仇者集合！扮演美國隊長、鋼鐵人、鷹眼或幻視，與好友一同粉碎紅骷髏稱霸世界的奸計。對抗 Whirlwind、Living Laser、Klaw、Grim Reaper 等敵人！在這款完美還原街機熱賣作的版本中，重溫漫威傳奇！

title_en: CAPTAIN TSUBASA J - ZENKOKU SEIHA E NO CHOUSEN
no_intro_name: Captain Tsubasa J - Zenkoku Seiha e no Chousen (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en: Captain Tsubasa J: Zenkoku Seiha e no Chousen is a soccer game developed and published by Bandai for the Game Boy platform.
overview_zh: 《キャプテン翼 J - 全国制覇への挑戦》是 Bandai 在 Game Boy 平台開發、發行的足球遊戲。

overview_en:
Captain Tsubasa VS is a soccer RPG/Strategy hybrid that plays out in a cinematic perspective. The game is based on the popular Japanese manga/anime of the same name and was released exclusively to Japan. As the game's title states, the game has a versus mode, which allows two Game Boys to be linked for 2-player versus play.

Captain Tsubasa VS is a prequel to the first Famicom game and plays identical to other Captain Tsubasa games published by Tecmo.
overview_zh:
《Captain Tsubasa VS》是一款結合 RPG 與策略要素、以電影般視角呈現的足球遊戲。本作改編自同名熱門日本漫畫／動畫，僅在日本推出。如標題所示，本作具備對戰模式，可透過連接兩台 Game Boy 進行二人對戰。

《Captain Tsubasa VS》是首款 Famicom 作品的前傳，玩法與 Tecmo 發行的其他《Captain Tsubasa》作品相同。

overview_en: Card Game is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Marionette and published by Coconuts Japan, which was released in Japan in 1990.
overview_zh: 《Card Game》是 Marionette 開發、Coconuts Japan 發行的雜項類遊戲，於 1990 年在日本推出。

overview_en: All the famous games of chance and skill are right in your hands whenever you want to try your luck. Take a spin on SLots or play for big stakes with Video Poker. Move over to the Craps table the Roulette wheel or take on the dealer with Blackjack. Or select tournament Mode and tour the casino for a series of dramatic turns of fate. For ages 12 and up. Experience the thrill of Las Vegas action.
overview_zh: 所有著名的機運與技巧博弈遊戲都在你掌中，隨時可以試試手氣。轉一把吃角子老虎，或在視訊撲克下大注。移到雙骰桌、輪盤桌，或在二十一點上挑戰荷官。或者選擇錦標賽模式，巡迴賭場體驗一連串戲劇性的命運轉折。建議 12 歲以上玩家。感受拉斯維加斯的刺激。

overview_en: Loosely follows the plot line of the 1995 film of the same name.
overview_zh: 鬆散改編自 1995 年同名電影。

overview_en: A platform game with some distinctive unique features. The player character, a small creature called Julius, is on a mission to destroy eight towers that have been built in the sea, by planting bombs at the towers' peaks. Julius's progress is hindered by enemies and obstacles, which he has to avoid in order to reach the top of the tower
overview_zh: 一款具備獨特特色的平台遊戲。玩家角色為一個名叫 Julius 的小生物，任務是在塔頂裝設炸彈，摧毀建在海上的八座塔。Julius 前進的途中會被敵人與障礙物阻擋，他必須加以閃避才能登上塔頂。
publisher:
Triffix NA
The Sales Curve EU
Hiro JP

overview_en: A strategy game from Hudson that's played like a board game mixed with card battle confrontations. Your goal is to topple kings. You take turns moving your pieces one at a time. The player who topples an opposing king wins the round. But being a good chess player won't be enough to win. With magical attacks and Card Roulette to contend with, you'll have to be lucky too. In Quest Mode there are 24 kings to defeat, and the last is that fearsome King of Magic, Baron
overview_zh: Hudson 推出的策略遊戲，玩法結合棋盤遊戲與卡牌戰鬥。目標是擊倒對方的王。玩家輪流逐一移動棋子，先擊倒對方王者贏得該回合。但僅靠下棋功力還不夠，要對付各種魔法攻擊與「Card Roulette」（卡牌輪盤），運氣同樣不可少。任務模式中共有 24 位王者要擊敗，最後一位是令人聞之色變的魔法王 Baron。

no_intro_name: Castlevania II - Belmont's Revenge (USA, Europe) (Castlevania Anniversary Collection)
overview_en:
Castlevania II: Belmont's Revenge (ドラキュラ伝説 II Dracula Densetsu II?, lit. "The Legend of Dracula II"), is an action-adventure platformer game developed and published by Konami for the Nintendo Game Boy handheld system and it is the second Castlevania game to be released on that system. It is the direct sequel to the system's previous title, Castlevania: The Adventure, and has Christopher Belmont, the star of the previous game, returning in a protagonist role, now on a quest to rescue his son, Soleil, from the powers of evil. The game was released in Japan on July 12, 1991, North America in August, 1991, and in Europe on November 26, 1992.
In 1998, the game was re-released for the classic Game Boy as part of Konami GB Collection, Vol. 3. The compilation featured Super Game Boy utilization and a picture frame. The collection, named Konami GB Collection, Vol. 4, was released in 2000 on the Game Boy Color in Europe, with new color schemes added to each stage of the game.

This game is sometimes referred to as "Castlevania: The Adventure II: Belmont’s Revenge", after the first Castlevania game for the Game Boy, to avoid confusion with the similarly-titled Castlevania II: Simon's Quest. However, that is not the game's official name.

The game takes place exactly one century before the original Castlevania game.
overview_zh:
《Castlevania II: Belmont's Revenge》（ドラキュラ伝説 II，意為「德古拉傳說 II」）是 Konami 為任天堂 Game Boy 掌機開發、發行的動作冒險平台遊戲，是該掌機上的第二款《Castlevania》。本作為前作《Castlevania: The Adventure》的直接續作，由前作主角 Christopher Belmont 再度出任主角，這次踏上自邪惡力量手中拯救其子 Soleil 的旅程。本作於 1991 年 7 月 12 日在日本、1991 年 8 月在北美、1992 年 11 月 26 日在歐洲發行。
1998 年，本作以《Konami GB Collection, Vol. 3》合輯之一在原版 Game Boy 上重新發行，合輯支援 Super Game Boy 並附有相框功能。2000 年另以《Konami GB Collection, Vol. 4》之名於歐洲 Game Boy Color 發行，每關皆加入新的配色。

為避免與標題相近的《Castlevania II: Simon's Quest》混淆，本作有時也被稱作《Castlevania: The Adventure II: Belmont's Revenge》（取自前一款 Game Boy 上《Castlevania》的名稱），但這並非官方名稱。

劇情時間設定於原作《Castlevania》的整整一個世紀之前。

overview_en: Every legend has a beginning. Now discover the beginning of the Castlevania Legend in Castlevania Legends for Game Boy. In this single-player adventure, you play as Sonia Belmont, the very first in the line of vampire hunting Belmonts. Use your whip to fend off the forces of darkness, as you work your way through six stages of non-linear gameplay. Explore the legendary areas of Castlevania, including the surrounding forest and the infamous clock tower. Don't forget to collect hearts from the torches that litter the stages to gain extra lives. Adjustable difficulty settings allow you to choose the skill level at which you want to play. At the end of it all, Count Dracula himself awaits. Can you defeat him and put the evil to rest for another 100 years?
overview_zh: 每段傳說都有起點。在 Game Boy 版《Castlevania Legends》中，揭曉惡魔城傳說的開端。在這款單人冒險中，你將扮演 Sonia Belmont——吸血鬼獵人 Belmont 一族的最初繼承者。揮舞鞭子抵禦黑暗勢力，挑戰六個非線性關卡。探索惡魔城眾多傳奇場景，包括周圍森林與惡名昭彰的鐘塔。別忘了從關卡中四散的火把上敲出愛心以獲得額外生命。可調整的難度設定讓你選擇適合的挑戰程度。最後等著你的，是德古拉伯爵本人。你能擊敗他、再次將邪惡封印一百年嗎？

overview_en:
Castlevania: The Adventure (ドラキュラ伝説 Dracula Densetsu, "The Legend of Dracula") is an action-adventure platformer video game, part of the Castlevania series, for the Nintendo Game Boy handheld system. It was the first entry in the series released on a handheld system. The game is known in Japan as Dracula Densetsu, which translates to English as The Legend of Dracula. It was released in Japan on October 27, 1989, and in North America on December, 1989. It was released in Europe and other PAL regions in 1990.
In 1997, the game was re-released for the classic Game Boy as part of Konami GB Collection, Vol. 1. The compilation featured Super Game Boy utilization and a picture frame. The collection was released in 2000 on the Game Boy Color in Europe, with new color schemes added to each stage of the game. It also became available for download on special flash RAM cartridge through the Nintendo Power service in Japan.

The original version of Castlevania: The Adventure became available on the 3DS Virtual Console in 2012 in Japan, Europe and North America. A remake of the game belonging to the ReBirth series by Konami was later released via WiiWare in 2009.

Plot
Transylvania, a small country in Europe, is associated even today with a demon's legend. With his powerful evil power, the legacy of Count Dracula has been dreaded by the people. However, no matter how many times Dracula comes back, he never manages to fully change the world into darkness as he is always put away by Simon, a descendant of the Belmont clan.

However, the devil Dracula has existed long before his first confrontation. Not as the devil Dracula, but as an evil sorcerer. Count Dracula was a fanatical demon worshiper, who built a dark castle at the outskirts of Transylvania and conducted evil rituals every night. He has summoned several demons from the other world to serve him and he himself has been trying to get eternal life by becoming a demon king possessing evil powers.

With each day, Count Dracula's evil powers became more frightening, as he spread fear and terror to the people of the village. Until one day, a man stood up. It was Christopher, an ancestor of the Belmont family. Christopher rushed to the dark castle. Many demons and traps laid out are waiting for him at the castle. Will he be able to defeat the transformed devil, Count Dracula, as expected?
— Official Japanese instruction booklet story for Castlevania: The Adventure.
overview_zh:
《Castlevania: The Adventure》（ドラキュラ伝説，意為「德古拉傳說」）是任天堂 Game Boy 掌機上的動作冒險平台遊戲，屬《Castlevania》系列。本作為該系列首款掌機作品。日版名稱譯為英文即《The Legend of Dracula》。本作於 1989 年 10 月 27 日在日本、1989 年 12 月在北美推出，並於 1990 年在歐洲及其他 PAL 地區發行。
1997 年，本作收錄於原版 Game Boy 上的《Konami GB Collection, Vol. 1》，合輯支援 Super Game Boy 並附相框功能。2000 年於歐洲 Game Boy Color 上推出，每關皆加入新配色。本作亦曾透過日本 Nintendo Power 服務以特殊快閃 RAM 卡帶下載。

原版《Castlevania: The Adventure》於 2012 年起陸續在日本、歐洲與北美的 3DS Virtual Console 上推出。Konami 後又推出歸屬「ReBirth」系列的重製作，於 2009 年透過 WiiWare 發行。

劇情：
位於歐洲的小國 Transylvania，至今仍與惡魔的傳說相連。借助強大的邪惡力量，德古拉伯爵的後裔長期令人聞風喪膽。然而無論德古拉復活幾次，他始終無法將世界完全籠罩於黑暗之中，因為總是被 Belmont 一族的後人 Simon 擊敗。

但其實惡魔德古拉早在第一次對決前便已存在——當時並非以惡魔德古拉之名，而是身為一名邪惡巫師。德古拉伯爵是一位狂熱的惡魔信徒，在 Transylvania 邊陲建造黑暗城堡，每夜舉行邪惡儀式。他從異界召喚數名惡魔為其效命，並企圖透過化身為擁有邪惡之力的魔王而獲得永生。

隨著日子過去，德古拉伯爵的邪惡力量越發駭人，村民飽受恐懼蹂躪。直到某天，一個男人挺身而出。他是 Belmont 一族的祖先 Christopher。Christopher 衝向那座黑暗城堡，城內潛伏著無數惡魔與陷阱。他能否如預期擊敗化身惡魔的德古拉？
— 摘自《Castlevania: The Adventure》日版說明書原始劇情。

overview_en:
Banished to a mysterious underground labyrinth of complex mazes, two explorers are faced with one chance to reverse the curse: solve all 100 puzzles set out in mazes before them.

But watch it! Every maze has monsters patrolling the depths of the labyrinth. Help Catgirl and Catboy push around huge blocks to bridge a path to yet another maze, or topple a block a few stories over the pursuing monsters. If you make a mistake, simply use the rewind function and travel back in time to correct it. With 100 mazes in this labyrinth, it will be quite a challenge to get out of the curse’s reach.

Catrap is more than just a game of mindbending intrigue and action. Be the architect of the underground labyrinth and make your own games of intricate mazes.

Whether you choose to be a maze builder or a maze solver, we know you can help Catboy and Catgirl land on their feet.
overview_zh:
兩名探險者被放逐到神秘的地下迷宮，這座由複雜迷宮組成的地下世界，他們唯一逆轉詛咒的機會：解開眼前 100 道謎題。

但要小心！每個迷宮深處都有怪物巡邏。協助 Catgirl 與 Catboy 推動巨大方塊搭出通往下一個迷宮的橋樑，或將方塊推下幾層砸向追擊的怪物。若不慎犯錯，使用倒帶功能即可回到先前修正。100 個迷宮等著挑戰，要逃出詛咒範圍可不容易。

《Catrap》不只是一款充滿燒腦與動作的遊戲，你還能化身為地下迷宮的設計者，自製複雜謎題。

無論你選擇當迷宮設計者或解謎者，相信你都能幫 Catboy 與 Catgirl 順利落地。
publisher:
ASK Kodansha JP
Asmik Ace Entertainment NA

overview_en:
You have come to the northern village Karuzu. As this village is surrounded by four dungeons many apprentice adventurers like yourself come here to improve their skill (level), there’s talk of the underground labyrinth (dungeon) being challenged day and night.

The leader of the adventurers guild said “You should train in the dungeon if you want to become a full-fledged adventurer. You appear to have some basic equipment, although the quest (objective) will be impossible to achieve with those alone. You should go get some items from the master of the forest. If you enter the dungeon, nobody will come to help. You need to be careful.”

Experience things as a true adventurer and do your best. Good luck.
overview_zh:
你來到了北方的村莊 Karuzu。這座村莊四周被四座迷宮環繞，許多像你一樣的見習冒險者來此磨練功力（等級），據說地下迷宮日夜都有人在挑戰。

冒險者公會的會長說：「想成為獨當一面的冒險者，你應該到迷宮裡鍛鍊。看你裝備尚可，但光靠這些是無法達成任務（目標）的。先去森林之主那邊取些道具吧。一旦進入迷宮，沒有人會去救你。要小心。」

以真正的冒險者身分體驗一切，盡你所能。祝你好運。

overview_en:
The classic arcade hit CENTIPEDE comes to Game Boy Color in this slightly enhanced version of the old favorite. This one- or two-player game has you firing pesticide at an oncoming centipede that is threatening the garden. As the pest weaves its way through the mushrooms dispersed throughout the screen, you'll have to use strategy as well as quickness to fight it off. The classic gameplay is replicated perfectly in this arcade port. 
DMG-AC4E-USA
overview_zh:
經典街機名作《CENTIPEDE》登上 Game Boy Color，本作為原作的略微強化版。一至兩名玩家可朝著入侵花園的蜈蚣噴灑殺蟲劑。蜈蚣會在散佈於畫面中的蘑菇間穿梭，玩家必須兼具策略與反應才能擊退牠。本街機移植版完美重現了經典玩法。
DMG-AC4E-USA

overview_en:
Chachamaru Boukenki 3: Abyss no Tou is a Role-Playing game, published by Human Entertainment, which was released exclusively in Japan in 1991.

Interestingly, the main character was modeled after a developer at Human that later would appear as referee in a Fire Pro Wrestling for Super Famicom.
overview_zh:
《Chachamaru Boukenki 3: Abyss no Tou》是 Human Entertainment 發行的角色扮演遊戲，1991 年僅在日本推出。

有趣的是，主角的造型參考自 Human 的一名開發人員，該員後來也以裁判身分出現在 Super Famicom 的《Fire Pro Wrestling》中。

overview_en: Jump and bounce through devilishly designed levels to collect the crystals needed to defeat the bosses in this sequel to the unreleased Virtual Boy game Bound High
overview_zh: 在精心設計的關卡中跳躍彈跳，蒐集擊敗頭目所需的水晶。本作為未發售的 Virtual Boy 遊戲《Bound High》的續作。

overview_en: The game is a straightforward, virtual version of pool, and includes several games: eight-ball, nine-ball, three-ball, ten-ball, fifteen-ball, straight pool (14.1 continuous), rotation, equal offense, and speed pool. The player may play against the computer or up to seven other players using the same console using the "Party Pool" (multiplayer) option. Other gameplay modes include "Tournament" (single-player, computer opponents), "Freestyle" (players make up own game rules), and "Challenge" (single-player, shot practice).[
overview_zh: 本作是直接呈現的虛擬撞球遊戲，收錄多種玩法：八號球、九號球、三號球、十號球、十五號球、直落式撞球（14.1 連續式）、輪轉式、equal offense 與 speed pool。玩家可挑戰電腦，也能透過「Party Pool」（多人模式）讓最多七名玩家在同一台主機上對戰。其他模式包括「Tournament」（單人對電腦）、「Freestyle」（玩家自訂規則）以及「Challenge」（單人擊球練習）。

overview_en: At the start of each level the player is informed who they are pursuing, a great distance away: They must apprehend the criminal before their time limit expires. The criminal's car is constantly moving away, so if the player repeatedly crashes or drives too slowly, the criminal will escape. At some points during the game the road splits, and the correct turn must be taken, otherwise it will take longer to catch the criminal. When their vehicle is reached, the time limit is extended; the vehicle must be rammed a number of times until the criminal is forced to stop, then is arrested.
overview_zh: 每關開始時會告知玩家追緝對象，且距離相當遙遠：必須在時限內逮捕罪犯。罪犯的車會持續逃離，若不斷撞車或開太慢，罪犯就會逃脫。途中道路會出現岔路，必須選對方向，否則追上罪犯將耗費更多時間。追上目標車輛後可獲得追加時間；必須多次撞擊使其停下，再將罪犯逮捕歸案。

publisher:
Hi Tech Expressions NA
Nintendo EU
Altron JP

overview_en: A Chibi Maruko-Chan adventure game for Game Boy.
overview_zh: Game Boy 上的櫻桃小丸子冒險遊戲。

title_en: CHIBI MARUKO-CHAN 3 - MEZASE! GAME TAISHOU NO MAKI
no_intro_name: Chibi Maruko-chan 3 - Mezase! Game Taishou no Maki (Japan)
overview_en: A Chibi Maruko-Chan action game for Game Boy.
overview_zh: Game Boy 上的櫻桃小丸子動作遊戲。

title_en: CHIBI MARUKO-CHAN 4 - KORE GA NIHON DA YO! OUJI-SAMA
no_intro_name: Chibi Maruko-chan 4 - Kore ga Nihon Da yo! Ouji-sama (Japan)
Chibi Maruko-chan - Maruko Deluxe Theater (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: A Chibi Maruko-Chan RPG for Game Boy.
overview_zh: Game Boy 上的櫻桃小丸子角色扮演遊戲。

overview_en: A Japanese-only racing game for Game Boy based on the Wacky Races cartoon.
overview_zh: 改編自卡通《瘋狂大賽車》（Wacky Races）的 Game Boy 賽車遊戲，僅在日本發售。

overview_en: Chiki Chiki Tengoku is a Puzzle game, published by J-Wing, which was released in Japan in 1995.
overview_zh: 《Chiki Chiki Tengoku》是 J-Wing 發行的解謎遊戲，1995 年於日本推出。

publisher:
Victor Interactive Software JP
JVC Musical Industries NA/EU

overview_en: The gameplay revolves around piloting a rescue helicopter into hostile territory and rescuing hostages. Enemies like birds, fighter jets, and even ammunition fired from various weapons can harm the player's helicopter. Saving more hostages than the scenario requires will allow players to collect extra points. However, losing a lot of hostage will lead to a loss of continues; regardles of how many lives the player has during that time. This is to simulate a mission failure and/or becoming a SNAFU.
overview_zh: 玩家駕駛救援直升機進入敵境救出人質。鳥類、戰鬥機，乃至各種武器發射的彈藥都能傷害直升機。救出超出任務需求的人質可獲得額外分數，但若損失大量人質，則無論還剩多少條命都會失去 continue 次數，用以模擬任務失敗或陷入混亂。
publisher:
Victor Interactive Software JP
JVC Musical Industries NA/EU

overview_en: Choplifter III is an Action game, developed by Teeny Weeny Games and published by Ocean, which was released in Europe in 1994.
overview_zh: 《Choplifter III》是由 Teeny Weeny Games 開發、Ocean 發行的動作遊戲，1994 年於歐洲推出。

title_en: CHOU MASHIN EIYUU DEN WATARU - MAZEKKO MONSTER
no_intro_name: Chou Mashin Eiyuu Den Wataru - Mazekko Monster (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

title_en: CHOU MASHIN EIYUU DEN WATARU - MAZEKKO MONSTER 2
no_intro_name: Chou Mashin Eiyuu Den Wataru - Mazekko Monster 2 (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en:
In Chousoku Spinner the object of the game is to have "yo-yo battles", buy new yo-yos, and upgrade current yo-yos. Chousoku Spinner contains RPG-like elements such as traveling to various locations, talking to other characters, earning money to buy new items and a story.

The way disputes are settled in Chousoku Spinner is by having a yo-yo battle. The winner is the character who can keep their yo-yo going for the longest amount of time. First, the balance must be chosen, the more in the middle it is the better the balance will be. After the balance is chosen the power must be chosen.
overview_zh:
在《Chousoku Spinner》中，遊戲目標是進行「溜溜球對戰」、購買新溜溜球並升級現有溜溜球。本作含有類似 RPG 的元素，包括前往不同地點、與其他角色交談、賺錢購買新道具，並有故事劇情。

爭執透過溜溜球對戰來解決。能讓溜溜球轉動最久的人即為勝者。首先要選擇平衡，越接近正中央越好；接著再選擇力道。

overview_en: The setting of the game is a fantasy prehistorical Stone Age-era world that is shared by both neanderthals, woolly mammoth, saber-tooth tigers, dinosaurs, and various assorted wild primeval monsters such as prehistoric mammals, giant insects, man-eating plants, and other exotica; thus, the setting is similar to that of films such as One Million Years B.C., or television shows such as The Flintstones or Dinosaurs.
overview_zh: 本作的舞台是奇幻的史前石器時代世界，住有尼安德塔人、長毛象、劍齒虎、恐龍，以及各式凶猛的遠古怪獸如史前哺乳動物、巨型昆蟲、食人植物等異獸。氛圍類似電影《公元前一百萬年》或影集《摩登原始人》、《Dinosaurs》。

overview_en:
Based on the film of the same name.
A plane filled with terrorists attempting to steal money from a treasury plane while airborne is shot down by an FBI plane. The terrorists survive and send out a distress signal, which the main character, Gabe, responds to. However, Gabe does not know that the mayday signal is coming from a group of terrorists, and after reaching them, the terrorists capture Gabe's partner, Hal, and hold him hostage. Gabe must then set out and retrieve the money in order to save Hal.
overview_zh:
改編自同名電影。
載滿恐怖份子的飛機企圖在飛行中劫走運鈔機上的款項，遭 FBI 飛機擊落。恐怖份子倖存後發出求救訊號，主角 Gabe 前往救援。Gabe 不知道求救訊號其實來自恐怖份子，抵達後夥伴 Hal 反遭俘虜。Gabe 必須奪回款項才能救出 Hal。

overview_en: Collection Pocket is a Miscellaneous game, published by Naxat Soft, which was released in Japan in 1997.
overview_zh: 《Collection Pocket》是 Naxat Soft 發行的雜項遊戲，1997 年於日本推出。

overview_en: Its gameplay is nearly identical to NBA Jam, on which it is based. It includes most major Division I colleges, but there are many, such as the University of Tennessee, the University of Notre Dame, and Mississippi State University (who had just made a run to the Final Four that year), that are not included. The player can play tournaments, a season, or a single game. The game, however, did not enjoy the success of NBA Jam.
overview_zh: 玩法幾乎與其原型《NBA Jam》相同。收錄大多數 NCAA 一級聯盟的學校，但仍有不少缺席，例如田納西大學、聖母大學，以及當年才剛打進 Final Four 的密西西比州立大學。玩家可進行錦標賽、賽季或單場比賽。本作銷量未能複製《NBA Jam》的成功。

overview_en: Welcome to 2636 the year the notorious Red Falcon gets even-with an unprecedented alien onslaught orchestrated to push the Contra forces to their ultimate reaches. Plunge through a molten massacre on a high speed voyage to the guts of the archenemy alien. Check out the side and top perspectives that engulf you in a 3-D sensation. Pick off solar slimedogs while you scale over walls swing from girders and ropes whatever it takes to defeat Red Falcon's allies. Sweat through five gut-splitting stages including the Streets of the Neo City and the Mucho Grande Badlands.
overview_zh: 歡迎來到 2636 年，惡名昭彰的 Red Falcon 將以前所未見的外星攻勢回擊，誓要把魂斗羅部隊逼至絕境。穿越熔岩戰場，高速直搗大魔王所在地。透過側視與俯瞰雙視角營造立體臨場感。掃蕩外星追隨者，攀越高牆、擺盪鋼樑與繩索，無所不用其極地擊敗 Red Falcon 的同夥。挑戰五個血脈賁張的關卡，包括 Streets of the Neo City 與 Mucho Grande Badlands。

overview_en: You and your best girl were floating happily in the vast void of space. Suddenly, the Big Bang occurs, separating the two of you. It's up to you to travel through time to find her. Before this can happen, you must go though a number of levels collecting items. However, the items must be collected in the proper order, and you will face a number of obstacles including piranhas, pterodactyls, rats, and birds. Keep bouncing and stay focused on the goal to be reuniting with you girlfriend in COOL BALL.
overview_zh: 你和心愛的女友原本悠遊在浩瀚宇宙中，突如其來的大霹靂將兩人拆散。你必須穿越時空尋找她。途中得通過多個關卡並蒐集道具，但道具必須按正確順序收集，還要面對食人魚、翼手龍、老鼠與飛鳥等障礙。在《COOL BALL》中持續彈跳前進，專注目標，與女友再度團聚。

overview_en: A game released in Europe as a collection of card games.  Solitaire, Cribbage, and Blackjack.
overview_zh: 於歐洲推出的撲克牌遊戲合輯，收錄接龍（Solitaire）、Cribbage 與 21 點。

overview_en: A single-player platformer in which the player controls Cool Spot, who can jump, and attack by firing soda bubbles, which could be shot in all directions and while jumping. Cool Spot could also cling to and climb various things by jumping up in front of them. In each level the player must rescue other cool spots, who look exactly alike, from cages at the end of that level, which is not necessarily the point at the far right of the level map. In order to do so, the player is required to collect a certain number of "spots" that would change (usually increase) as the game progressed. "Spots" were placed across the level in large quantities, and were the game's substitute for items such as the coins in Super Mario Bros or Sonic the Hedgehog's gold rings (these were often used in this style of game, mostly for points and extra lives).
overview_zh: 單人平台動作遊戲，玩家操控 Cool Spot，他能跳躍，並朝四面八方甚至跳躍中發射汽水泡泡攻擊。Cool Spot 也能跳到物體前以攀附並爬上去。每關玩家須從關卡終點的籠子中救出長相相同的其他 Cool Spot，但終點不一定位於關卡地圖最右側。要救出夥伴，玩家必須蒐集一定數量的「spots」，所需數量隨遊戲進度（通常是增加）而變化。「Spots」大量散佈於各關，相當於《超級瑪利歐兄弟》的金幣或《音速小子》的金環，多用於計分與加命。

overview_en: The Golden Spike of Power, hidden atop the Ocean Hotel in Las Vegas, is the powerful wedge between Cool World and this world. And Holli's trying to steal it. If she removes it, she may destroy both her world and Jack's. As Jack, you're got to stop her from doing it -- because you know she will if she can!
overview_zh: 藏在拉斯維加斯 Ocean Hotel 頂端的「Golden Spike of Power」，是 Cool World 與現實世界之間強大的封印。Holli 正試圖盜取它。一旦得手，可能毀掉她的世界與 Jack 的世界。身為 Jack，你必須阻止她，因為只要她有機會就一定會動手！

overview_en:
The player controls an armoured fighting vehicle from either a first-person perspective or a third-person perspective; depending on the level design. All games begin on a planet's surface with an overhead view. When the player enters a tunnel, the view switches to first-person. After destroying the Life Core inside a tunnel, the player travels to a new planet through a vertically scrolling stage.

Cosmo Tank has three modes. In quest mode, the object of the game is to destroy Alien Life Cores on five planets to free them from Master Insect. Players can earn experience levels in the quest mode by defeating enemies. The maximum amount of experience points that a player can earn is 999; which allows players to reach the level cap of 6. In training mode, the player practices in a closed area and is given a ranking. In vs. mode, the Game Link Cable is used to allow two players to race to defeat the alien leader.

After either beating the game or acquiring a game over, the player is given a rank that shows how far he made it in the game along with his target score. The lowest rank in the game is a skull and crossbones (signifying a casualty on the battlefield).
overview_zh:
玩家操控一台裝甲戰車，依關卡設計採第一人稱或第三人稱視角。所有關卡皆從俯瞰視角的星球表面開始，當玩家進入隧道後切換為第一人稱。摧毀隧道內的 Life Core 後，會透過縱向捲動關卡前往下一顆星球。

《Cosmo Tank》共有三種模式。在 quest 模式中，目標是摧毀五顆星球上的外星 Life Core，將它們從 Master Insect 手中解放。擊敗敵人可累積經驗值，最大值為 999，可達到等級上限 6。training 模式中，玩家在封閉區域練習並獲得評等。vs 模式則透過 Game Link Cable 兩名玩家競速擊敗外星首領。

通關或 Game Over 後，玩家會獲得顯示進度與目標分數的評等。最低評等是骷髏標記（代表戰場犧牲）。

title_en: CRAYON SHIN-CHAN 2 - ORA TO WANPAKU GOKKO DAZO
no_intro_name: Crayon Shin-chan 2 - Ora to Wanpaku Gokko Dazo (Japan)
overview_en: An action platformer for the Game Boy starring the popular anime character "Shin-chan". This is the second installment of the Game Boy Crayon Shin-Chan series.
overview_zh: Game Boy 上以動畫人氣角色「蠟筆小新」為主角的動作平台遊戲，是 Game Boy《蠟筆小新》系列的第二作。

title_en: CRAYON SHIN-CHAN 3 - ORA NO GOKIGEN ATHLETIC
no_intro_name: Crayon Shin-chan 3 - Ora no Gokigen Athletic (Japan)
overview_en: Crayon Shin-Chan 3: Ora no Gokigen Athletic is an Action game, published by Bandai, which was released in Japan in 1994.
overview_zh: 《Crayon Shin-Chan 3: Ora no Gokigen Athletic》是 Bandai 發行的動作遊戲，1994 年於日本推出。

title_en: CRAYON SHIN-CHAN 4 - ORA NO ITAZURA DAIHENSHIN
no_intro_name: Crayon Shin-chan 4 - Ora no Itazura Daihenshin (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

title_en: CRAYON SHIN-CHAN - ORA NO GOKIGEN COLLECTION
no_intro_name: Crayon Shin-chan - Ora no Gokigen Collection (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en: Crayon Shin-Chan: Ora no Gokigen Collection is an Action game, published by Bandai, which was released in Japan in 1996.
overview_zh: 《Crayon Shin-Chan: Ora no Gokigen Collection》是 Bandai 發行的動作遊戲，1996 年於日本推出。

title_en: CRAYON SHIN-CHAN - ORA TO SHIRO WA OTOMODACHI DA YO
no_intro_name: Crayon Shin-chan - Ora to Shiro wa Otomodachi Da yo (Japan)
overview_en:
Crayon Shin-Chan: Ora to Shiro wa Otomodachi da yo is a Miscellaneous game, developed by TOSE and published by Bandai, which was released in Japan in 1993.

Crayon Shin-Chan: Ora to Shiro ha Otomodachi Dayo is a platforming game
based off the Crayon Shin-Chan manga, mostly popular in Japan although
translated and published in a couple of other countries. The game is heavily
oriented towards platforming, with only a couple of blow bubbles-based weapons
littered throughout the game's short four levels.

Shin-chan can hop onto the heads of the enemy humans that are
interspersed around each stage, as well as use the bubbles to knock them out. He
can also hop onto hooks and branches, and scale telephone poles and trees.
There are also three mini-games in Crayon Shin-Chan along with a fourth
kind-of mini-game. Although all four mini-games are encountered in the course of
your playthrough, you can also access them from the title screen using the
second option presented to you.

Also of note is a timer in each of the level. For some weird reason, if
you try to collect everything in a level, there simply is not enough time, at
least in Level 2. Fortunately, you are given checkpoints throughout each of the
levels. Timing out will simply throw you back to one of the checkpoints.
overview_zh:
《Crayon Shin-Chan: Ora to Shiro wa Otomodachi da yo》是由 TOSE 開發、Bandai 發行的雜項遊戲，1993 年於日本推出。

本作改編自蠟筆小新漫畫，主要在日本受歡迎，亦有少數國家翻譯出版。遊戲以平台動作為主，僅有少數吹泡泡相關武器散落於四個短關卡中。

小新可踩在敵方人類頭上，也能用泡泡將其擊昏。他還能跳上掛鉤與樹枝，攀爬電線桿與樹木。
本作另有三款迷你遊戲，加上一款類似迷你遊戲的內容。雖然全部四款都會在劇情中出現，玩家也能從標題畫面選擇第二個選項直接遊玩。

值得一提的是，每關都設有時限。奇怪的是，至少在第二關，想要蒐集所有東西時間根本不夠。所幸每關都設有檢查點，時間到只會被送回最近的檢查點。

overview_en: The player controls a small, circular spaceship which must travel around the screen collecting crystals. This task is made more difficult by the aliens which constantly swarm out from the portals on both sides of the screen. These can be shot down by the ship's gun (which has unlimited ammo) or eliminated by activating one of the player's limited supply of "smart bombs", which will clear the screen of all current enemies.
overview_zh: 玩家操控一艘小型圓形太空船，需在畫面中四處移動蒐集水晶。畫面兩側的傳送門會持續湧出大量外星人，使任務更加困難。可使用無限子彈的艦砲擊落敵人，或啟動數量有限的「smart bomb」清空畫面上的所有敵人。

overview_en:
Cult Jump is an adventure trivia video game developed by Sun L and published by Bandai Co. for the Game Boy. A crossover game exclusive to Japan, it was released on September 10, 1993 and features many popular characters from seven series in Weekly Shonen Jump.

The king of the JUMP world has been imprisoned in a castle far away. It is up to the reader of Shonen Jump to use all of his knowledge of their published works to beat opponents and rescue the king. Altogether, there are 50 long stages where the player needs to answer the questions posed by the opponents to survive and move on. A password will be displayed after beating each of these stages.
overview_zh:
《Cult Jump》是由 Sun L 開發、Bandai 為 Game Boy 發行的冒險問答遊戲。本作為日本獨佔的跨界作品，於 1993 年 9 月 10 日推出，登場角色取自《週刊少年 JUMP》連載的七部人氣作品。

JUMP 世界的國王被囚於遙遠城堡。少年 JUMP 的讀者必須運用對連載作品的知識擊敗對手，救出國王。全作共有 50 個漫長關卡，玩家須回答對手的問題才能存活並前進。每通過一關會顯示密碼。

overview_en: Players test their knowledge of the Ultraman tokusatsu series in this quiz game.
overview_zh: 考驗玩家對鹹蛋超人特攝系列的瞭解程度的問答遊戲。

overview_en:
Based on the feature film of the same name.
The game casts players in the role of renegade treasure hunters. The player is able to choose between two characters: Morgan Adams, a female character who wields a rapier; or William Shaw, a buccaneer who is armed with a sword. The game features single player and two player action mode. During single player mode, the player's character must battle through 10 levels, encountering various foes such as pirates, redcoats and harbor masters. The game features two different gameplay styles to choose from: Swordplay and Brawling. In addition to all the swordplay, level two requires players to flee from prison guards in a quarry cart, and level five puts player atop a runaway horse-drawn carriage. As the player progresses through the game several items such as knives, bombs, bottles, torches, hammers, pistols, and other weapons are collectable.
overview_zh:
改編自同名電影。
玩家扮演叛逆的尋寶人。可從兩名角色中擇一：手持西洋劍的女角 Morgan Adams，或配劍的海盜 William Shaw。本作有單人與雙人動作模式。單人模式下，玩家須闖過 10 關，對抗海盜、紅衣兵與港務官等敵人。遊戲提供兩種風格：劍鬥與肉搏。除了劍術，第二關須駕駛採石場推車逃離獄卒，第五關則騎在失控的馬車上奮戰。隨進度推進，可蒐集刀、炸彈、酒瓶、火把、鐵錘、手槍等多種武器。

overview_en:
3090 A.D. Earth exists as a united and peaceful federation... Until an insanely evil scientists known as ROGUE plants to conquer Earth with an army of dangerous robots, from his fortress CYRAID, high above the capitol city Trillilium.

 The Federation has called its best Agents of Peace, code named WARRIOR and FIGHTER, to destroy CYRAID. ROGUE's spies have informed him that WARRIOR and FIGHTER are brothers. To keep them from destroying CYRAID, ROGUE will kidnap NATASIA, their adored mother. If he can distract them from their mission, he may have enough time to conquer the Federation and rule Earth!
overview_zh:
西元 3090 年，地球進入和平統一聯邦時代……直到瘋狂邪惡的科學家 ROGUE 出現，他打算從首都 Trillilium 上空的堡壘 CYRAID 派出危險機器人軍團征服地球。

聯邦派出最優秀的「Agents of Peace」，代號 WARRIOR 與 FIGHTER，前往摧毀 CYRAID。ROGUE 的間諜得知兩人是兄弟，為阻止他們，便綁架了他們深愛的母親 NATASIA，意圖以家人為人質拖延任務，好讓自己有時間征服聯邦並統治地球！

overview_en:
The game is essentially a series of 36 jigsaw puzzles with Tetris-like pieces known as pentominos that must be assembled into a specific shape. The puzzles start off with rectangular shapes and simple solutions, but the puzzles quickly grow more complex, with odder shapes like a rocket ship, a gun, and even enlarged versions of some of the pentominoes themselves. Each level is timed, and once the timer is started it cannot be stopped until the level is finished. One starts off the game with only three pentomino pieces, and at the completion of each early level, a new piece is awarded to the player. At the final level, the player is given the 2x2 square O tetromino and must complete an 8x8 square puzzle.

After completing each level, the player was given a password to access that level at a later time. Interestingly, each password was a common English four-letter word, so that by guessing common four-letter words, players could potentially access levels they had not actually reached by playing the game.
overview_zh:
本作本質上是 36 道拼圖，使用類似俄羅斯方塊的 pentomino 碎片，必須拼成指定形狀。前期是長方形等簡單解，但很快變得複雜，例如火箭、手槍，甚至是某些 pentomino 自身的放大版。每關皆有時限，計時開始後直到通關都不能停止。一開始只擁有三種 pentomino，前幾關過關後會獲得新碎片。最終關玩家會拿到 2x2 方形的 O 型 tetromino，須拼成 8x8 的方塊。

通關後可獲得密碼，方便日後再玩該關。有趣的是，每組密碼都是英文常見四字母單字，玩家只要猜常見四字母字，就有可能解鎖未真正抵達的關卡。

overview_en:
Shrinking rays and crushing platforms are commonly seen as the player tries to kill Martians that are standing in the way along with rock monsters and dragons. Lava won't instantly kill the player's character but falling into a bottomless pit will. In the end, Marvin the Martian must be destroyed in the final stage of the game.

The Game Boy version includes a secret "hard" difficulty level. Losing in this difficulty level will simply reset the game instead of bringing up the game over screen.
overview_zh:
玩家經常會看到縮小光線與會壓人的平台，必須擊敗擋路的火星人，以及岩石怪與飛龍。落入岩漿不會立即死亡，但掉入無底洞則必死。最後關卡須擊敗火星人馬文。

Game Boy 版內藏隱藏的「困難」難度，在此難度下失敗會直接重啟遊戲，而不會跳出 Game Over 畫面。

no_intro_name: Dai-2-ji Super Robot Taisen G (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en: Dai-2-Ji Super Robot Taisen G is a Strategy game, developed by WinkySoft and published by Banpresto, which was released in Japan in 1995.
overview_zh: 《Dai-2-Ji Super Robot Taisen G》是由 WinkySoft 開發、Banpresto 發行的策略遊戲，1995 年於日本推出。

title_en: DAIKAIJUU MONOGATARI - THE MIRACLE OF THE ZONE
no_intro_name: Daikaijuu Monogatari - The Miracle of the Zone (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

title_en: DAIKU NO GEN-SAN - GHOST BUILDING COMPANY
no_intro_name: Daiku no Gen-san - Ghost Building Company (Japan)

title_en: DAIKU NO GEN-SAN - ROBOT TEIKOKU NO YABOU
no_intro_name: Daiku no Gen-san - Robot Teikoku no Yabou (Japan)
overview_en: Another iteration in the Hammerin' Harry platformer series.
overview_zh: 《Hammerin' Harry》（大工の源さん）平台系列的另一作。

overview_en: Daisenryaku is a Strategy game, published by Hiro, which was released in Japan in 1991. It’s pretty simple: issue your commands in the Map mode (hit Select), and then get out of Map mode and the game plays itself out. Your units do what they’re told every turn until the order’s carried out, and then they sit there. Get as many cities as you can, because then you get more money. Infantry kills heavy infantry, heavy infantry kills tanks, and tanks kill infantry.
overview_zh: 《Daisenryaku》是 Hiro 發行的策略遊戲，1991 年於日本推出。玩法相當簡單：在地圖模式（按 Select）下下達指令，離開地圖模式後遊戲便自動進行。部隊會依命令行動直到完成任務後留在原地。盡量奪取城市以增加收入。步兵剋重步兵、重步兵剋戰車、戰車剋步兵。

overview_en: In this side-scrolling platformer, the player controls the Darkman, a superhero who can jump, kick and punch, as well as swing from a rope during action sequences between levels. In each level, Darkman disguises himself as the boss of the level, whom he must defeat before the time limit elapses.
overview_zh: 本側捲軸平台遊戲中，玩家操控超級英雄 Darkman，可跳躍、踢擊與出拳，並在關卡之間的動作場景中盪繩前進。每一關 Darkman 須喬裝成該關頭目，並在時限內擊敗對方。

title_en: DAVID CRANE'S THE RESCUE OF PRINCESS BLOBETTE
no_intro_name: David Crane's The Rescue of Princess Blobette (USA)
overview_en:
Starring: A Boy and His Blob

The Rescue of Princess Blobette tells the story of a young, male protagonist and his blob companion as they attempt to rescue the latter's girlfriend, the titular Princess Blobette. The damsel in distress has been imprisoned by the Antagonistic Alchemist within the highest tower of the Royal Castle on the planet Blobolinia. Like its predecessor, A Boy and His Blob: Trouble on Blobolonia, The Rescue of Princess Blobette is a puzzle-platformer in which the player directly controls the boy as he is followed around by the blob, who is controlled by the computer AI. The pair must navigate the various passages and floors of the castle to locate and free Blobette. The boy can only run back and forth, cannot jump or swim, and will die if he falls a long distance or comes in contact with dangerous objects such as flame throwers and sewer serpents. However, the blob can be made to turn into useful tools when he is fed jelly beans of various flavors. Each flavor causes a different transformation. For example, feeding the blob a tangerine jelly bean will change him into a trampoline, which the boy can then use to reach high platforms. The player may also locate extra jelly bean sacks and numerous, optional treasures. Finding five peppermints will increase the player's extra lives by one.
overview_zh:
主演：A Boy and His Blob

《The Rescue of Princess Blobette》講述少年主角與他的果凍夥伴前往救出果凍的女友——標題中的 Blobette 公主。公主被反派鍊金術師囚禁於 Blobolinia 行星皇家城堡的最高塔內。如同前作《A Boy and His Blob: Trouble on Blobolonia》，本作為解謎平台遊戲，玩家直接操控少年，果凍則由電腦 AI 控制跟在身旁。兩人必須穿越城堡的通道與樓層，找到並釋放 Blobette。少年只能左右奔跑，無法跳躍或游泳，從高處墜落或碰到火焰噴射器、下水道蟒等危險物便會死亡。果凍則能在被餵食不同口味的果凍豆後變成各種有用的工具，每種口味對應不同變身。例如餵柑橘口味，果凍會變成彈跳床，讓少年跳上高台。玩家也可找到額外的果凍豆袋與多種選擇性寶物。蒐集到五顆薄荷糖可獲得一條命。
publisher:
Jaleco JP
Absolute Entertainment NA
Nintendo EU

overview_en: A NASCAR racing simulation video game loosely based on the 1990 movie Days of Thunder. The game utilized elements from the movie, using a movie license from Paramount Pictures for its graphical elements, plot, and music soundtrack.
overview_zh: 鬆散改編自 1990 年電影《Days of Thunder》的 NASCAR 賽車模擬遊戲。本作取得 Paramount Pictures 授權，沿用了電影的圖像元素、劇情與配樂。

overview_en:
Players must choose between a dune buggy, a sand rail vehicle, and the incredible off-road truck. All races are strictly against the clock while the driver navigates through blockades on the road and other drivers that want to defeat the player. All of the ten courses must be unlocked in a linear fashion; all the races take place in a tube. Few power-ups exist in them game; including a chance to increase the player's nitro boost.

There are ten stages in the entire game. No penalties are given for bumping into the other drivers; unlike real life. Each course is in the shape of a half-pipe.
overview_zh:
玩家可從沙灘越野車、沙地賽車或厲害的越野卡車中擇一。所有比賽都是與時間賽跑，駕駛須穿過路上的路障與想擊敗你的其他車手。十條賽道必須依序解鎖，所有比賽皆於管狀賽道內進行。道具不多，包括有機會增加 nitro 加速。

全作共十關。撞到其他賽車不會像現實中那樣有罰則。每條賽道形狀皆為半管。
publisher:
Copya System JP
Electro Brain NA

overview_en:
Based on the 1993 movie of the same name.
The object is to defeat a burglar who managed to find Dennis' town via the local railroad connection. Stages include Mr. Wilson's house, the great outdoors, a boiler room, and eventually the big boss battle with the burglar himself.
overview_zh:
改編自 1993 年的同名電影。
目標是擊敗一名搭乘當地鐵路潛入 Dennis 鎮上的小偷。關卡包括 Wilson 先生家、戶外、鍋爐房，最終與小偷展開頭目戰。

title_en: DESERT STRIKE - RETURN TO THE GULF
no_intro_name: Desert Strike - Return to the Gulf (USA) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en: After terrorist leader General Kilbaba has seized control of an unnamed "small but wealthy" Gulf emirate, overthrown the monarchy and installed himself as dictator, the United States sends a lone helicopter to destroy his army in a series of swift strikes. The game's plot was felt by commentators to be a thinly disguised reference to the Gulf War, while comparisons were drawn between Kilbaba and Saddam Hussein, and between the game's unnamed desert setting and Iraq.
overview_zh: 恐怖份子首領 General Kilbaba 奪取了一個未指明的「小而富裕」的波斯灣酋長國，推翻王室並自立為獨裁者後，美國派出單機直升機展開一連串閃電打擊以摧毀其軍隊。評論者多認為本作劇情是波斯灣戰爭的影射，Kilbaba 也常被拿來與海珊比較，未指名的沙漠舞台則被視為伊拉克。
publisher:
Malibu Games NA
Ocean Software EU

overview_en: A game that consists of a square floor covered in seven rows and eight columns of tiles (56 tiles in total). The goal of the game is to flip all of the light tiles into dark tiles. There are several enemies as the level advances. The game has a total of 30 rounds.
overview_zh: 本作場地由 7 列 8 行共 56 塊地磚組成。目標是把所有亮色磚翻成暗色磚。隨關卡推進會出現多種敵人。全作共 30 關。

overview_en:
The game's introduction shows that Big Boy has escaped from the state penitentiary and kidnapped Tess, Tracy's love interest. The gameplay itself is purely level-based platforming, foregoing the overhead driving sequences of its NES counterpart.

Stylistically, the Game Boy version bears a strong resemblance to the side-scrolling mode of the NES version. Dick Tracy can punch and use the same weapons (hand gun, Tommy gun, tear gas), as well as grenades (which will instantly kill all non-boss enemies on the screen). This game also shares some common music with the NES version. Each of the five levels contains 12 hidden pieces of a photograph used to solve a puzzle at the end of each level.

At the end of each level, Dick Tracy would fight one of the antagonists from the film, including Shoulders, Flattop, and Pruneface). After defeating the boss, the player would need to solve the twelve-piece puzzle using the pieces found throughout the level to reveal a photo of the next boss to be pursued. If the puzzle could be solved within the allotted period of time, the player would be awarded a bonus life. For every two pieces placed correctly, the player would be awarded with one extra hit point. If any of the missing pieces were missed or if the puzzle isn't solved in time, then the game will automatically piece the whole image together (without any bonuses, of course). Then, Tracy would interrogate the fallen boss for where to search next for clues leading to Big Boy and Tess.
overview_zh:
開場演出 Big Boy 越獄並綁架 Tracy 的戀人 Tess。玩法純為關卡式平台動作，捨去了 NES 版的俯瞰駕駛橋段。

風格上 Game Boy 版酷似 NES 版的側捲軸模式。Dick Tracy 可出拳並使用相同武器（手槍、湯姆森衝鋒槍、催淚瓦斯）以及手榴彈（可瞬殺畫面上所有非頭目敵人）。本作部分配樂與 NES 版共用。全作共五關，每關藏有 12 片照片碎片，用於關底解謎。

關底會與電影中的反派如 Shoulders、Flattop、Pruneface 等對戰。擊敗頭目後玩家須以撿到的碎片完成 12 片拼圖，揭示下一個追查目標。若能在時限內完成，可獲得加命；每正確擺對兩片可加一格血量。若有缺片或超時未完成，遊戲將自動拼完整張圖（自然沒有獎勵），Tracy 隨後審問頭目，問出下一條 Big Boy 與 Tess 的線索。

overview_en:
The objective of Dig Dug is to eliminate underground-dwelling monsters by inflating them with an air pump until they pop, or by dropping rocks on them. There are two kinds of enemies in the game:
Pookas - A race of round red monsters (said to be modeled after tomatoes) who wear yellow goggles.
Fygars - A race of green dragons who can breathe fire.
overview_zh:
《Dig Dug》的目標是消滅地底怪物——使用打氣筒把牠們充氣到爆裂，或以落石壓死。遊戲中有兩種敵人：
Pookas——圓滾紅色怪物（傳說造型參考番茄），戴著黃色護目鏡。
Fygars——綠色噴火飛龍。

overview_en:
Released in 1997 for the Game Boy.

Dino Breeder is a virtual pet game developed by Digital Kids (later known as Ubisoft Nagoya) and published by J-Wing for the Game Boy platform.

In Dino Breeder the game starts with the player being able to choose one of six different dinosaur eggs. The player then gets to keep whichever dinosaur hatches from the egg and gets to name it.

Once players have chosen a dinosaur it can be fed, trained, or get into a battle. There is a story which can be progressed through by meeting certain criteria.

Dinosaurs have a set amount of hit points and if they are taken down to zero they will die leaving players the option to start the whole game over or start again at the last checkpoint with the current dinosaur.
overview_zh:
1997 年推出的 Game Boy 遊戲。

《Dino Breeder》是由 Digital Kids（後改名 Ubisoft Nagoya）開發、J-Wing 在 Game Boy 上發行的虛擬寵物遊戲。

遊戲開始時可從六顆恐龍蛋中擇一，孵化後玩家便可飼養並命名。

選定恐龍後可餵食、訓練或進行戰鬥。達成特定條件可推進故事。

恐龍有設定的生命值，歸零便會死亡，玩家可選擇從頭開始，或以現有恐龍從上一個檢查點繼續。

overview_en:
Dirty Racing is a top-down racing game, developed by Gremlin Interactive and published by Jaleco Entertainment, which was released exclusively in Japan in 1993.

After a race, you are awarded money based on what place you qualified in, which can be used to purchase nitrous, upgrade, or repair your car in a manner similar to Tradewest's Super Off Road. You then move around a board game-like map to choose your next race.

Despite the game being Japanese exclusive, the entire game's text is in English. The game also shares another similarity with Super Off Road, that being scantily clad women who are shown when a race is finished.
overview_zh:
《Dirty Racing》是由 Gremlin Interactive 開發、Jaleco Entertainment 發行的俯瞰賽車遊戲，1993 年僅在日本推出。

比賽結束後可依名次獲得獎金，用於購買氮氣加速、升級或修理愛車，作法類似 Tradewest 的《Super Off Road》。接著在類似桌遊的地圖上移動，選擇下一場比賽。

雖然本作為日本獨佔，但全部文字皆為英文。本作另一個與《Super Off Road》的相似之處，是比賽結束時會出現衣著清涼的女性。

overview_en:
Dodge Boy features six selectable teams. Each of the six teams are represented by a different country.

-Japan
-Germany
-U.S.A
-U.S.S.R
-Australia
-China
overview_zh:
《Dodge Boy》提供六支可選隊伍，分別代表不同國家：

-日本
-德國
-美國
-蘇聯
-澳洲
-中國

overview_en:
Donkey Kong is a 1994 Game Boy video game developed by Nintendo EAD and Pax Softnica and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on June 28, 1994.

Donkey Kong returns to Game Boy! This famous ape has kidnapped Pauline and climbed to the top of a perilous skyscraper. Challenged by many perils and unending puzzles, Mario must reach his arch rival. As he makes his way Mario will need to gather disappearing keys to unlock doors of hidden rooms. Donkey Kong devises evil tricks to confuse and trap him. Our heroic plumber has his hands full this time!
overview_zh:
《Donkey Kong》是 1994 年由 Nintendo EAD 與 Pax Softnica 開發的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Nintendo of America 於 1994 年 6 月 28 日在美國發售。

大金剛重返 Game Boy！這隻名聲響亮的猩猩綁走了 Pauline，並爬上了險峻的摩天大樓。瑪利歐須突破無數陷阱與謎題追上宿敵，途中得蒐集會消失的鑰匙以打開隱藏房間的門。大金剛設下種種詭計干擾並圍困他，這位英勇的水管工這次可有得忙了！

overview_en:
Donkey Kong Land is a 1995 Game Boy video game developed by Rare and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on June 26, 1995.

Monkey mayhem comes to Game Boy with all-new Kong adventures! Donkey Kong teams up with his sidekick, Diddy Kong, for new adventures and gorilla antics. Facing high-flying pigs, deadly Zingers, and reptilian Kremlings our duo swings back into action! Challenged by incredible perils they clamor their way through the mysterious pirate ship, perils in the snow, an unbelievable aquatic temple, and crazy capers in the sky. Grab a vine and join the thrills in the Land of Kong!
overview_zh:
《Donkey Kong Land》是 1995 年由 Rare 開發、Nintendo of America 於 1995 年 6 月 26 日在美國發售的 Game Boy 遊戲。

猿類大亂鬥登上 Game Boy，全新 Kong 冒險展開！大金剛攜手夥伴 Diddy Kong 踏上嶄新冒險。面對飛天豬、致命的 Zinger 與爬蟲族 Kremling 接連登場！穿越神秘海盜船、雪地險境、難以置信的水中神殿，乃至天空中的瘋狂演出。抓緊藤蔓，加入 Land of Kong 的刺激旅程！

overview_en:
Donkey Kong Land 2 is a 1996 Game Boy video game developed by Rare and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on September 23, 1996.

Wage battle against Kaptain K. Rool and his vast army of Kremlings. K. Rool kidnapped Donkey Kong and he's demanding the entire Banana Hoard as ransom. It's up to Diddy Kong and Dixie Kong to rescue their kidnapped pal. A wild assortment of friendly animals like Rambi the Rhino, Squitter the Spider, Squawks the Parrot, Rattly the Rattlesnake, and Enguarde the Swordfish help the two little monkeys in their adventurous mission. Each exciting level is filled with special traps, hidden items and dastardly Kremlings! Prepare yourself for the biggest Game Boy adventure yet!
overview_zh:
《Donkey Kong Land 2》是 1996 年由 Rare 開發、Nintendo of America 於 1996 年 9 月 23 日在美國發售的 Game Boy 遊戲。

對抗 Kaptain K. Rool 與其龐大 Kremling 軍團！K. Rool 綁架了大金剛，要求以全部香蕉藏量作為贖金。Diddy Kong 與 Dixie Kong 必須挺身搭救好夥伴。一群動物朋友——犀牛 Rambi、蜘蛛 Squitter、鸚鵡 Squawks、響尾蛇 Rattly 與旗魚 Enguarde——將協助兩隻小猴子完成冒險。每一關都充滿特殊陷阱、隱藏道具與凶狠的 Kremling！準備迎接 Game Boy 至今最大規模的冒險吧！

no_intro_name: Donkey Kong Land III (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en:
Donkey Kong Land III is a 1997 Game Boy video game developed by Rare and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on October 27, 1997.

Fame-and-fortune seekers have flooded Donkey Kong Country in search of the fabled Lost World. Dixie Kong & Kiddy Kong rush through 36 Kong-sized levels of action and adventure. Use your animal friends - Squitter the spider, Squawks the parrot, Ellie the elephant, Enguarde the swordfish and Parry the parallel bird - to help you prove your adventuring skills and find the Lost World before someone else does!
overview_zh:
《Donkey Kong Land III》是 1997 年由 Rare 開發、Nintendo of America 於 1997 年 10 月 27 日在美國發售的 Game Boy 遊戲。

追名逐利者湧入 Donkey Kong Country，搜尋傳說中的 Lost World。Dixie Kong 與 Kiddy Kong 在 36 個 Kong 級關卡裡疾行冒險。借助動物夥伴——蜘蛛 Squitter、鸚鵡 Squawks、大象 Ellie、旗魚 Enguarde 與平行鳥 Parry——展現你的冒險本領，搶在他人之前找到 Lost World！

overview_en: Based on the popular TV animation, Doraemon must race his friends and win the cup!
overview_zh: 改編自人氣電視動畫，哆啦A夢必須與朋友們競速並奪冠！

title_en: DORAEMON NO GAME BOY DE ASOBOUYO DELUXE 10
no_intro_name: Doraemon no Game Boy de Asobouyo Deluxe 10 (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en:
A Doraemon mini-game collection for Game Boy.

Doraemon no Game Boy de Asobouyo: Deluxe 10 is an Action game, developed by Wizard and published by Epoch, which was released in Japan in 1998.
overview_zh:
Game Boy 上的哆啦A夢迷你遊戲合輯。

《Doraemon no Game Boy de Asobouyo: Deluxe 10》是由 Wizard 開發、Epoch 發行的動作遊戲，1998 年於日本推出。

title_en: DORAEMON NO STUDY BOY 1 - SHOU 1 KOKUGO KANJI
no_intro_name: Doraemon no Study Boy 1 - Shou 1 Kokugo Kanji (Japan)

title_en: DORAEMON NO STUDY BOY 2 - SHOU 1 SANSUU KEISAN
no_intro_name: Doraemon no Study Boy 2 - Shou 1 Sansuu Keisan (Japan)

title_en: DORAEMON NO STUDY BOY 3 - KU KU MASTER
no_intro_name: Doraemon no Study Boy 3 - Ku Ku Master (Japan)

title_en: DORAEMON NO STUDY BOY 4 - SHOU NI KOKUGO KANJI
no_intro_name: Doraemon no Study Boy 4 - Shou ni Kokugo Kanji (Japan)

title_en: DORAEMON NO STUDY BOY 5 - SHOU 2 SANSUU KEISAN
no_intro_name: Doraemon no Study Boy 5 - Shou 2 Sansuu Keisan (Japan)

title_en: DORAEMON NO STUDY BOY 6 - GAKUSHUU KANJI MASTER 1006
no_intro_name: Doraemon no Study Boy 6 - Gakushuu Kanji Master 1006 (Japan)

overview_en: Double Dragon is the story of Billy and Jimmy Lee, twin brothers who learned to fight on the cold, tough streets of the city. Their expert knowledge of the martial arts combined with their street smarts, has made them both formidable fighting machines. But now Billy is faced with his greatest challenge. Marian has been kidnapped by the Black Warriors, the savage street gang of the mysterious Shadow Boss! Using whatever weapons come to hand - knives, whips, bats, rocks, oil drums, even dynamite - Billy must pursue the gang through the slums, factories, and wooded outskirts of the city to reach the hideout for his final confrontation with the Shadow Boss... his brother Jimmy!
overview_zh: 《雙截龍》講述雙胞胎兄弟 Billy 與 Jimmy Lee 的故事，他們在冷酷的城市街頭學會搏擊。精通武術加上街頭智慧，使兩人成為令人生畏的格鬥高手。但 Billy 此刻面臨最大考驗——Marian 被神秘 Shadow Boss 麾下的兇暴街頭幫派 Black Warriors 綁走了！Billy 須使用一切能用的武器——刀、鞭、棒、石頭、油桶，甚至炸藥——穿越貧民區、工廠與郊外林地，追擊歹徒直搗藏身處，與 Shadow Boss 展開最後對決……而那竟是他的兄弟 Jimmy！
publisher:
Technōs Japan JP
Tradewest NA
Nintendo EU

no_intro_name: Double Dragon 3 - The Arcade Game (USA, Europe)
overview_en: Only one man knows the real story behind Marion's disappearance... and he's dead! Now the Double Dragons must rely on a mysterious fortune teller to locate Marion and her ransom - the Sacred Stones of Power! You'll fend off vicious street thugs, evil ninja warriors, deadly gladiators, Manchurian barbarians and more! Defeat your most dreaded enemies and out of pure respect they'll join your side - adding their Iron Claws and Shangai Stars to your all-new martial arts maneuvers - like the awesome mid-air somersault. Double Dragon III. If you survive the action, you'll rescue Marion, retain your honor and discover the truth behind the Sacred Stones. If you fail...
overview_zh: 只有一個人知道 Marion 失蹤的真相……可惜他已經死了！雙截龍兄弟現在只能仰賴神秘的占卜師找到 Marion 與她的贖金——傳說的 Sacred Stones of Power！你將擊退凶惡的街頭混混、邪惡忍者、致命角鬥士、滿洲蠻族等等！擊倒最強大的敵人後，他們會出於敬意加入你方，提供 Iron Claw 與 Shanghai Star，搭配全新的空中翻身等武術招式。雙截龍 III。若你撐過這場大戰，便能救回 Marion、保住榮譽，並揭開 Sacred Stones 的真相。若失敗……

overview_en: Billy and Jimmy Lee, the Double Dragons, are back to avenge the loss of Marion. In their quest to defeat the evil Shadow Warriors, Billy and Jimmy must complete nine missions, facing deadly street gangs, ninjas and huge mutant fighters. The duo must traverse through construction sites, alleyways and underwater hideouts complete with secret elevator shafts, spiked ceilings and razor-sharp mechanical claws. Can Billy and Jimmy contend with the enemies placed before them and ultimately save the world?
overview_zh: Billy 與 Jimmy Lee，雙截龍兄弟，為 Marion 之死回來復仇。在擊敗邪惡 Shadow Warriors 的征途中，兩人必須完成九項任務，對抗致命街頭幫派、忍者與龐大突變鬥士。一行人會穿越工地、巷弄與帶有秘密升降井、尖頂天花板與利刃機械爪的水中藏身處。Billy 與 Jimmy 能否突破重圍，最終拯救世界？
publisher:
Technōs Japan JP
Tradewest NA
Nintendo EU

overview_en: Compared to many sports-related Nintendo games of this era, Double Dribble resembled its sport with surprising accuracy. However, there were several quirks in the programming that are noteworthy, if only for their contribution to the overall experience of playing Double Dribble. The game clock, as in most early timed video games, was accelerated (far faster than real-time). In the third-quarter, third is abbreviated as "3rt."
overview_zh: 與當時的眾多 Nintendo 運動遊戲相比，《Double Dribble》對籃球運動的還原意外貼近真實。不過程式中也存在若干怪癖，雖然只是讓整體體驗更具特色——例如比賽時鐘如多數早期計時遊戲般遠快於真實時間；第三節時，third 還被縮寫為「3rt.」。

overview_en: Double Yakuman is a Japan only traditional mahjong game for Game Boy.
overview_zh: Game Boy 上的傳統麻將遊戲，僅在日本發售。

overview_en: The third entry in the Double Yakuman series, after Double Yakuman and Double Yakuman Jr.
overview_zh: Double Yakuman 系列的第三作，前作為《Double Yakuman》與《Double Yakuman Jr.》。

overview_en: The second game in the Japan only Double Yakuman series of Mahjong games, a simpler take on the original.
overview_zh: 日本獨佔《Double Yakuman》麻將系列的第二作，是原作的簡化版本。

overview_en:
Reihou Academy Student Council proposed a friendly athletic meet-up to apologize for the wrongdoings done by student council president Yamada. However, Toudou Mamoru, the new student council president who has been entrusted with the arrangement of the athletic meet, has no intention of apologizing. Instead he is plotting to crush the other schools, and reinstates The Double Dragons despite them being expelled for their kidnapping of Mami.

Nobody hesitates to participate. Nekketsu High School, led by Kunio, Hanazono High School led by Riki and Interschool Union led by Gouda all announce their participation in the competition. Thus Toudou can begin his plot with the 4 teams in place.
overview_zh:
禮鳳學園學生會為了替前任會長山田所犯下的事情致歉，提議舉辦一場友誼運動會。然而新任會長藤堂衛承接此次運動會的籌辦工作後，並無道歉之意，反而暗中策劃打垮其他學校，並讓因綁架真美而被退學的雙截龍兄弟復籍。

沒有人猶豫參賽。由邦夫率領的熱血高中、力率領的花園高中，以及合田率領的校際聯盟皆宣布參戰。隨著四隊到位，藤堂的計謀正式啟動。

title_en: DOWNTOWN SPECIAL - KUNIO-KUN NO JIDAIGEKI DA YO ZENIN SHUUGOU!
no_intro_name: Downtown Special - Kunio-kun no Jidaigeki Da yo Zenin Shuugou! (Japan)

overview_en: The Game Boy release of the game uses a password-based saving system to save the player's progress. The game consisted of seven floors where various items and parts of Bitsy (Franky's girlfriend) were hidden. Keys and special items were needed to access additional areas to find more body parts and equipment required to resurrect Bitsy.
overview_zh: Game Boy 版採用密碼存檔系統紀錄進度。遊戲共有七層樓，藏有各種道具以及 Franky 女友 Bitsy 的零件。鑰匙與特殊道具是進入更多區域、找到更多身體部位以及復活 Bitsy 所需設備的關鍵。

overview_en: Franky, must escape the castle in which he is trapped in order to search for pieces of a gold tablet which will help him to stave off debt.
overview_zh: Franky 必須逃出他被困住的城堡，尋找一塊金板的碎片，以解除身上的債務。

overview_en:
Dr. Mario is a 1990 Game Boy video game developed by Nintendo R&D1 and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on December 1, 1990.

It's Dr. Mario for an intense new challenge! Mario throws multi-shaded vitamin capsules into a bottle that contains an ugly variety of nasty viruses. You can move, shift or spin the capsules as they fall. Arrange them to align with other capsules on top of a virus. If you can get 4 or more of the same shade in a row, POOF! They disappear! Destroy all of the viruses in the bottle and you progress to the next round where things get even more difficult. Dr. Mario, with germs that are fun to catch.
overview_zh:
《瑪利歐醫生》是 1990 年由 Nintendo R&D1 開發的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Nintendo of America 於 1990 年 12 月 1 日在美國發售。

《瑪利歐醫生》全新挑戰登場！瑪利歐將多色維他命膠囊投入裝滿病毒的藥瓶中。膠囊下落時可移動、平移或旋轉，將其與病毒上方的同色膠囊排成一線。只要連成 4 個以上同色，砰！它們就會消失。將瓶中所有病毒消滅即可進入下一回合，難度也會更高。《瑪利歐醫生》——令人欲罷不能的細菌大戰。

overview_en: Dracula Densetsu (also known as Castlevania: The Adventure) is a 1989 Game Boy side-scrolling action platformer video game developed and released by Konami in Japan on October 27, 1989.
overview_zh: 《Dracula Densetsu》（即《惡魔城：The Adventure》）是 1989 年由 Konami 開發發行的 Game Boy 側捲軸動作平台遊戲，於 1989 年 10 月 27 日在日本推出。

no_intro_name: Dragon Ball Z - Gokuu Gekitouden (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)
Dragon Ball Z - Gokuu Hishouden (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

publisher:
Ubisoft NA
Epic/Sony Record JP
Elite Systems EU

overview_en: Dragon's Lair: The Legend is a companion version to the NES version. Both were developed by Motivetime and published by CSG Imagesoft. This is a black and white platforming gamed only inspired by the game characters.
overview_zh: 《Dragon's Lair: The Legend》是 NES 版的姊妹作，皆由 Motivetime 開發、CSG Imagesoft 發行。本作為僅以遊戲角色為靈感的黑白平台遊戲。
publisher:
Ubisoft NA
Epic/Sony Record JP
Elite Systems EU

title_en: DRAGON SLAYER GAIDEN - NEMURI NO OUKAN
no_intro_name: Dragon Slayer Gaiden - Nemuri no Oukan (Japan)
overview_en:
A Game Boy spin-off in the Dragon Slayer franchise.

Dragon Slayer Gaiden is a role-playing game developed by Epoch and published by Nihon Falcom for the Game Boy platform. The game was only released in Japan.
overview_zh:
Dragon Slayer 系列的 Game Boy 外傳。

《Dragon Slayer Gaiden》是由 Epoch 開發、Nihon Falcom 為 Game Boy 發行的角色扮演遊戲，僅在日本推出。

overview_en:
Dragon Slayer is an action RPG designed by Yoshio Kiya and developed by Nihon Falcom. It became a success in Japan, and is credited for pioneering the action RPG genre.

Dragon Slayer is regarded as the progenitor of the action RPG genre, and is considered to be the first action-RPG. In contrast to earlier turn-based roguelikes, Dragon Slayer was a dungeon crawl RPG that was entirely real-time, with action-oriented, hack & slash, real-time combat. In some ways, the foundations of Dragon Slayer's action RPG gameplay can already be seen in Yoshio Kiya's previous 1983 game Panorama Toh.

Dragon Slayer featured an in-game map to help with the dungeon-crawling, required item management due to the inventory being limited to one item at a time, and introduced the use of item-based puzzles which later influenced The Legend of Zelda. Dragon Slayer's overhead action-RPG formula was used in many later games, laying the foundations for future action RPG series such as Hydlide, Ys, and The Legend of Zelda.
overview_zh:
《Dragon Slayer》由木屋善夫設計、Nihon Falcom 開發，是當年在日本大受歡迎的動作 RPG，被視為開創動作 RPG 類型的鼻祖。

《Dragon Slayer》被視為動作 RPG 類型的開山之作，是公認最早的動作 RPG。相對於先前回合制的 roguelike，《Dragon Slayer》是完全即時、強調動作與砍殺的地下城探索 RPG。某種程度上，其動作 RPG 玩法的雛形已可在木屋善夫 1983 年的舊作《Panorama Toh》中見到。

《Dragon Slayer》具備內建地圖協助探索、需管理只能持有單一道具的物品欄，並導入物品解謎要素，後者影響了《薩爾達傳說》。其俯瞰式動作 RPG 公式在後續作品中廣為沿用，奠定了《Hydlide》、《Ys》及《薩爾達傳說》等動作 RPG 系列的基礎。

overview_en: Dragonheart is an Action game, developed by Torus Games and published by Acclaim, which was released in 1996.
overview_zh: 《Dragonheart》是由 Torus Games 開發、Acclaim 發行的動作遊戲，1996 年推出。

overview_en: Dropzone is an Action game, developed by Eurocom Entertainment Software and published by Mindscape Inc., which was released in Europe in 1992.
overview_zh: 《Dropzone》是由 Eurocom Entertainment Software 開發、Mindscape Inc. 發行的動作遊戲，1992 年於歐洲推出。

overview_en:
Dungeon Land is a strategy game released on the Game Boy.

Dungeon Land is a random dungeon strategy game developed by Random House and released on the Game Boy in Japan.
overview_zh:
Game Boy 上推出的策略遊戲。

《Dungeon Land》是由 Random House 開發的隨機地下城策略遊戲，於 Game Boy 在日本發售。

overview_en: A horse race betting game exclusive to the Game Boy in Japan.
overview_zh: Game Boy 上的賽馬下注遊戲，僅在日本推出。

overview_en: This is the European release of Atomic Punk, a video game released for the Game Boy in 1990 by Hudson Soft and licensed by Nintendo, as part of the Bomberman series. It was the first game of the series to be released on the Game Boy.
overview_zh: 本作為《Atomic Punk》的歐洲版，1990 年由 Hudson Soft 製作、Nintendo 授權，於 Game Boy 推出，屬《炸彈超人》系列。為該系列首款 Game Boy 作品。

overview_en: Now you can eat dirt on the road. Earthworm Jim™, winner of Die-Hard Game Fan's Game of the Year, Game Player's Ultimate and Electronic Gaming Monthly's Genesis Game of the Year has wormed his way onto the Game Boy. This is the tightest conversion from a 16-bit to a hand-held ever! Now the head swinging, blaze blastin' action is totally mobile. So you can eat dirt everywhere you go!
overview_zh: 現在你也能隨時隨地咬土。曾獲 Die-Hard Game Fan 年度遊戲、Game Player's Ultimate 與 Electronic Gaming Monthly Genesis 年度遊戲的《Earthworm Jim》登上 Game Boy。本作是 16 位元到掌機之間最緊湊的移植！甩頭與爆能槍的火爆動作完全可攜帶，無論去哪都能咬土！

overview_en:
In the game, the player assumes the role of a spy who infiltrates a building filled with elevators. He must collect secret documents from the building and traverse the 30 floors of the building using an increasingly complex series of elevators. The player is pursued by enemy agents who appear from behind closed doors. These agents must be dealt with via force or evasion. Successful completion of a level involves collecting all the secret documents and traversing the building from top to bottom. In the lower floors of the building, the elevator systems are so complex that some puzzle-solving skills are needed.

The Game Boy includes the ability to acquire different weapons, such as a machine gun that fired more rapidly.
overview_zh:
玩家扮演潛入一棟充滿電梯之大樓的間諜，必須在大樓中蒐集機密文件，並透過漸趨複雜的電梯系統穿越 30 層樓。敵方探員會從關著的門後出現追擊，玩家須以武力或閃避因應。完成關卡需取得所有機密文件並從頂層走到底層。在較低樓層，電梯系統錯綜複雜，需要一定的解謎能力。

Game Boy 版加入取得不同武器的能力，例如能更快速射擊的機關槍。

overview_en: Elite Soccer was also released for the Game Boy. Developed by Denton Designs, it was also published in Japan by Coconuts Japan as "World Cup Striker", and in Europe as "Soccer".
overview_zh: 《Elite Soccer》也推出了 Game Boy 版，由 Denton Designs 開發，日本由 Coconuts Japan 以《World Cup Striker》為名發行，歐洲則以《Soccer》為名發行。

overview_en:
Extra Bases is a baseball game developed by Namco for the original Game Boy. Extra Bases has a single player and two player mode. In both modes either five or nine innings can be chosen. There are 14 different selectable teams in the "Bandai League" and are all represented by just a letter of the alphabet.
 
Extra Bases features a password save system. There are two different stadiums that can be chosen to play in: City or Park.
Popular on Giant Bomb.
overview_zh:
《Extra Bases》是 Namco 為原版 Game Boy 開發的棒球遊戲。提供單人與雙人模式，兩種模式皆可選擇五局或九局。「Bandai League」中共 14 支可選隊伍，皆以單一英文字母代表。
 
本作採用密碼存檔。可選擇兩種球場：City 或 Park。
本作在 Giant Bomb 上頗受歡迎。

overview_en: F-1 Race (F1レース F1 Rēsu) is a racing video game released in 1984 for the Family Computer in Japan. A version was released in 1990 for the Game Boy in Japan and in 1991 in Europe and North America, which included the Four Player Adapter for four player gameplay.
overview_zh: 《F-1 Race》（F1レース）為 1984 年於日本 Famicom 發售的賽車遊戲。1990 年推出 Game Boy 日版，1991 年於歐美發行，並附贈 Four Player Adapter 以支援四人連線。

overview_en: The game begins when the player selects Libya (much like Operation El Dorado Canyon), the Persian Gulf, or Vietnam as a mission theater. Play then begins from the cockpit of an F-15 already in flight and armed with a variety of missiles, bombs, drop tanks, flares and chaff. The player flies plane in combat to bomb various targets including a "primary" and "secondary" target while also engaging in air-to-air combat with enemy fighters. The game ends when either the player's plane is destroyed or when the player returns to base.
overview_zh: 遊戲開始時，玩家可選擇利比亞（類似 Operation El Dorado Canyon）、波斯灣或越南作為任務區。隨後從已飛行中的 F-15 駕駛艙視角開始，戰機配備多種飛彈、炸彈、副油箱、曳光彈與干擾箔。玩家須駕機投擲炸彈攻擊「主要」與「次要」目標，並與敵方戰機進行空戰。當戰機被擊毀或玩家返航時遊戲結束。

overview_en: The actual names of the drivers are not used due to licensing arrangements. There are sixteen rounds divided in eight levels. Each level has a special rival to beat. The game structure has similarities with F-1 Race (Game Boy), but this time it requires a certain ability to control the Formula One car. Levels become more difficult because the rival becomes increasingly strong.
overview_zh: 因授權問題，車手姓名並未使用真名。共有十六場比賽分為八關，每關都有特別強敵。遊戲架構與 Game Boy 版《F-1 Race》相似，但本作對 F1 賽車的操控要求更高。隨著對手實力提升，難度也持續上升。

overview_en: An early first person shooter maze game, it is notable for being the only Game Boy game to support 16 simultaneous players. It used a special hardware device and cables created by Champagne.
overview_zh: 早期的第一人稱迷宮射擊遊戲，特別之處在於是唯一支援 16 人同時連線的 Game Boy 遊戲。需透過 Champagne 製作的特殊硬體與線材實現連線。

overview_en: Family Jockey is a Sports game, developed by Use and published by Namco, which was released in Japan in 1991.
overview_zh: 《Family Jockey》是由 Use 開發、Namco 發行的運動遊戲，1991 年於日本推出。

overview_en: Family Jockey 2: Meiba no Kettou is a Sports game, developed by Use and published by Namco, which was released in Japan in 1993.
overview_zh: 《Family Jockey 2: Meiba no Kettou》是由 Use 開發、Namco 發行的運動遊戲，1993 年於日本推出。

overview_en: Published in North America by Bandai as Extra Bases
overview_zh: 在北美由 Bandai 以《Extra Bases》之名發行。

overview_en:
Sequel to Extra Bases/Famista.

Famista 2 is a baseball game developed and published by Namco for the Game Boy platform. The game was only released in Japan.
overview_zh:
《Extra Bases》／《Famista》的續作。

《Famista 2》是由 Namco 開發發行的 Game Boy 棒球遊戲，僅在日本推出。

overview_en:
More baseball! Yay!

Famista 3 is a Sports game, published by Namco, which was released in Japan in 1993.
overview_zh:
更多棒球！耶！

《Famista 3》是 Namco 發行的運動遊戲，1993 年於日本推出。

overview_en: Every detail of F-1 racing comes to the Game Boy with FASTEST LAP. Challenge the clock and try to get the best time on one of 16 different tracks. When you want some competition, take on the world and try to win the championship, or race against a friend for bragging rights. No matter how you race, there is plenty of action to go around in FASTEST LAP.
overview_zh: F1 賽車的每個細節在《FASTEST LAP》中都登上 Game Boy。挑戰時間，於 16 條不同賽道刷新最佳秒數。想要競爭時，可挑戰世界爭奪冠軍，或與好友對戰一較高下。無論你怎麼跑，《FASTEST LAP》都有滿滿的動作場面。

overview_en: The game involves the player controlling Felix the Cat as he sets out to defeat the evil mad Professor who has kidnapped Felix's lovely girlfriend, Kitty. The Game Boy version plays virtually the same as the NES version, but features fewer levels.
overview_zh: 玩家操控菲力貓，目標是擊敗綁架了他可愛女友 Kitty 的邪惡瘋狂教授。Game Boy 版玩法幾乎與 NES 版相同，但關卡較少。
publisher:
Hudson Soft NA
Sony Electronics EU

overview_en:
Players practice up to six laps or qualify for every Formula One race of the season using metric units (kilometres per hour instead of miles per hour). It was one of the few 8-bit Formula One video games to adequately represent the Circuit Gilles Villeneuve as having an urban background along with several other urban race tracks represented in the 1990 Formula One season with the exception that Circuit de Catalunya is presented in this version as the round in Spain, alltough Jerez hosted the 1990 Spanish Grand Prix. Tire wear is possible resulting in trips to the pit crew for maintenance and repairs. A radio allows communication with the crew chief; he will advise whether repairs are necessary. The top speed of the vehicle is 335 kilometres per hour and turbo is not used in the game.

Before the first qualifying session can take place, the player must insert his name and his nationality. The name can be up to 10 characters long and the country has to fit into a three-character field. Since the game doesn't verify if the three-letter code matches up to a real nationality, it doesn't matter if the player makes up a nationality for a fictional country.
