overview_zh:
玩家可進行最多六圈練習，或為當季每一場 F1 賽事爭取資格，數據以公制單位（公里／小時，而非英里／小時）顯示。本作是少數能像樣呈現 Circuit Gilles Villeneuve 都會背景的 8 位元 F1 遊戲，1990 賽季的多條街道賽道也有合適呈現，唯一例外是西班牙站採用 Circuit de Catalunya，雖然 1990 年的西班牙大獎賽其實是在 Jerez 舉行。輪胎會磨損，需進站維修；無線電可與技師長溝通，他會建議是否需要維修。車輛極速為 335 公里／小時，本作未使用渦輪增壓。

首次資格賽前，玩家必須輸入姓名與國籍。姓名最多 10 字，國籍須塞入三字代碼。由於遊戲不會驗證國籍代碼是否屬實，因此玩家可隨意虛構國家。

publisher:
Elite Systems EU
Coconuts Japan JP
Jaleco NA

overview_en: "FIFA International Soccer has it all... experience sheer brilliance"
overview_zh: 「FIFA International Soccer 應有盡有……體驗純粹的精彩」

no_intro_name: FIFA - Road to World Cup 98 (Europe) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en: FIFA: Road to World Cup 98 is a Sports game, developed by Tiertex Design Studios and published by THQ, which was released in 1997.
overview_zh: 《FIFA: Road to World Cup 98》是由 Tiertex Design Studios 開發、THQ 發行的運動遊戲，1997 年推出。

no_intro_name: FIFA Road to World Cup 98 (Europe) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en: FIFA: Road to World Cup 98 is a Sports game, developed by Tiertex Design Studios and published by THQ, which was released in 1997.
overview_zh: 《FIFA: Road to World Cup 98》是由 Tiertex Design Studios 開發、THQ 發行的運動遊戲，1997 年推出。

overview_en: Next generation soccer is here! Features include: Silicon Graphics modeled players utilizing MotionDesign animation technology. New moves including 1-2 passing, fast dribble, volleys, dummies, fakes, and nutmegs! Over 3,500 real players with accurate strengths and weaknesses. Transfer real and custom players to create your dream team. 12 international leagues including English, Scottish, Italian, German and French.
overview_zh: 次世代足球登場！特色包括：以 Silicon Graphics 建模並運用 MotionDesign 動畫技術的球員；新動作如 1-2 短傳、快帶、凌空射門、假動作、欺敵與穿襠！收錄超過 3,500 位真實球員，能力值如實呈現。可移轉真實或自訂球員，組成夢幻隊伍。包含英超、蘇超、義甲、德甲、法甲在內共 12 個國際聯賽。

overview_en: FIFA Soccer 97 is a soccer game developed by Tierex Design Studios and published by Black Pearl, released in November 1996.
overview_zh: 《FIFA Soccer 97》是由 Tierex Design Studios 開發、Black Pearl 發行的足球遊戲，1996 年 11 月推出。

no_intro_name: Fighting Simulator 2 in 1 - Flying Warriors (USA, Europe)
overview_en:
AVAILABLE FOR THE 1ST. TIME ON THE GAME BOY! 2 GAMES IN 1, THIS IS ONE OF THE MOST POWERFUL VS TOURNAMENT GAME EVER MADE! I FIGHTING SIMULATOR MODE

There are 7 different contact sport to choose from in this game pack, including Kung-fu, wrestling, and boxing. Choose your favorite sport and play for the World Championship! By using the Game Link feature, you can enjoy a vs tournament with your friends. Fierce fights for the title of the strongest in the world begin now!

11 FLYING WARRIORS ACTION GAME MODE

Besides a fighting simulator mode, there is a scroll action game too. Our superhero Rick, fights against a mysterious enemy, the Dark Dragon, Fight through the numerous formidable enemies and traps and get the legendary treasure back from evil's hand.
overview_zh:
Game Boy 首發！2 合 1 的這款合輯，是史上最強悍的對戰錦標賽遊戲之一！I 格鬥模擬模式

包裝中收錄 7 種不同的接觸性運動，包含功夫、摔角與拳擊。選擇你最喜歡的項目，挑戰世界冠軍！透過 Game Link 功能還能與朋友進行對戰賽。爭奪世界最強之名的激戰即刻展開！

II 飛龍戰士動作遊戲模式

除了格鬥模擬模式外，還有捲軸動作遊戲。超級英雄 Rick 對抗神秘敵人 Dark Dragon。穿越無數強敵與陷阱，從邪惡手中奪回傳說中的寶藏。

overview_en:
Final Fantasy Adventure is a 1991 Game Boy video game developed by Square and released by Square Soft Inc. in the USA on November 1, 1991.

In the Empire of Glaive, a gladiator-slave is forced to fight evil monsters controlled by the Dark Lord. But when his best friend is mortally wounded, he learns of a secret pendant which will give him great power. As the hero, you must battle your way out of the Dark Knight's castle and search through a dangerous world for the girl who has the pendant. But you discover she has been captured by the Dark Knight's men. To free her, you must find the legendary sword and fight off the Dark Knight's beasts and overlords through deserts, snowfields, lakes, forests, and caves. Are you ready for the adventure of your life?
overview_zh:
《Final Fantasy Adventure》是 1991 年由 Square 開發的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Square Soft Inc. 於 1991 年 11 月 1 日在美國發售。

在 Glaive 帝國，一名角鬥奴隸被迫對抗受 Dark Lord 操縱的邪惡怪物。當摯友身受重傷之際，他得知一條神秘墜飾能賦予強大力量。身為主角，你必須殺出 Dark Knight 的城堡，在險惡世界中尋找擁有墜飾的少女，卻發現她已被 Dark Knight 的部下擄走。為救她，你得找到傳說之劍，穿越沙漠、雪原、湖泊、森林與洞窟，擊敗 Dark Knight 的眾多猛獸與爪牙。準備好迎接此生最壯闊的冒險了嗎？

overview_en:
Final Fantasy Legend II is a 1991 Game Boy video game developed by Square and released by Square Soft Inc. in the USA on November 1, 1991.

Long ago, the ancient gods possessed a powerful force called The Magi. But they later split it into 77 different pieces and scattered them throughout nine different worlds. You've been given one of those pieces. And now, along with your band of chosen warriors, you journey through each world searching for the rest of the pieces and your long-lost father. You face danger at every turn. But if you make the right decisions, you can conquer each world and recover all the pieces of The Magi. Get ready for a daunting adventure, filled with unexpected surprises and perils.
overview_zh:
《Final Fantasy Legend II》是 1991 年由 Square 開發的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Square Soft Inc. 於 1991 年 11 月 1 日在美國發售。

太古諸神曾擁有名為「The Magi」的強大力量，後將其分為 77 塊散佈於九個世界中。你拿到了其中一塊。如今，你帶著一群被選中的戰士，遍訪各個世界尋找其餘碎片以及失蹤已久的父親。每一步都暗藏危機，但只要做出正確抉擇，便能征服每個世界並蒐集所有 The Magi 碎片。準備迎接這場意外重重、險象環生的艱鉅冒險。

overview_en:
Final Fantasy Legend III is a 1993 Game Boy video game developed by Square and released by Square Soft Inc. in the USA on August 1, 1993.

Millennia ago, a fierce battle was waged for control of an idyllic world known as Pureland. After much fighting, the brave warriors of Pureland were protectively sealed in their own dimension, away from the rest of the universe. This was done by means of Talon, a powerful space craft capable of traveling through both time and space. Centuries have passed and the would-be master of Pureland have managed to create a rift in the galaxy, sending the Pureland Water Entity to devour all that stands in its path. You must journey through past, present, and future to find the 13 pieces of the now-divided Talon. Only then can you save the universe from total destruction.
overview_zh:
《Final Fantasy Legend III》是 1993 年由 Square 開發的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Square Soft Inc. 於 1993 年 8 月 1 日在美國發售。

千年前，世人曾為控制名為 Pureland 的桃源世界而鏖戰。經過漫長戰火，Pureland 的勇士被守護性地封印於另一維度。封印是借助一艘能穿梭時空的強大飛行器 Talon 完成的。歲月流轉，覬覦 Pureland 的人在銀河上撕開縫隙，使 Pureland Water Entity 衝出吞噬一切。你必須穿梭過去、現在與未來，找回如今分散的 13 塊 Talon 碎片，才能拯救宇宙免於毀滅。

overview_en: Final Reverse is an Action game, developed by Shouei and published by Toei Animation, which was released in Japan in 1991.
overview_zh: 《Final Reverse》是由 Shouei 開發、Toei Animation 發行的動作遊戲，1991 年於日本推出。

overview_en: Fire Fighter is an Action game, developed by Teeny Weeny Games and published by Mindscape Inc., which was released in Europe in 1992.
overview_zh: 《Fire Fighter》是由 Teeny Weeny Games 開發、Mindscape Inc. 發行的動作遊戲，1992 年於歐洲推出。

overview_en:
Players essentially get to control Fish Dude as he eats as many tiny fish in the ocean to get bigger and stronger. Once he is strong enough, players can successfully defend themselves against larger fish, seagulls that want to grab unsuspecting players out of the water and cats that want to eat players as a tasty snack. A variety of allies (includuing Octo Dude who is an octopus) can help Fish Dude when the problems grow too intense for him to handle alone.

With only three lives to lose until achieving a "game over" screen, the game requires cunning and dexterity to master. Levels allow players to scroll of the screen at the extreme ends of the field and come back on the other side of the playing field. There are 18 levels that get more difficult as the other fish get faster and more predators are introduced in an attempt to kill off the players. Each level concludes after 20 fish have been consumed.

Passwords are introduced from the third level onwards
overview_zh:
玩家操控 Fish Dude，吃下海中越多小魚便能變得更大更強。等到實力足夠，便能自衛抵抗大魚、想把玩家叼出水面的海鷗，以及想把玩家當點心的貓。多種盟友（包括章魚 Octo Dude）會在 Fish Dude 應付不來時出手相助。

只有三條命到 Game Over，本作要求精準與機智。關卡兩端可捲出畫面後從另一側出現。共 18 關，難度隨敵魚變快、掠食者增多而提升，每關吃掉 20 條魚便結束。

第三關起導入密碼系統。

publisher:
Toei Animation JP
Electro Brain NA

overview_en: The beautiful planet of Blue Star, home-planet to a young boy named Flappy , is invaded by Dark Emperor Ngalo-Ngolo. The proud inhabitants of Blue Star, wanting neither war nor the invasion, self-destruct along with the planet on a path of self-determination. Flappy, however, is boarded onto an escape capsule headed for neighboring Planet Seviras by his father and so survives. From his capsule he sees fragments of the exploded Blue Star rain down incessantly on Planet Seviras.
overview_zh: 美麗的 Blue Star 是少年 Flappy 的故鄉，遭暗黑皇帝 Ngalo-Ngolo 入侵。Blue Star 高傲的居民既不願戰爭也不願被佔領，便選擇與星球同歸於盡的自決之路。父親將 Flappy 送上前往鄰星 Seviras 的逃生艙，他因此倖存。從艙中，他看到 Blue Star 爆炸的碎片不停墜落於 Seviras 之上。

overview_en: Fleet Commander Vs. is a Strategy game, published by ASCII Entertainment, which was released in Japan in 1991.
overview_zh: 《Fleet Commander Vs.》是 ASCII Entertainment 發行的策略遊戲，1991 年於日本推出。

title_en: FLINTSTONES, THE - KING ROCK TREASURE ISLAND
no_intro_name: Flintstones, The - King Rock Treasure Island (USA, Europe)

overview_en: Get into one of the gnarliest brain games around! Then use your reflexes and imagination to solve this wacky puzzle before time runs out! If you're fast, you'll get through all 50 levels, each one tougher than the last. But flip the wrong cube, and only your wits can save you!
overview_zh: 投入這款最具風格的腦力遊戲！運用反應與想像力，在時間耗盡前破解這場古怪的謎題！手腳夠快，便能闖過全部 50 關，且越往後越難。但若翻錯方塊，就只能靠機智救命！

overview_en: Soccer is a Sports game, developed by TOSE and published by Tonkin House, which was released in Europe 1991.
overview_zh: 《Soccer》是由 TOSE 開發、Tonkin House 發行的運動遊戲，1991 年於歐洲推出。

overview_en: Foreman For Real is a Sports game, developed by Software Creations and published by Acclaim, which was released in 1995.
overview_zh: 《Foreman For Real》是由 Software Creations 開發、Acclaim 發行的運動遊戲，1995 年推出。

overview_en:
Fortified Zone's plot follows two Mercenaries named Masato Kanzaki and Mizuki Makimura as they infiltrate a literal fortified zone, where they must take on mercenaries, soldiers, robots and monsters before destroying the central complex at the fortified zone's heart.

Gameplay:
Fortified Zone was ahead of its time in allowing the player to switch between characters during game play. Each character has their own strengths and weaknesses: Masato (the male mercenary) uses all the special weapons, but cannot jump. Mizuki (the female mercenary) can jump, but cannot use the special weapons. A top-down shoot-'em-up, the game had four multi-room levels, titled 'Field', 'Jungle', 'Caves' and 'Complex'. At the end of each level the player faces a 'boss' character: a cannon installation, a supertank, a dragon, a bulldozer and a large assault vehicle as the final boss. Items that can be picked up in gameplay include medical packs, flamethrowers, hand grenades, rocket launchers, 3-way machine guns and chain guns.
overview_zh:
《Fortified Zone》劇情描述兩名傭兵 Masato Kanzaki 與 Mizuki Makimura 潛入一座防禦工事區，他們必須擊退傭兵、士兵、機器人與怪物，最終摧毀防區中央的核心設施。

玩法：
《Fortified Zone》在當時頗為前衛，玩家可在遊戲中切換角色操作。兩人各有特色：男性傭兵 Masato 能使用所有特殊武器，但無法跳躍；女性傭兵 Mizuki 能跳躍，但不能使用特殊武器。本作為俯瞰式射擊，共有四個多房間關卡：'Field'、'Jungle'、'Caves' 與 'Complex'。每關尾的頭目分別為砲台、超級戰車、龍、推土機，最終頭目為大型突擊載具。可拾取的道具包括醫療包、火焰噴射器、手榴彈、火箭發射器、三向機關槍與鏈鎖機槍。

no_intro_name: Frank Thomas Big Hurt Baseball (USA, Europe)
overview_en: Frank wanted big league technology to match his two-time MVP award-winning style. He wanted authentic gameplay like pitchers losing arm strength. He wanted CD-quality sound FX including umpire calls, crowd cheering and bat cracking. He wanted 8 pitch selections and 27 stat categories. He wanted 6 modes of play including Season, All-Star Game, Home Run Derby, Playoffs, and Batting Practice. He wanted 28 3D rendered stadiums to crank home runs. He wanted motion captured sprites. And he wanted a ton of camera angles to check out all the action... he got it!
overview_zh: Frank 想要與兩屆 MVP 風範相稱的大聯盟級科技。他要求逼真玩法，例如投手會逐漸失去手臂力量；要求 CD 音質的音效，包括裁判判決、群眾歡呼與球棒擊聲；要求 8 種球路選擇與 27 種數據項目；要求 6 種模式，包括 Season、All-Star Game、Home Run Derby、Playoffs 與打擊練習；要求 28 座 3D 球場可供開轟；要求動作捕捉的精靈圖；還要求多種鏡頭角度看盡每個畫面……他全都拿到了！

title_en: FRANKY, JOE _ DIRK - ON THE TILES
no_intro_name: Franky, Joe _ Dirk - On the Tiles (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl)
overview_en: The Joe and Mac, Dragon's Lair and Dr. Franken franchises combine in this tile sliding puzzle game. A rather bizarre concept given the source material but does the gameplay stand on its own merits?
overview_zh: 《Joe and Mac》、《Dragon's Lair》與《Dr. Franken》系列在這款滑塊解謎遊戲中合體。素材組合相當奇妙，玩起來究竟有沒有獨立的樂趣？

overview_en:
Frogger (フロッガー) is a 1981 arcade game developed by Konami and licensed for North American distribution by Sega-Gremlin. It is regarded as a classic from the golden age of video arcade games, noted for its novel gameplay and theme. The object of the game is to direct frogs to their homes one by one by crossing a busy road and navigating a river full of hazards. The Frogger coin-op is an early example of a game with more than one CPU, as it used two Z80 processors.[4]

By 2005, Frogger in its various home video game incarnations had sold 20 million copies worldwide, including 5 million in the United States.[5]


The game starts with three, five, or seven frogs (lives), depending on the settings used by the operator. The player guides a frog which starts at the bottom of the screen, to his home in one of 5 slots at the top of the screen. The lower half of the screen contains a road with motor vehicles, which in various versions include cars, trucks, buses, dune buggies, bulldozers, vans, taxis, bicyclists, and/or motorcycles, speeding along it horizontally. The upper half of the screen consists of a river with logs, alligators, and turtles, all moving horizontally across the screen. The very top of the screen contains five "frog homes" which are the destinations for each frog. Every level is timed; the player must act quickly to finish each level before the time expires.

The only player control is the 4 direction joystick used to navigate the frog; each push in a direction causes the frog to hop once in that direction. On the bottom half of the screen, the player must successfully guide the frog between opposing lanes of trucks, cars, and other vehicles, to avoid becoming roadkill.

The middle of the screen, after the road, contains a median where the player must prepare to navigate the river.

By jumping on swiftly moving logs and the backs of turtles and alligators except the alligator jaws, the player can guide his or her frog safely to one of the empty lily pads. The player must avoid alligators sticking out at one of the five "frog homes", snakes, and otters in the river, but may catch bugs or escort a lady frog for bonuses. When all five frogs are directed home, the game progresses to the next level, with increased difficulty. After five levels, the game gets briefly easier yet again gets progressively harder to the next fifth level.

Softline in 1982 stated that "Frogger has earned the ominous distinction of being 'the arcade game with the most ways to die'".[6] There are many different ways to lose a life (illustrated by a "skull and crossbones" symbol where the frog was), including:

Being hit by or running into a road vehicle
Jumping into the river's water
Running into snakes, otters or into an alligator's jaws in the river
Jumping into a home invaded by an alligator
Staying on top of a diving turtle until it has completely submerged
Riding a log, alligator, or turtle off the side of the screen
Jumping into a home already occupied by a frog
Jumping into the side of a home or the bush
Running out of time
Frogger is available as a standard upright or cocktail cabinet. The controls consist solely of a 4-direction joystick used to guide the frog's jump direction. The number of simultaneous players is one, and the game has a maximum of two players.

The game's opening tune is the first verse of a Japanese children's song called Inu No Omawarisan (The Dog Policeman). The song remained intact in the US release. Other Japanese tunes that are played during gameplay include the themes to the anime Hana no Ko Lunlun and Araiguma Rascal.
overview_zh:
《Frogger》（フロッガー）為 1981 年由 Konami 開發的街機遊戲，北美由 Sega-Gremlin 取得授權發行。它被視為街機黃金時代的經典，以新穎的玩法與題材聞名。遊戲目標是引導青蛙們穿越繁忙的馬路、橫跨佈滿危險的河流，逐隻回到家中。Frogger 機台是早期使用多顆 CPU 的範例之一，採用兩顆 Z80 處理器。

截至 2005 年，《Frogger》在各家用平台上的累計銷量已達全球 2,000 萬套，其中美國 500 萬套。


遊戲依機台設定開始時提供三、五或七隻青蛙（命數）。玩家從畫面下方引導青蛙至上方五個窩中的其一。畫面下半部是繁忙的馬路，車輛種類視版本而異，包括汽車、卡車、巴士、沙灘車、推土機、廂型車、計程車、自行車與機車等橫向疾駛。畫面上半部是河流，漂流著木頭、鱷魚與烏龜，皆橫向移動。最上方是五個「青蛙窩」，是每隻青蛙的目的地。每關都有時限，玩家必須在時間耗盡前完成。

操作僅有四方向搖桿，每按一次方向，青蛙就往該方向跳一次。畫面下半部須在卡車與汽車等對向車流間穿梭，避免成為路殺。

馬路與河流之間有一條安全帶，讓玩家準備過河。

透過跳上快速移動的木頭、烏龜與鱷魚背（除了鱷魚嘴部），引導青蛙安全抵達空著的蓮葉。河中有時會從五個窩中冒出鱷魚、蛇與水獺，須避開；但途中可吃蟲或護送母青蛙獲得加分。當五隻青蛙都回家後便進入下一關，難度提升。每五關後難度會略為下降，但下一個五關又會變得更難。

Softline 雜誌 1982 年表示「Frogger 贏得了『死法最多的街機遊戲』這項令人膽寒的稱號」。死法（青蛙原地會出現骷髏標記）包括：

被路上車輛撞到或衝撞之；
跳入河水；
撞上河中蛇、水獺或鱷魚嘴；
跳進已被鱷魚佔據的窩；
站在潛入水中烏龜上直至完全沒入；
隨木頭、鱷魚或烏龜漂出畫面外；
跳進已有青蛙的窩；
撞上窩或灌木的側邊；
超時。
Frogger 有直立式與雞尾酒桌型兩種規格，操控僅一支四向搖桿。最多兩名玩家輪流，不能同時遊玩。

開場曲取自日本童謠《いぬのおまわりさん》（狗狗警察）的第一段，美版亦保留原曲。其他遊戲中播放的日本曲目包括動畫《花の子ルンルン》與《浣熊拉斯卡爾》的主題曲。

title_en: FROM TV ANIMATION SLAM DUNK 2 - ZENKOKU E NO TIP OFF
no_intro_name: From TV Animation Slam Dunk 2 - Zenkoku e no Tip Off (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: Players move around the tiled maze, avoiding an array of bizarre enemies from crabs to robotic snowmen via amoeba ghosts, flipping tiles from white to dark.
overview_zh: 玩家在方塊迷宮中四處移動，避開螃蟹、機械雪人乃至阿米巴鬼魂等各種古怪敵人，並把白色磚翻成黑色磚。

title_en: FUSHIGI NA BLOBBY - PRINCESS BLOB O SUKUE!
no_intro_name: Fushigi na Blobby - Princess Blob o Sukue! (Japan)

title_en: FUSHIGI NO DUNGEON - FUURAI NO SHIREN GB - TSUKIKAGE MURA NO KAIBUTSU
no_intro_name: Fushigi no Dungeon - Fuurai no Shiren GB - Tsukikage Mura no Kaibutsu (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en:
SD Command Gundam G-ARMS: Operation Gundam (SDコマンドガンダム G-ARMS オペレーションガンダム) is an Action game, published by Bandai, which was released in Japan on May 18, 1991 .

An action shooting game based on "G-ARMS", the earliest of the "SD Command Chronicles" series of SD Gundam works. It is based on the battle action scene of the Gachapon Warrior series.
overview_zh:
《SD Command Gundam G-ARMS: Operation Gundam》（SDコマンドガンダム G-ARMS オペレーションガンダム）是 Bandai 發行的動作遊戲，於 1991 年 5 月 18 日在日本推出。

本作為動作射擊遊戲，改編自《SD Command Chronicles》系列 SD 鋼彈作品中最早的「G-ARMS」，並以 Gachapon Warrior 系列的戰鬥動作場景為基礎。

overview_en: Galaga & Galaxian (ギャラガ&ギャラクシアン) is a 1995 video game compilation developed and published by Namco. It was released in North America by Nintendo as part of its Arcade Classic series, renaming it Arcade Classic Vol. 3: Galaga and Galaxian. It includes conversions of Galaxian (1979) and Galaga (1981), with both featuring support for the Super Game Boy peripheral for enhanced color and border backgrounds. The included port of Galaga was later re-released for Namco Gallery Vol. 1 and Galaxian in Namco Gallery Vol. 2, both released in 1996.
overview_zh: 《Galaga & Galaxian》（ギャラガ&ギャラクシアン）是 1995 年由 Namco 開發發行的合輯。北美由 Nintendo 以 Arcade Classic 系列的《Arcade Classic Vol. 3: Galaga and Galaxian》之名發售。收錄《Galaxian》（1979）與《Galaga》（1981）的移植版，皆支援 Super Game Boy 周邊以呈現增強色彩與邊框背景。本作中的 Galaga 後續收錄於《Namco Gallery Vol. 1》，Galaxian 收錄於《Namco Gallery Vol. 2》，兩款合輯皆於 1996 年推出。

overview_en: The Game Boy Camera, released as Pocket Camera in Japan, is a Nintendo accessory for the handheld Game Boy game console. It was released on February 21, 1998, in Japan, and manufacturing ceased in late 2002. As a toy for user-generated content, it can be used to shoot grayscale photographs, edit them or create original drawings, and transfer images between GBC units or to the 64DD art game suite Mario Artist. The accessory featured a 180°-swivel front-facing camera that allowed users to capture selfies. Its images can be printed to thermal paper with the Game Boy Printer. The GBC's cartridge contains minigames based on Nintendo's early games such as the arcade video game Space Fever and the Game & Watch handheld game Ball, and a chiptune music sequencer; photographers have embraced its technological limitations as artistic challenges.
overview_zh: Game Boy Camera（日版名為 Pocket Camera）是 Nintendo 為掌機 Game Boy 推出的周邊。1998 年 2 月 21 日在日本發售，2002 年末停產。作為使用者創作內容的玩具，可拍攝灰階照片、編輯或自由作畫，並在 GBC 主機間或與 64DD 的繪圖軟體 Mario Artist 互傳影像。本周邊配有一個 180 度可旋轉的前置鏡頭，可拍自拍。影像可透過 Game Boy Printer 印於熱感紙。卡帶內建以 Nintendo 早期遊戲為基礎的迷你遊戲，例如街機《Space Fever》與 Game & Watch 的《Ball》，並附有 chiptune 音樂編輯器；攝影師將其技術限制視為藝術上的挑戰。

overview_en: The Game Boy Camera line has was released in five different standard colors of models: blue, green, red, yellow, and clear purple (Japan only). this is a limited edition gold themed for The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time, which contains unique stamps, and was available only in the United States through a mail-order offer from Nintendo Power. It is thought that there are only 2000 in circulation.
overview_zh: Game Boy Camera 推出過五種標準色：藍、綠、紅、黃，以及僅於日本發售的透明紫。本作是搭配《薩爾達傳說：時之笛》主題的金色限定版，內含獨特印章，僅在美國透過 Nintendo Power 郵購方式提供。據傳流通量僅 2000 個。

overview_en: Game Boy Gallery is a Game Boy video game released exclusively in Europe in 1995. The game includes five classic Game & Watch video games with enhanced graphics and sound (if the player wishes, he or she can choose an option that lets them listen to the original sounds of the Game & Watch games). The gameplay has also been slightly altered. The games that were included are Ball, Vermin, Flagman, Manhole, and Mario's Cement Factory (for information on each individual game, check their page). The game was succeeded by Game & Watch Gallery, which included Game & Watch games and remakes with Mario characters.
overview_zh: 《Game Boy Gallery》是 1995 年於歐洲獨佔發售的 Game Boy 遊戲，收錄五款經典 Game & Watch 遊戲，畫面與音效強化（玩家亦可選擇聆聽原 Game & Watch 音效）。玩法亦稍作調整。收錄作品為《Ball》、《Vermin》、《Flagman》、《Manhole》與《Mario's Cement Factory》（個別介紹請見各自頁面）。後續作為《Game & Watch Gallery》，收錄了 Game & Watch 遊戲及加入瑪利歐角色的重製版。

overview_en:
Game & Watch Gallery (known as Game Boy Gallery in Japan, and Game Boy Gallery 2 in Australia and Europe) is the second of five games in the Game Boy Gallery/Game & Watch Gallery series. 

Original and updated versions of four Game & Watch hand held games!

Classic versions will take you back to the '80s and a simpler time in video games. Modern versions feature your favorite characters and will bring you to the present with improved play control and sound effects.

-Enjoy four different games!
Manhole - Don't let pedestrians fall.
Fire - Rescue the jumpers.
Octopus - Retrive the sunken treasure.
Oil Panic - Catch the dripping oil.

-New Interrupt Save feature lets you stop and restart anytime!

-Battery-backed memory saves all your scores!
overview_zh:
《Game & Watch Gallery》（日版名《Game Boy Gallery》，澳洲與歐洲版名《Game Boy Gallery 2》）是 Game Boy Gallery／Game & Watch Gallery 系列五作中的第二款。

收錄四款 Game & Watch 掌上機遊戲的原版與更新版！

經典版讓你回到 80 年代電玩單純的時光；現代版則加入大家熟悉的角色、改良操作手感與音效，將你帶進當下。

-暢玩四款不同遊戲！
Manhole——別讓行人掉下去。
Fire——救下跳樓者。
Octopus——回收沉沒寶藏。
Oil Panic——接住滴落的油。

-新「Interrupt Save」功能讓你隨時暫停與繼續！

-電池備份記憶體保留所有得分！

no_intro_name: Game Boy Gallery - 5 Games in 1 (Europe) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: Game Boy Wars (ゲームボーイウォーズ Gēmu Bōi Wōzu?) is a turn-based war simulator produced by Nintendo and Intelligent Systems that was released for the Game Boy in Japan only in 1991. It is a portable follow-up to the 1988 Family Computer war simulator Famicom Wars, making it the second game in Nintendo's Wars series. A series of sequels to the original Game Boy Wars were produced by Hudson Soft.
overview_zh: 《Game Boy Wars》（ゲームボーイウォーズ）是 Nintendo 與 Intelligent Systems 製作的回合制戰爭模擬遊戲，1991 年僅在日本推出 Game Boy 版。本作是 1988 年 Famicom 戰爭模擬遊戲《Famicom Wars》的可攜續作，為 Nintendo Wars 系列第二作。後續多款續作則由 Hudson Soft 製作。

overview_en:
Game Boy Wars Turbo is an enhanced version of the original Game Boy Wars that was released on June 24, 1997. The main new feature in Game Boy Wars Turbo is that the CPU now has a better decision-making algorithm during its turns, allowing battles to proceed swifter than in the original. Turbo also features 50 new maps, as well as Super Game Boy support.

An alternate version of Game Boy Wars Turbo was released as a promotional giveaway by Weekly Famitsu featuring a set of maps submitted by readers of the magazine.
overview_zh:
《Game Boy Wars Turbo》是原《Game Boy Wars》的強化版，於 1997 年 6 月 24 日推出。最大的新特色是 CPU 在回合中具備更佳的決策演算法，使對戰節奏比原作更流暢。Turbo 還新增 50 張地圖，並支援 Super Game Boy。

另有由《週刊 Famitsu》以贈品形式發放的特別版《Game Boy Wars Turbo》，收錄讀者投稿的地圖。

title_en: GAME BOY WARS TURBO - FAMITSU VERSION
no_intro_name: Game Boy Wars Turbo - Famitsu Version (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en:
Tamagotchi is the name of a Game Boy game released in October 1997, also known as Game de Hakken!! Tamagotchi in Japan. It is very much like the original Tamagotchi, but with additional features such as music, contests, and more games.

Upon starting the game, players will select an egg of the 8 there are, which will hatch after a short period of time. After the baby hatches from the egg, the player can choose a name for it. Up to three characters can be raised at one time.
overview_zh:
《Tamagotchi》是 1997 年 10 月推出的 Game Boy 遊戲，日版名為《Game de Hakken!! Tamagotchi》。玩法接近原版電子雞，並追加音樂、競賽與更多迷你遊戲等內容。

開始遊戲時，玩家可從 8 顆蛋中擇一，經一段時間後孵化。寶寶孵出後可命名，最多同時飼養三隻角色。

title_en: GAME DE HAKKEN!! TAMAGOTCHI - OSUTCHI TO MESUTCHI
no_intro_name: Game de Hakken!! Tamagotchi - Osutchi to Mesutchi (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en: Game de Hakken!! Tamagotchi Osucchi to Mesucchi (ゲームで発見!たまごっち オスっちとメスっち) is a Game Boy Color game based on Mesutchi and Osutchi. The game was released on January 15, 1998 only in Japan by the Japanese game development company Tom Create and Bandai.
overview_zh: 《Game de Hakken!! Tamagotchi Osucchi to Mesucchi》（ゲームで発見!たまごっち オスっちとメスっち）是以 Mesutchi 與 Osutchi 為基礎的 Game Boy Color 遊戲，由日本遊戲開發公司 Tom Create 與 Bandai 於 1998 年 1 月 15 日僅在日本發售。

overview_en:
The Game & Watch Gallery is Nintendo's first portable compilation featuring their popular line of original 1980's handheld games, featuring the popular "Mr. Game & Watch" himself, as well as Mario and friends.

The compilation consists of four popular titles from the Game & Watch Series, each with a "Classic" and "Modern" version of each game:

    Octopus: Collects as much treasure as your bag can hold, while avoiding the octopus tentacles that continually swing around you. In the "Modern" version, Mario becomes the diver, and as he collects more treasure, his bag becomes heavier, making it harder to return to the surface. Mario can also delay the octopus tentacles by throwing treasure at them.


    Fire: Position your net to catch the falling people jumping from the burning building. The "Modern" version has Mario and Luigi rescuing Toad, Yoshi and Donkey Kong Jr. from Princess Peach's Castle. Each falling character has different weights and falling patterns.


    Manhole: The player must cover the holes to keep the continually walking people from falling through the manholes and into the sewers. In the "Modern" version, Yoshi must use his tongue to keep Mario, Toad and Donkey Kong Jr. from falling thought the hole, each character having different speeds and patterns.


    Oil Panic: The player must collect the dripping blobs of oil before they slip past and ruin everything. The "Modern" version has Bowser dropping oil blobs at Mario, who has to catch the oil and dump it over to Yoshi before the Koopa King gets the best of Mario.



Each mode (Classic and Modern) has two difficulties: Easy and Hard. The higher score a player gets in each version, new unlockable bonuses will become available via the "Gallery Corner". These bonuses include release dates, pictures and animations which tell in greater detail the history behind Gunpei Yokoi's portable creations.
overview_zh:
《Game & Watch Gallery》是任天堂首款掌機合輯，收錄其1980年代知名的原版掌上遊戲，登場人物包括著名的「Game & Watch先生」以及瑪利歐和好友們。

本合輯收錄四款Game & Watch系列的人氣作品，每款皆有「經典版」與「現代版」兩種版本：

    Octopus：在不被章魚觸手碰到的情況下，盡可能蒐集寶物裝滿袋子。「現代版」中由瑪利歐擔任潛水員，蒐集越多寶物袋子越重，浮回水面也越困難。瑪利歐還能丟寶物拖延章魚觸手。


    Fire：操作彈跳網接住從失火大樓跳下的人。「現代版」中由瑪利歐和路易吉從碧姬公主城堡救出奇諾比奧、耀西和大金剛Jr.。每位墜落角色的重量與下落模式各不相同。


    Manhole：玩家必須蓋住人孔，避免持續行走的路人掉進下水道。「現代版」中由耀西用舌頭接住瑪利歐、奇諾比奧和大金剛Jr.，每個角色的速度與動向皆不同。


    Oil Panic：玩家必須在油滴落地造成損壞前接住所有油滴。「現代版」中由酷霸王朝瑪利歐倒下油滴，瑪利歐須接住並倒給耀西，以免被酷霸王得逞。



各模式（經典與現代）皆有簡單與困難兩種難度。在每個版本中分數越高，「Gallery Corner」中可解鎖的獎勵就越多，包含發售日、圖片與動畫，詳細介紹橫井軍平所創掌機作品的歷史。

overview_en:
Gamera: Guardian of the Universe (Gamera: Daikaijuu Kutyu Kessen) is a Gamera game for the original Gameboy. It was released to coincide with the movie of the same title, in 1995.

The game is essentially a turn-based battler, in a similar vein to the Pokemon games for the same console. Its battle system is similar to that of an RPG game, but other than that, the similarities end there.

Most of the attacks rely on Button Combos, but the game provides a list of combos for the more inexperienced player.

Gamera's enemies are Gyaos, Guiron and Viras. Eventually, the game's final battle pits Gamera against a clone of himself.

The game's language is in Japanese, but an English fan translation does exist.
overview_zh:
《卡美拉：宇宙守護者》（ガメラ 大怪獣空中決戦）是Game Boy上的卡美拉遊戲，於1995年配合同名電影推出。

本作基本上是回合制對戰遊戲，風格類似同主機的《精靈寶可夢》系列。戰鬥系統類似RPG，但相似之處僅止於此。

大多數攻擊仰賴按鍵組合技，遊戲也提供組合技列表給較不熟練的玩家參考。

卡美拉的敵人包括Gyaos、Guiron與Viras。最後決戰將由卡美拉對抗自己的複製體。

遊戲為日文版，但有英文同人翻譯版本。

no_intro_name: Ganbare Goemon - Kurofunetou no Nazo (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: Go For It, Goemon: Ebisumaru Has Been Kidnapped is the first Goemon game for the Game Boy.  It's in the style of the Famicom action games, played from an overhead view.
overview_zh: 《加油吧五右衛門：惠比壽丸被綁架了》是Game Boy上首款五右衛門系列作品。風格延續紅白機動作遊戲，採俯視視角進行。

overview_en:
Garfield Labyrinth is a European exclusive video game released for the Nintendo Game Boy in the 1990s.

Alternate versions of this game were available in North America (as The Real Ghostbusters) and Japan (as Mickey Mouse IV: Mah? no Labyrinth).
overview_zh:
《加菲貓迷宮》是1990年代於Game Boy上發行的歐洲限定遊戲。

此遊戲的不同版本曾在北美（《The Real Ghostbusters》）與日本（《米奇老鼠IV：魔法迷宮》）發行。

overview_en:
Gargoyle's Quest is a 1990 Game Boy video game developed by Capcom and released by Capcom USA in the USA on July 1, 1990.

The game consists of two gameplay styles. One half has the player traverse an overhead view, either on the world map or in towns. This is broken up by the other type of content: individual, action-platforming levels that sometimes feature a boss at the end. While traversing in the sections with an overhead view, the player is able to talk with residential ghouls and, if outside a town, is susceptible to random battle encounters. The player then must defeat the enemies in order to return to the overhead-view map. While on the overhead map, the player occasionally comes across ghouls who want to fight Firebrand for various reasons.

Firebrand can walk, jump (progressively higher with time), cling to walls using his claws, hover for a period (progressively longer with time), and fire offensive projectiles. The player starts with a weak projectile, but progressively gains new projectiles which grant more power and special abilities. Firebrand starts with two hit points, but gains more throughout the game based on items or blessings obtained; various enemies and objects drain different amounts of his health, represented by the hit points.

Throughout the game, the player gains various items including passive ones that increase Firebrand's abilities outright. Eventually, Firebrand acquires an item that allows the player to hover without ever needing to rest on the ground. A healing vial can be used to restore health. Additionally, the offensive projectiles that are learned over time each have unique traits or specialized uses. The Blockbuster, for example, is more powerful than its predecessor and can destroy special walls blocking the player's path. Another projectile temporarily covers sharp vertical surfaces allowing Firebrand to reach higher locations. These abilities guarantee a use for such projectiles even after more powerful projectiles are obtained, and provide a depth of valid options for attacking foes. Projectiles can be selected from a drop-down, pause menu at any time, same as healing vials.
overview_zh:
《Gargoyle's Quest》是Capcom開發的1990年Game Boy作品，由Capcom USA於1990年7月1日在美國發行。

遊戲玩法分為兩種型態。其一是俯視視角下的世界地圖或城鎮探索；其二則是橫向動作平台關卡，部分關卡末尾會有頭目戰。在俯視視角中，玩家可與住民食屍鬼對話，於城鎮外則會遭遇隨機戰鬥，必須擊敗敵人才能回到俯視地圖。在地圖上偶爾也會遇到要與Firebrand戰鬥的食屍鬼。

Firebrand可行走、跳躍（隨遊戲進度跳得越高）、用爪子攀附牆壁、滯空一段時間（時間隨進度延長）、發射攻擊性彈幕。玩家初期持有威力較弱的彈幕，會逐漸獲得威力更強且具特殊能力的新彈幕。Firebrand起始HP為2，遊戲進行中可透過道具或祝福增加HP；不同敵人與物件會造成不同的傷害扣血。

遊戲過程中可獲得各種道具，包括直接強化Firebrand能力的被動道具。最終Firebrand會獲得允許他無需落地即可滯空的道具。藥水可恢復生命。此外，逐漸學會的攻擊彈幕各有獨特特性或專門用途。例如Blockbuster比前一發更強，能破壞擋路的特殊牆壁；另一種彈幕能暫時覆蓋尖銳的垂直表面，讓Firebrand到達高處。即使取得更強彈幕後，這些技能仍有用武之地，提供豐富的攻擊選擇。彈幕與藥水可隨時於暫停下拉選單中切換。

overview_en:
The gameplay is very similar to the original Gauntlet, a topdown dungeon crawl supporting up to four players. The biggest difference from the original game is that players can choose identical classes, instead of being limited to a particular one for each joystick.

The Game Boy version was praised by the German Play Time magazine for its technical implementation (including 8-directional scrolling), faithful recreation of graphics, and for evoking nostalgic feelings with similar sound effects, however this version was criticized for difficult-to-recognize sprites and its technically weak theme music.[
overview_zh:
玩法與初代《Gauntlet》非常相似，是俯視視角的地下城探索遊戲，最多支援四人遊玩。與前作最大的差別在於，玩家可選擇相同職業，不再受限於每支搖桿固定一種職業。

德國《Play Time》雜誌讚賞Game Boy版的技術實作（包括8方向捲動）、忠實重現的圖像，以及與原版相似的音效喚起的懷舊感；但批評其精靈圖難以辨識，主題曲表現偏弱。[

overview_en:
Bonk's Adventure is a scrolling platform game developed by Red Company and Atlus and released in 1989 in Japan and 1990 in North America for the TurboGrafx-16. In Japan it was titled PC Genjin (PC原人), a play on the Japanese name for the system, PC Engine. The first game in the Bonk series, it was followed by two more games for the TurboGrafx-16 before branching out to other platforms.

Bonk's Adventure was ported to the NES and Amiga, as well as being released as a coin-operated arcade game, under different titles (FC Genjin and BC Genjin). A completely different game with the same name appeared on the Game Boy (under the title GB Genjin in Japan).
overview_zh:
《Bonk's Adventure》是由Red Company與Atlus共同開發的橫向捲動平台遊戲，1989年於日本、1990年於北美在TurboGrafx-16上發行。日版名稱為《PC原人》，取自該主機日版名稱「PC Engine」的諧音。本作是Bonk系列首作，後續在TurboGrafx-16上又推出兩款續作，並擴展至其他平台。

《Bonk's Adventure》以不同名稱（FC原人、BC原人）移植至NES、Amiga，並推出大型電玩版。Game Boy上則出現一款完全不同的同名作品（日版稱為《GB原人》）。

title_en: GB GENJIN LAND - VIVA! CHIKKUN OUKOKU
no_intro_name: GB Genjin Land - Viva! Chikkun Oukoku (Japan)
overview_en: GB Genjin Land: Viva! Chikkun Kingdom (GB原人ランド ビバ!チックン王国, GB Genjin Land: Viva! Chikkun Ōkoku lit. GB Primitive Man Land: Viva! Chicken Kingdom) is an action video game that was released by Hudson Soft for Game Boy on April 22, 1994 exclusively in Japan. It is a unique entry in Bonk series as it consists of multiple mini-games rather than being a standard side-scrolling platformer.
overview_zh: 《GB原人ランド ビバ!チックン王国》（GB Genjin Land: Viva! Chikkun Ōkoku）是Hudson Soft於1994年4月22日在日本獨佔發行的Game Boy動作遊戲。本作為Bonk系列中較特別的一作，並非標準橫向捲動平台遊戲，而是由多款迷你遊戲組成。

overview_en: Gear Works is an Action game, developed by Teque Interactive and published by Sony Imagesoft, which was released in 1993.
overview_zh: 《Gear Works》是Teque Interactive開發、Sony Imagesoft發行的動作遊戲，於1993年推出。

title_en: GEGEGE NO KITAROU - YOUKAI SOUZOUSHU ARAWARU!
no_intro_name: Gegege no Kitarou - Youkai Souzoushu Arawaru! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: Genjin Collection (原人コレクション, Genjin Korekushon) is a compilation video game released for the Game Boy. It was only released in Japan and features 3 Game Boy Bonk games in 1 pack.
overview_zh: 《原人コレクション》（Genjin Collection）是Game Boy上的合輯遊戲。日本限定發售，一卡帶收錄三款Game Boy版Bonk系列作品。

overview_en: You're "Big George" Foreman and you've got an appetite for BIG action that only KO BOXING can satisfy. Take on a roster of 15 heavyweight contenders as you go for the World Championship. Rook your opponents with stinging left-right combos! Pound your way to the title with a spectacular "Big George" Super Punch - while the computer "judge" tracks the action! GEORGE FOREMAN'S KO BOXING puts the power of the greatest knockout artist in your hands!
overview_zh: 你就是「Big George」Foreman，渴望只有KO BOXING能滿足的大規模激戰。挑戰15位重量級競爭者，朝世界冠軍邁進。用刺人的左右組合拳擊退對手！施放壯觀的「Big George」超級重拳一路擊敗對手登上王座，電腦「裁判」全程紀錄戰況！《GEORGE FOREMAN'S KO BOXING》讓你親手掌握史上最強KO高手的力量！

overview_en: In the game, the player is presented with four Ghostbusters to choose from: Peter, Ray, Egon, or Winston. The NES version features their accountant, Louis, as a fifth playable character. This, along with the North American version of Ghostbusters II, were the only titles ever released that allowed players to play as Winston. While the action can be performed by oneself in the NES version, a secondary player may join the game with the ability to press B on a second controller to release a ghost-catching trap. The objective of the game is to trap all the ghosts in an area until an arrow appears which alerts the player where to travel to next. A boss appears at the end of each stage.
overview_zh: 本作可從四位魔鬼剋星中選擇：Peter、Ray、Egon或Winston。NES版額外可選會計師Louis作為第五位可操作角色。本作與北美版《魔鬼剋星II》是僅有的兩款讓玩家能扮演Winston的作品。NES版可單人遊玩，第二位玩家也可加入並用第二支控制器按B鍵釋放捕鬼陷阱。遊戲目標是把該區域的幽靈全部捕捉，待箭頭出現後前往下一區。每關結尾會出現頭目。

overview_en: Go Go Ackman is a maze game like Pac-Man, based on the manga of the same name.
overview_zh: 《Go Go Ackman》是類似《小精靈》的迷宮遊戲，改編自同名漫畫。

overview_en: A board game where players hitchhike around the world.
overview_zh: 玩家搭便車環遊世界的桌上遊戲。

overview_en: A peaceful nation has been invaded by an enemy army. It's up to you to conquer the army and save your nation!
overview_zh: 和平國度遭敵軍入侵，由你負責征服敵軍、拯救國家！
publisher:
Copya Systems JP
Electro Brain NA

overview_en: The clock ticks down. The roar of the crowd rises in a deafening chant of "U-S-A! U-S-A!" Suddenly, your winger breaks free, and spots the open man in the middle. Pass... shot... GOAL! It's America's favorite new sport, soon to become your favorite new home video game, thanks to Jaleco! Because GOAL! brings soccer to life like you've never seen it. You play with a full team of 11 players, each one rated in 7 different skill categories. You can match them against a team controlled by the computer or another player. You can even team up with a friend and match your combined skills against the best computer team. So if you want soccer at its best, tune in to the undisputed champion of home soccer software: GOAL!
overview_zh: 倒數計時。觀眾的怒吼化為震耳欲聾的「U-S-A! U-S-A!」呼聲。突然，邊鋒甩開防守、發現中央空檔。傳球…射門…GOAL!這是美國新興的人氣運動，多虧Jaleco，很快也將成為你最愛的家用電玩！《GOAL!》以前所未見的方式重現足球──你掌控完整11人陣容，每位球員都有7種不同能力評等。可挑戰電腦或另一位玩家控制的隊伍，也可與好友合作對抗最強電腦隊。想體驗最棒的足球，就鎖定家用足球軟體王者：《GOAL!》！

title_en: GOD MEDICINE - FANTASY SEKAI NO TANJOU
no_intro_name: God Medicine - Fantasy Sekai no Tanjou (Japan)
overview_en:
God Medicine: Fantasy Sekai no Tanjou is a fantasy RPG for Game Boy.

Overview
The story in God Medicine is heavily metatextual. It concerns a video game company called Phantom, which is hard at work on its newest Role Playing Game venture. Suddenly, the entire company is destroyed. Three hardcore RPG fanatics embark on a quest to discover what happened to Phantom, and find that a demon from their game's world is responsible.

Release History
God Medicine: Fantasy Sekai no Tanjou was released only in Japan, on July 20, 1993. An enhanced version called God Medicine Hukkokuban was released in 1999 via Nintendo's "Nintendo Power" downloadable game service. It included, among other things, a bestiary and support for the Super Game Boy.
overview_zh:
《GOD MEDICINE：奇幻世界的誕生》是Game Boy上的奇幻RPG。

概要
本作劇情具有強烈的元文本色彩。故事描述名為Phantom的電玩公司正在開發新的角色扮演遊戲，公司卻突然遭到毀滅。三位資深RPG狂熱者展開冒險，試圖查明Phantom的下落，最終發現是來自遊戲世界的惡魔所為。

發售歷史
《GOD MEDICINE：奇幻世界的誕生》於1993年7月20日在日本獨佔發售。1999年透過任天堂的「Nintendo Power」遊戲下載服務推出強化版《GOD MEDICINE 復刻版》，新增魔物圖鑑與Super Game Boy支援等內容。

overview_en:
The game is a 2D side-scrolling video game where Godzilla can only walk around or climb ladders, vines or crystals. A prominent part of the game is his punch, the only attack he has, which is used to punch and destroy boulders, and to kill or push enemies. The main point of each room is to destroy all of the boulders, by pushing them against a wall and hitting it again. Once all of the boulders are gone, one or two arrow panels will appear somewhere in the room. Touching one will take Godzilla to the room in a large map corresponding to its direction. As levels are completed, the direction is revealed on the map for further use.

There are two power-ups; the hourglass and the lightning bolt. The hourglass stops all enemy movement for a short period of time. The lightning bolt kills all enemies on-screen except for Ghidrah.
overview_zh:
本作為2D橫向捲動遊戲，哥吉拉只能行走或攀爬梯子、藤蔓、水晶。重要玩法為他的拳擊──這是他唯一的攻擊手段，可用於擊碎巨石、擊倒或推開敵人。各房間的主要目標是把所有巨石推向牆壁並再次擊打以摧毀。所有巨石清除後，房間內會出現一到兩個方向箭頭面板，碰觸後即可前往大地圖上對應方向的房間。隨關卡破關進度，各方向會在地圖上顯示供後續使用。

有兩種能力強化道具：沙漏與閃電。沙漏可短暫凍結所有敵人；閃電則消滅畫面上除王者基多拉外的所有敵人。

overview_en: Nintendo GOLF lets you choose your clubs, change your stance, control your swings - even select the angle of impact! You'll view the hole from both close up and far away, judge the changing conditions of the green, and measure the wind velocity. But watch out! When the wind changes, so does the flight of your ball. With Nintendo's state-of-the-art graphics and realistic game play, you'll really believe you're on the fairways. So play Nintendo GOLF, because there's not a video golf game on par with it anywhere!
overview_zh: 任天堂《GOLF》讓你選擇球桿、調整站姿、控制揮桿動作，甚至挑選擊球角度！可從遠近兩種視角觀察球洞，判斷果嶺狀況、測量風速。但要注意！風向變化會影響球的飛行軌跡。透過任天堂頂尖的圖像與真實的玩法，讓你彷彿置身球道。快來玩任天堂《GOLF》──沒有任何電玩高爾夫遊戲能與之並駕齊驅！
