overview_en:
Gradius: The Interstellar Assault is a 1992 Game Boy video game developed by Konami and released by Konami Inc. in the USA on January 17, 1992.

YOU'RE CORDIALLY INVITED TO THE GALAXY'S HOTTEST COOKOUT!

Smell the challenge, as the flames of destruction scorch your courage and ignite your fears. Just when you thought life was cool, the Bacterion Beast Squadron launches a massive counterattack that makes all other intergalactic battles seen like picnics. These plutonian chow hounds are starving for a victory. And if you're not careful, they'll char your hide, then serve you up like a stuffed Sarubian Space Pig!

-Two megs memory intensifies five unbelievable new levels of deep space devastation.
-Plot the galaxy's most feared fighter, and out-blast hundreds of psychotic space freaks who'll roast your tail with weapons unlike any you've ever encountered.
-Unique duel scrolling battlefield speeds up the action and adds 3D effects to the carnage.
-Select from three different pre-attack modes: Intruder Missiles, Laser Warfare and Double Guns 'A Blazing.
-Capture Power-Up Spheres and increase your firepower with Ripple Blasts, Multiple Warheads, Ghost Fighters and Force Fields.
-Sharpen your tactics in "Practice Galaxy" where you can increase your odds of survival... slightly!
overview_zh:
《宇宙巡航艦：星際突襲》是Konami開發的1992年Game Boy作品，由Konami Inc.於1992年1月17日在美國發行。

誠摯邀請你參加銀河系最熱辣的烤肉大會！

感受挑戰的火焰，毀滅之火將灼燒你的勇氣、點燃你的恐懼。正當你以為一切平靜時，Bacterion獸獸軍團發動空前反擊，讓所有星際戰役相形之下都像野餐。這群冥王星級貪食客飢渴於勝利，若不小心，他們會把你烤成焦炭、像填料的Sarubian太空豬一樣端上桌！

-2百萬位元記憶體強化五個前所未見的深空毀滅關卡。
-駕駛銀河系最令人聞風喪膽的戰機，擊潰數百名持有前所未見武器的瘋狂太空怪物。
-獨特的雙向捲動戰場加快動作節奏，並為混戰加上3D效果。
-可從三種預設攻擊模式擇一：Intruder Missiles、Laser Warfare、Double Guns 'A Blazing。
-取得Power-Up Spheres強化火力，加上Ripple Blasts、Multiple Warheads、Ghost Fighters、Force Fields。
-在「Practice Galaxy」中磨練戰術，稍微提升你的生存機率！

overview_en: A simple and full-scale fishing game where you can experience the fun of bass fishing. The purpose of "Tournament Mode" is to compete with rivals for fishing results and become a tournament leader. The news (newspaper) screen will be displayed for one tournament, and you can feel the results of your efforts, such as checking your ranking and displaying one side if you win. The lure can enjoy realistic bass fishing depending on the target location. In addition, lures that appear in software are also used in the play, and those that are actually commercialized have appeared.
overview_zh: 簡單而完整的釣魚遊戲，可體驗路亞釣黑鱸的樂趣。「比賽模式」的目標是與對手競爭釣果，成為錦標賽冠軍。一場比賽結束後會顯示新聞（報紙）畫面，可確認排名、奪冠時亦會顯示一面，讓你感受到努力的成果。釣具可依目標地點享受真實的黑鱸釣魚體驗。此外，遊戲中登場的擬餌也會在遊玩中使用，當中還包含已實際商品化的款式。

overview_en: Sam, a resident of the "real world," is transported to the fictional world of Greene in order to prevent Biohazard Harry (simply referred to as "Bio-Haz" in the game) from continuing to pollute Greene, a world of seven nations. Sam finds himself stuck in Greene because Microwave, who brought him there in the first place, lost her power in the previous battle. Sam's adventures range from collecting debut records to helping to expose a corrupt politician.
overview_zh: 「現實世界」居民Sam被傳送到虛構世界Greene，目的是阻止Biohazard Harry（遊戲中簡稱「Bio-Haz」）繼續汙染這個由七國組成的世界。當初帶他過來的Microwave在前一場戰鬥中失去力量，導致Sam被困在Greene。Sam的冒險五花八門，從蒐集首張唱片到揭發貪汙政客都有。

overview_en: Gizmo is trapped inside Clamp Centre by the evil Gremlins. Your mission? Help him battle his way to the control center and rid the city forever of the Gremlin menace! It's not going to be easy. You'll have to use cunning and wits to survive with only the weapons you find inside Clamp Centre... matches, a flashlight, tomatoes, and a homemade bow and arrow. But, if you're lucky, the door to Mr. Wing's Magic Shop may mystically appear... and let you buy some very special - and powerful - items to help you. This game has all the traps, mazes, and lightning quick moves to push your skill to the limits. And it has graphics that seem to come alive on the screen. Gremlins. Stopping them is not going to be easy. Don't say we didn't warn you!
overview_zh: Gizmo被邪惡的小精靈囚禁在Clamp Centre。你的任務？協助他殺出重圍前進控制中心，將小精靈威脅永遠驅出城市！這可不簡單。你必須運用機智與聰明，僅憑Clamp Centre內找到的武器求生──火柴、手電筒、番茄、自製弓箭。但若幸運，Mr. Wing魔法商店的門可能神祕現身，讓你購買特殊又強大的道具助你一臂之力。本作充滿陷阱、迷宮與閃電般的動作，逼你發揮極限技巧。畫面圖像彷彿在螢幕上活了起來。要阻止小精靈絕非易事，別說我沒提醒你！

overview_en: Get a headlock on fun with Hal Wrestling! Eight rompin', stompin' brutes squares off in a head-to-head matches any sports fan can enjoy! All the pro wrestling moves you can use and a few you haven't seen before! Go one-on-one against the computer or a friend, or round up your own four-man wrecking crew for thunderous action! Hal Wrestling - we're coming to get YOU!
overview_zh: 用《Hal Wrestling》來個樂趣鎖頸技！八位狂踩猛衝的大塊頭一對一交手，運動迷不容錯過！盡情施展所有職業摔角技，還有你從沒見過的招式！可單人挑戰電腦、與好友對戰，或召集自己的四人破壞小組享受雷霆般的激戰！《Hal Wrestling》──我們來抓你了！
publisher:
Human Entertainment JP
HAL Laboratory NA

overview_en:
Harry and his spouse were walking down the street, while all of a sudden,
ghosts start to appear and the city gets demolished. A dark city, with a
haunted mansion in the middle, rises from the rumble and four ghost fuse to
become a large ghost and kidnaps Harry's spouse. You must save your spouse and
stop the evil Ghost Building Company.
overview_zh: Harry與妻子走在街上，突然鬼魂出現、城市遭到摧毀。一座中央有鬼屋的黑暗都市從廢墟升起，四隻鬼魂合體成一隻巨鬼，並綁架了Harry的妻子。你必須拯救妻子，並阻止邪惡的Ghost Building Company。

overview_en: Harvest Moon GB is the second game in the Harvest Moon series of video games, and was developed by Victor Interactive Software. Harvest Moon GB is the first portable Harvest Moon game, developed for the Game Boy. A Game Boy Color version was released later under the name Harvest Moon GBC.
overview_zh: 《牧場物語GB》是《牧場物語》系列第二作，由Victor Interactive Software開發。本作是首款掌上型《牧場物語》，於Game Boy上發行。後續推出的Game Boy Color版本名為《牧場物語GBC》。
publisher:
Victor Interactive Software JP
Natsume NA

overview_en: Remember Tetris? The way those cubes kept coming at you? That was tricky enough, but what if they were half a dozen different hats instead? Derbies, baseball caps, cowboy hats, wizard hats, top hats and crowns? Well, that's the whole idea behind Hatris. The hats keep coming at you two at a time. All you have to do is stack them up five at a time and - poof - they're history. It sounds perfectly simple. Until you get into it. Then you'll wish you had six heads instead of one. Because this is the latest game from Alexey Pajitnov, the designer of Tetris, and his partner Vladimir Pokhilko. And anyone who could turn geometry into a contact sport is a force to be reckoned with. And this time they really want you to use your head. If you don't, you'll look pretty strange with that pile of hats on it!
overview_zh: 還記得《俄羅斯方塊》嗎？方塊持續往下掉的玩法已經夠刁鑽了，但如果換成六種不同的帽子呢？圓頂硬禮帽、棒球帽、牛仔帽、巫師帽、高頂禮帽和皇冠？這就是《Hatris》的核心構想。帽子兩個一組接連掉下，你只需把同款帽子疊滿五頂──啵！它們就消失了。聽起來很簡單，玩起來才知道你會希望自己有六顆頭。本作是《俄羅斯方塊》設計者Alexey Pajitnov與夥伴Vladimir Pokhilko的最新作。能把幾何學變成肉搏運動的人不容小覷。這次他們真的要你動腦──否則頂著一堆帽子的你看起來會很怪！

overview_en: Hayaoshi Quiz: Ouza Ketteisen is a quiz game, published by Jaleco Entertainment, which was released in Japan in 1998. It has enhanced graphics and a custom border when played on the Super Game Boy.
overview_zh: 《早押Quiz：王座決定戰》是Jaleco Entertainment發行的搶答益智遊戲，於1998年在日本推出。在Super Game Boy上遊玩時具有強化圖像與專屬邊框。

overview_en: Head On is a racing game which takes obvious game elements from Pac-Man.  It is addictive in its own way, since you drive a small car around a track collecting pellets and avoiding contact with the opponent's car. There are items you can collect along the way, but there are also hazards and obstacles designed to mess with your progress. There are only two game modes, one on a regular course with no items (sort of like a survival mode), and a special mode where there are items and obstacles to face. You can also play in the special mode against a second human player. It can be fun, albeit tough to put down, so give it a try!
overview_zh: 《Head On》是賽車遊戲，明顯吸取《小精靈》的元素。玩家駕駛小車繞行賽道蒐集豆子，同時避開對手車輛，自有其令人上癮之處。途中可蒐集道具，但也有故意阻撓你的危險與障礙物。遊戲僅有兩種模式：一種是無道具的常規賽道（類似生存模式），另一種則包含道具與障礙物的特殊模式。特殊模式也可與另一位人類玩家對戰，雖辛苦卻欲罷不能，值得一試！

overview_en: Once the player chooses a boxer, the other challengers must be defeated in order to gain the title. Points can be distributed and re-distributed on the fighter's health meter, stamina, and how fast he moves around in the ring. Either uppercuts or normal punches can be used to wear down the opponent in the game.
overview_zh: 玩家選定一名拳擊手後，必須擊敗其他挑戰者才能奪得頭銜。可在角色的生命值、體力與場上移動速度間分配與重新分配點數。以上鉤拳或一般拳擊磨耗對手體力。

overview_en:
1000 years ago the city of Kyo was suddenly invaded by aliens. A Kebiishi (knight of the past) was entrusted to defend the city.

The game starts with a maze where the kebiishi and some aliens appear. The aliens start moving through the maze wherever they please. While trying to keep from getting eaten, the kebiishi digs holes where the aliens will likely travel. If an alien comes to a finished hole, it will fall in and be trapped for a while. While the alien is trapped in the hole, you can fill the hole to bury it. If all aliens are buried, the round ends and you can proceed to the next round.

The Game Boy version includes both the original arcade version as well as an enhanced version with new graphics and original features such as a super alien that has special powers, moves to avoid holes and chases the keibiishi. Two players can play via the video link cable.
overview_zh:
1000年前，京之都突然遭外星人入侵。一位「檢非違使」（古代武士）被委以守衛城市的重任。

遊戲開場為一座迷宮，檢非違使與外星人皆於其中現身。外星人會在迷宮中任意走動，玩家必須在不被吃掉的同時，於外星人可能行經之處挖洞。當外星人掉入挖好的洞中會被困住一段時間，此時可填洞將其埋葬。所有外星人皆被埋葬即可進入下一關。

Game Boy版同時收錄原版大型電玩版以及強化版。強化版具有新圖像與原創特色，例如擁有特殊能力、會閃避洞穴並追擊檢非違使的超級外星人。可透過通訊線進行雙人對戰。

overview_en: Heracles no Eikou: Ugokidashita Kamigami is a spin-off entry in the Glory of Heracles series for the Gameboy and is a direct continuation of the first game. The title was developed by SAS Sakata and published in Japan on December 27, 1992 by Data East. An English fan translation was released by HTI in 2012 under the title "The Glory of Heracles: Snap Story.
overview_zh: 《赫拉克勒斯之榮光：眾神甦醒》（ヘラクレスの栄光 動き出した神々）是《赫拉克勒斯之榮光》系列的Game Boy外傳，劇情承接首作。本作由SAS Sakata開發，Data East於1992年12月27日在日本發行。HTI於2012年推出英文同人翻譯版本，名為「The Glory of Heracles: Snap Story」。

overview_en: Hero Shuugou!! Pinball Party is an Action game, published by Jaleco Entertainment, which was released in Japan in 1990.
overview_zh: 《英雄集合!! 彈珠台派對》是Jaleco Entertainment發行的動作遊戲，於1990年在日本推出。

overview_en: Hiden Inyou Kikouhou: Ca Da is a Puzzle game, developed by Outback and published by Yonezawa PR21, which was released in Japan in 1991.
overview_zh: 《秘伝陰陽鬼公方：CA-DA》是Outback開發、Yonezawa PR21發行的益智遊戲，於1991年在日本推出。

title_en: HIGASHIO OSAMU KANSHUU PRO YAKYUU STADIUM '91
no_intro_name: Higashio Osamu Kanshuu Pro Yakyuu Stadium '91 (Japan)

title_en: HIGASHIO OSAMU KANSHUU PRO YAKYUU STADIUM '92
no_intro_name: Higashio Osamu Kanshuu Pro Yakyuu Stadium '92 (Japan)

overview_en: High Stakes Gambling is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Sculptured Software and published by Electro Brain, which was released in 1992.
overview_zh: 《High Stakes Gambling》是Sculptured Software開發、Electro Brain發行的雜項類遊戲，於1992年推出。

title_en: HIT THE ICE - VHL - THE OFFICIAL VIDEO HOCKEY LEAGUE
no_intro_name: Hit the Ice - VHL - The Official Video Hockey League (USA, Europe)
overview_en: Featuring a cartoonish representation of the sport, Hit the Ice features games with three players on each team (forward, defense, and goalie). Unlike standard hockey, there are very few rules, as players are encouraged to trip, elbow and kick opponents.
overview_zh: 《Hit the Ice》以卡通化方式呈現冰上曲棍球，每隊三名球員（前鋒、後衛、守門員）對戰。與一般冰球規則不同，本作幾乎沒有任何規則，反而鼓勵球員絆人、肘擊、踢踹對手。

overview_en: A popular program on NHK Educational TV has become an RPG. Like the show, Mai-chan, the main character, will challenge the RPG. The battle scene with the enemy is in a quiz format.
overview_zh: NHK教育電視台的人氣節目改編成RPG。如同節目內容，主角小麥（Mai-chan）將挑戰RPG冒險。與敵人的戰鬥場面採問答形式進行。

title_en: HOKUTO NO KEN - SEIZETSU JUUBAN SHOUBU
no_intro_name: Hokuto no Ken - Seizetsu Juuban Shoubu (Japan)

overview_en: Save the neighborhood from Harry and Marv! Kevin's been left home alone, and the two sneaky crooks are prowling his street. Who's in danger now? Kevin - or the bullying housebreakers? Race from house to house on Kevin's sled, keeping your eyes peeled for the villains. Dodge stumps and slick ice 'cuz time's running out. Arm yourself with a BB gun and all the home-made weapons you can find and assemble. Keep the robbers running before they can loot the goods! 5 different houses to save. Set and launch a variety of attacks and ambushes to snare the thieves. Assemble household items to make and use hilarious weapons like a flashbulb shotgun, a snowball bazooka and a glue-bomb launcher. Comic animation and slap-stick action relive all the fast, zany humor of the hit movie.
overview_zh: 從Harry與Marv手中拯救社區！Kevin被獨自留在家中，兩名鬼祟竊賊正在街上四處踩點。誰才是真正的危險者？是Kevin，還是這兩名霸道的入侵者？騎著Kevin的雪橇穿梭各戶人家、留意壞人蹤影。閃過樹樁與滑溜冰面，因為時間正在倒數。武裝你的BB槍與所有能找到並組裝的自製武器，把竊賊嚇到落荒而逃，趕在他們得手前阻止他們！五棟不同房屋待你拯救。設置並啟動各種伏擊與陷阱來捕捉小偷。組合家中物品打造爆笑的武器，例如閃光燈獵槍、雪球火箭筒和強力膠炸彈發射器。卡通動畫與滑稽動作完美重現賣座電影的瘋狂幽默。

title_en: HOME ALONE 2 - LOST IN NEW YORK
no_intro_name: Home Alone 2 - Lost in New York (USA, Europe)
overview_en: Guess who's all alone again... only this time in the biggest metropolis of them all - New York City! Help Kevin McCallister in his newest comedy adventure! Marv and Harry bring reinforcements this time to nab the kid that sent them to jail. As Kevin, you'll collect assorted toys and items to blast your opponents right out of action and into early retirement! This time it seems a whole city is out for Kevin. Voracious vacuum cleaners and mean house detectives chase him through a posh hotel. Watch out for nasty gang members in Central Park and beware of holes in the floor of his uncle's townhouse - all the while looking out for a dangerous reunion with the Wet Bandit Gang! Now you can show them what "just a kid" can do!
overview_zh: 猜猜誰又一個人了……這次還是在最大的都市──紐約市！協助Kevin McCallister展開全新喜劇冒險！Marv與Harry這次找來幫手，要報復害他們入獄的小子。扮演Kevin蒐集各種玩具與物品，把對手轟出戰場、強迫他們提早退休！這次似乎整座城市都在追Kevin。豪華旅館裡有飢渴的吸塵器與兇惡的偵探追逐他；中央公園要小心兇狠的幫派分子；舅舅家公寓地板上的洞也要當心，同時還要提防危險的「Wet Bandit Gang」重逢！讓他們見識「一個小孩」的厲害！

overview_en: A Game Boy version of a Famicom  Disk System game by the same name. It's a puzzle game from the same mold as Shanghai in which you match Mahjohng tiles, restricted by certain rules. The tiles are stacked up like bricks, and matching a tile removes it. If you remove a tile and leave the ones above it unsupported, then they fall and it's game over.
overview_zh: 《HONG KONG》為紅白機磁碟機同名遊戲的Game Boy版。本作為類似《上海》的益智遊戲，依特定規則配對麻將牌。牌如磚塊堆疊，配對成功即可移除。若移除後造成上層牌失去支撐，便會崩落導致遊戲結束。

overview_en: PETER PAN has now grown up, and is far away from NEVERLAND, but his old enemy CAPTAIN HOOK has not forgotten and schemes his revenge. Kidnapping Peter's children, he lures our hero back to the island of PIRATES and "LOST BOYS" for a final confrontation. With the help of TINKERBELL, the faithful fairy, you take on the role of PETER in this magic adventure fraught with danger and excitement.
overview_zh: 彼得潘已經長大，遠離夢幻島，但他的宿敵虎克船長並未忘懷，正策劃復仇。船長綁架了彼得的孩子，引誘我們的英雄重返這座海盜與「Lost Boys」的島嶼，準備最後對決。在忠實小仙女Tinkerbell的協助下，你扮演彼得展開充滿危險與刺激的奇幻冒險。

overview_en: Dream Land is in peril! An evil king has stolen the magic Twinkle Stars. If they're not recovered, the people of Dream Land could starve. Meet Kirby, a roly-poly little hero, as he runs, jumps, floats and swims in search of the treasured Twinkle Stars. He'll puff his way through castles, caves, dungeons and forests. In his path are many wicked and greedy enemies but Kirby has a special way to defeat them! It's non-stop action all the way to the top of Mt. Dedede!
overview_zh: 夢之國危機重重！邪惡的國王偷走了魔法閃亮之星，若不奪回，夢之國的居民將陷入饑荒。認識這位圓滾滾的小英雄卡比，他會奔跑、跳躍、漂浮、游泳，尋找珍貴的閃亮之星。他將穿越城堡、洞穴、地牢與森林，沿途有許多邪惡貪婪的敵人，但卡比有獨門擊敗他們的方式！全程不間斷的動作，直到Mt. Dedede山頂！

overview_en: The Rainbow Bridges have disappeared! Help Kirby solve the mystery. Search the seven Rainbow Islands while battling King DeDeDe and his horde of evil minions! Meet Rick the Hamster, Kine the Fish and Coo the Owl. Each holds important abilities that can multiply the magnitude of Kirby's powers. Earn the mysterious Rainbow Sword and prepare to face Kirby's most menacing rival ever - the evil Dark Matter!
overview_zh: 彩虹橋消失了！協助卡比解開謎團。穿越七座彩虹之島，與帝帝帝大王與其邪惡爪牙對戰！認識倉鼠Rick、魚Kine與貓頭鷹Coo，每位夥伴都擁有能讓卡比能力倍增的關鍵能力。獲得神祕的彩虹劍，準備迎戰卡比有史以來最具威脅的對手──邪惡的Dark Matter！

overview_en:
The player assumes the role of Hudson Hawk, a cat burglar. He is sent on a mission to steal three Da Vinci artifacts. Walking through various levels in this platform game, the player must avoid sounding alarms. In addition, security guards and dogs show up to hamper the mission. Hudson Hawk can pacify the enemies by punching them or throwing a "ball" at them.

Enemies include a rhinoceros stampeding in the Vatican library and a kangaroo.
overview_zh:
玩家扮演飛賊Hudson Hawk，奉命偷取三件達文西文物。在這款橫向平台遊戲中行經多種關卡，必須避免觸發警報。此外，警衛與警犬也會妨礙任務。Hudson Hawk可以揮拳或丟「球」制伏敵人。

敵人包括在梵蒂岡圖書館橫衝直撞的犀牛，以及袋鼠等。
publisher:
Sony Imagesoft NA
Epic/Sony Records JP

overview_en: Meet Hugo. Hugo is a collector who decides to get local currency from every country. To do this, you have to travel to 9 different countries, but beware, because no one in those countries wants you to take their money. Help Hugo in this difficult mission.
overview_zh: 認識Hugo。Hugo是名收藏家，立志蒐集每個國家的當地貨幣。為此你必須前往9個不同國家，但要當心，那些國家的人都不希望你帶走他們的錢。協助Hugo達成這項艱困任務。

overview_en: Hugo 2 is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Bit Managers and published by Laguna, which was released in Europe in 1997.
overview_zh: 《Hugo 2》是Bit Managers開發、Laguna發行的雜項類遊戲，於1997年在歐洲推出。

title_en: HUNCHBACK OF NOTRE DAME, THE - 5 FOOLISHLY FUN TOPSY TURVY GAMES
no_intro_name: Hunchback of Notre Dame, The - 5 Foolishly Fun Topsy Turvy Games (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced)
Hunt for Red October, The (USA, Europe)
publisher:
Hi Tech Expressions NA/EU
Altron JP

overview_en:
IT'S TIME FOR A LITTLE HARDWOOD HYSTERIA

Your coach leads the team in a pre-game moment of silence. The only sound heard from the locker room is the methodical dripping of a leaky showerhead. Then, with intensity in his eyes, coach looks up and growls "Time to crash the boards!" The screams of 40,000 strong reverberate through the packed arena as you blast out of the tunnel and into the blinding camera light of the national media. Welcome to the only pro-style, five on five game ever to hit the hardwood!
In this conquest to be the best, youll need to have more talent in your little fingers than the competition as you try to slam, pass, steal, free throw, jump shoot and drive the lane against eight different teams. Each with players of varying strength and weakness. The cameras will even zoom in when you go airborne for the rim rockin' slams! But you don't become a foul-happy hatchet man or the refs will have you turning the ball over more than a flapjack cook at a Pancake Emporium. Pump up the high-tech hi tops, you're jammin' with the big boys now!
overview_zh:
硬木地板的瘋狂時刻來臨

教練帶領全隊進行賽前默禱。更衣室內唯一的聲音是漏水蓮蓬頭規律的滴水聲。隨後教練眼神一凝，吼出：「該去搶籃板了！」當你衝出球員通道、踏入炫目的全國媒體鎂光燈，4萬名觀眾的吶喊響徹整座球館。歡迎來到史上唯一登上硬木地板的職業風五對五遊戲！
為了登頂，你的小指尖頭都得比對手有更多才華──需要灌籃、傳球、抄截、罰球、跳投、切入，迎戰八支不同隊伍。各隊球員強弱不一。當你飛躍框上灌籃時，攝影機甚至會放大特寫！但若變成愛犯規的莽夫，裁判會讓你失誤連連，像鬆餅店廚師翻烙餅一樣頻繁。穿好高科技高筒鞋，你已經和大男孩同場較勁了！

overview_en: Your objective is to gather gold that is scattered on the brick platforms, which are connected by ladders. You are chased by robots (cyborgs) that end your character's life if they catch him, though you can stand on their heads. Your main weapon is the ability to dig both to the left and right of your character. The holes you dig are only temporary and fill themselves in. A robot that falls into one of your holes will be destroyed if the hole fills in before it can escape. Your character can also suffer this same fate, ending his life. Destroyed robots are replaced with new ones that appear from the top of the screen. The robots can also carry gold which they drop if they fall into a hole. The robot's movements are dependent on yours, and a significant facet of the game play is figuring out how to use the robot's movements to your advantage in clearing a stage. Besides bricks and ladders, levels also consist of blocks (which can't be dug into), rope (to traverse platform chasms) and crumbling bricks (which you fall through). Once all gold has been retrieved a missing segment of ladder will appear allowing your character to escape to the next level. Some levels contain keys and doors which provide an alternate way to leave a level.
overview_zh: 你的目標是蒐集分布在磚塊平台上的金幣，平台之間以梯子相連。機器人（生化人）會追逐你，碰到你即喪命，但你可以踩在它們頭上。你的主要武器是能在角色左右兩側挖洞。挖開的洞只是暫時的，會自動填回。若機器人掉進洞中且洞填回前無法逃出，便會被消滅；你的角色亦可能遭遇相同命運而喪命。被消滅的機器人會自畫面上方再次出現。機器人也可能攜帶金幣，掉入洞中時便會掉落。機器人的動作隨你的動向而變化，遊戲重要環節之一便是利用機器人的動作協助過關。除磚塊與梯子外，關卡還有方塊（無法挖開）、繩索（用以橫越平台間隙）以及碎裂磚塊（會踩穿掉落）。蒐集所有金幣後，原本缺失的梯子段會出現，讓你的角色逃往下一關。部分關卡含有鑰匙與門，提供另一種離開關卡的方式。

overview_en: The two special agents Masato Kanzaki and Mizuki Makimura receive a new important mission: destroying the ultimate weapon the enemy is developing in its secret base.
overview_zh: 兩位特工神崎正人與牧村美月接到一項重要新任務：摧毀敵方在祕密基地中開發的終極武器。

overview_en: In Your Face is a Sports game, developed and published by Jaleco Entertainment, which was released in 1990.
overview_zh: 《In Your Face》是Jaleco Entertainment開發兼發行的運動遊戲，於1990年推出。

title_en: INDIANA JONES AND THE LAST CRUSADE
no_intro_name: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade (USA, Europe)
overview_en: The search for the Holy Grail is on! Hitler must have the Grail to secure his domination of the world and is willing to do anything to get it. Indy's father, Dr. Jones Sr., was close to finding the Grail, but was kidnapped. Now Indy must save his father and find the Grail before it's too late! Explore six treacherous levels of excitement in a race against time, evil and ancient mysteries!
overview_zh: 尋找聖杯的旅程開始了！希特勒必須奪得聖杯以確保稱霸世界，並不擇手段。Indy的父親Dr. Jones Sr.差點找到聖杯，卻遭綁架。如今Indy必須在為時已晚前救出父親、找到聖杯！探索六個險峻的關卡，與時間、邪惡及古代謎團展開激烈競賽！

no_intro_name: Indien dans la Ville, Un (Europe) (SGB Enhanced)

title_en: INFOGENIUS PRODUCTIVITY PAK - BERLITZ FRENCH TRANSLATOR
no_intro_name: InfoGenius Productivity Pak - Berlitz French Translator (USA, Europe)
overview_en:
Berlitz French Translator is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Imagineering Inc and published by GameTek, which was released in 1991.

The perfect companion for school, work or travel, the French Translator contains the same words and phrases as the Berlitz Dictionaries... with 12,500 words per cartridge, and 300 of the most commonly used phrases. You can even convert prices with the currency converter, or change to and from the metric system. Traveling from country to country? Changing languges is as easy as changing cartridges. It's the ideal tool for business people, students, teachers, and travelers. Just type in a word or phrase in French or English and the equivalent instantly appears. And you'll find the phrases you need most in convenient categories, with easy-to-use menus. All this right at your fingertips, with instant access to the information you need when you need it... with the Infogenius French Translator.
overview_zh:
《Berlitz French Translator》是Imagineering Inc開發、GameTek發行的雜項類遊戲，於1991年推出。

是學習、工作或旅行的最佳良伴。French Translator收錄與Berlitz詞典相同的單字與片語，每個卡帶12,500個單字、300個最常用片語。還可使用貨幣換算器轉換價格，或在公制與英制間切換。多國遊歷？切換語言就像更換卡帶一樣簡單。它是商務人士、學生、教師與旅人的理想工具。只要輸入法文或英文單字或片語，立即顯示對應翻譯。最常用的片語以方便分類整理，搭配易於使用的選單。隨手可得，需要時即時取得資訊──這就是Infogenius French Translator。

title_en: INFOGENIUS PRODUCTIVITY PAK - BERLITZ SPANISH TRANSLATOR
no_intro_name: InfoGenius Productivity Pak - Berlitz Spanish Translator (USA, Europe)
overview_en:
Berlitz Spanish Translator is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Imagineering Inc and published by GameTek, which was released in 1991.

The perfect companion for school, work or travel, the Spanish Translator contains the same words and phrases as the Berlitz Dictionaries... with 12,500 words per cartridge, and 300 of the most commonly used phrases. You can even convert prices with the currency converter, or change to and from the metric system. Traveling from country to country? Changing languges is as easy as changing cartridges. It's the ideal tool for business people, students, teachers, and travelers. Just type in a word or phrase in Spanish or English and the equivalent instantly appears. And you'll find the phrases you need most in convenient categories, with easy-to-use menus. All this right at your fingertips, with instant access to the information you need when you need it... with the Infogenius Spanish Translator.
overview_zh:
《Berlitz Spanish Translator》是Imagineering Inc開發、GameTek發行的雜項類遊戲，於1991年推出。

是學習、工作或旅行的最佳良伴。Spanish Translator收錄與Berlitz詞典相同的單字與片語，每個卡帶12,500個單字、300個最常用片語。還可使用貨幣換算器轉換價格，或在公制與英制間切換。多國遊歷？切換語言就像更換卡帶一樣簡單。它是商務人士、學生、教師與旅人的理想工具。只要輸入西班牙文或英文單字或片語，立即顯示對應翻譯。最常用的片語以方便分類整理，搭配易於使用的選單。隨手可得，需要時即時取得資訊──這就是Infogenius Spanish Translator。

title_en: INFOGENIUS PRODUCTIVITY PAK - FROMMER'S TRAVEL GUIDE
no_intro_name: InfoGenius Productivity Pak - Frommer's Travel Guide (USA)
overview_en:
InfoGenius Productivity Pak: Frommer's Travel Guide is a Miscellaneous game, developed by NovaLogic and published by GameTek, which was released in 1991.

The perfect travel companion, the Travel Guide covers 15 of the most popular and most traveled cities in the U.S.; Atlanta - Boston - Chicago - Denver - Honolulu - Las Vegas - Los Angeles - Miami/Fort Lauderdale - New Orleans - New York - Orlando - San Francisco - Santa Fe - Seattle - Washington. Compiled from the famous bestselling Frommer's Guides, the most up-to-date and valuable visitor information has been formatted and organized for instant access and ease to use. Reliable and detailed, Frommer's reports on accommodations and restaurants are clear and concise, with full listings of sights, attractions, sports, shopping, culture, and nightlife. Also included aare informative introductions to each city to make the most out of your visit.
overview_zh:
《InfoGenius Productivity Pak: Frommer's Travel Guide》是NovaLogic開發、GameTek發行的雜項類遊戲，於1991年推出。

完美旅伴，Travel Guide涵蓋美國15座最熱門也最受遊客造訪的城市：亞特蘭大、波士頓、芝加哥、丹佛、檀香山、拉斯維加斯、洛杉磯、邁阿密／勞德岱堡、紐奧良、紐約、奧蘭多、舊金山、聖塔菲、西雅圖、華盛頓。內容彙整自著名暢銷的Frommer's旅遊指南，提供最新且實用的觀光資訊，並重新編排以方便即時查閱。Frommer's對住宿與餐廳的點評清晰簡潔，並完整列出景點、運動、購物、文化與夜生活；同時收錄各城市的詳實簡介，讓你旅程收穫加倍。

title_en: INFOGENIUS PRODUCTIVITY PAK - PERSONAL ORGANIZER AND PHONE BOOK
no_intro_name: InfoGenius Productivity Pak - Personal Organizer and Phone Book (USA)
overview_en:
InfoGenius Productivity Pak: Personal Organizer and Phone Book is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Imagineering Inc and published by GameTek, which was released in 1991.

A phone book, a day planner, and a calendar all in one. Store up to 90 names and phone numbers. Keep track of appointments and events with the built-in day planner, and find dates up until the year 2000 with the built-in calendar. Also featured is a complete listing of the most often used 800 numbers, a world clock with over 75 cities, a fully functioning calculator and a notepad. Have it all at the touch of your fingertips, with instant access to the information you need when you need it... with the InfoGenius Personal Organizer cartridge.
overview_zh:
《InfoGenius Productivity Pak: Personal Organizer and Phone Book》是Imagineering Inc開發、GameTek發行的雜項類遊戲，於1991年推出。

電話簿、日程簿與行事曆三合一。可儲存多達90組姓名與電話號碼。透過內建日程簿管理約會與活動，內建行事曆可查至西元2000年。還收錄最常用的800免付費電話完整列表、含75座以上城市的世界時鐘、功能完備的計算機與記事本。隨手可得，需要時即時取得資訊──這就是InfoGenius Personal Organizer卡帶。

title_en: INFOGENIUS PRODUCTIVITY PAK - SPELL CHECKER AND CALCULATOR
no_intro_name: InfoGenius Productivity Pak - Spell Checker and Calculator (USA)
overview_en:
InfoGenius Productivity Pak: Spell Checker and Calculator is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Imagineering Inc and published by GameTek, which was released in 1991.

Now you can check the spelling of over 60,000 of the most frequently misspelled words without consulting the dictionary! Just type in the word as you think it is spelled and the InfoGenius Spell Checker instantly shows you the correct spelling. If the word is misspelled, the Spell Checker finds its most probably match...phonetically. Plus, the cartridge converts your Game Boy into a full-functioning calculator! It's the ideal tool for business people, students, and travelers. Much faster and more convenient than any dictionary, the Spell Checker and Calculator is perfect for desk, home, and use on the go. Put it all right at your fingertips, with instant access to the information you need when you need it... with the InfoGenius Spell Checker and Calculator.
overview_zh:
《InfoGenius Productivity Pak: Spell Checker and Calculator》是Imagineering Inc開發、GameTek發行的雜項類遊戲，於1991年推出。

現在你不用查字典，就能檢查超過60,000個最常拼錯單字的拼字！直接輸入你以為的拼法，InfoGenius Spell Checker立即顯示正確拼法。若拼錯，Spell Checker會以發音找出最可能的對應字。此卡帶還能將Game Boy變身為功能完備的計算機！是商務人士、學生與旅人的理想工具。比任何字典更快更方便，無論在辦公桌、家中或外出皆適用。隨手可得，需要時即時取得資訊──這就是Spell Checker and Calculator。

title_en: INFOGENIUS SYSTEMS - PERSONAL ORGANIZER WITH PHONE BOOK
no_intro_name: InfoGenius Systems - Personal Organizer with Phone Book (Europe)

overview_en: Initial D Gaiden is a 1998 game for the Nintendo Game Boy. It is the first video game based on the Initial D series. The game was only released in Japan.
overview_zh: 《頭文字D外傳》是1998年發行於任天堂Game Boy的遊戲，是首款以《頭文字D》系列為題材的電玩。日本限定發售。

overview_en: International Superstar Soccer is a Sports game, developed by Konami Computer Entertainment Nagoya and published by Konami, which was released in 1998.
overview_zh: 《International Superstar Soccer》是Konami Computer Entertainment Nagoya開發、Konami發行的運動遊戲，於1998年推出。

overview_en:
Bet on virtual horse races in this Japanese only Game Boy game.

Ippatsu Gyakuten! DX Bakenou is a horse race betting game developed by Graphic Research and published by Asmik Ace Entertainment for Game Boy.
overview_zh:
在這款日本限定的Game Boy遊戲中下注虛擬賽馬。

《一發逆轉! DX馬券王》是Graphic Research開發、Asmik Ace Entertainment發行的Game Boy賽馬投注遊戲。

title_en: IRON MAN X-O MANOWAR IN HEAVY METAL
no_intro_name: Iron Man X-O Manowar in Heavy Metal (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en: Metal titans, Iron Man and X-O Manowar, come together for the first time ever to tackle one heavy-duty cosmic crisis! It's an apocalyptic meltdown of furious action, with the ultimate in Super Hero power and realism! Featuring Bi-Directional firepower, Chest-Beam blasts, multi-hit combos and Z-axis shooting, ultimate boss battles and enhanced weapon power!
overview_zh: 金屬巨人鋼鐵人與X-O Manowar首度攜手，共同迎戰一場重磅宇宙危機！這是場末日級的火爆動作對戰，集結超級英雄能力與真實感的極致表現！具備雙向火力、胸口光束、多段連擊、Z軸射擊、終極頭目戰與強化武器威力等特色！

overview_en:
From Stonehenge to the Great Pyramids...From the earliest North Americans to the ancient civilizations of the Far East...The stones of ISHIDO have spanned continents and cultures for eons of time to arrive here in your hands, drawing you into their spell of endless fascination.

The object of ISHIDO is to place as many stones as possible onto the game board in combinations that maximize your score. Easy to learn, and yet challenging, for players of all ages, ISHIDO combines the elements of skill, strategy and luck in a game that will captivate you for countless hours...As it has captivated others for centuries.
overview_zh:
從巨石陣到大金字塔……從最早的北美原住民到遠東的古文明……ISHIDO的石頭跨越大陸與文化，歷經漫長歲月來到你手中，將你拉入無盡迷人的魔咒。

《ISHIDO》的目標是在棋盤上盡可能放置石頭，並以使分數最大化的組合方式擺放。簡單易學卻富有挑戰，適合所有年齡層。本作結合技巧、策略與運氣，能讓你著迷數小時──正如它千百年來吸引眾人那般。

overview_en: A dog and cat pet simulation game. Super Gameboy compatible.
overview_zh: 貓狗寵物模擬遊戲。支援Super Game Boy。

title_en: J.LEAGUE FIGHTING SOCCER - THE KING OF ACE STRIKERS
no_intro_name: J.League Fighting Soccer - The King of Ace Strikers (Japan)
overview_en:
J-League Fighting Soccer: The King of Ace Strikers is a Japan-exclusive soccer simulation video game for the Game Boy and Family Computer.

The Game Boy version (released almost 5 months before the start of the inaugural season of the J. League) was the first title officially licensed by the J. League.
overview_zh:
《J.LEAGUE FIGHTING SOCCER：THE KING OF ACE STRIKERS》是日本限定的足球模擬遊戲，於Game Boy與Family Computer上發行。

Game Boy版（早於J聯賽首屆球季開幕約5個月推出）是首款獲得J聯賽官方授權的作品。

overview_en: J-League Winning Goal (Jリーグ ウィニングゴール J-Rīgu Uiningu Gōru) is a soccer game released for the Game Boy and Family Computer that revolves around the J-League. There is an exhibition, a season mode, a playoff mode, and a practice mode. The object in the game is to win the championship so that the player's chosen team can be called the greatest team in all of Japan
overview_zh: 《J.LEAGUE WINNING GOAL》（Jリーグ ウィニングゴール）是Game Boy與Family Computer上以J聯賽為主題的足球遊戲。具備表演賽、球季模式、季後賽模式與練習模式。遊戲目標是贏得冠軍，讓玩家所選的隊伍成為全日本最強隊伍。

overview_en: The biggest name in golf brings you the most realistic and feature-backed golf simulation ever! Play on two of Jack Nicklaus' favorite courses or design an unlimited number of your own. One to four players can compete on beginner and expert levels. You control every detail of the action. The password feature even lets your take a break. If you're ready to play against the best, JACK NICKLAUS GOLF is your game!
overview_zh: 高爾夫界第一招牌帶來史上最寫實、功能最齊全的高爾夫模擬遊戲！可在Jack Nicklaus兩座最愛球場遊玩，或自行設計無限多座球場。1至4位玩家可在初級或專家難度下競爭。動作細節全由你掌控。密碼功能還能讓你隨時暫停。準備好挑戰最強嗎？《JACK NICKLAUS GOLF》就是你的選擇！

overview_en: An arms smuggling ring threatens to create a new world order. The peace and security of the entire planet is at stake. MI6 sent agent 008 into Turkey to dismantle the operation. Soon thereafter, all contact was lost with 008. M makes a decision to send their best agent, James Bond, to investigate the whereabouts of 008. As Bond carries out this latest order, he becomes entangled in his deadliest mission yet. As James Bond, you must use all of your expertise to unravel the sinister plot. It is up to you to determine friend from foe as you uncover clues. Along the way, weapons and items will be found that assist you in overcoming the many obstacles placed in your path. Be sure to keep an eye open for Q and his unique brand of help. Be careful, Bond, you may not be able to charm everyone!
overview_zh: 軍火走私集團企圖建立新世界秩序，整個地球的和平與安全岌岌可危。MI6派遣特工008前往土耳其瓦解該行動，但不久後便與008失聯。M決定派出最佳特工詹姆士·龐德，調查008下落。執行這項最新命令的同時，龐德也捲入有史以來最致命的任務。扮演詹姆士·龐德的你必須運用一切專業，揭穿邪惡陰謀；過程中你必須在解謎時辨明敵友。一路上會找到武器與道具，協助你克服重重障礙。請留意Q與他獨特的協助方式。要小心，龐德，你未必能讓所有人都吃你那一套！

title_en: JANSHIROU II - SEKAI SAIKYOU NO JANSHI
no_intro_name: Janshirou II - Sekai Saikyou no Janshi (Japan)

overview_en: A four player Mahjong game on the Gameboy
overview_zh: Game Boy上的四人麻將遊戲。

overview_en:
There are several options in the game including: difficulty level, whether to race in MPH or KM/H, steering ability, whether or not to have a track map, chevrons, and position flashing. The object is to race laps around a muddy race track while trying to get first place. There are twenty tracks to race in; each with a timer that forces the player to race fast. There is an option to either do a single race or a multi-race tournament against a computer opponent or through a human playing while using the Game Boy link cable and another copy of the video game. Items in the background like electric lines and rocks help provide a road-like feeling to the races.

In a single-player race, the player will race to the finish line against a field of approximately nineteen other drivers.
overview_zh:
本作提供多種選項，包含難度等級、時速顯示為MPH或KM/H、轉向能力、是否顯示路線圖、箭頭、位置閃爍等。目標是在泥濘賽道上爭取首位完成多圈賽事。共有20條賽道可賽，每條皆有計時迫使玩家加速。可選擇單場賽事或對抗電腦的多場錦標賽，亦可透過Game Boy通訊線與另一份卡帶與真人對戰。背景中的電線與岩石等元素為比賽營造臨場感。

單人比賽中，玩家將與大約19名其他賽車手競速衝向終點。

overview_en:
Jelly Boy puts in the control of a jelly baby with morphing powers, sort of 
like if A Boy and His Blob merged together in some ungodly ritual. His quest is
to find various items inside a weird factory so that the elevator doorman will
allow him to go up and meet the dude in charge. Awesome music, polished 
graphics, a whole bunch of detailed levels and worlds and a bizarre sense of
humor brighten up an otherwise generic platformer.
overview_zh: 《Jelly Boy》讓玩家操控具備變形能力的軟糖寶寶，宛如《A Boy and His Blob》以詭異儀式合體後的產物。他的目標是進入怪異的工廠尋找各種道具，讓電梯管理員允許他上樓見大頭目。出色的音樂、精美的圖像、大量細節豐富的關卡與世界，加上奇異的幽默感，讓這款本來平凡的平台遊戲熠熠生輝。

overview_en: Join your host Alex Trebek in the Nintendo 64 version of Jeopardy! With its 3D rendered set, high-quality 16-bit audio and detailed video capture of Alex Trebek, you will feel as if you were really on the set. Featuring 4,000 brand new answers and questions and 650 different categories directly from the TV show.
overview_zh: 與主持人Alex Trebek一同進入N64版《Jeopardy!》！3D渲染場景、高音質16位元音效，加上Alex Trebek的精細視訊片段，讓你彷彿置身節目現場。收錄全新4,000道答案與題目，以及來自電視節目的650種類別。

overview_en: Not much new in this installment of the classic trivia game show.
overview_zh: 經典益智節目這次的續作沒太多新意。

overview_en: Sports version of the classic trivia game show.
overview_zh: 經典益智節目的運動版。

overview_en: An easier version of the classic trivia game show.
overview_zh: 經典益智節目的簡易版。

overview_en: There used to be a continent called "Mu Continent", which was ruled by the king of the country called Prina. King Lars II suddenly turned the state religion of Neil into the evil religion of Max. Shortly after the Neil people were ousted from the sanctuary, the Queen of Purina suddenly disappeared. In addition, the newborn son of the king was taken away by someone. After the conversion, monsters began to appear in various parts of the continent. People began rumors that the people of Neil were manipulating monsters. It's been 16 years since then. The demons, who continued to grow in power, finally invaded Purina Castle. The seriously injured king runs to the remote village "Eribe".
overview_zh: 曾經有座名為「Mu大陸」的大陸，由Prina王國的國王統治。Lars II世國王突然將Neil的國教改信邪教Max。Neil族被逐出聖地後不久，Prina王后突然失蹤；新生王子也遭人擄走。改信邪教後，怪物開始出現於大陸各地，民眾傳言Neil族操縱怪物。事隔16年，魔物力量持續壯大，終於入侵Prina城。重傷的國王逃往偏遠村落「Eribe」。

title_en: JIMMY CONNORS NO PRO TENNIS TOUR
no_intro_name: Jimmy Connors no Pro Tennis Tour (Japan)

overview_en: The player can compete in an ATP World Tour at one of three difficulty levels, or just practice hitting tennis balls.
overview_zh: 玩家可在三種難度等級下參加ATP世界巡迴賽，或單純練習擊球。

overview_en: Jinsei Game Densetsu is a board game RPG with fantasy elements based on "The Game of Life"
overview_zh: 《人生遊戲傳說》是融合奇幻元素、改編自《人生遊戲》的桌遊式RPG。

overview_en: The objective of the game is to rescue group of girls who were kidnapped by a rival tribe of cavemen. The game features a health system by which the player loses health over a period of time, apart from during boss battles.
overview_zh: 遊戲目標是拯救被敵對穴居人部落綁架的女孩們。本作具有生命值系統，玩家會隨時間扣血，但頭目戰時除外。
publisher:
Data East NA
Elite Systems EU

title_en: JORDAN VS BIRD - ONE ON ONE
no_intro_name: Jordan vs Bird - One on One (Japan)
overview_en: Michael Jordan of the Chicago Bulls and Larry Bird of the Boston Celtics were the only two players in the game, which allowed the player to participate in a one-on-one basketball game. Mini-games included a slam dunk contest (utilizing Jordan) and a three-point contest (utilizing Bird).
overview_zh: 本作中僅有兩位球員可選：芝加哥公牛的麥可·喬丹，與波士頓塞爾提克的賴瑞·柏德，可進行一對一籃球賽。迷你遊戲包括灌籃大賽（由喬丹進行）與三分球大賽（由柏德進行）。
publisher:
Electronic Arts NA/EU
Electronic Arts Victor JP

overview_en: You play Joshua, the leader of God's people after Moses. You must lead God's people into the Promised Land, but there are many puzzles and obstacles that stand in your way - falling rocks, bad soldiers and other things. Using your horn and other special weapons to defeat enemies, you will face ancient biblical baddies like the Hitties, the Amorites, the Gibeonites, and the Gezerites.
overview_zh: 你扮演摩西之後上帝子民的領袖約書亞。你必須帶領上帝的子民進入應許之地，但途中有許多謎題與障礙阻礙你前進──落石、敵兵與其他陷阱。使用你的號角與其他特殊武器擊退敵人，迎戰古代聖經中的反派如希提人、亞摩利人、基遍人與基色人。

overview_en: Mega-City One is in ruins. Corruption is rampant. It's time to take the law into your own hands. Armed with explosive Lawgiver firepower - heat seekers, ricochet rockets, incendiary missiles and more - take on Mean Machine, the ABC Robot and other brutal barriers to justice. Take to the skies on your high-speed Lawmaster motorcycle and pacify even the most persistent perps! You're not above the law. You ARE the law!!!
overview_zh: Mega-City One陷入廢墟，腐敗橫行，是時候親自執法了。武裝爆炸性的Lawgiver火力──熱追蹤彈、跳彈火箭、燃燒飛彈等──擊敗Mean Machine、ABC機器人與其他正義路上的兇惡阻礙。騎著高速Lawmaster摩托車翱翔天際，制伏最頑強的罪犯！你不在法律之上──你就是法律！

overview_en: Now the storm hits the jungle! The Desert Madman is dead - now his vicious son plots a nuclear strike against the U.S.A. He's enlisted a powerful ally - a ruthless South American Drug Lord with an army of hi-tech mercenaries. It's YOUR mission to take them out! Turn night into day with your explosions on a deadly night mission. Penetrate the Drug Lord's air defenses in an F-117A Stealth fighter. Stalk the terrorists from the streets of Washington D.C. to the deadly jungles, rivers and snow-covered peaks of South America! Stunning cinematics and digitized sound effects create a spectacular movie-like experience!
overview_zh: 風暴吹進叢林！沙漠瘋人已死，他殘暴的兒子如今策劃對美國發動核攻擊。他結盟一位強大盟友──擁有高科技傭兵團的南美毒梟。你的任務就是拔除他們！在致命夜間任務中以爆炸照亮黑夜；駕駛F-117A匿蹤戰機突破毒梟空防；從華盛頓特區的街頭追擊恐怖分子，直到南美的致命叢林、河流與雪山！絕美的過場畫面與數位音效打造猶如電影般的視聽饗宴！

overview_en: Jungle Wars is a Role-Playing game, published by Pony Canyon, which was released in Japan in 1991.
overview_zh: 《Jungle Wars》是Pony Canyon發行的角色扮演遊戲，於1991年在日本推出。

overview_en: Plunge into a heart-wrenching race for survival! On a tropical island, a violent hurricane rips through the dinosaur preserve, trapping the tourists and freeing the most terrifying animals in prehistory! Two bigger-than-life ways to play: Be a dinosaur! As a Raptor, rampage across the island battling other beasts and eluding the traps and weapons of your human enemies. As Grant, the paleontologist, arm yourself with tranquilizer guns, and sleeping-gas grenades. Dodge the slashing jaws of the Tyrannosaurus Rex and the paralyzing spit of the Dilophosaurs! 16 mammoth megs of nerve-shredding action!
overview_zh: 投入震撼人心的求生競賽！熱帶島嶼上一場猛烈颶風撕裂恐龍保護區，遊客被困、史前最恐怖的生物逃出生天！兩種大規模玩法可選：扮演恐龍！化身迅猛龍橫掃島嶼，與其他野獸交戰、逃過人類敵人的陷阱與武器。或扮演古生物學家Grant，以麻醉槍與催眠瓦斯手榴彈武裝自己。閃避暴龍的咬擊與雙脊龍麻痺的吐液！16百萬位元級緊張刺激的動作體驗！

title_en: JURASSIC PARK PART 2 - THE CHAOS CONTINUES
no_intro_name: Jurassic Park Part 2 - The Chaos Continues (USA, Europe) (En,Fr,De,It)
overview_en:
A year has passed. No one has set foot in Jurassic Park... until now. 

As Dr. Grant, you'll venture back to the island, where more dinosaurs than you could ever imagine await your return - including terrifying  new species you never seen before!

Only you have the power to send these prehistoric monsters back where they came from.

Only you can close the doors on Jurassic Park... for another 65 million years!
overview_zh:
一年過去了。再無人踏足侏羅紀公園……直到現在。

你扮演Grant博士重返島嶼，這裡的恐龍多得超乎你想像，包括前所未見的恐怖新物種！

只有你有能力把這些史前怪物送回原處。

只有你能讓侏羅紀公園的大門再度緊閉……再封印6500萬年！

title_en: KAERU NO TAME NI KANE WA NARU
no_intro_name: Kaeru no Tame ni Kane wa Naru (Japan)
overview_en: In a land far away, the two princes—Richard (of the Custard Kingdom) and the game's main protagonist (prince of the Sablé Kingdom)—have shared a friendly rivalry since they were small children. They often compete, although it usually ends in a tie or close win. In Fencing however, Prince Richard is always the victor. One day a messenger arrives from a small neighboring kingdom, warning the princes that the evil King Delarin has invaded the Mille-Feuille Kingdom and captured the beautiful princess Tiramisu. In yet another boastful attempt to best the Sablé Prince, Richard grabs a boat and rushes towards the kingdom. The Sablé Prince is left trying to catch up. While on his journey, he and Richard (and many others) are transformed into frogs in an attempt to reveal the true happenings in this kingdom.
overview_zh: 在遙遠的國度，兩位王子──Custard王國的Richard以及本作主角（Sablé王國的王子）──自孩提時代便是良性對手。他們時常較量，雖多以平手或勢均力敵收場，但在劍術上Richard永遠勝出。某日鄰近小國的使者來訪，告知王子們邪惡的Delarin國王入侵Mille-Feuille王國並擄走美麗的提拉米蘇公主。Richard又一次想壓Sablé王子一頭，搶先搭船前往該國。Sablé王子隨後追趕。途中他與Richard（以及許多人）在揭露此王國真相的過程中被變成青蛙。

title_en: KAMEN RIDER SD - HASHIRE! MIGHTY RIDERS
no_intro_name: Kamen Rider SD - Hashire! Mighty Riders (Japan)
overview_en:
Race against generations of Kamen Rider!

-Kamen Rider 1-
-Kamen Rider 2-
-Kamen Rider V3-
-Kamen Rider Riderman-
-Kamen Rider X-
-Kamen Rider Amazon-
-Kamen Rider Stronger-
-Kamen Rider Skyrider-
-Kamen Rider Super-J-
-Kamen Rider ZX-
overview_zh:
與歷代假面騎士飆速競賽！

-假面騎士1號-
-假面騎士2號-
-假面騎士V3-
-假面騎士Riderman-
-假面騎士X-
-假面騎士Amazon-
-假面騎士Stronger-
-假面騎士Skyrider-
-假面騎士Super-1-
-假面騎士ZX-

overview_en: Karakuri Kengou Den Musashi Lord (English Patched) (からくり剣豪伝ムサシロード) is a Action video game published by Tose, Yutaka released on 19910427 for the GameBoy.
overview_zh: 《機關劍豪傳武藏Lord》（からくり剣豪伝ムサシロード）是Tose開發、Yutaka發行的Game Boy動作遊戲，於1991年4月27日發售。

overview_en:
One day, human beings dug up the underground world. There were many creatures that I had never seen and those that were born from fossils.
Mankind dispatches an expedition to the world. The hero secretly gets into the vehicle of the expedition team in which his brother participates and sticks to the base of the underground world.
Since there is no way to return to the ground immediately, the main character will participate in the investigation of the underground world as a special case.
overview_zh:
某日，人類挖掘到地底世界。那裡有許多前所未見的生物與從化石中誕生的物種。
人類派遣探險隊前往該世界。主角偷偷潛入兄長所屬探險隊的車輛，潛伏到地底世界的基地。
由於無法立即返回地表，主角將以特例參與地底世界的調查。

title_en: KEN GRIFFEY JR. PRESENTS MAJOR LEAGUE BASEBALL
no_intro_name: Ken Griffey Jr. Presents Major League Baseball (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en:
From power hiting to playing awesome defense, "The Kid" can do it all! Now, you can too, with KEN GRIFFEY JR. PRESENTS MAJOR LEAGUE BASEBALL®! Hundreds of unique characters from your favorite teams are here-- the very best Major League Baseball has to offer!
Dive or leap to make the catch! Jump over the hard slide of the lead runner, pivot and fire to first for a rally-killing double play! Feel the pain when you slam into the outfield fence and rob your opponent of extra bases! Do you have what it takes to play ball with "The Kid"?
overview_zh:
從強力打擊到驚人守備，「The Kid」樣樣精通！現在你也能透過《KEN GRIFFEY JR. PRESENTS MAJOR LEAGUE BASEBALL》辦到！集結你最愛球隊的數百位獨特球員，齊聚大聯盟最頂尖陣容！
撲身或飛躍接殺！跳過先發跑者的猛撲滑壘，轉身傳一壘完成終結反攻的雙殺！撞上外野全壘打牆的痛感讓你阻止對手取得長打！你有膽和「The Kid」並肩打球嗎？

overview_en:
Kid Dracula is a 1993 Game Boy video game developed by Konami and released by Konami Inc. in the USA on March 1, 1993.

His pearly fangs drive the girls wild, while his dead-of-the-party sense of humor makes them scream. He's Kid Dracula, star of the mythical Transylvania 92010, and the coolest living corpse ever to stake his claim on the Game Boy. If you thought Mario had a way with magic, you should see junior jugular's spellbinding powers, including the mesmerizing bat transformation. Poof! Nobody wings it better than Kid Drac.
overview_zh:
《Kid Dracula》是Konami開發的1993年Game Boy作品，由Konami Inc.於1993年3月1日在美國發行。

他閃亮的尖牙令女孩們瘋狂，他冷面派對王般的幽默感讓她們尖叫。他就是Kid Dracula，傳奇之地Transylvania 92010的明星，也是Game Boy上最酷的活屍。如果你以為瑪利歐玩魔法很在行，看看小尖牙的迷人法力，包括令人著迷的蝙蝠變身。「啵！」沒人比Kid Drac更會展翅！

title_en: KID ICARUS - OF MYTHS AND MONSTERS
no_intro_name: Kid Icarus - Of Myths and Monsters (USA, Europe)
overview_en:
Kid Icarus: Of Myths and Monsters is a 1991 Game Boy video game developed by Nintendo R&D1 and Tose and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on November 5, 1991.

A lighthearted adventure with mythical challenges. Angel Land is up to its halos in woes as mythical monsters are running rampant. Pit, the original Kid Icarus, must save the realm again. Armed with his trusty bow, he'll zap the bad guys and find the Three Sacred Treasures hidden by Palutena. Only after this grueling training will he be strong enough to take on the dark forces behind Angel Land's troubles. Pit will encounter old friends and new enemies - from helpful Centurions to the dreaded Eggplant Wizard - as he journeys from the depths of the underworld to the towers of the sky palace. Find hammers to shatter special walls and reveal helpful items. Collect hearts by fighting off Pit's foes. Train hard and battle harder. Pit's challenges make the labors of Hercules look like a walk in the park.
overview_zh:
《Kid Icarus: Of Myths and Monsters》是任天堂R&D1與Tose共同開發的1991年Game Boy作品，由Nintendo of America於1991年11月5日在美國發行。

一場輕快的神話冒險。Angel Land光環危機四伏，神話怪物到處橫行。Pit──最初的Kid Icarus──必須再度拯救這片國度。他將以信賴的弓擊倒壞蛋，並尋回Palutena藏起的三件神聖寶物。唯有經過此番艱苦修練，他才足以對抗Angel Land動盪背後的黑暗勢力。Pit將遇見舊友與新敵──從熱心的Centurion到令人聞之色變的茄子巫師──從地下世界的深處一路前進到天空宮殿的高塔。尋找鐵鎚以打破特殊牆壁、揭露有用的物品。擊敗Pit的敵人蒐集愛心。勤練苦戰。Pit的考驗讓海格力斯的試煉看起來像是公園散步。

overview_en:
Twenty years into the future, a city now called "Tokyo" has developed into one of the few world-class high-tech centers, "Tokyo City." The main character, Ken Kanzaki, is a young investigator assigned to the criminal investigation section of the Metropolital Police. He is one of the finest sharpshooters in the Police. One day, Ken is ordered to provide security for a party held by "Zaizen Konzern," a world-class plutocracy.

All of a sudden, Spector robots appear and disrupt the party. Zaizen, a commander-in-chief, is killed, and both Ken and Jun. Zaizen's son is fatally injured by the robots. Two of the party's guests, an auto-racer, Ryo Aguri, and a wrestler, Go Goda, also receive serious injuries. Three severely injured young men are operated upon by scientists from the Metropolitan Police. Several days later, a robot corp led by a mysterious organization called "Ido" appears in the floating town of Tokyo Bay. But the Police and the Army have no effective strategies to contain them.

At that moment, three young men attired in mechanical suits enter. They are the very three young men, Ken, Ryo, and Go, who have been turned into cyborg investigators through the operation. They call themselves "Armored Police Metal Jacks". "Metal Jacks," dazzlingly switching from "Jack Suits" to "Jack Armors," completely demolish the robot corp and achieve victory, thus signals the beginning of the battle between the high-tech criminals and "Metal Jacks" with a futuristic "Tokyo City" in the background.
overview_zh:
二十年後，今日名為「Tokyo」的城市已發展成世界級高科技中心之一「Tokyo City」。主角神崎健是隸屬警視廳搜查課的年輕刑警，也是警方頂尖神槍手之一。某日健奉命為世界級財閥「財前康采恩」舉辦的派對提供護衛。

突然，Spector機器人闖入派對搗亂。指揮官財前遭殺害，健與財前之子潤皆被機器人重創。派對賓客中的賽車手亞栗領與摔角手剛悟也身受重傷。三位重傷年輕人接受警視廳科學家的手術。數日後，由神祕組織「Ido」率領的機器人軍團出現於東京灣的浮島町，警方與軍隊對其束手無策。

此時，三位身穿機械戰衣的年輕人現身。正是接受手術後改造為生化人刑警的健、領與剛。他們自稱「機甲警察Metal Jacks」。Metal Jacks以絢麗變身在「Jack Suits」與「Jack Armors」間切換，徹底擊敗機器人軍團、奪得勝利，從此揭開了在未來「Tokyo City」背景下高科技罪犯與Metal Jacks間戰鬥的序幕。

overview_en:
Killer Instinct is a 1995 Game Boy video game developed by Rare and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on November 1, 1995.

Killer Instinct! First it tore into the arcades. Then it burst into your house only on the Super NES. Now, it comes home again, this time on Game Boy! Choose from eight characters, including T.J. Combo, Fulgore, Jago, B. Orchid, Chief Thunder, Spinal, Sabrewulf, and Glacius, and battle your way to victory in Killer Instinct. The same great combo strategies are there along with power-packed special moves and gruesome danger moves. Learn each character's special attacks and combinations in the Practice mode, and when you are ready for competition, challenge a friend or take on the Arcade mode. Killer Instinct is also powered up on Super Game Boy! Brawl it out in high-tension arcade action!
overview_zh:
《Killer Instinct》是Rare開發的1995年Game Boy作品，由Nintendo of America於1995年11月1日在美國發行。

《Killer Instinct》！先在大型電玩席捲，再以Super NES獨家登陸家中，如今再度回歸，這次來到Game Boy！從T.J. Combo、Fulgore、Jago、B. Orchid、Chief Thunder、Spinal、Sabrewulf、Glacius等八位角色中擇一，殺出血路贏得勝利。原汁原味的連段策略一個不少，加上強大的特殊技與駭人的Danger Move。可在練習模式中熟練各角色的特殊攻擊與連段，準備好就挑戰好友或單挑Arcade模式。在Super Game Boy上力量更上層樓！沉浸於高張力的大型電玩動作中拼搏吧！

publisher:
Takara JP
Nintendo NA
Laguna EU

title_en: KING OF FIGHTERS, THE - HEAT OF BATTLE
no_intro_name: King of Fighters, The - Heat of Battle (Europe) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: Your quest, brave hero, is of extreme urgency. The fate of the kingdom rests in your hands, you must defeat your enemy by taking control of his army and his fortresses. Use your army wisely because although you have your own legion of wizards, giants, paladins, and knights, the enemy army is similarly equipped and will fight for their own crusade. Good luck and may Merlin's mystical brow guide you on your way.
overview_zh: 勇敢的英雄啊，你的任務十萬火急。王國命運繫於你身，你必須奪下敵軍與其堡壘擊敗對手。明智運用你的軍隊──雖然你擁有自己的法師、巨人、聖騎士與騎士軍團，但敵軍裝備同樣精良，並為自己的聖戰而戰。願梅林的神祕祝福引領你前行，祝你好運。

title_en: KINGYO CHUUIHOU! - WAPIKO NO WAKUWAKU STAMP RALLY!
no_intro_name: Kingyo Chuuihou! - Wapiko no Wakuwaku Stamp Rally! (Japan)

overview_en: Kinnikuman: The Dream Match is an Action game, published by Yutaka, which was released in Japan in 1992.
overview_zh: 《筋肉人：夢之比賽》是Yutaka發行的動作遊戲，於1992年在日本推出。

overview_en:
Kirby's back with fast-paced, four-way action!

It's a breakaway bash in this wild new Kirby game of Block Ball! By destroying the blocks on the screen, you clear stages and obtain powers that help you in your final confrontation with King Dedede.

Paddles on all four sides of the screen make this an intense four-way action contest. Your quick reactions and your careful use of Kirby's powers will determine your ultimate fate!
overview_zh:
卡比帶著快節奏的四向動作回歸！

這款瘋狂的卡比新作《Block Ball》是場破壞大亂鬥！透過破壞畫面上的方塊清關並取得能力，協助你最終決戰帝帝帝大王。

畫面四邊皆有球拍，造就緊張刺激的四向動作對戰。靈敏的反應與善用卡比的能力，將決定你最終的命運！

overview_en:
Kirby's Block Ball is a 1996 Game Boy video game developed by Nintendo R&D1, HAL Laboratory, and Tose and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on May 13, 1996.

Kirby's back with fast-paced, four-way action!

It's a breakaway bash in this wild new Kirby game of Block Ball! By destroying the blocks on the screen, you clear stages and obtain powers that help you in your final confrontation with King Dedede.

Paddles on all four sides of the screen make this an intense four-way action contest. Your quick reactions and your careful use of Kirby's powers will determine your ultimate fate!
overview_zh:
《Kirby's Block Ball》是任天堂R&D1、HAL Laboratory與Tose共同開發的1996年Game Boy作品，由Nintendo of America於1996年5月13日在美國發行。

卡比帶著快節奏的四向動作回歸！

這款瘋狂的卡比新作《Block Ball》是場破壞大亂鬥！透過破壞畫面上的方塊清關並取得能力，協助你最終決戰帝帝帝大王。

畫面四邊皆有球拍，造就緊張刺激的四向動作對戰。靈敏的反應與善用卡比的能力，將決定你最終的命運！

overview_en:
Kirby's Dream Land[a] ist ein von HAL Laboratory entwickeltes und von Nintendo für den Game Boy veröffentlichten Action-Plattformspiel von 1992. Es ist das erste Spiel in der KirbyKirby-Serie und markiert das Debüt von Kirby. Es führte viele Konventionen ein, die in späteren Spielen der Serie erscheinen würden. Das Spiel folgt Kirby, als er fünf Levels durchläuft, um die Sparkling Stars und das Essen von Dream Land von King Dedede abzurufen.

Kirby's Dream Land wurde von Masahiro Sakurai in seinem Debütspiel entworfen, der beabsichtigte, es ein einfaches Spiel zu sein, das leicht zu erreichen und von denen zu spielen sein könnte, die mit Action-Spielen nicht vertraut sind. Für fortgeschrittenere Spieler bot er zusätzliche optionale Herausforderungen wie einen harten Modus und die Möglichkeit, Kirbys maximale HP und Startnummer des Lebens zu bearbeiten. Kirby's Dream Land wurde 2011 auf dem Nintendo 3DS über die Virtual Console wiederveröffentlicht und ist auch eines der Spiele, die in dem Kompilationsspiel Kirby's Dream Collection for the Wii enthalten sind, das zum 20-jährigen Bestehen der Serie veröffentlicht wurde. Das Spiel wurde im Februar 2023 als Teil des Nintendo Switch Online-Dienstes aufgenommen.[[2] Das Spiel war mit 5.130.000 verkauften Exemplaren die umsatzstärkste in der Serie, bis sie 30 Jahre später von Kirby und dem Forgotten Land geschlagen wurde.
overview_zh:
《Kirby's Dream Land》[a]是HAL Laboratory開發、任天堂於1992年在Game Boy上發行的動作平台遊戲。本作為卡比系列首作，也是卡比的初登場。本作建立了系列後續作品中許多沿用的慣例。劇情描述卡比穿越五個關卡，從帝帝帝大王手中奪回閃亮之星與夢之國的食物。

《Kirby's Dream Land》是櫻井政博的處女作，他希望這款作品能讓不熟悉動作遊戲的人輕鬆上手與遊玩。對進階玩家則提供額外可選的挑戰，例如困難模式以及自訂卡比最大HP與初始命數的功能。本作於2011年透過Nintendo 3DS的Virtual Console再度推出，並收錄於Wii上的合輯《Kirby's Dream Collection》（為紀念系列20週年發行）。2023年2月本作也加入Nintendo Switch Online服務。[2]本作銷售達513萬套，曾為系列最暢銷之作，30年後才被《Kirby and the Forgotten Land》超越。

overview_en:
Kirby's Dream Land 2[a] ist ein 1995 von platform gameHAL Laboratory entwickeltes und von Nintendo für die Game Boy Handheld-Videospielkonsole veröffentlicht. Es erschien am 21. März 1995 in Japan, am 1. Mai 1995 in Nordamerika[[1] in Europa am 31. Juli 1995 und am 22. November 1995 in Australien.

Kirby's Dream Land 2 setzt die Abenteuer von KirbyKirby's Dream Land und Kirby's Adventure fort und fügt drei tierische Freunde hinzu, um Kirby im Kampf zu unterstützen. Es kann auf dem Super Game Boy gespielt werden und gibt leichte Änderungen am Spiel, wie das Hinzufügen eines benutzerdefinierten Farbschemas, eine spezielle Spielgrenze und ein paar neue Soundeffekte.

Das Spiel wurde am Virtual Console15. Februar 2012 in der PAL-Regionen am 17. Mai 2012 in der PAL-Regionen und am 1. August 2013 in Nordamerika wiederveröffentlicht. Kirby's Dream Land 2 ist auch in Kirby's Dream Collection für die Wii enthalten.
overview_zh:
《Kirby's Dream Land 2》[a]是HAL Laboratory開發、任天堂於1995年在Game Boy掌機上發行的平台遊戲。日版於1995年3月21日發售、北美於1995年5月1日[1]、歐洲於1995年7月31日、澳洲於1995年11月22日推出。

《Kirby's Dream Land 2》延續《Kirby's Dream Land》與《Kirby's Adventure》的冒險，新增三位動物夥伴協助卡比戰鬥。可在Super Game Boy上遊玩，並提供細微改動，例如自訂配色、特殊遊戲邊框與少數新音效。

本作後於Virtual Console上重新發行：北美於2012年2月15日、PAL地區於2012年5月17日，以及2013年8月1日。本作亦收錄於Wii的《Kirby's Dream Collection》。

overview_en:
Kirby's Pinball Land is a 1993 Game Boy video game developed by HAL Laboratory and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on November 30, 1993.

Choose your world and take aim! Kirby will be launched into the fast-paced danger of uncharted worlds, but you can help him face his foes head on. It's a pinball race to check out each new world's surprise enemies and pitfalls. Flip Kirby in battles against lethal eyeballs, a shooting tree and mace-swinging maniacs. Take aim and leap to new worlds!
overview_zh:
《Kirby's Pinball Land》是HAL Laboratory開發的1993年Game Boy作品，由Nintendo of America於1993年11月30日在美國發行。

選擇你的世界、瞄準目標！卡比將被彈射進未知世界的快節奏危險中，但你能助他正面迎敵。這是場彈珠台競賽，探索每個新世界的驚奇敵人與陷阱。彈動卡比與致命眼球、會射擊的樹、揮舞釘錘的瘋子大戰。瞄準目標、躍入新世界！

overview_en:
Kirby's Star Stacker is a 1997 Game Boy video game developed by HAL Laboratory and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on April 7, 1997.

Join Kirby as he stacks the falling stars with help from his friends, Rick the Hamster, Kine the Sunfish, and Coo the Owl. Watch out for King Dedede. He is out to stop you! With a few quick moves and some well-timed strategy, you can quickly outwit him and move on to the next challenging level. Kirby's Star Stacker features pure puzzle fun for everyone. From above, blocks rain down constantly. From below, whole lines appear with unrelenting clock-like regularity. Simply sandwich the stars between Kirby's pals and you'll soon be on your way to the high score.

-Play the VS mode against a friend using the Game Link Cable! (sold separately).
-Four different games: Round Clear, VS, Challenge, and Time Attack!
-Battery backed-up memory saves your progress!
overview_zh:
《Kirby's Star Stacker》是HAL Laboratory開發的1997年Game Boy作品，由Nintendo of America於1997年4月7日在美國發行。

與卡比一同堆疊掉落的星星，並有夥伴Rick the Hamster、Kine the Sunfish與Coo the Owl相助。當心帝帝帝大王，他要阻止你！靠著迅速操作與時機準確的策略，便能巧妙智取，邁向下一道挑戰關卡。本作為純粹的益智樂趣，老少咸宜。方塊不斷自上落下，下方則有整列方塊規律湧現，只要把星星夾在卡比的夥伴之間，便能輕鬆衝高分。

-透過Game Link Cable與好友進行VS模式對戰！（線材另售。）
-四種模式：Round Clear、VS、Challenge、Time Attack！
-內建電池可儲存遊戲進度！

overview_en: Kitchen Panic is an Action game, developed by Bits Laboratory and published by Coconuts Japan, which was released in Japan in 1991.
overview_zh: 《Kitchen Panic》是Bits Laboratory開發、Coconuts Japan發行的動作遊戲，於1991年在日本推出。

title_en: KIZUCHI DA QUIZ DA GEN-SAN DA!
no_intro_name: Kizuchi da Quiz da Gen-san da! (Japan)

overview_en: KLAX - It's simple in concept and easy to play. Catch the colored tiles with the paddle and flip them into bins to make same colored stacks, diagonals and rows of three. Sounds easy? It is. The hard part is pulling yourself away from this fun and addictive game!
overview_zh: 《KLAX》──概念簡單、上手容易。用滑板接住彩色方塊，把它們翻入儲存槽中，組成同色三連直、斜或橫向。聽起來容易？確實如此。難的是怎麼讓自己放下這款有趣又上癮的遊戲！

overview_en: Sir Will accepts a series of bold quests to defend his land. Battling dread beasts and wizards most foul, the brave Knight shall face his greatest fears - and his finest hours.
overview_zh: Sir Will接下一連串大膽的任務以保家衛國。他將與恐怖野獸與最邪惡的法師對抗，迎來人生最大的恐懼，也迎接人生最榮耀的時刻。

overview_en: Connect lovers on a path and keep the rivals away in this puzzle game.
overview_zh: 在這款益智遊戲中為戀人們牽起路徑，並讓對手遠離。
