overview_en:
At the beginning of the game, players can select either "Exhibition" or "Tournament" matches. An exhibition match is just one game played against either the computer or another player. Tournament matches are similar to the NHL playoffs. It starts out as one team of the player's choice going against other teams in a playoff style tournament. The team that is successful in beating all of the opposing teams is awarded the Cup.[2]

Fighting in the game is initiated whenever two players bump into each other three times in a row without hitting another player. The two players will stop skating and engage in pre-fight confrontation where they are able to exchange punches if they choose. If one player is able to rapidly punch their opponent during the pre-fight there is a chance they will knock their opponent down and neither player suffers a penalty. If mutual punches are thrown during the pre-fight sequence, then a voice yells "fight", the fight screen appears, and the gamers take control of their players. During the fight a player can punch high, punch low, block high, or block low and is given a health bar of five hits. The loser is the first person to get hit five times, is given the penalty, and sent to the penalty box (the winner is not punished), creating a power play opportunity of 5-on-4 skaters. Up to four players can be penalized, for a maximum of a 5-on-1 advantage. If a fight occurs close to one of the nets, the referee may break up the fight and call a "penalty shot".

During the second intermission, either a playable mini-game will appear for Player One to play or a Konami ad will appear featuring a bear shooting the puck into a net mouthing the words "Nice Shot!" The mini-game is actually an advertisement for Contra and other Konami games, in which (at one point) a little spaceship is trying to destroy a much larger spaceship, this being a reference to Gradius.

If the score is tied at the end of the game, a shoot out (similar to a penalty shot) is used to determine the winner. Each team gets five shots. The team with the most goals after five shots is the winner. If, after that, the game is still tied, each team keeps getting one more shot until a winner is determined.

There are a total of eight teams (four from Canada and four from the United States), each one representing a city that housed a NHL team at the time of development. The four Canadian cities are Toronto, Vancouver, Montreal, and Edmonton. The four American teams are from New York, Chicago, Los Angeles and Minnesota. Teams are depicted with jerseys that vary in color.

This game also features distinct voice samples, which were rare at the time in NES games. Most notably, the voice says "Blades of Steel!" on the title screen, "FACEOFF!" before each faceoff, "FIGHT!" when a fight breaks out, "Get the pass" after a successful pass is made, "Penalty Shot," and an "Aaahhh!" made by the losing player after a fight, or when a player skates into a goalie. The NES passing sound bite is garbled and has been interpreted as "With the pass", "It's a pass", etc. but the arcade passing bite is clearly audible and confirms the phrase as "Get the pass". The arcade version has a greater variety of sound bites and commentary owing to the hardware's better speech faculties and extra memory.

Blades of Steel differs from the professional game in the NHL in the late 1980s in that it has no offside rule, and its interpretation of penalties is somewhat unusual.[citation needed] The game's officials only call two penalties. Players who lose a fistfight are penalized for two minutes, an abstract reworking of the five-minute offsetting majors normally assigned in the event of a fight. Should a fight break out in front of one team's net, then the player on offense gets a penalty shot.[citation needed] The penalty shot is administered in the style of a soccer penalty shot, in that the shooting player must stand on the blue line, instead of moving towards the goaltender. The game also recognizes icing infractions, with an appropriate game reset and faceoff in the liable team's zone
overview_zh:
遊戲開始時可選擇「Exhibition」或「Tournament」比賽。表演賽即與電腦或另一位玩家進行單場對戰。錦標賽則類似NHL季後賽，由玩家所選隊伍以淘汰賽形式對戰其他隊伍。擊敗所有對手的隊伍可奪冠。[2]

當兩位球員在沒碰其他球員的情況下連續三次相撞，便會觸發打架。雙方會停下溜冰並進入打架前對峙，可選擇互毆。若一方在對峙中能快速出拳，便有機會擊倒對手且雙方皆無罰則。若雙方互擲拳頭，便會聽到一聲「fight」、出現打架畫面，玩家接管角色操作。打架時可上勾拳、下擊、上格擋或下格擋，雙方各有可承受5次的生命條。先被擊中5次者敗北、受罰並送進處罰席（勝者不受罰），形成5對4的power play機會。最多可同時罰下4人，最高為5對1優勢。若打架發生在球門附近，裁判可能中止打架並判「penalty shot」。

第二段中場時，第一位玩家可玩到迷你遊戲，或顯示Konami廣告──熊咬住「Nice Shot!」字樣將冰球射進球門。迷你遊戲實則為魂斗羅等Konami作品的廣告，其中（某段）小型太空船試圖摧毀大太空船，正是致敬Gradius。

比賽結束若平手，將以類似penalty shot的射門大戰決勝。每隊各五球，五球後進球較多者勝。若仍平手，將每隊一球持續加賽至分出勝負。

共有八支隊伍（加拿大四支、美國四支），各代表開發當時擁有NHL球隊的城市。加拿大四城為多倫多、溫哥華、蒙特婁與愛民頓；美國四隊為紐約、芝加哥、洛杉磯與明尼蘇達。各隊球衣顏色不同。

本作具有豐富的語音取樣，這在當時的NES遊戲中相當罕見。最著名的是標題畫面的「Blades of Steel!」、每次爭球前的「FACEOFF!」、開打時的「FIGHT!」、傳球成功的「Get the pass」、「Penalty Shot」以及打架輸方的「Aaahhh!」（也用於球員撞上守門員時）。NES版的傳球語音較模糊，曾被解讀為「With the pass」、「It's a pass」等，但大型電玩版聲音清晰，可確認為「Get the pass」。大型電玩版因硬體語音與記憶體較佳，擁有更豐富的語音與評論。

《Blades of Steel》與1980年代後期NHL的職業比賽不同，無越位規則，且對犯規的詮釋偏特別。[citation needed] 遊戲裁判僅判兩種犯規：拳擊輸方罰兩分鐘（簡化自原本打架時雙方各五分鐘的對抵大過）；若打架發生在某隊球門前，攻方獲得罰球機會。[citation needed] 罰球以足球PK風格進行，射手須站在藍線上，而非朝守門員逼近。遊戲也會判icing犯規，並重置比賽於違規隊伍區內爭球。

overview_en: Roll a die through a maze of obstacles in this puzzle game.  You have to reach the exit with the correct side facing up.
overview_zh: 在這款益智遊戲中操控骰子穿越障礙迷宮。你必須抵達出口時讓正確的點數朝上。

overview_en: Hey, kids! Give a hoot! Help out your old pal Krusty the Clown! My official Krusty's Fun House is infested with rats! There are over 60 levels in this game, and they're all crawling with the little varmints! I've got my loyal cadets, Bart and Homer Simpson, Sideshow Mel, and Corporal Punishment to guard the rat traps, but I need you to lead the filthy rodents into those traps! Then we blow 'em up! We incinerate 'em! We laser-blast 'em! We electrocute 'em! We Krusterize the little stinkers! Hoo boy! Did I mention the snakes, aliens and flying pigs? Well, watch out for those riffraff! If you can't Krusterize 'em, at least avoid 'em... they're worse than the #@!*%! rats! Making Krusty's Fun House vermin-free is not a pretty task, kiddy cadets - but someone's gotta do it!
overview_zh: 嘿，孩子們！我這位老朋友，小丑Krusty需要你的幫忙！我官方的Krusty's Fun House鬧老鼠了！本作有超過60個關卡，全爬滿那些害蟲！我的忠誠手下Bart和Homer Simpson、Sideshow Mel與Corporal Punishment守在捕鼠陷阱旁，但我需要你把那些骯髒的齧齒類引進去！然後把牠們炸了！燒了！雷射轟掉！電擊牠們！把這些臭傢伙Krusterize一下！老天！我提到蛇、外星人和飛天豬了嗎？小心那些雜碎！如果不能Krusterize牠們，至少躲遠一點……牠們比那些該死的老鼠還糟！把Krusty's Fun House清得乾乾淨淨可不是輕鬆活，孩子兵團，但總得有人做！

title_en: KUMA NO PUUTAROU - TAKARA SAGASHI DA OOIRI GAME BATTLE!
no_intro_name: Kuma no Puutarou - Takara Sagashi da Ooiri Game Battle! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en:
Leap into Action!

Trouble's brewing under the blistering desert sun. The arch-fiend Daddy Long Legs and his army of Ninja Mercenaries, Kung Phooeys, and other bandits are cooking up something evil in their Pyramid-shaped factories and not telling anyone about it. Bruce Leap, Kung-Fu Master and part-time camel racer, must once again jump into the fry and set things straight. Leap has no need for guns, his hands and feet are themselves lethal weapons.
overview_zh:
起飛吧！

炙熱的沙漠陽光下風雲變色。大反派Daddy Long Legs與其Ninja傭兵、Kung Phooey以及其他土匪軍團，在金字塔形的工廠裡密謀邪惡之事，並對外保密。功夫大師兼兼差駱駝騎手Bruce Leap，必須再次跳進油鍋撥亂反正。Leap不需要槍，他的手腳本身就是致命武器。

title_en: KUUSOU KAGAKU SEKAI GULLIVER BOY - KUUSOU KAGAKU PUZZLE PURITTOPON!!
no_intro_name: Kuusou Kagaku Sekai Gulliver Boy - Kuusou Kagaku Puzzle Purittopon!! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: Lamborghini American Challenge is a Racing game, developed and published by Titus Software, which was released in Europe in 1993.
overview_zh: 《Lamborghini American Challenge》是Titus Software開發兼發行的賽車遊戲，於1993年在歐洲推出。

overview_en: Last Action Hero blasts you out of the real world - onto the silver screen - and back again, in a non-stop action-adventure based on the epic fantasy feature starring Arnold Schwarzenegger. As movie hero Jack Slater, you'll team up with your biggest fan, Danny Madigan, who's got a magic movie ticket that's the ticket to serious trouble. Leaping between both the movie world and the real world with this magic ticket, you'll get into wild chases and deadly fights with the most dangerous criminals imaginable. Last Action Hero delivers all the excitement of the Schwarzenegger film with just one difference... you're the star! But this time, you must ultimately defeat the arch henchman Benedict to ensure a happy ending.
overview_zh: 《Last Action Hero》將你從現實世界轟入大銀幕、再轟回來，動作冒險全程不停歇，靈感來自由阿諾·史瓦辛格主演的史詩奇幻電影。你扮演電影英雄Jack Slater，與最大粉絲Danny Madigan搭檔──他擁有一張惹禍上身的魔法電影票。靠這張魔法票穿梭電影世界與現實世界，你將與最危險的罪犯展開驚心動魄的飛車追逐與致命搏鬥。本作將史瓦辛格電影的所有刺激元素送上你手中，唯一的差別是──你才是主角！但這次你必須擊敗大反派Benedict，方能換得圓滿結局。

publisher:
The Sales Curve EU
Coconuts Japan JP

overview_en: Lazlos' Leap is a Puzzle game, developed and published by Hect, which was released in 1992.
overview_zh: 《Lazlos' Leap》是Hect開發兼發行的益智遊戲，於1992年推出。

overview_en: Legend: Ashita e no Tsubasa is a Role-Playing game, published by Quest, which was released in Japan in 1991.
overview_zh: 《LEGEND：通往明日的翅膀》是Quest發行的角色扮演遊戲，於1991年在日本推出。

title_en: LEGEND OF THE RIVER KING GB
no_intro_name: Legend of the River King GB (USA) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en: You'll need all your angling and survival skills to succeed in this unique fishing RPG. On a perilous quest to capture a mysterious and mystical fish, you'll deploy a variety of tackle in both quiet lakes and raging rapids. Along the shores, dangerous animals are a constant threat. To get supplies, you'll sell some of your catch at village markets. You can also try your hand at raising a pet fish from embryo to adult and watch as it grows and even changes species!
overview_zh: 在這款獨特的釣魚RPG中，你需要結合釣魚技巧與生存技能。為了捕獲一條神祕又神奇的魚，你將在寧靜的湖泊與湍急的激流中運用各式釣具。岸邊危險動物隨時威脅你的安危。為補給物資，你可在村落市集販售部分漁獲；也能挑戰從魚卵養大寵物魚，看著牠成長甚至變更物種！

title_en: LEGEND OF ZELDA, THE - LINK'S AWAKENING
no_intro_name: Legend of Zelda, The - Link's Awakening (USA, Europe)

overview_en: A unique mind-boggling game of multiple skill levels. Take command of the wackiest collection of misdirected rodents ever seen on your screen. Featuring fantastically animated graphics and simple yet addictive gameplay.
overview_zh: 一款結合多重關卡的獨特燒腦遊戲。指揮這群迷糊嚮導的可愛小傢伙，挑戰你的靈活操作。畫面動畫精彩，玩法簡單卻十分上癮。

overview_en: A whole new world! Those lovable green-haired Lemmings are back with a whole new bunch of skills, levels and mayhem to challenge your dexterity and tax your wits. You've gotta save those goofy critters. The Lemmings have split into 12 different tribes and are spread all over Lemming Island. It's up to you to lead them on. With your brains and their magic, you'll be unstoppable as you blaze through tons of awesome puzzles! Take the adventure to a higher level and reunite The Tribes!
overview_zh: 嶄新世界！這群可愛的綠髮Lemmings帶著全新技能、關卡與混亂回歸，準備考驗你的手腕與機智。你必須拯救這群憨傻小傢伙。Lemmings分裂成12個不同部落，散布在Lemming Island各地，由你領他們前進。憑你的智慧與他們的魔力組合無敵，攻克大量精彩謎題！把冒險推向新高度，讓The Tribes重新團聚！

overview_en: Lethal Weapon is an Action game, developed by Eurocom Entertainment Software and published by Ocean, which was released in 1993.
overview_zh: 《Lethal Weapon》是Eurocom Entertainment Software開發、Ocean發行的動作遊戲，於1993年推出。

overview_en: Lingo is a Miscellaneous game, developed by PCSL and published by Altron, which was released in Europe in 1994.
overview_zh: 《Lingo》是PCSL開發、Altron發行的雜項類遊戲，於1994年在歐洲推出。

overview_en: Little Master 2: Raikou no Kishi is a Strategy game, developed by Zener Works and published by Tokuma Shoten, which was released in Japan in 1992.
overview_zh: 《Little Master 2：雷光之騎士》是Zener Works開發、德間書店發行的策略遊戲，於1992年在日本推出。

overview_en: This side-scrolling game allows the player to control different Looney Tunes characters and their different abilities to advance through the levels, seven in all. The player can use Daffy Duck (throwing a frisbee to defeat enemies with Mario-style gameplay), Tweety Bird (elude Sylvester throughout the level), Porky Pig (control a bi-plane to shoot down enemies), Taz (really only a bonus game in which he has to collect as many steaks as possible in 60 seconds), Speedy Gonzalez (elude ghosts and ghouls in a haunted mansion), Roadrunner (of course running from his arch enemy, Wile E. Coyote) and finally Bugs Bunny (gameplay similar to Daffy).
overview_zh: 這款橫向捲軸遊戲讓玩家操控不同的樂一通角色，運用各自的能力闖過總共七個關卡。可使用達菲鴨（瑪利歐式玩法，丟飛盤擊敗敵人）、崔弟（全程躲避傻大貓）、波奇豬（操控雙翼機擊落敵人）、塔斯曼尼亞惡魔（其實是個獎勵關，須在 60 秒內盡可能蒐集牛排）、墨西哥飛毛腿（在鬼屋中躲避鬼怪）、嗶嗶鳥（當然是逃離宿敵威利狼）以及最後的兔寶寶（玩法類似達菲）。

title_en: LOONEY TUNES 2 - TASMANIAN DEVIL IN ISLAND CHASE
no_intro_name: Looney Tunes 2 - Tasmanian Devil in Island Chase (USA, Europe)
overview_en:
The Tasmanian Devil has busted out of the Acme Zoo on an island-hopping mission to find a safe place to live. Big game hunters want to grab the spinning devil and put him behind bars. It's up to you to keep Taz from becoming a permanent display!
Leap, bounce and spin through five gigantic islands-each with devilish traps and hidden dangers for Taz to survive. Guide him through monster-infested swamps and sticky pools of quicksand on islands scattered across the South Pacific. Taz-Mania'll keep you spinning!

Blast through the tropics with the tornado spin and knock off enemies right off the screen!Squash enemies with a "Taz Stomp" to temporarily stun them!Ride on a wild rollercoaster and a haunted mine car!Make it to Dodo Island to face off against diabolical dinosaurs!Big Hat Hunter wants the ultimate prize-Taz in his collection!
overview_zh:
塔斯曼尼亞惡魔逃出 Acme 動物園，展開跳島之旅尋找安身之處。大型獵人們想抓住這隻旋轉惡魔把牠關進籠子裡。能否讓 Taz 不變成永久展示品就看你了！
蹦跳、彈跳、旋轉穿越五座巨大島嶼，每座都有險惡陷阱與隱藏危機等著 Taz。引導牠穿越散布於南太平洋上、滿是怪物的沼澤與黏稠的流沙。Taz-Mania 會讓你轉個不停！

以龍捲旋轉橫掃熱帶並把敵人擊飛出畫面！用「Taz 踩踏」短暫擊昏敵人！搭乘瘋狂雲霄飛車與鬧鬼礦車！抵達渡渡鳥島面對邪惡恐龍！大帽獵人想要的終極獵物——把 Taz 收進收藏中！

title_en: LOONEY TUNES - BUGS BUNNY TO YUKAI NA NAKAMA-TACHI
no_intro_name: Looney Tunes - Bugs Bunny to Yukai na Nakama-tachi (Japan)
Looney Tunes Series - Daffy Duck (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: It couldn't be simpler. You get pieces of different sizes and shapes. One by one you put them down on the playing board - soon you've made your first loop. Yeaaaah! Now it's not so easy. This time you didn't get the pieces you wanted. Never mind - just start another loop. All of a sudden the board's getting just a little too crowded. Now you're struggling to find a place to drop the pieces (who cares where they go, you can't afford to let the timer run down because you'll lose a life). Now it's getting really hectic. Did you honestly think this game was simple (and this is just the first level of Game A). Pretty soon you'll be dreaming about LOOPZ. Wondering if next time you'll be able to make a longer loop than ever before - or more loops than your record. Will LOOPZ drive you crazy? You bet!
overview_zh: 規則再簡單不過。你會拿到各種大小與形狀的拼塊，一塊塊放上盤面，很快就完成第一個迴圈。耶！不過接下來就沒這麼容易了。這次拿到的不是想要的拼塊，沒關係，再起一個迴圈就好。突然之間盤面變得有點太擁擠，你開始拼命找地方放下拼塊（管它放哪，計時跑完就少一條命）。場面越來越緊張，你還覺得這遊戲簡單嗎（而且這只是 Game A 的第一關）。很快你就會夢到 LOOPZ，想著下次能不能拼出更長的迴圈，或破自己的紀錄。LOOPZ 會讓你瘋狂嗎？絕對會！

no_intro_name: Lost World, The - Jurassic Park (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: Lucky Luke is an Action game, developed by Bit Managers and published by Infogrames, which was released in Europe in 1996.
overview_zh: 《Lucky Luke》是一款動作遊戲，由 Bit Managers 開發、Infogrames 發行，1996 年於歐洲推出。

overview_en: Lucle is a Puzzle game, developed and published by Vic Tokai, which was released in Japan in 1994.
overview_zh: 《Lucle》是一款益智遊戲，由 Vic Tokai 開發與發行，1994 年於日本推出。

overview_en: Lunar Lander is an Action game, published by Pack-In-Video, which was released in Japan in 1990.
overview_zh: 《Lunar Lander》是一款動作遊戲，由 Pack-In-Video 發行，1990 年於日本推出。

overview_en: The first to be released to a handheld, being released for the first time to both the Game Boy and Sega Game Gear.
overview_zh: 本系列首次登上掌機平台，同步推出 Game Boy 與 Sega Game Gear 版本。

overview_en: All 30 NFL teams, including Jacksonville and Carolina. Hidden codes reveal secret teams and players. Create Player Combine Scouting - Game within the game. All-new 3-D rendered graphics and animations: over-the-top dives, kneeling catches, logos in the end zone, clothesline tackles, left-handed QB/kickers. General Manager feature - trade and sign players. Over 20 new offensive and defensive plays. Full season with Playoffs and Super Bowl.
overview_zh: 全 30 支 NFL 球隊，包括 Jacksonville 與 Carolina。隱藏密碼可解鎖秘密球隊與球員。創建球員、新秀選秀偵察等遊戲中遊戲。全新 3D 渲染圖像與動作：誇張撲接、跪姿接球、底線區隊徽、橫掃式擒抱、左撇子四分衛/踢球員。總經理功能可進行交易與簽約。新增超過 20 種進攻與防守戰術。完整賽季含季後賽與超級盃。

overview_en:
NFL Football--MADDEN STYLE! 
 Full NFL SEASON, playoffs, Super Bowl, and Pro Bowl 
 TV-STYLE PRESENTATION -- Live commentary with Madden and Summerall, plus James Brown in the studio 
 Over 100 NFL TEAMS 
 NFL PLAYER rosters 
 CREATE and TRADE players 
 Over 500 MADDEN designed plays 31 3-D rendered NFL STADIUMS 
 Multiple CAMERA ANGLES 
 10 real NFL PENALTIES 
 Player and team season STATS tracked in over 60 catergories
overview_zh:
NFL 美式足球——MADDEN 風格！
 完整 NFL 賽季、季後賽、超級盃與職業盃
 電視轉播風格呈現——Madden 與 Summerall 即時講評，James Brown 在攝影棚
 超過 100 支 NFL 球隊
 NFL 球員名單
 創建與交易球員
 超過 500 種 Madden 設計戰術，31 座 3D 渲染 NFL 球場
 多種攝影機角度
 10 種真實 NFL 犯規
 球員與球隊賽季數據追蹤超過 60 項類別

overview_en: Fifth grader Edojou Honmaru is one of the most trodden-upon losers in his class, until he meets Magical Taluluto-kun. Taluluto's powers help him deal with all his hardships, such as girls, bullies, and numerous other challenges.
overview_zh: 五年級生江戶城本丸是班上被欺負得最慘的魯蛇之一，直到他遇見魔法 Taluluto 君。Taluluto 的法力幫他化解各種難題，包括女生、欺負人的同學以及無數其他挑戰。

overview_en:
Each team has eight players (one goalkeeper, two attackers/defenders, and three midfielders). When the player moves a row, all of them are moved at once unlike on an actual table soccer set. Rows cannot be moved in an upward or a downward position; only from left to right. Stopping the ball and performing powerful shots is only one aspect of the game. Players can also incapacitate one of the opposing players on a well-timed shot. A tied game results in a penalty shootout.

Three different surfaces are available. Players can practice without a computer opponent and a spectator mode allows newcomers to see two computer-controller opponents face off.
overview_zh:
每隊有八名球員（一名守門員、兩名前鋒/後衛、三名中場）。當玩家移動一排時，整排會一起移動，與真正的桌上足球不同。各排只能左右移動，無法上下移動。停球與射出強力射門僅是遊戲的一部分，玩家還可以用時機抓得好的射門撞傷對方球員。平局時以 PK 戰決定勝負。

提供三種不同球場表面。玩家可在無電腦對手下練習，觀戰模式則讓新手觀摩兩台電腦對戰。

title_en: MAHOUJIN GURUGURU - YUUSHA TO KUKURI NO DAIBOUKEN
no_intro_name: Mahoujin GuruGuru - Yuusha to Kukuri no Daibouken (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: Welcome to Malibu: Volleyball capital of the world. This is where the best come to play--and show off their tans. If you want in, sign up. But keep your eyes on the ball...there'll be plenty of time for bikini-watching after the match!
overview_zh: 歡迎來到馬里布：世界排球之都。這裡是高手齊聚之地，也是大家曬日光浴炫膚色的地方。想加入就報名吧。但請盯緊球……比賽結束後再慢慢欣賞比基尼也不遲！

title_en: MANI 4 IN 1 - BUBBLE BOBBLE + ELEVATOR ACTION + CHASE H.Q. + SAGAIA
no_intro_name: Mani 4 in 1 - Bubble Bobble + Elevator Action + Chase H.Q. + Sagaia (China) (En)

title_en: MANI 4 IN 1 - GENKI BAKUHATSU GAMBARUGER + ZETTAI MUTEKI RAIJIN-OH + ZOIDS DENSETSU + MIRACLE ADVENTURE OF ESPARKS - USHINAWARETA SEISEKI PERIVRON
no_intro_name: Mani 4 in 1 - Genki Bakuhatsu Gambaruger + Zettai Muteki Raijin-Oh + Zoids Densetsu + Miracle Adventure of Esparks - Ushinawareta Seiseki Perivron (China) (Ja)

title_en: MANI 4 IN 1 - R-TYPE II + SAIGO NO NINDOU + GANSO!! YANCHA MARU + SHISENSHOU - MATCH-MANIA
no_intro_name: Mani 4 in 1 - R-Type II + Saigo no Nindou + Ganso!! Yancha Maru + Shisenshou - Match-Mania (China) (Ja)

title_en: MANI 4 IN 1 - TAKAHASHI MEIJIN NO BOUKEN-JIMA II + GB GENJIN + BOMBER BOY + MILON NO MEIKYUU KUMIKYOKU
no_intro_name: Mani 4 in 1 - Takahashi Meijin no Bouken-jima II + GB Genjin + Bomber Boy + Milon no Meikyuu Kumikyoku (China) (Ja)

title_en: MANI 4 IN 1 - TETRIS + ALLEYWAY + YAKUMAN + TENNIS
no_intro_name: Mani 4 in 1 - Tetris + Alleyway + Yakuman + Tennis (China) (Ja)

overview_en: It couldn't be simpler. You get pieces of different sizes and shapes. One by one you put them down on the playing board - soon you've made your first loop. Yeaaaah! Now it's not so easy. This time you didn't get the pieces you wanted. Never mind - just start another loop. All of a sudden the board's getting just a little too crowded. Now you're struggling to find a place to drop the pieces (who cares where they go, you can't afford to let the timer run down because you'll lose a life). Now it's getting really hectic. Did you honestly think this game was simple (and this is just the first level of Game A). Pretty soon you'll be dreaming about LOOPZ. Wondering if next time you'll be able to make a longer loop than ever before - or more loops than your record. Will LOOPZ drive you crazy? You bet!
overview_zh: 規則再簡單不過。你會拿到各種大小與形狀的拼塊，一塊塊放上盤面，很快就完成第一個迴圈。耶！不過接下來就沒這麼容易了。這次拿到的不是想要的拼塊，沒關係，再起一個迴圈就好。突然之間盤面變得有點太擁擠，你開始拼命找地方放下拼塊（管它放哪，計時跑完就少一條命）。場面越來越緊張，你還覺得這遊戲簡單嗎（而且這只是 Game A 的第一關）。很快你就會夢到 LOOPZ，想著下次能不能拼出更長的迴圈，或破自己的紀錄。LOOPZ 會讓你瘋狂嗎？絕對會！

overview_en:
Mario's Picross is a 1995 Game Boy video game developed by Ape and Jupiter and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on March 16, 1995.

Help Mario unlock the mystery of Picross! The secrets lie in the numeric codes on the top and left side of the window. Deciper these numbers and uncover a hidden picture in each mind-bending puzzle!

Quick wits and a speedy pace are required to solve the clues before the clock runs out! Chisel away strategic boxes and reveal the hidden image in record time!

Be careful! Every mistake will cost precious minutes!
overview_zh:
《Mario's Picross》是一款 1995 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Ape 與 Jupiter 開發，Nintendo of America 於 1995 年 3 月 16 日在美國發行。

幫瑪利歐解開 Picross 之謎！秘密就藏在視窗上方與左側的數字提示中。破解這些數字，揭開每道燒腦謎題中隱藏的圖像！

需要敏捷思考與快速節奏，才能在時間用完前解出提示！策略性地敲掉方格，以最短時間揭曉隱藏圖像！

小心！每次失誤都會耗掉寶貴時間！

overview_en: Yoshi, known as Mario & Yoshi in PAL regions, is a puzzle video game developed by Game Freak and published by Nintendo. It was released for the NES and Game Boy platforms. Both versions were first released simultaneously in Japan on December 14, 1991, and released in all other regions the following year.
overview_zh: 《Yoshi》（在 PAL 地區稱為 Mario & Yoshi）是一款益智遊戲，由 Game Freak 開發、任天堂發行，登上 NES 與 Game Boy 平台。兩個版本於 1991 年 12 月 14 日在日本同步首發，其他地區則於翌年推出。

overview_en:
The Master Traveler takes on the Monsters of the World.

Play as the ninja Maru in this action-packed side-scrolling game that will take you on a journey across the world. While Maru is out for a walk with his girlfriend Cori, an evil samurai named Muramasa suddenly appears and kidnaps her. In Maru's efforts to track her down and rescue her, he must face a number of mythological monsters while gaining new and powerful weapons in order to defeat them. Using the hints that are left behind by his enemies, Maru will follow a trail that will lead him across six different locations - including the bug-infested forests of America and the scorching deserts of Egypt. Help our hero on his mission as he fights to rescue Cori.
overview_zh:
大師級旅人對抗世界各地的怪物。

在這款動作十足的橫向捲軸遊戲中扮演忍者 Maru，踏上跨越世界的旅程。Maru 與女友 Cori 散步時，邪惡武士村正突然現身將她擄走。為追蹤並救回 Cori，Maru 必須對抗各種神話怪物，並一路取得新的強力武器。利用敵人留下的線索，Maru 將循跡走遍六個不同地點——包括蟲害肆虐的美洲森林與酷熱難耐的埃及沙漠。協助這位英雄完成救援 Cori 的任務。

overview_en: Masakari Densetsu: Kintarou Action-Hen is an Action game, developed by TOSE and published by Tonkin House, which was released in Japan in 1992.
overview_zh: 《マサカリ伝説 金太郎アクション編》是一款動作遊戲，由 TOSE 開發、Tonkin House 發行，1992 年於日本推出。

no_intro_name: Masakari Densetsu - Kintarou RPG Hen (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: The player controls an unnamed protagonist who is attempting to rescue his love interest, the Princess Mariko, from Akuma's castle fortress. The game exhibits a combination of a side-scrolling platform and fighting game elements similar to a beat 'em up.
overview_zh: 玩家操控一名無名主角，企圖從 Akuma 的城堡要塞中救出心愛的真理子公主。本作結合了橫向捲軸平台與類似 beat 'em up 的格鬥元素。

overview_en:
Matthias Sammer Soccer is a soccer game made for Germany.  The game features a field spread North to South where your player moves North and the opponent moves the ball South.  The game was released in Germany in 1997.

Goal!!!!!!
overview_zh:
《Matthias Sammer Soccer》是一款專為德國市場製作的足球遊戲。場地為南北向，玩家球員往北移動，對手把球帶往南方。本作於 1997 年在德國發行。

進球！！！！！！

overview_en: When he morphs into a ninja, you better duck! Play as Maui. Play as the Ninja. Play as Maui. Play as the Ninja. Try not to get dizzy. Find the missing Shabuhm Shabuhm idol before your island paradise goes kaboom kaboom! 40 hours of intense gameplay. So pack plenty of attitude. And your bug gun. Come beak to beak with MudDrakes, Rotting Pirates, Duck Zombies, Amazon Warriors. And a bunch of fowl-tempered hangers-on. Laugh in the face of danger from the top of a volcano, the bottom of the sea, the Realm of the Dead, and Ninja Training Grounds. Then get the heck out! Live every level like it's your last - 'cuz it may be!
overview_zh: 當他變身為忍者時，最好閃遠一點！可扮演 Maui，也可扮演忍者；可扮演 Maui，也可扮演忍者。盡量別暈頭轉向。在你的島嶼天堂被炸成轟轟之前，找出失蹤的 Shabuhm Shabuhm 神像！40 小時的緊張遊玩。記得帶上滿滿態度，還有你的捕蟲槍。與泥龍、腐爛海盜、殭屍鴨、亞馬遜女戰士面對面交手，還有一群脾氣暴躁的跟班。從火山頂、海底深處、亡者領域到忍者訓練場，笑看危險。然後快點逃出來！每一關都當作最後一關來玩——因為很可能真的是！

overview_en:
M.C. Kids is a 1992 platform game developed and published by Virgin Interactive. It was initially released for the Nintendo Entertainment System in February 1992 in North America, and by Ocean Software in May 1993 in Europe. As a licensed product for the McDonald's fast food franchise, the game occasionally features the various logos and characters from McDonald's restaurant signage and television advertisements, for the purposes of plot advancement and power-ups. It stars two children who venture into the fantasy world of McDonaldland in order to return Ronald McDonald's magical bag, which has been stolen by the Hamburglar.

M.C. Kids was also released for the Commodore 64, Amiga, Atari ST, and MS-DOS, though all of these home computer versions were only sold in Europe.[1] Additionally, a different version of the game was released for the Game Boy, as McDonaldland. This version was released outside of Europe as Spot: The Cool Adventure, themed upon the Cool Spot franchise. Virgin Interactive would release another game based on the McDonald's franchise for the Sega Mega Drive/Genesis called Global Gladiators that is more of a traditional side-scrolling action-adventure game.
overview_zh:
《M.C. Kids》是 1992 年由 Virgin Interactive 開發與發行的平台遊戲，1992 年 2 月於北美 NES 上首次推出，1993 年 5 月由 Ocean Software 在歐洲發行。作為麥當勞速食連鎖的授權產品，本作為了推進劇情與道具強化用途，運用了各種來自麥當勞餐廳招牌與電視廣告的標誌與角色。故事敘述兩名孩童進入麥當勞樂園的奇幻世界，要把麥當勞叔叔被漢堡神偷竊走的魔法袋取回。

《M.C. Kids》也曾推出 Commodore 64、Amiga、Atari ST 與 MS-DOS 版本，但這些家用電腦版僅在歐洲銷售。此外，Game Boy 上推出了不同版本，名為《McDonaldland》。歐洲以外地區則以《Spot: The Cool Adventure》之名發行，主題改為 Cool Spot 系列。Virgin Interactive 後來又為 Sega Mega Drive/Genesis 推出另一款麥當勞授權作《Global Gladiators》，玩法較偏傳統橫向捲軸動作冒險。

overview_en:
Mega Man: Dr. Wily's Revenge is a 1991 Game Boy video game developed by Minakuchi Engineering and released by Capcom USA in the USA on December 6, 1991.

They're alive, and ripping up the town! Insane industrial wizard Dr. Wily has revived 8 of his robot masters in another try at taking over the world. Dr. Wily's really raving this time. As you blaze and blast your way closer, he runs further into even nastier mazes, and hides behind terrifying tons of mechanized maniacs, including the all-new Mega Man Hunter! Yikes, Mega Man. This one's a close shave!
overview_zh:
《Mega Man: Dr. Wily's Revenge》是一款 1991 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Minakuchi Engineering 開發，Capcom USA 於 1991 年 12 月 6 日在美國發行。

他們活過來了，把城市搞得天翻地覆！瘋狂工業天才 Wily 博士再次喚醒了 8 名機器人首領，企圖征服世界。Wily 這次真的失控了。當你一路轟炸前進時，他則竄逃進更險惡的迷宮，躲在成堆恐怖的機械瘋子之後，包括全新的 Mega Man Hunter！哎呀，洛克人，這次真是險象環生！

overview_en:
The demented Dr. Wily is at it again! This time he's stolen the experimental Time Skimmer and skipped into the future. But Wait! Four of his strongest cyborgs have been left behind to squash the mighty Mega Man!

Time is of the essence as Mega Man and Rush blast past waves of maniacal metal monsters on the way to underground lair of Dr. Wily. Once there they must face Quint, the ferocious fiend from the future!
overview_zh:
瘋狂的 Wily 博士又出手了！這次他偷走了實驗中的時光穿梭機，逃進了未來。但等等！他留下了四名最強的改造人想消滅強大的洛克人！

時間就是一切，洛克人與 Rush 一路擊破成群結隊的瘋狂金屬怪物，前往 Wily 博士的地下基地。抵達後還要面對來自未來的兇猛敵人 Quint！

overview_en:
Mega Man III is a 1992 Game Boy video game developed by Minakuchi Engineering and released by Capcom USA in the USA on December 18, 1992.

Battle at the Center of the Earth!

That sinister scientist Dr. Wily is at it again! Now, he and his renegade robots have purloined an off-shore oil rig and are drilling through the Earth's crust. It's up to Mega Man to shut down their scheme before Wily can harness the molten power of the Earth's core to fuel his latest metallic monstrosity!

Join Rush, Flip-Top and Mega Man as they battle wave after wave of mechanical maniacs as they search through Wily's fiendish fortress. Battle Snake Man, Spark Man, and six other robot masters as you near Wily's lair. Sneak inside and summon the power of the Mega Buster as you face the awesome power of Wily's ultimate creation!
overview_zh:
《Mega Man III》是一款 1992 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Minakuchi Engineering 開發，Capcom USA 於 1992 年 12 月 18 日在美國發行。

地心大決戰！

邪惡科學家 Wily 博士又來了！如今他和叛變的機器人佔據了一座海上鑽油平台，正鑽穿地殼。洛克人必須在 Wily 利用地心熔岩之力為新型金屬怪物供能之前阻止他！

與 Rush、Flip-Top 一同對抗一波波機械瘋子，搜索 Wily 的險惡要塞。在接近 Wily 巢穴的過程中擊敗 Snake Man、Spark Man 等八位機器人首領，潛入內部召喚 Mega Buster 的力量，迎戰 Wily 最強造物的驚人實力！

overview_en:
Mega Man IV is a 1993 Game Boy video game developed by Minakuchi Engineering and released by Capcom USA in the USA on December 12, 1993.

A huge celebration at the World Robot Expo is shattered by the sight of a flying saucer streaking across the sky. But instead of holding little green men, this saucer holds one very mad scientist! Armed with a mind control machine that transmits a sinister signal. Dr. Wily is ready to mesmerize all the robots of the city into an army of mindless metallic mercenaries!

Battling the effects of Wily's mind control machine, Mega Man and his robotic reenforcements, Rush and Beat must blast to molten metal an army of foes led by eight of Wily's greatest robot masters! And should Mega Man survive, Dr. Wily is waiting to unleash the heavy artillery with his latest creation, the awesome Wily Tank!
overview_zh:
《Mega Man IV》是一款 1993 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Minakuchi Engineering 開發，Capcom USA 於 1993 年 12 月 12 日在美國發行。

世界機器人博覽會的盛大慶典，被一艘劃過天空的飛碟打斷。但飛碟裡載的不是小綠人，而是一位非常瘋狂的科學家！Wily 博士帶著一台會發出邪惡訊號的心智控制機，準備把全市的機器人都洗腦成一支沒有思想的金屬傭兵大軍！

洛克人必須抵抗心智控制機的影響，與機械夥伴 Rush 和 Beat 並肩作戰，將 Wily 八位最強機器人首領率領的敵軍徹底摧毀！若洛克人能存活下來，Wily 博士還會出動他的最新傑作——驚人的 Wily Tank 重砲！

overview_en:
Mega Man V is a 1994 Game Boy video game developed by Minakuchi Engineering and released by Capcom USA in the USA on September 10, 1994.

They came from outer space!

From the cosmic reaches of outer space, comes mankind's greatest threat. Hordes of alien robots have swarmed down from the heavens all the Earth's weapons are powerless to stop their ravenous rampage. Now the only hope to stop these alien invaders lies with one man - Mega Man!

Blast off for new worlds of excitement as Mega Man launches an all-out attack on the alien armada! Rocket into battle and dodge the deadly rings of SATURN and face the molten menace of MERCURY! Search the galaxy for alien gems and construct the ultimate "Mega Arm" weapon and blast these invaders all the way back to Alpha Centauri!
overview_zh:
《Mega Man V》是一款 1994 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Minakuchi Engineering 開發，Capcom USA 於 1994 年 9 月 10 日在美國發行。

它們從外太空來了！

來自浩瀚外太空的，是人類最大的威脅。成群的外星機器人從天而降，地球所有武器都無法阻止牠們的猛烈肆虐。如今阻止這些外星侵略者的唯一希望，落在一人身上——洛克人！

洛克人對外星艦隊發動全面攻擊，飛向新世界的刺激戰場！火箭升空投入戰鬥，閃避土星的致命光環，迎戰水星的熔岩威脅！搜索整個銀河系蒐集外星寶石，打造終極「Mega Arm」武器，把入侵者一路打回半人馬座 α 星！

overview_en: When a wicked witch decides to rule the world with the power of her magic jewels, her terrifying plot leads her to kidnap elves, princesses, and even fairies. You're the brave warrior who's decided to save all the captured innocents, but the witch gets wind of your plan and turns you to stone. Now, your efforts turn to breaking the spell, which is going to require cracking the ancient puzzle of Megalit. If the princesses and magical beings stand any chance of making it out of the witch's clutches, you'd better solve the code quickly.
overview_zh: 當邪惡女巫決定用她的魔法寶石統治世界時，她可怕的計畫使她擄走了精靈、公主，甚至仙女。你是決心拯救所有被擄走無辜者的勇敢戰士，但女巫聽聞你的計畫並把你變成了石頭。如今你的目標轉為破解咒語，這得解開古老的 Megalit 謎題。若公主與魔法生物還想脫離女巫的魔掌，你最好快點解開密碼。
publisher:
Asmik Ace Entertainment JP
Takara NA/EU

title_en: MEGAMI TENSEI GAIDEN - LAST BIBLE II
no_intro_name: Megami Tensei Gaiden - Last Bible II (Japan)

title_en: MEITANTEI CONAN - CHIKA YUUENCHI SATSUJIN JIKEN
no_intro_name: Meitantei Conan - Chika Yuuenchi Satsujin Jiken (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

title_en: MEITANTEI CONAN - GIWAKU NO GOUKA RESSHA
no_intro_name: Meitantei Conan - Giwaku no Gouka Ressha (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: Over one hundred years ago during the mighty Shogun era, the Lord of Darkness sent his fearsome army to terrorize the Japanese countryside. Using the Dark Lord's powerful magic, his evil minions spread famine, plague, and pestilence wherever they went, leaving the peaceful population hopelessly oppressed. All who challenged the wicked Lord were mercilessly slain as a warning to all those who had any further thoughts of rebellion. Then one day while meditating, the great Shogun, Tokugawa, had a divine vision where he saw a small group of mighty warriors rise up to defeat the evil Lord. He immediately set out to recruit the five bravest and most skillful fighters in the land. After months of searching he was finally ready to put his dream into action. It was time to unleash the Mercenary Force.
overview_zh: 一百多年前的幕府盛世，黑暗領主派出他可怕的軍隊恐嚇日本鄉間。借助暗黑領主的強大法力，邪惡爪牙所到之處便散播饑荒、瘟疫與蟲害，使和平的百姓深受壓迫，陷入絕望。任何挑戰邪惡領主的人都會被殘酷殺害，作為對其他想反抗者的警告。某天，偉大將軍德川在冥想時得到神諭，看見一小群英勇戰士奮起擊敗邪惡領主。他立刻著手招募全國最勇敢、最熟練的五位戰士。歷時數月搜尋後，他終於準備將夢想化為行動。是時候釋放 Mercenary Force 了。

overview_en:
AT A TIME WHEN MACHINES ARE WORTH MORE THAN MAN

One man is worth more to humanity than any machine ever was. The evil Baron Harkan has long sought to dominate the world and now, with the political power he has gained through shrewd investments in the Metal Master Tournaments and the discovery of a Super Robot, his plans seem unstoppable. Only you, a novice Metal Master, sponsored by the League for Freedom can defeat Harkan's robot army and find the pieces to the Super Robot before he does. Or can you?
overview_zh:
在機器比人更有價值的時代

有一個人對人類的價值勝過任何機器。邪惡的 Harkan 男爵長久以來企圖支配世界，如今他憑藉精明投資 Metal Master 錦標賽所獲得的政治力量，以及一具超級機器人的發現，計畫看似已無法阻擋。只有你——由自由聯盟贊助的新手 Metal Master，能在 Harkan 之前打敗他的機器人軍團，找到組成超級機器人的零件。但你做得到嗎？

title_zh: 銀河戰士II 薩姆斯的回歸
overview_en:
Metroid II: Return of Samus is a 1991 Game Boy video game developed by Nintendo R&D1 and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on November 5, 1991.

Space Hunter Samus Aran returns to battle a planet crawling with evil creatures bent on universal domination in this bigger than ever sequel to the NES classic, Metroid.

Take control! Guide Samus through cavernous corridors, ancient ruins and alien traps. On the mysterious planet of the Metroid, you'll find artifacts of a lost civilization that grant amazing powers. Cut through creatures in a buzz-saw blur! Roll through hidden tunnels and climb sheer walls!

A battery back-up allows you to save your progress as you fight to the heart of the planet and search for the merciless Metroid leaders. If you are a cunning explorer, you'll earn the best of several super endings.

Enter this exciting Metroid sequel and experience the thrills of Game boy like never before!
overview_zh:
《Metroid II: Return of Samus》是一款 1991 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由任天堂 R&D1 開發，Nintendo of America 於 1991 年 11 月 5 日在美國發行。

太空獵人 Samus Aran 重返戰場，前往一顆爬滿邪惡生物、企圖支配宇宙的星球，本作是 NES 經典《Metroid》的更大規模續作。

操控 Samus 穿越巨大洞穴走廊、古老遺跡與外星陷阱。在這顆 Metroid 神秘星球上，你會發現失落文明的遺物，賦予驚人能力。以圓鋸般的旋風斬切敵人！穿越隱藏通道、攀爬陡峭高牆！

附電池備份功能，讓你在通往星球核心、追擊無情 Metroid 首領的旅程中保存進度。若你是個機智的探險者，就能解鎖數個超級結局中最棒的那一個。

進入這部令人興奮的 Metroid 續作，體驗前所未有的 Game Boy 刺激！

overview_en:
Mickey Mouse II (released as Mickey Mouse in Europe) is a 1991 action/puzzle video game released by Kemco for the Nintendo Game Boy in Japan and Europe. It is the sequel to Mickey Mouse, and the second game in Kemco's series of video games starring Mickey Mouse.

Due to Capcom holding the rights to make Disney video games on Nintendo systems in the US at the time, when the game was to be released in the US, Kemco replaced the Disney characters in the game with Looney Tunes characters and renamed it The Bugs Bunny Crazy Castle 2.

In 1995, PAL regions got the reskin of this game with Hugo characters (with Horned king being replaced by a viking that looks like a pedobear in the shadow) for unknown reasons, probably becuase Kemco of Europe losing rights to disney characters by the time
overview_zh:
《Mickey Mouse II》（歐洲版稱為 Mickey Mouse）是 1991 年由 Kemco 為任天堂 Game Boy 在日本與歐洲推出的動作/益智遊戲，是《Mickey Mouse》的續作，也是 Kemco 米老鼠系列的第二部作品。

當時 Capcom 持有任天堂平台迪士尼遊戲的美國發行權，因此本作要在美國推出時，Kemco 將遊戲中的迪士尼角色換成樂一通角色，並改名為《The Bugs Bunny Crazy Castle 2》。

1995 年，PAL 地區則因不明原因（可能是 Kemco 歐洲分公司當時失去迪士尼授權）推出了將角色換成 Hugo 系列的版本（Horned King 被換成一隻看起來像 pedobear 剪影的維京人）。

title_en: MICKEY MOUSE IV - MAHOU NO LABYRINTH
no_intro_name: Mickey Mouse IV - Mahou no Labyrinth (Japan)
Mickey Mouse - Magic Wands! (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en:
A great adventure with Magic Wands!
Hurry and rescue your friends from the wicked witch's castle!

Mickey Mouse and his friends have become lost while playing near the edge of the forest. Mickey's friends have been trapped in Yashja the wicked witch's castle. Hurry and rescue your friends, Mickey! Take the Magic Wands and begin your great adventure.
overview_zh:
魔杖大冒險！
快從邪惡女巫的城堡中救出朋友！

米老鼠和朋友們在森林邊緣玩耍時迷了路。米奇的朋友被困在邪惡女巫 Yashja 的城堡中。趕快去救他們吧，米奇！拿起魔杖，展開你的大冒險。

overview_en:
Mickey Goes After a Missing Present and the Culprit Who Swiped It!

Who's got Minnie's missing present? Big Bad Pete is the culprit! He swiped Minnie's present and spoiled the surprise. Now Mickey's after him, and the chase leads through some very dangerous places. Mickey meets barking bulldogs, slippery weasels, hairy tarantulas, and even worse critters. Tricks, traps, and collapsing escape routes make Mickey scurry. He scampers through his Hometown, into the Woods and up the Mountain. He chases Pete through a Factory and up to the Rooftops for a final showdown. Can you help Mickey stop Pete and get the missing present back? Better hurry!

-Mickey throws boxes at the bad guys while grabbing Stars and Prizes.

-A speedboat, jalopy, and bouquet of balloons add high fun to Mickey's chase.
overview_zh:
米奇追緝失竊的禮物與下手的元兇！

誰拿走了米妮失竊的禮物？元兇正是大壞蛋皮特！他偷走了米妮的禮物，搞砸了驚喜。如今米奇緊追在後，沿途穿越許多危險之地。米奇遇上狂吠的鬥牛犬、滑溜的黃鼠狼、毛茸茸的毒蜘蛛，還有更糟的生物。陷阱、機關與崩塌的逃生路線讓米奇得拚命疾奔。他穿越家鄉、進入森林、爬上高山，並追著皮特進入工廠，登上屋頂展開最終決戰。你能幫米奇阻止皮特、奪回失竊的禮物嗎？快點動手吧！

-米奇向壞人扔箱子，同時撿取星星與獎品。

-快艇、老爺車與一束氣球為米奇的追逐增添歡樂。

overview_en:
Five Magical Puzzles
Full Of Family Fun!

"The sky is rumbling!
The sky is rumbling! What ever can it be?" cry the citizens of Beanwick.

"Is it a storm? Is it a monster? Is it the end of the Kingdom?" I don't know, but I'll find out, says Mickey, "if I have to search every room in the Castle of Beanwick to solve the mystery!"

In Mickey's Ultimate Challenge, volunteer as Mickey or Minnie to help the Kingdom of Beanwick solve the mystery of the rumblings in the sky. But, first you must prove worthy of the challenge--by thinking your way through a series of fiendishly clever puzzles, players from 4 to 104 can take full advantage of the game's interactive capabilities to put their critical thinking skills to the ultimate test. Five incredible locations!

Five brain-teasing challenges starring many of your favorite Disney characters. Solve them all for a chance to see what's really up, up there!

Is this all a dream? Play Mickey's Ultimate Challenge and decide for yourself!
overview_zh:
五道魔法謎題
適合全家同樂！

「天空在隆隆作響！
天空在隆隆作響！到底是怎麼回事？」豆莖鎮的居民驚呼。

「是暴風雨嗎？是怪物嗎？還是王國的末日？」我不知道，但我會查清楚，米奇說：「就算我得搜遍豆莖城堡的每個房間，也要解開這個謎團！」

在《Mickey's Ultimate Challenge》中，自願扮演米奇或米妮，幫豆莖王國解開天空隆隆聲之謎。但首先你必須證明自己夠格——透過一連串巧妙的謎題思考。從 4 歲到 104 歲的玩家都能充分利用本作的互動設計，把批判思考能力推向極限。五個精彩場景！

五道燒腦挑戰，眾多你最愛的迪士尼角色登場。全部解開，就有機會看清上方究竟發生了什麼！

這一切是夢嗎？玩玩《Mickey's Ultimate Challenge》，你自己評斷！

overview_en: Hit the gas and race on 16 outrageous, high-speed tracks in 8 different worlds. It's totally unique racing action in an oversized world where anything (and everything!) can happen.
overview_zh: 踩下油門，在 8 個世界、共 16 條離譜的高速賽道上飆車。在這個放大版的世界中，任何事（與所有事！）都可能發生，是獨一無二的競速體驗。

overview_en:
The second game of the Micro Machines series. Like in its predecessor, you behind the steering wheel of an extremely small car. You race around on interesting places, like a table, a treehouse and many more. The control of the cars is sometimes quite difficult, especially if you don't know the tracks (the top-down view is not very clear). The CD-ROM version additionally features CD-Audio music and a track editor.

Micro Machines 2: Turbo Tournament is a Driving game, developed by Codemasters and published by Ocean, which was released in Europe in 1996.
overview_zh:
Micro Machines 系列的第二作。如同前作，玩家操控的是極小的小車，在桌上、樹屋等各種有趣場景中競速。車輛操控有時相當困難，尤其是在不熟悉賽道時（俯視畫面不太清楚）。CD-ROM 版額外收錄 CD 音軌音樂與賽道編輯器。

《Micro Machines 2: Turbo Tournament》是一款競速遊戲，由 Codemasters 開發、Ocean 發行，1996 年於歐洲推出。

no_intro_name: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en: It's Morphin Time! Five ordinary teens morph into the Power Rangers to foil the plans of the Evil Empress Rita Repulsa and save planet Earth. Choose your favorite Power Ranger color - Red, Yellow, Blue, Pink or Black! Battle huge, fierce and spectacular enemies! Even the Green Ranger and the fearsome Dragonzord! Sharpen your "Zord Play" in eight awesome difficulty levels!
overview_zh: 變身時刻到了！五位平凡少年變身為金剛戰士，挫敗邪惡女皇 Rita Repulsa 的計畫，拯救地球。挑選你最愛的金剛戰士顏色——紅、黃、藍、粉、黑！迎戰巨大、兇猛、壯觀的敵人！甚至包含綠色戰士與可怕的恐龍戰艦！在八個高難度等級中磨練你的「戰艦操控」！

title_en: MIGHTY MORPHIN POWER RANGERS - THE MOVIE
no_intro_name: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers - The Movie (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en: The Power Rangers stripped of their Mighty Morphin Powers and forced to flee Earth? Rita Repulsa and Lord Zedd overwhelmed by an evil far greater than their combined nastiness? The Command Center totally obliterated and Zordon on the brink of death The fate of the world in the slimey hands of Ivan Ooze, the most sinister monster the universe has ever seen? Could this be a bad dream? Don't count on it. It all happens in the Morphinominal Mighty Morphin Power Rangers the Movie! And now, you can battle Ivan Ooze, the vilest villain in Nintendo history, and a whole host of his mean and ugly minions in this hyperaction, seven level, no-hold-barred brawl featuring the eye-popping graphics and ear-pounding sounds of the Super NES. So, morph into action, and lead the Power Rangers on to their greatest victory.
overview_zh: 金剛戰士被剝奪變身能力，被迫逃離地球？Rita Repulsa 與 Lord Zedd 被一個比他們合力更可怕的邪惡擊垮？指揮中心被徹底摧毀，Zordon 命在旦夕？世界命運落入有史以來最邪惡怪物 Ivan Ooze 的黏滑手中？這該不會是惡夢吧？別期待。這一切都發生在精彩萬分的《Mighty Morphin Power Rangers the Movie》中！如今你可以在這場七關卡、火力全開的混戰中對抗任天堂史上最邪惡的反派 Ivan Ooze 與他一票兇惡醜陋的爪牙，享受 Super NES 的奪目畫面與震撼音效。變身行動，帶領金剛戰士贏得史上最偉大的勝利吧！

overview_en: Guide Milon through the four levels of Garland Castle in his quest to reach the top floor and vanquish the big boss! The journey is a difficult one though, because the castle is locked up tight and Milon doesn't have the keys. You will have to use your bubble attacks to fend off the castle baddies while busting up every block in sight trying to find all of the hidden treasure and other secrets throughout the game. Unlike most platformers, Milon's Secret Castle is less about defeating all of the enemies in an area, and more about scouring every bit of each room to find the secrets that lie within Garland Castle! Milo can uncover practically anything in the game. This includes: items, power-ups, money, shields, keys, level exits, even shops! The only way to get to each level boss is to find the right secret items!
overview_zh: 引導 Milon 穿越 Garland 城堡的四個樓層，登上頂樓擊敗大魔王！但旅途並不輕鬆，因為城堡上鎖嚴實，Milon 沒有鑰匙。你必須用泡泡攻擊抵擋城堡敵人，同時敲爆視野中的所有方塊，找出隱藏的所有寶藏與秘密。與多數平台遊戲不同，《Milon's Secret Castle》重點不在擊敗區域內所有敵人，而是仔細搜索每個房間每個角落，找出 Garland 城堡內潛藏的秘密！Milo 幾乎能挖出遊戲中所有東西，包括：道具、強化、金錢、護盾、鑰匙、關卡出口，甚至商店！抵達各關 BOSS 的唯一辦法，就是找到正確的秘密道具！

overview_en: Sequel to Mini 4 Boy and published by J-Wing.
overview_zh: 《Mini 4 Boy》的續作，由 J-Wing 發行。

overview_zh: 《Mini-Putt》是一款運動遊戲，由 A-Wave 發行，1991 年於日本推出。

no_intro_name: Miracle Adventure of Esparks - Ushinawareta Seiseki Perivron (Japan)

overview_en: Missile Command is an Action game, developed by The Code Monkeys and published by Accolade, which was released in 1992.
overview_zh: 《Missile Command》是一款動作遊戲，由 The Code Monkeys 開發、Accolade 發行，1992 年推出。

title_en: MOGU MOGU GOMBO - HARUKANARU CHOU RYOURI DENSETSU
no_intro_name: Mogu Mogu Gombo - Harukanaru Chou Ryouri Densetsu (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en:
Mole Mania is a 1997 Game Boy video game developed by Nintendo EAD and Pax Softnica and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on February 1, 1997.

Join Muddy Mole in a race to destroy enemies and obstacles in an attempt to defeat the evil farmer, Jinbei. Blast strategic exits using black balls and tunnel your way to the next action-packed level. Help Muddy solve the incredible puzzles of Jinbei Land and reunite him with his beloved mole family. You'll dig the fast pace and challenging fun of Mole Mania!
overview_zh:
《Mole Mania》是一款 1997 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由任天堂 EAD 與 Pax Softnica 開發，Nintendo of America 於 1997 年 2 月 1 日在美國發行。

與鼴鼠 Muddy 一同奔走，破壞敵人與障礙，擊敗邪惡農夫 Jinbei。利用黑球炸出戰略出口，挖隧道前往下一個刺激關卡。協助 Muddy 解開 Jinbei Land 的精彩謎題，與心愛的鼴鼠家族團聚。你會愛上《Mole Mania》緊湊節奏與挑戰樂趣！

overview_en: Momotaro Thunderbolt 2 is an Action game, published by Hudson, which was released in Japan in 1994.
overview_zh: 《桃太郎電擊 2》是一款動作遊戲，由 Hudson 發行，1994 年於日本推出。

title_en: MOMOTAROU DENTETSU JR. - ZENKOKU RAMEN MEGURI NO MAKI
no_intro_name: Momotarou Dentetsu jr. - Zenkoku Ramen Meguri no Maki (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)
Monde Perdu, Le - Jurassic Park (France) (En) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: Money Idol Exchanger is a Puzzle game, developed by C-Lab and published by Athena, which was released in Japan in 1997.
overview_zh: 《Money Idol Exchanger》是一款益智遊戲，由 C-Lab 開發、Athena 發行，1997 年於日本推出。

overview_en: Rich Uncle Pennybags is your animated Master of Ceremonies as Depression-era Atlantic City comes to life - from the rolling lawns of Park Place to the lowly backyards of Baltic Avenue! Perform all the wheeling and dealing feats that have made the MONOPOLY game the most popular in the world.
overview_zh: Pennybags 大叔是你的動畫式主持人，帶你走進大蕭條時代躍然紙上的大西洋城——從 Park Place 翠綠草坪到 Baltic Avenue 簡陋後院！施展讓 MONOPOLY 成為全球最受歡迎遊戲的所有交易與斡旋本領。
publisher:
Tomy JP
Parker Brothers NA
Konami EU

overview_en: Monster Max is an Action game, developed by Rare Ltd. and published by Titus Software, which was released in Europe in 1994.
overview_zh: 《Monster Max》是一款動作遊戲，由 Rare Ltd. 開發、Titus Software 發行，1994 年於歐洲推出。

overview_en: Monster * Race is a Racing game, published by Koei, which was released in Japan in 1998.
overview_zh: 《Monster * Race》是一款競速遊戲，由 Koei 發行，1998 年於日本推出。

overview_en: Monster Truck is a Racing game, developed by Another and published by Varie, which was released in Japan in 1990.
overview_zh: 《Monster Truck》是一款競速遊戲，由 Another 開發、Varie 發行，1990 年於日本推出。

overview_en: Monster Truck Wars is a Driving game, developed by Gremlin Graphics and published by Acclaim, which was released in 1994.
overview_zh: 《Monster Truck Wars》是一款競速遊戲，由 Gremlin Graphics 開發、Acclaim 發行，1994 年推出。

overview_en: Max Montezuma is a soldier descended from an ancient Aztec emperor. Max stumbles across a deserted, uncharted island, and accidentally crashes his plane on it. Prior to Max's arrival, the island is undiscovered. Max only has a flashlight, canteen, and an entire lost Aztec civilization before him. He must restore the desecrated tomb of his ancestors, discover the link between the ancient Aztecs and a race of saucer-flying aliens, and more, in his adventure.
overview_zh: Max Montezuma 是一名出身古阿茲特克皇帝後裔的士兵。他誤打誤撞發現一座荒蕪、未被探索的島嶼，並意外將飛機墜毀於此。在 Max 抵達前，這座島從未被發現。Max 只有手電筒、水壺，以及眼前一整片失落的阿茲特克文明。他必須修復被褻瀆的祖先陵墓、揭開古阿茲特克人與飛碟外星種族間的關聯，並完成這場冒險中的更多任務。

overview_en:
PREPARE YOURSELF...

The #1 arcade hit is here: from Sub-Zero, Rayden and your favorite Kombat Warriors to the grueling endurance and intense mirror matches! Execute bone-shattering combos and ferocious finishing moves! Defeat the half-human dragon Goro, and destroy the shape-changing Shang Tsung to become the Supreme Mortal Kombat Warrior!
overview_zh:
做好準備……

大型電玩第一名熱門大作登場：從 Sub-Zero、Rayden 到你最愛的格鬥戰士，再到艱鉅的耐力戰與激烈的鏡像對戰！施展粉碎骨頭的連段與兇狠的終結技！擊敗半人半龍的 Goro，摧毀變身術士 Shang Tsung，成為至高無上的 Mortal Kombat 戰士！

overview_en: Get ready for the fight of your life... Eight selectable fighters - including 6 new characters and 1 fighter hidden within the game! Five direct-from-the-arcade backgrounds to keep you jumping! Secret portals that allow you to smash up and down into different backgrounds for the ultimate bi-level battlefield! New fatalities and babalities! Intense, fully-digitized fighters for the most realistic action you've ever encountered!
overview_zh: 迎接你人生中最激烈的一戰……可選擇 8 名鬥士，包括 6 名新角色與 1 名隱藏鬥士！五個直接從大型電玩搬來的場景，讓你動感十足！秘密傳送門讓你撞穿天花板與地板，進出不同場景，打造終極雙層戰場！全新 Fatality 與 Babality！集大成、全數位化的鬥士，提供前所未見的真實動作！

overview_en: Nothing, NOTHING can prepare you! The fierce kombatants of the #1 arcade smash gather for Mortal Kombat II, a battle to defeat the shape-shifting demon Shang Tsung and his ruthless master, Shao Kahn. Brutal special moves, Babalities, hidden surprises, outrageous finishing moves -- ALL yours to kommand. Let the Kombat Kontinue...
overview_zh: 沒有任何事物能讓你做好準備！第一名大型電玩熱門作中的兇猛鬥士齊聚 Mortal Kombat II，要擊敗變身惡魔 Shang Tsung 與他殘忍的主人 Shao Kahn。殘暴特殊招式、Babality、隱藏驚喜、誇張終結技——全在你掌控之中。讓格鬥繼續……

overview_en:
Mortal Kombat I
PREPARE YOURSELF...

The #1 arcade hit is here: from Sub-Zero, Rayden and your favorite Kombat Warriors to the grueling endurance and intense mirror matches! Execute bone-shattering combos and ferocious finishing moves! Defeat the half-human dragon Goro, and destroy the shape-changing Shang Tsung to become the Supreme Mortal Kombat Warrior!

Mortal Kombat II
Nothing, NOTHING can prepare you! The fierce kombatants of the #1 arcade smash gather for Mortal Kombat II, a battle to defeat the shape-shifting demon Shang Tsung and his ruthless master, Shao Kahn. Brutal special moves, Babalities, hidden surprises, outrageous finishing moves -- ALL yours to kommand. Let the Kombat Kontinue...
overview_zh:
Mortal Kombat I
做好準備……

大型電玩第一名熱門大作登場：從 Sub-Zero、Rayden 到你最愛的格鬥戰士，再到艱鉅的耐力戰與激烈的鏡像對戰！施展粉碎骨頭的連段與兇狠的終結技！擊敗半人半龍的 Goro，摧毀變身術士 Shang Tsung，成為至高無上的 Mortal Kombat 戰士！

Mortal Kombat II
沒有任何事物能讓你做好準備！第一名大型電玩熱門作中的兇猛鬥士齊聚 Mortal Kombat II，要擊敗變身惡魔 Shang Tsung 與他殘忍的主人 Shao Kahn。殘暴特殊招式、Babality、隱藏驚喜、誇張終結技——全在你掌控之中。讓格鬥繼續……

overview_en: This is pure insanity. And to take the checkered flag, you'll need sheer intensity to throttle past hundreds of obstacles, including the Head Spinning Loop and the Sky Riding Ramp. You'll also need precision skills to refuel with Nitro Turbo Boosts that'll power you to victory! There are 8 championship tracks and 3 ultra-challenging levels (Rookie, World Class and Daredevil) to choose from. You can even race against the clock or computer. Or attach your Video Link and spit some mud in the face of a friend. So get down and dirty in an off-road rad race where speed and courage are the difference between popping wheelies and biting the dust.
overview_zh: 這簡直瘋狂至極。要拿下方格旗，你得用全力衝過數百種障礙物，包括「頭旋迴圈」與「天空衝坡」。你也得具備精準操作，才能利用 Nitro Turbo Boost 補充燃料，加速衝向勝利！共有 8 條冠軍賽道與 3 種高難度等級（新手、世界級、特技狂）可選。也可挑戰計時或對戰電腦，或接上 Video Link，把泥漿濺向朋友的臉。在這場越野狂飆中，盡情狂奔——速度與膽量決定你是翹孤輪還是吃灰塵。
publisher:
Konami JP
Ultra Games NA
Palcom Software EU

overview_en: Mouse Trap Hotel is an Action game, developed by Imagineering Inc and published by Electro Brain, which was released in 1992.
overview_zh: 《Mouse Trap Hotel》是一款動作遊戲，由 Imagineering Inc 開發、Electro Brain 發行，1992 年推出。

overview_en: In this high skill action adventure game, Mr. Chin is in hot pusuit of his favorite treat. He has come all the way from China to eat as many luscious gourmet peaches as he can before anyone else discovers how to eat this unique treat. As Mr. Chin, you must pursue the mysterious Momos and zap them into peaches with your demoe beam. So hurry up and run, jump, zap and eat as many peaches as you can before they make dinner out of you!
overview_zh: 在這款高技巧動作冒險遊戲中，Mr. Chin 正熱切追逐他最愛的點心。他不遠千里從中國而來，要在別人發現如何品嘗這獨特美味之前，盡情享用美味的水蜜桃。扮演 Mr. Chin，你必須追擊神秘的 Momos，用你的 demoe 光束把牠們變成水蜜桃。趕快跑、跳、發射、進食，在牠們把你當晚餐之前盡可能多吃水蜜桃！

overview_en: The object of Mr. Do! is to score as many points as possible by digging tunnels through the ground and collecting cherries. The title character, Mr. Do (a circus clown), is constantly chased by red monsters resembling small dinosaurs, and the player loses a life if Mr. Do is caught by one. The game is over when the last life is lost.
overview_zh: 《Mr. Do!》的目標是盡可能取得高分，方法是挖掘地底隧道並蒐集櫻桃。主角 Mr. Do（一位馬戲團小丑）會不斷被外型像小恐龍的紅色怪物追殺，被抓到就會少一條命。所有命用完即遊戲結束。

title_en: MR. GO NO BAKEN TEKICHUU JUTSU
no_intro_name: Mr. Go no Baken Tekichuu Jutsu (Japan)

overview_en: MR. NUTZ - Only he can prevent a new and permanent ice age. To help him on his way he's got a lotta Nutz, a lotta gutz, and one enormous tail!
overview_zh: MR. NUTZ——只有他能阻止全新且永久的冰河時期。一路上幫助他的是滿滿的堅果、過人的膽量，以及一條超巨大的尾巴！

overview_en: Ms. Pac-Man is here to drive you totally wild and crazy with more fun than you've ever imagined! Four feisty ghosts are chasing MS. PAC-MAN. Use your skill and strategy to rack up points while outrunning the gobbling ghosts. Grab an energy pill, and score even more points. Now gobble up all those fearless ghosts!
overview_zh: Ms. Pac-Man 來啦，要讓你瘋狂享受前所未有的樂趣！四隻活潑的鬼魂正追趕著 MS. PAC-MAN。運用技巧與策略，一邊躲開貪吃鬼魂、一邊衝高分數。吃下能量豆，分數更可觀，再把這群肆無忌憚的鬼魂全部吞掉！

overview_en: Muhammad Ali: Heavyweight Boxing is a Sports game, developed by Gremlin Graphics and published by Virgin Interactive, which was released in 1993.
overview_zh: 《Muhammad Ali: Heavyweight Boxing》是一款運動遊戲，由 Gremlin Graphics 開發、Virgin Interactive 發行，1993 年推出。

overview_en: Mysterium is a Role-Playing game, developed by Maxis and published by Asmik Corporation of America, which was released in 1991.
overview_zh: 《Mysterium》是一款角色扮演遊戲，由 Maxis 開發、Asmik Corporation of America 發行，1991 年推出。
publisher:
Asmik Corporation of America NA
VAP

overview_en: In the Empire of Glaive, a gladiator-slave is forced to fight evil monsters controlled by the Dark Lord. But when his best friend is mortally wounded, he learns of a secret pendant which will give him great power. As the hero, you must battle your way out of the Dark Knight's castle and search through a dangerous world for the girl who has the pendant. But you discover she has been captured by the Dark Knight's men. To free her, you must find the legendary sword and fight off the Dark Knight's beasts and overlords through deserts, snowfields, lakes, forests, and caves. Are you ready for the adventure of your life?
overview_zh: 在 Glaive 帝國中，一名鬥士奴隸被迫對抗黑暗領主操控的邪惡怪物。但當他最好的朋友身受重傷瀕死時，他得知一條神秘墜飾能賦予他強大力量。身為英雄的你，必須從黑暗騎士的城堡中殺出一條血路，並在險惡的世界中尋找擁有那條墜飾的少女。卻發現她已被黑暗騎士的部下擄走。要救她，你必須找到傳說之劍，穿越沙漠、雪原、湖泊、森林與洞窟，擊退黑暗騎士的怪獸與爪牙。準備好展開人生最大的冒險了嗎？

overview_en: A giant UFO has appeared over Oedo Castle, and the Mystical Ninja is off to save the world again! Control Goemon and his giant robot, Impact, Ebisimaru, a truly twisted ninja, Yae, the part-time militant mermaid, and Sasuke, a mechanical warrior. This brave band must travel from town to town, collecting information and purchasing helpful items in their quest to defeat the dreaded Peach Mountain Shoguns.
overview_zh: 一艘巨大幽浮出現在大江戶城上空，神秘忍者再次出馬拯救世界！操控 Goemon 與他的巨大機器人 Impact、扭曲的忍者 Ebisimaru、兼職激進派人魚 Yae，以及機械戰士 Sasuke。這支勇敢小隊必須行遍各村，蒐集情報並購買實用道具，踏上擊敗可怕「桃山幕府」的旅程。

title_en: NADA ASATAROU _ KOJIMA TAKEO NO JISSEN MAHJONG KYOUSHITSU
no_intro_name: Nada Asatarou _ Kojima Takeo no Jissen Mahjong Kyoushitsu (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)
