no_intro_name: Nada Asatarou no Powerful Mahjong - Tsugi no Itte 100 Dai (Japan)

overview_en: Nail 'N Scale is an Action game, developed and published by I'Max, which was released in 1992.
overview_zh: 《Nail 'N Scale》是一款動作遊戲，由 I'Max 開發與發行，1992 年推出。

title_en: NAKAJIMA SATORU - F-1 HERO GB - WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP '91
no_intro_name: Nakajima Satoru - F-1 Hero GB - World Championship '91 (Japan)

title_en: NAKAJIMA SATORU KANSHUU - F-1 HERO GB '92 - THE GRADED DRIVER
no_intro_name: Nakajima Satoru Kanshuu - F-1 Hero GB '92 - The Graded Driver (Japan)

overview_en: Namco Classic is a Sports game, developed by TOSE and published by Namco, which was released in Japan in 1991.
overview_zh: 《Namco Classic》是一款運動遊戲，由 TOSE 開發、Namco 發行，1991 年於日本推出。

overview_en: Namco Gallery Vol. 2 is a Miscellaneous game, developed by TOSE and published by Namco, which was released in Japan in 1996.
overview_zh: 《Namco Gallery Vol. 2》是一款綜合類遊戲，由 TOSE 開發、Namco 發行，1996 年於日本推出。

overview_en: Namco Gallery Vol. 3 is a Miscellaneous game, developed by TOSE and published by Namco, which was released in Japan in 1997.
overview_zh: 《Namco Gallery Vol. 3》是一款綜合類遊戲，由 TOSE 開發、Namco 發行，1997 年於日本推出。

title_en: NANGOKU SHOUNEN PAPUWA-KUN - GANMADAN NO YABOU
no_intro_name: Nangoku Shounen Papuwa-kun - Ganmadan no Yabou (Japan)
overview_en:
Welcome to Papuwa Island, where the wildlife is strange and the locals are even weirder!

This is a solid little Action Puzzle game based on an old comedy manga/anime series that doesn’t seem to be very well known outside of Japan. The title may ring a bell thanks to the Super Famicom game of the same name (with its own fan translation provided by Frank Hughes), which, while both looking and playing completely differently to this game, was actually released on the exact same day!

The aim of this game is to destroy all of the blocks in a level in one punch (after charging the strength of the punch with the A button). The blocks will regenerate after a couple of seconds if you didn’t manage to take them all out at the same time. By pushing and pulling barrels into the correct position - while avoiding enemies - you can force the shockwave from Papuwa’s punch to split off into different directions. By failing to destroy all of the blocks with the first punch, you do actually get the opportunity to collect some items, which can come in handy for boss battles. Those take place on every 5th stage.
overview_zh:
歡迎來到 Papuwa 島，這裡的野生動物奇怪，當地居民更怪！

這是一款扎實的小品動作益智遊戲，改編自一部老牌喜劇漫畫/動畫——這部作品在日本以外似乎不太有名。標題或許讓人想起同名 Super Famicom 遊戲（Frank Hughes 提供了該作的同人翻譯），雖然兩款外觀與玩法完全不同，但其實是同一天發售！

本作目標是用一拳打掉一關內所有方塊（A 鈕蓄力後出拳）。若沒能一次打完，方塊會在數秒後復活。藉由推拉木桶到正確位置——同時躲避敵人——可讓 Papuwa 拳頭的衝擊波分裂朝不同方向擴散。若一拳沒打完所有方塊，反而有機會撿到道具，對 BOSS 戰相當有用。BOSS 戰每 5 關出現一次。

overview_en: A non-stop, action-packed arcade-style thriller based on the heroic missions of the world's most elite, superbly trained commando unit... the U.S. NAVY SEALS. You have a number of perilous missions to complete. Outmaneuver the enemy, destroy hostile missile sites, and rescue the hostages. You begin with the briefing. You may end with a victory... It's the middle ground that hurts!
overview_zh: 一款不停歇、火力全開、街機風格的驚悚動作遊戲，靈感來自世上最精銳、訓練最完備的突擊單位——美國海軍海豹部隊的英勇任務。你有數項危險任務要完成：擺脫敵人、摧毀敵方飛彈陣地、救出人質。從任務簡報開始，可能以勝利收場……但中間過程才是煎熬！

overview_en: NBA All-Star Challenge is a Sports game, developed by Beam Software and published by LJN Ltd., which was released in 1991.
overview_zh: 《NBA All-Star Challenge》是一款運動遊戲，由 Beam Software 開發、LJN Ltd. 發行，1991 年推出。

overview_en: NBA All-Star Challenge 2 is a Sports game, developed by Beam Software and published by Acclaim Japan, which was released in 1992.
overview_zh: 《NBA All-Star Challenge 2》是一款運動遊戲，由 Beam Software 開發、Acclaim Japan 發行，1992 年推出。

overview_en: The popular granddaddy of arcade-style basketball is back. NBA Jam brings the supercharged, "in-your-face" highlights of NBA play to life with over-the-top, thrilling three-on-three basketball. Perform monster dunks and alley-oops and shoot from valuable hotspots to catch "on-fire" and obliterate the competition. You can choose from all 29 current NBA teams, players, and arenas and even outdoor playground courts like Rucker Park and LA's Venice Beach. With no fouls to slow down the game, be as rough and flashy as you can be.
overview_zh: 街機風格籃球的人氣始祖回來了。NBA Jam 以誇張刺激的三對三籃球，把 NBA 賽場上「灌進你臉裡」的精采畫面活靈活現呈現出來。施展怪獸灌籃與空中接力，從關鍵熱區出手命中後就會「上火」，徹底壓制對手。可從現役 29 支 NBA 球隊、球員與球場中挑選，甚至包括 Rucker Park 與洛杉磯 Venice Beach 等戶外街頭球場。沒有犯規拖慢節奏，盡情粗獷與華麗。

overview_en: NBA JAM Tournament Edition brings you more senses-shattering slam dunking excitement than ever! More than twice as many NBA TE superstars, more than double the secret characters, Hot Spots, Super Jam Power-Ups and -OH MY- nine all-new rim-rattling slam dunks plus all the original jams!
overview_zh: 《NBA JAM Tournament Edition》帶來前所未有、震撼感官的灌籃刺激！NBA TE 巨星數量翻倍以上、隱藏角色翻倍以上、Hot Spots、Super Jam 強化道具，以及——天啊——9 種全新震框灌籃，並收錄所有原作灌籃！

overview_en: New for NBA Live '96: New player animations - big blocks, tip-ins, tip-in slams, spin moves, crossover moves, two foot takeoff. New moves - one-on-one, spin dribble and crossover. Two new teams - the Vancouver Grizzlies and Toronto Raptors. Multi-Team Seasons for up to four players. Trade any player, any time. On-the-fly Playcalling, Animating Playbook and Shot Diagram screens for side-line strategies. All-Star game and the Draft for the ultimate NBA season realism.
overview_zh: 《NBA Live '96》全新內容：新球員動作——大火鍋、補籃、補籃灌、轉身、Crossover、雙腳起跳。新動作——一對一、轉身運球、Crossover。兩支新球隊——溫哥華灰熊與多倫多暴龍。可供最多四人遊玩的多隊賽季模式。隨時可交易任何球員。即時叫戰術、戰術簿動畫與射籃示意圖等場邊策略畫面。全明星賽與選秀，提供終極 NBA 賽季真實感。

overview_en: This Gameboy port of Nectaris (AKA Military Madness in North America) was only released in Japan.  It is a a turn-based strategy war game with a Science Fiction theme, set on earth's moon.  The game is played on a hex-grid.  This installment of the franchise includes a map editor which allows players to create game maps and even transfer those maps to another player wirelessly through an infrared modem called the KISS-Link.  Another unique feature of this game is the ability to download maps off of the internet using a PC and transfer them to the cartridge through the KISS-Link.
overview_zh: 本作為 Nectaris（北美名稱 Military Madness）的 Game Boy 移植版，僅在日本發行。這是一款以科幻為題材、設定在地球月球上的回合制策略戰爭遊戲，戰場為六角格地圖。本版收錄地圖編輯器，玩家可自製地圖，並能透過名為 KISS-Link 的紅外線數據機無線傳送給其他玩家。另一獨特功能是可用 PC 從網路下載地圖，再透過 KISS-Link 傳輸到卡帶上。

title_en: NEKKETSU! BEACH VOLLEY DA YO KUNIO-KUN
no_intro_name: Nekketsu! Beach Volley Da yo Kunio-kun (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

title_en: NEKKETSU KOUHA KUNIO-KUN - BANGAI RANTOU HEN
no_intro_name: Nekketsu Kouha Kunio-kun - Bangai Rantou Hen (Japan)
overview_en: After Mihoko's boyfriend Hiroshi is beaten by Munakata Enterprises due to the president's son falling in love with her, Kunio heads to Munakata's HQ to exact revenge.
overview_zh: 美保子的男友 Hiroshi 因 Munakata 企業社長之子愛上她而被毆打。Kunio 前往 Munakata 總部，誓要為他報仇。

title_en: NEKKETSU KOUKOU DODGEBALL-BU - KYOUTEKI! DODGE SOLDIER NO MAKI
no_intro_name: Nekketsu Koukou Dodgeball-bu - Kyouteki! Dodge Soldier no Maki (Japan)

title_en: NEKKETSU KOUKOU SOCCER-BU - WORLD CUP HEN
no_intro_name: Nekketsu Koukou Soccer-bu - World Cup Hen (Japan)
overview_en: Led by Kunio-kun, Nekketsu FC will fight the powerhouse teams of the 12 world countries. Go in to steal the ball with a deadly tackle, and land a deadly shot that explodes in front of the goal. The uniqueness of the Nekketsu series, you can enjoy intense soccer on the go!
overview_zh: 由 Kunio 君率領的熱血 FC 將迎戰世界 12 國強隊。以致命剷球搶下球權，於球門前轟出爆炸性射門。發揮熱血系列獨有的特色，隨時隨地享受激烈足球！

overview_en:
Nemesis is a 1990 Game Boy video game developed by Konami and released by Ultra Games in the USA on April 1, 1990.

Nemesis retains the basic power-up meter commonly used in most Gradius games, but with the addition of multi-level missiles not present in the original Gradius.

The game consists of only five stages, each with a unique core boss. Although it is also possible to access hidden bonus stages in which the player may collect 1UPs and score bonus cells. Like other Game Boy titles developed by Konami, the game presents the player with a stage selection screen before starting.
overview_zh:
《Nemesis》是一款 1990 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Konami 開發，Ultra Games 於 1990 年 4 月 1 日在美國發行。

《Nemesis》保留了大多數 Gradius 遊戲常見的基本強化儀表，但加入了原版 Gradius 沒有的多段式飛彈。

本作僅有五關，每關各有獨特的核心 BOSS。也可進入隱藏的獎勵關，蒐集 1UP 與分數加成。如同其他 Konami 開發的 Game Boy 作品，本作在開始前會顯示關卡選擇畫面。

overview_en: Gradius: The Interstellar Assault, released as Nemesis II: The Return of the Hero in Europe, and Nemesis II in Japan, is the second Game Boy game in the Gradius series. The game was later ported to the Konami GB Collection series of Super Game Boy and Game Boy Color compilations; it can be found in the Japanese Vol. 3 and the European Vol. 4. Like Gradius before it, these versions were renamed Gradius II for the Japanese Vol. 3 and Gradius II: The Return of the Hero for the European Vol. 4.
overview_zh: 《Gradius: The Interstellar Assault》（歐洲版稱為 Nemesis II: The Return of the Hero、日版稱為 Nemesis II）是 Game Boy 上的 Gradius 系列第二作。本作後來被收錄於 Konami GB Collection 系列的 Super Game Boy 與 Game Boy Color 合輯中，可在日版 Vol. 3 與歐版 Vol. 4 中找到。如同前作 Gradius，這些版本在日版 Vol. 3 改名為 Gradius II，歐版 Vol. 4 則改名為 Gradius II: The Return of the Hero。

title_en: NEMESIS II - THE RETURN OF THE HERO
no_intro_name: Nemesis II - The Return of the Hero (Europe)
Nettou Garou Densetsu 2 - Aratanaru Tatakai (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)
overview_en: The three lone wolves return to clash with new opponents in the "Sultan of Slugs" Battle Royale. After a year in training, forging bodies of steel, Andy, Joe, and Terry take on the world.
overview_zh: 三匹孤狼回歸，在「拳壇蘇丹」皇家大戰中迎戰新的對手。經過一年的鍛鍊鋼鐵之軀後，Andy、Joe 與 Terry 將與全世界一較高下。

title_en: NETTOU REAL BOUT GAROU DENSETSU SPECIAL
no_intro_name: Nettou Real Bout Garou Densetsu Special (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)
Nettou Samurai Spirits - Zankurou Musouken (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)
Nettou The King of Fighters '95 (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)
Nettou The King of Fighters '96 (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

publisher:
Hi Tech Expressions NA
Altron JP

overview_en:
Getting your helmet split by a blind sided hit has never been so much fun!
NFL Football puts the pressure on your shoulder pads to carry both the pro-style offense and defense.
When driving for the end zone, you'll call every shot, firing bullets and bombs to your favorite receivers. Or run bootlegs, blasting upfield behind snarling, thick-necked blockers.
Then on defense, chosse every attack formation and position yourself as a tenacious head banger, going the pigskin by blitzing or picking-off lame ducks.
First downs, four quarters, kickoffs, punts, field goals, extra points, stats...everything's here but the bruises. You can even star on your favorite NFL franchise, since al 28 teams are here, ready to replay their rowdy rivalries.
So pull down your face mask, tape your fingers, and grind it out on this Game Boy game breaker.
overview_zh:
頭盔被冷不防一擊撞裂從未這麼有趣！
NFL Football 把職業級進攻與防守的壓力全壓在你的護肩上。
衝向達陣區時，每一球都由你下令，飛彈傳球與長傳炸彈送向你最愛的接球員，或執行 bootleg、跟在咆哮粗頸的擋人後猛攻。
防守時，可選擇任何攻擊陣型，化身為頑強的撞擊手，靠 blitz 或攔截爛傳球阻止對方。
首攻、四節、開球、棄踢、射門、加分、數據……應有盡有，就缺真實的瘀青。你還能在最愛的 NFL 球隊中當主角，全 28 隊到齊，準備重演他們火爆的對決。
所以拉下面罩、纏好手指、在這款 Game Boy 招牌作品中拚到最後吧。

overview_en: NFL Quarterback Club is game developed by Condor and published by LJN Ltd. It was released in November 1993.
overview_zh: 《NFL Quarterback Club》由 Condor 開發、LJN Ltd. 發行，1993 年 11 月推出。

overview_en: The ultimate in football realism! Ultra-smooth cam lets you review the action from any angle and distance. Hyper audibles let you choose over 50 plays - no pausing! Historic simulation mode lets you change history in over 50 game-breaking situations. Break the tackle or be tackled? The power shuck mode puts you in control.
overview_zh: 終極美式足球真實感！極流暢攝影機讓你以任何角度與距離回放動作。Hyper Audibles 讓你在不暫停的情況下從超過 50 種戰術中選擇！歷史模擬模式讓你在超過 50 個關鍵情境中改寫歷史。要掙脫擒抱還是被擒倒？Power Shuck 模式由你掌控。

overview_en: NFL Quarterback Club II is a Sports game, developed by Condor and published by Acclaim Japan, which was released in 1995.
overview_zh: 《NFL Quarterback Club II》是一款運動遊戲，由 Condor 開發、Acclaim Japan 發行，1995 年推出。

overview_en: NHL 96 is a Sports game, developed by Probe Entertainment Limited and published by Black Pearl, which was released in 1996.
overview_zh: 《NHL 96》是一款運動遊戲，由 Probe Entertainment Limited 開發、Black Pearl 發行，1996 年推出。

overview_en: NHL Hockey '95 is a Sports game, developed and published by Malibu, which was released in 1995.
overview_zh: 《NHL Hockey '95》是一款運動遊戲，由 Malibu 開發與發行，1995 年推出。

overview_en: Hold onto your engines and pour on the coal as you hit the track with the greatest name in World Championship racing, Nigel Mansell. You're in control. You've got the machine. But can you handle it? Try rough weather, a mean track and competition that won't quit. Or, go for one-on-one pointers from Mansell and have the track all to yourself while you practice the moves of a master. Then, check in for the big one. And don't forget your crash helmet!
overview_zh: 握緊引擎、踩盡油門，與世界錦標賽最響亮的名字 Nigel Mansell 一同上場。操控權在你手上，車也有了，但你駕馭得了嗎？挑戰惡劣天氣、難纏賽道與毫不退讓的對手。或者來個 Mansell 一對一指導，獨享整條賽道練習大師級走線。然後挑戰最重要的那場大賽。別忘了戴上安全帽！

title_en: NIHON DAIHYOU TEAM - EIKOU NO ELEVEN
no_intro_name: Nihon Daihyou Team - Eikou no Eleven (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

title_en: NIHON DAIHYOU TEAM FRANCE DE GANBARE! - J.LEAGUE SUPPORTER SOCCER
no_intro_name: Nihon Daihyou Team France de Ganbare! - J.League Supporter Soccer (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: Released in 1998 for the Game Boy.
overview_zh: 1998 年於 Game Boy 上發行。

overview_en: Ninja Boy is an Action game, developed and published by Culture Brain, which was released in Japan in 1990
overview_zh: 《Ninja Boy》是一款動作遊戲，由 Culture Brain 開發與發行，1990 年於日本推出。

overview_en: Ninja Boy 2 is an Action game, developed and published by Culture Brain, which was released in Japan in 1991.
overview_zh: 《Ninja Boy 2》是一款動作遊戲，由 Culture Brain 開發與發行，1991 年於日本推出。

overview_en: When a madman threatens to take over the entire world, our beloved hero Ryu must travel the globe to get to New York. Once he gets there, there are hazards and enemies hiding in each and every nook and cranny. If you think the "Big Apple" is dangerous in real life, you'll be amazed at the depths of evil employed by the big-city villains in this escapade. You'll have to hack, slash, and kick your way through the streets and all the way to one of the most dangerous bosses in videogame history. Another installment in the ongoing Ninja Gaiden series, Ninja Gaiden Shadow boasts intense graphics, a great storyline, and smooth gameplay. The world could really use a hero, and if you've got the skills and know-how, you could be it.
overview_zh: 當一名瘋子威脅要征服全世界，我們敬愛的英雄 Ryu 必須踏遍全球，前往紐約。一抵達當地，每個角落都潛藏著危險與敵人。如果你以為現實中的「大蘋果」已經夠險惡，這場冒險中大都會反派的邪惡程度會讓你大開眼界。你必須一路砍殺、踢打穿越街頭，迎戰電玩史上最危險的 BOSS 之一。作為《Ninja Gaiden》系列的另一部作品，《Ninja Gaiden Shadow》具備緊湊的畫面、精彩的劇情與流暢的玩法。世界真的需要英雄，若你具備本領與技巧，那個人可能就是你。

overview_en:
High Adventure in the Far East
It's the era of feudal war in Japan. One Shogun struggles to unite the provinces, but he needs help.
His villainous arch-rival is rumored to be dead, but a merciless legion of anarcy continues to plague the countryside. If he is dead, then who could be leading th evil forces which prevent Japan from attaining peace and order?

This chaos must be stopped!
From the ranks of the Phantom sect to the Shogun's aid comes Ninja Taro. With the cunning of a thief, the skill of a master, and a legendary sword, he must venture forth to tame the minions of evil, and unravel the riddle that will unite the empire!
overview_zh:
遠東大冒險
日本進入封建戰亂時代。一位將軍奮力統一各國，但他需要援助。
他兇惡的宿敵據傳已死，但無情的混亂軍團仍持續荼毒鄉間。如果他真的死了，那是誰在領導阻止日本邁向和平與秩序的邪惡勢力？

這場混亂必須終結！
從幻影宗的行列中，挺身相助將軍的，是忍者太郎。憑著盜賊般的狡黠、宗師般的本領以及一柄傳說之劍，他必須出征馴服邪惡爪牙，揭開將統一帝國的謎題！

no_intro_name: Ninku Dai-2-dan - Ninku Sensou Hen (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en: The eyes of the world are upon you. National pride is at stake. Only seconds left and the crowd rises in anticipation of the greatest upset in soccer history. The horn sounds and you've won it all! The coveted world cup trophy is yours! Pick your team and plan your game strategy. Use advanced super moves like the Bicycle Kick or the Super Header. Choose from 13 teams, representing countries from around the world. Defeat your opponents and you're on your way to the prestigious world cup final. Bring the excitement of international soccer home with Nintendo World Cup!
overview_zh: 全世界的目光都在你身上，國家榮耀懸於一線。比賽只剩數秒，觀眾起立屏息以待，準備見證足球史上最大的逆轉。哨聲響起，你贏了！夢寐以求的世界盃獎盃是你的了！挑選你的隊伍，規劃比賽策略。使用 Bicycle Kick 或 Super Header 等進階特殊招式。從代表世界各國的 13 支隊伍中選擇，擊敗對手，邁向尊貴的世界盃決賽。將國際足球的熱情帶回家，盡情享受 Nintendo World Cup！

title_en: NOBUNAGA NO YABOU - GAME BOY BAN
no_intro_name: Nobunaga no Yabou - Game Boy Ban (Japan)

overview_en: Accept the challenge of Nobunaga and fight for control of 16th Century Japan. As a Daimyo (warlord) you'll have to master many tasks such as developing the town, harvesting crops, and establishing economic policy. You'll have to learn the art of diplomacy to build allies and train your troops well in preparation for war. You'll quickly learn what it takes to manage a country and win support of the people. Determine the destiny of Japan with your own hands and experience the ultimate in strategic simulation gameplay!
overview_zh: 接受信長的挑戰，爭奪 16 世紀日本的天下。身為大名（軍閥），你必須掌握諸多事務，例如發展城下町、收成作物與制定經濟政策。你必須學習外交藝術以結盟，並徹底訓練軍隊備戰。你會很快學到治理一國、贏得民心所需的本事。親手決定日本的命運，體驗終極策略模擬遊戲！

overview_en: Help Noobow get to the end of each level in this candy-filled puzzler from Irem!
overview_zh: 在 Irem 推出的這款滿是糖果的益智遊戲中，幫助 Noobow 抵達每關終點！

overview_en: You're Abe, the chanting Mudokon - the skinny guy in the loincloth with no weapons. And you have to run a death-defying gauntlet of falling rocks, land mines, rolling stones, and other, even more deadly, perils! As if that weren't enough, you're being chased by a legion of flesh-eating, heavily armed enemies. But when the going gets tough, Abe gets odd. So get going already!
overview_zh: 你是 Abe，一個會吟唱的 Mudokon——穿著腰布、沒有武器的瘦小傢伙。你必須闖過落石、地雷、滾石以及更多致命險境的死亡關卡！更糟的是，你還被一群食人、武裝精良的敵人追擊。但情勢越艱困，Abe 就越古怪。所以快走吧！

overview_en: Oni III: Kuro no Hakaishin is a Role-Playing game, developed by Pandora Box and published by Banpresto, which was released in Japan in 1993.
overview_zh: 《鬼忍降魔錄 III - 黒の破壊神》是一款角色扮演遊戲，由 Pandora Box 開發、Banpresto 發行，1993 年於日本推出。

no_intro_name: Oni V - Oni wo Tsugumono (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en:
Operation C is a 1991 Game Boy video game developed by Konami and released by Ultra Games in the USA on February 1, 1991.

YOU'RE UP AGAINST A COLD BLOODED SNAKE OF AN ENEMY!

Red Falcon had devoured a portion of this planet and now the vile Black Viper has come from deep space for seconds. But he hasn't come alone. Viper's transported a battalion of battletron tanks, stealth subs, laser cannons, and annihilating androids. And he's seized a secret naval lab to develop a new breed of supreme alien being. So Scorpion stands alone against biological experiments gone bad like towering tarantulas and venomous vesty flies. His mission: level the lab before Viper transforms Earth into an alien nation.

Although he may be a solo commando, Scorpion has an array of devastating weapons at his disposal like a M-90 Shell Shocker, Fire Phazer, and Homing Blaster. But it will take more than sheer firepower to survive five new lethal levels of naval ports, forests, caverns and a laboratory filled with genetic mutants. You've got a snowball's chance in Haiti of making it!

But, that's the way Scorpion likes it!
overview_zh:
《Operation C》是一款 1991 年的 Game Boy 遊戲，由 Konami 開發，Ultra Games 於 1991 年 2 月 1 日在美國發行。

你要面對的是一條冷血毒蛇般的敵人！

Red Falcon 已經吞噬了這顆星球的一部分，如今邪惡的 Black Viper 從深邃太空再度來犯。但他不是一個人來，Viper 帶來了一整營的 battletron 戰車、匿蹤潛艇、雷射砲與毀滅型機器人，並佔領了一座秘密海軍實驗室，要培育新一代至高無上的外星生物。如今 Scorpion 必須單槍匹馬對抗失控的生物實驗品，例如高聳的塔蘭圖拉與毒液 vesty 蒼蠅。他的任務：在 Viper 把地球變成外星國度之前夷平實驗室。

雖然他是隻身突擊兵，但 Scorpion 擁有 M-90 Shell Shocker、Fire Phazer、Homing Blaster 等毀滅性武器。但要在五個全新的致命關卡——海港、森林、洞窟與滿是基因變異體的實驗室——中存活，光靠火力是不夠的。你能成功的機會微乎其微！

但 Scorpion 就喜歡這樣！
publisher:
Konami JP
Ultra Games NA
Palcom Software EU

overview_en:
The character controls a penguin who must clear 40 levels worth of action. There are a certain amount of lines with switches and dots that need activating.[3] Once all the lines are cleared, so are any enemies that are remaining in that level. A strict time limit make players lose their lives in addition to bumping into an enemy.

There is no regularity to the movement of the character, giving an element of luck to the game. Some aspects of background graphics appear in certain levels (especially on levels 12, 20, 28, and 36).  Level 40 is essentially a giant maze which leads up to a castle that ends the game.

ESRB Rating: Not Rated

Genre(s): Action
overview_zh:
玩家操控一隻企鵝，必須通關 40 個動作關卡。場上有一定數量的線條、開關與圓點需要啟動。一旦所有線條清空，留在該關的敵人也會一併清除。嚴格的時限會讓玩家除了撞到敵人外，也可能因超時而失去生命。

角色的移動沒有規律，為遊戲增添了運氣成分。某些關卡會出現背景圖案（特別是第 12、20、28、36 關）。第 40 關基本上是一座巨大迷宮，通往結束遊戲的城堡。

ESRB 分級：未分級

類別：動作

overview_en:
Othello is a well-known classic board game that has the famous slogan, "A minute to learn, a lifetime to master." This game favors logic and thinking ahead over agility or luck. With either black or white, you have to trap the opponent's pieces to make that piece yours. The cleverest player will get the most pieces once the 64-square board is
filled.
overview_zh: Othello 是一款廣為人知的經典桌遊，名言為「一分鐘上手，一輩子精通」。本作講求邏輯與遠見，而非反應或運氣。執黑或白棋，必須包夾對方棋子使其變成自己的。等 64 格棋盤填滿時，最聰明的玩家擁有的棋子最多。

overview_en: Othello World is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Dice and published by Tsukuda Original, which was released in Japan in 1994.
overview_zh: 《Othello World》是一款綜合類遊戲，由 Dice 開發、Tsukuda Original 發行，1994 年於日本推出。

overview_en: Out of Gas is a racing game, developed by Realtime Associates and published by FCI, Inc., which was released in 1992.
overview_zh: 《Out of Gas》是一款競速遊戲，由 Realtime Associates 開發、FCI, Inc. 發行，1992 年推出。

no_intro_name: Oyatsu Quiz Mogu Mogu Q (Japan) (SGB Enhanced)

overview_en:
Based on Namco's Japanese-only arcade puzzler Cosmo Gang the Puzzle, Pac-Attack is similar to many block-dropping puzzle games from the time, such as Puyo Puyo.

The objective of the game is to place ghosts and then, after three pieces (which can include one or two blocks as well), make Pac-Man eat as many ghosts as possible to try and clear up the game area. Pac-Man's directions are chosen at random between left or right, but as he goes moving on the game area (after you place him, of course), if he bumps against a block or a "wall" on the game area, he will change his direction. As with many block-dropping puzzlers, if a line of blocks and/or ghosts reaches the top, the game ends. However, by filling up a meter on the left of the game area, a fairy may appear that can clear approximately 6 or 7 lines with ghosts, but it only clears the ghosts, although the blocks that were on top of them will drop.

The game also includes a Puzzle mode. It features 100 levels, in which you have to eat all ghosts with no more than 4 Pac-Men at least (the number reduces in certain levels), and, unlike the other modes, you can change Pac-Man's direction with the press of a button.
overview_zh:
本作改編自 Namco 僅在日本推出的大型電玩益智作《Cosmo Gang the Puzzle》，《Pac-Attack》與當時眾多落下式益智遊戲類似，例如《魔法氣泡》。

遊戲目標是放置鬼魂，每三塊（也可包含一兩個方塊）後讓 Pac-Man 盡可能吃掉鬼魂，以清除遊戲區。Pac-Man 的方向會在左右間隨機決定，但他在場上移動時（你放下他之後）若撞上方塊或牆面就會轉向。如同許多落下式益智作，方塊與鬼魂堆到頂端遊戲就結束。不過，把場上左側的儀表填滿後，會出現一位仙女，可清掉約 6 至 7 行的鬼魂，但只清鬼魂，鬼魂上方的方塊會落下。

本作也包含 Puzzle 模式，共 100 關，須以最多 4 個 Pac-Man 吃掉所有鬼魂（某些關卡數量更少），且與其他模式不同，可按鍵切換 Pac-Man 的方向。

overview_en: The evil Ghost Witch has cast a vicious spell on Pac-Man and thrown him back in time to when he was a Pac-Boy. Only you can save him now. Down some Pac-Pellets and get ready to battle your way through a totally supersonic side-scrolling adventure. Journey through snowy mountains and forests, collect fireballs and bubbles, crunch Pac-Bats and ghosts, swim like a fish and swing like a monkey... and ultimately get Pac-Man back to the real world!
overview_zh: 邪惡的 Ghost Witch 對 Pac-Man 下了惡毒的咒語，把他送回他還是 Pac-Boy 的時代。如今只有你能拯救他。吞下幾顆 Pac-Pellet，準備在這場超音速的橫向捲軸冒險中殺出重圍。穿越雪山與森林、蒐集火球與泡泡、咬碎 Pac-Bat 與鬼魂、像魚一樣游泳、像猴子一樣攀盪……最終把 Pac-Man 帶回現實世界！

overview_en: Gobble, gobble, gulp! Who's munching Power Pellets? Who's zipping around the maze at top speed, chomping up ghosts and scoring big points? It's Pac-Man, the world's hungriest character! Devour a fruit treat and get a big bonus score. But if you're caught by the little haunters, you're ghostflakes! Use the warp tunnel for a quick escape. Hours of ghost-chomping action!
overview_zh: 咬咬咬、吞下肚！誰在嗑能量豆？誰在迷宮中飛速穿梭、吃掉鬼魂大撈分數？正是世上最飢餓的角色——Pac-Man！吞下水果獎勵就能拿到豐厚的加分。但被那群小幽靈抓到，你就成了鬼飼料！運用傳送通道快速逃離。數小時的吃鬼動作體驗！

overview_en: PGA European Tour is a Sports game, developed by Unexpected Development and published by Malibu, which was released in 1995.
overview_zh: 《PGA European Tour》是一款運動遊戲，由 Unexpected Development 開發、Malibu 發行，1995 年推出。

overview_en: PGA Tour 96 is a Sports game, developed by Unexpected Development and published by Black Pearl, which was released in 1995.
overview_zh: 《PGA Tour 96》是一款運動遊戲，由 Unexpected Development 開發、Black Pearl 發行，1995 年推出。
